Abstract: Polarimetric imaging captures surface polarization characteristics, such as the Degree of Linear Polarization (DoLP) and the Angle of Polarization (AoP). In mainstream Division of-Focal-Plane (DoFP) color polarization imaging, recovering polarization parameters from captured mosaic arrays remains a challenging inverse problem. Existing DoFP cameras also face hardware bottlenecks and often cannot support high-frame-rate acquisition, limiting polarimetric imaging in dynamic video tasks. These limitations motivate joint spatial and temporal enhancement. To this end, we propose the first space-time polarization video reconstruction architecture. The method jointly models polarization directions in space and time and uses a polarization-aware implicit neural representation for continuous, high-fidelity upsampling. By analyzing temporal variations in polarization parameters, we further introduce a flow-guided polarization variation loss to supervise polarization dynamics. We also establish the first large-scale color DoFP polarization video benchmark to support this research direction. Extensive experiments on this benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.

</details>


### [257] [PaMoSplat: Part-Aware Motion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10307)
*Yinan Deng,Jianyu Dou,Jiahui Wang,Jingyu Zhao,Yi Yang,Yufeng Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PaMoSplat提出了一种结合部分感知和运动先验的动态高斯泼溅框架，通过图聚类将分割掩码提升到3D空间形成高斯部分，利用差分进化算法估计刚性运动，实现高质量渲染和精确跟踪，并支持4D场景编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于3DGS的方法在处理大规模复杂运动的动态场景时，难以同时实现高保真渲染和精确跟踪，亟需一种能有效处理大幅、复杂运动的动态场景重建方法。

Method: 1) 通过图聚类将多视图分割掩码提升到3D空间，建立连贯的高斯部分作为场景变形基元；2) 利用差分进化算法结合多视图光流线索估计各部分的刚性运动，为优化提供稳健的初始值；3) 引入自适应迭代计数、可学习的内部刚性和光流监督渲染损失，加速并优化训练过程。

Result: 在多种场景（包括真实世界环境）的全面评估中，PaMoSplat相比现有方法实现了更优的渲染质量、更高的跟踪精度和更快的收敛速度。

Conclusion: PaMoSplat通过将部分感知和运动先验引入动态高斯泼溅框架，有效解决了复杂动态场景重建的挑战，并在渲染质量、跟踪精度和收敛速度方面均优于现有方法，同时支持4D场景编辑等下游应用。

Abstract: Dynamic scene reconstruction represents a fundamental yet demanding challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent progress in 3DGS-based methods has advanced dynamic scene modeling, obtaining high-fidelity rendering and accurate tracking in scenarios with substantial, intricate motions remains significantly challenging. To address these challenges, we propose PaMoSplat, a novel dynamic Gaussian splatting framework incorporating part awareness and motion priors. Our approach is grounded in two key observations: 1) Parts serve as primitives for scene deformation, and 2) Motion cues from optical flow can effectively guide part motion. Specifically, PaMoSplat initializes by lifting multi-view segmentation masks into 3D space via graph clustering, establishing coherent Gaussian parts. For subsequent timestamps, we leverage a differential evolutionary algorithm to estimate the rigid motion of these parts using multi-view optical flow cues, providing a robust warm-start for further optimization. Additionally, PaMoSplat introduces an adaptive iteration count mechanism, internal learnable rigidity, and flow-supervised rendering loss to accelerate and optimize the training process. Comprehensive evaluations across diverse scenes, including real-world environments, demonstrate that PaMoSplat delivers superior rendering quality, improved tracking precision, and faster convergence compared to existing methods. Furthermore, it enables multiple part-level downstream applications, such as 4D scene editing.

</details>


### [258] [LimeCross: Context-Conditioned Layered Image Editing with Structural Consistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10319)
*Ryugo Morita,Stanislav Frolov,Brian Bernhard Moser,Ko Watanabe,Riku Takahashi,Issey Sukeda,Andreas Dengel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LimeCross 是一个无需训练的上下文条件分层图像编辑框架，通过双流注意力机制实现跨层一致性编辑，并引入 LayerEditBench 基准评估性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分层图像编辑方法要么需要手动协调各层（耗时且难以保持一致性），要么将分层压平为普通图像编辑后再分解（导致背景-前景泄露和不稳定透明度），缺乏可控且一致的分层编辑方案。

Method: 提出 LimeCross 框架，采用双流注意力机制从其他层获取上下文线索以保持跨层一致性，同时显式维护层完整性防止编辑污染，并且无需额外训练。

Result: 在 LayerEditBench（1500个分层场景）上的实验表明，LimeCross 在层纯度（layer purity）和合成真实感（composite realism）上显著优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: 上下文条件分层编辑是一种具有前景的可控生成范式，LimeCross 有效解决了分层图像编辑中的一致性和泄露问题。

Abstract: Layered image assets are widely used in real-world creative workflows, enabling non-destructive iteration and flexible re-composition. Recent advances in layered image generation and decomposition synthesize or recover layered representations, yet controllable editing of layered images remains challenging. Manual editing requires careful coordination across layers to maintain consistent illumination and contact, while AI-based pipelines collapse layers into a flattened image for editing, then decompose them again, introducing background-to-foreground leakage and unstable transparency. To address these limitations, we propose LimeCross, a training-free context-conditioned layered image editing framework that edits user-selected RGBA layers according to text while keeping the remaining layers unchanged. It leverages contextual cues from other layers using a bi-stream attention mechanism to preserve cross-layer consistency, while explicitly maintaining layer integrity to prevent the contamination of edited layers. To evaluate our approach, we introduce LayerEditBench, a benchmark of 1500 layered scenes with paired source/target prompts, along with evaluation protocols that assess both edit fidelity and alpha channel stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LimeCross improves layer purity and composite realism over strong editing baselines, establishing context-conditioned layered editing as a principled framework for controllable generative creation.

</details>


### [259] [The Alpha Blending Hypothesis: Compositing Shortcut in Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10334)
*Andrii Yermakov,Jan Cech,Mario Fritz,Jiri Matas*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Alpha Blending Hypothesis，认为当前最先进的深度伪造检测器本质上是alpha混合搜索器，而非学习语义异常或生成模型指纹。基于此，提出BlenD方法，仅使用真实人脸图像结合自混合图像(SBI)训练，在15个数据集上达到最佳跨数据集泛化性能，集成方案AUROC达94.0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法在跨数据集泛化上表现提升，但其内在工作机制尚不明确。作者希望探究这些检测器究竟学到了什么特征，并据此设计更有效的训练方法。

Method: 1) 提出Alpha Blending Hypothesis，认为检测器主要定位伪造人脸与目标帧融合时产生的低层级合成伪影。2) 通过实验验证检测器对自混合图像(SBI)和非生成式操作高度敏感。3) 提出BlenD方法，仅使用真实人脸数据集，通过大规模SBI增强训练，完全避免使用显式生成的深度伪造样本。

Result: 在2019-2025年间发布的15个组合深度伪造数据集上，BlenD实现了最佳平均跨数据集泛化性能。与对混合捷径鲁棒的模型集成后，AUROC达到94.0%。

Conclusion: 深度伪造检测器的核心能力并非检测生成痕迹，而是检测混合痕迹。显式混合搜索器与鲁棒模型具有互补性，集成可显著提升性能。训练时可完全避免使用深度伪造数据。

Abstract: Recent deepfake detection methods demonstrate improved cross-dataset generalization, yet the underlying mechanisms remain underexplored. We introduce the Alpha Blending Hypothesis, positing that state-of-the-art frame-based detectors primarily function as alpha blending searchers; rather than learning semantic anomalies or specific generative neural fingerprints, they localize low-level compositing artifacts introduced during the integration of manipulated faces into target frames. We experimentally validate the hypothesis, demonstrating that deepfake detectors exhibit high sensitivity to the so-called self-blended images (SBI) and non-generative manipulations. We propose the method BlenD that leverages a large-scale, diverse dataset of real-only facial images augmented with SBI. This approach achieves the best average cross-dataset generalization on 15 compositional deepfake datasets released between 2019 and 2025 without utilizing explicitly generated deepfakes during training. Furthermore, we show that predictions from explicit blending searchers and models resilient to blending shortcuts are highly complementary, yielding a state-of-the-art AUROC of 94.0% in an ensemble configuration. The code with experiments and the trained model will be publicly released.

</details>


### [260] [EvoStreaming: Your Offline Video Model Is a Natively Streaming Assistant](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10343)
*Zichen Wen,Boxue Yang,Junlong Ke,Jiajie Huang,Chenfei Liao,Junxi Wang,Xuyang Liu,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出RealStreamEval评估协议和EvoStreaming自适应框架，仅用1000个自生成样本即可让VideoLLM学会在流媒体视频中适时回应，无需架构修改且保留离线性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VideoLLM面向离线推理，缺乏实时交互策略（何时该说话），而现有流媒体基准将时机决策外部化给评估者，无法真正衡量模型的主动交互能力。

Method: 提出EvoStreaming框架：基础模型自身作为数据生成器、相关性标注器和 rollout 策略，自合成流媒体交互轨迹（无需外部监督），仅用1000条自生成样本进行交互策略微调。

Result: 在五个开源VideoLLM（Qwen2/2.5/3-VL, InternVL-3.5, MiniCPM-V4.5）上，RealStreamEval分数提升最高10.8分，且基本保留离线视频性能；训练数据量仅为领先方法的1/139。

Conclusion: 数据高效的交互策略微调是将现有VideoLLM适配为流媒体助手的实用路径，模型自身具备自我进化交互策略的能力。

Abstract: Streaming video understanding demands more than watching longer videos: assistants must decide when to speak in real time, balancing responsiveness against verbosity. Yet most video-language models (VideoLLMs) are trained for offline inference, and existing streaming benchmarks externalize this timing decision to the evaluator. We address this gap with RealStreamEval, a frame-level multi-turn evaluation protocol that exposes models to sequential observations and penalizes unnecessary responses. Under this protocol, we observed that strong offline VideoLLMs retain useful visual understanding but lack an interaction policy for deciding when to respond. Motivated by this observation, we propose EvoStreaming, a self-evolved streaming adaptation framework in which the base model itself acts as data generator, relevance annotator, and roll-out policy to synthesize streaming trajectories without external supervision. With only $1{,}000$ self-generated samples ($139\times$ less than the leading streaming instruction-tuning approach) and no architectural changes, EvoStreaming consistently improves the overall RealStreamEval score by up to $10.8$ points across five open VideoLLM backbones (Qwen2/2.5/3-VL, InternVL-3.5, MiniCPM-V4.5) while largely preserving offline video performance. These results suggest that data-efficient interaction tuning is a practical path for adapting existing VideoLLMs to streaming assistants.

</details>


### [261] [BGG: Bridging the Geometric Gap between Cross-View images by Vision Foundation Model Adaptation for Geo-Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10345)
*Wei Wang,Dou Quan,Ning Huyan,Shuang Wang,Yi Li,Pei He,Licheng Jiao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出BGG框架，基于视觉基础模型（DINOv3）通过多粒度特征增强适配器（MFEA）和频率感知结构聚合（FASA）模块，以低训练成本实现跨视角地理定位的几何差异桥接，在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨视角图像（如无人机与卫星视角）之间的几何差异严重阻碍了跨视角地理定位（CVGL）的性能，现有方法难以高效捕捉视角不变特征。

Method: 提出BGG框架：1）基于视觉基础模型DINOv3作为骨干；2）多粒度特征增强适配器（MFEA）通过多级膨胀卷积增强尺度适应性和视角鲁棒性；3）频率感知结构聚合（FASA）模块在频域调制patch token并自适应聚合，增强局部结构特征；4）融合增强局部特征与[CLS]token进行精确定位。

Result: 在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上，BGG优于其他方法，达到最先进的定位性能，且训练成本低。

Conclusion: BGG有效利用视觉基础模型的通用表征能力和泛化能力，通过参数高效适配方式桥接跨视角几何差距，为CVGL任务提供了一种低成本高性能的解决方案。

Abstract: Geometric differences between cross-view images, such as drone and satellite views, significantly increase the challenge of Cross-View Geo-Localization (CVGL), which aims to acquire the geolocation of images by image retrieval. To further enhance the CVGL performance, this paper proposes a parameter-efficient adaptation framework for bridging the geometric gap across images based on the vision foundation model (VFM) (e.g., DINOv3), termed BGG. BGG not only effectively leverages the general visual representations of VFM and captures the robust and consistent features from cross-view images, but also utilizes the generalization capabilities of the VFM, significantly improving the CVGL performance. It mainly contains a Multi-granularity Feature Enhancement Adapter (MFEA) and a Frequency-Aware Structural Aggregation (FASA) module. Specifically, MFEA enhances the scale adaptability and viewpoint robustness of features by multi-level dilated convolutions, effectively bridging the cross-view geometric gap with small training costs. Additionally, considering the [CLS] token lacks spatial details for precise image retrieval and localization, the FASA module modulates patch tokens in the frequency domain and performs adaptive aggregation for local structural feature enhancement. Finally, BGG fuses the enhanced local features with the [CLS] token for more accurate CVGL. Extensive experiments on University-1652 and SUES-200 datasets demonstrate that BGG has significant advantages over other methods and achieves state-of-the-art localization performance with low training costs.

</details>


### [262] [Portable Active Learning for Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10349)
*Rashi Sharma,Justin Timothy C. Bersamin,Karthikk Subramanian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PAL是一种与检测器无关的主动学习框架，仅利用推理输出，通过结合类别级不确定性、图像多样性等信息进行样本选择，显著提升目标检测的标注效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目标检测中标注边界框成本高昂，现有主动学习方法依赖模型内部特征或修改检测器结构，集成开销大，且未能充分利用图像级信号、类别不平衡和实例级不确定性。

Method: PAL在每轮中训练轻量级类别逻辑回归分类器区分真/假正例，计算熵值作为不确定性分数；再结合全局图像熵、类别多样性和图像相似度精炼候选批次，实现信息性与多样性兼顾的样本选择。

Result: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K上，PAL相比现有主动学习基线方法，一致提升了标签效率和检测精度。

Conclusion: PAL作为一种无需修改检测器内部结构的即插即用框架，为真实场景下可扩展、低成本的目标检测部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Annotating bounding boxes is costly and limits the scalability of object detection. This challenge is compounded by the need to preserve high accuracy while minimizing manual effort in real-world applications. Prior active learning methods often depend on model features or modify detector internals and training schedules, increasing integration overhead. Moreover, they rarely jointly exploit the benefits of image-level signals, class-imbalance cues, and instance-level uncertainty for comprehensive selection. We present Portable Active Learning (PAL), a detector-agnostic, easily portable framework that operates solely on inference outputs. PAL combines class-wise instance uncertainty with image-level diversity to guide data selection. At each round, PAL trains lightweight class-specific logistic classifiers to distinguish true from false positives, producing entropy-based uncertainty scores for proposals. Candidate images are then refined using global image entropy, class diversity, and image similarity, yielding batches that are both informative and diverse. PAL requires no changes to model internals or training pipelines, ensuring broad compatibility across detectors. Extensive experiments on COCO, PASCAL VOC, and BDD100K demonstrate that PAL consistently improves label efficiency and detection accuracy compared to existing active learning baselines, making it a practical solution for scalable and cost-effective deployment of object detection in real-world settings.

</details>


### [263] [DySurface: Consistent 4D Surface Reconstruction via Bridging Explicit Gaussians and Implicit Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10360)
*Minje Kim,Younghyun Noh,Jaesoon Kim,Tae-Kyun Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DySurface框架，通过将显式3DGS高斯与隐式SDF场桥接，解决动态场景中几何表面重建不连续、存在伪影的问题，在保持高质量渲染的同时显著提升几何精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态场景新视图合成方法（NeRF和3DGS）仅依赖光度优化，导致几何歧义，出现表面不连续、严重伪影和时间上断裂的表面。

Method: 提出VoxGS-DSDF分支，利用变形高斯构建动态稀疏体素网格，为隐式SDF场提供显式几何引导，从而正则化体渲染过程。该方法解决了3DGS前向变形与SDF体渲染所需反向变形之间的结构不一致问题。

Result: 在几何精度指标上显著优于SOTA基线，同时保持具有竞争力的渲染性能。

Conclusion: DySurface通过显式锚定隐式场，有效提升了动态场景的表面重建质量，实现了水密边界和精细表示。

Abstract: While novel view synthesis (NVS) for dynamic scenes has seen significant progress, reconstructing temporally consistent geometric surfaces remains a challenge. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offer powerful dynamic scene rendering capabilities; however, relying solely on photometric optimization often leads to geometric ambiguities. This results in discontinuous surfaces, severe artifacts, and broken surfaces over time. To address these limitations, we present DySurface, a novel framework that bridges the effectiveness of explicit Gaussians with the geometric fidelity of implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) in dynamic scenes. Our approach tackles the structural discrepancy between the forward deformation of 3DGS ($canonical \rightarrow dynamic$) and the backward deformation required for volumetric SDF rendering ($dynamic \rightarrow canonical$). Specifically, we propose the VoxGS-DSDF branch that leverages deformed Gaussians to construct a dynamic sparse voxel grid, providing explicit geometric guidance to the implicit SDF field. This explicit anchoring effectively regularizes the volumetric rendering process, significantly improving surface reconstruction quality, with watertight boundaries and detailed representations. Quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that DySurface significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in geometric accuracy metrics while maintaining competitive rendering performance.

</details>


### [264] [CellDX AI Autopilot: Agent-Guided Training and Deployment of Pathology Classifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10362)
*Alexey Pchelnikov,Aleksei Pchelnikov*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CellDX AI Autopilot 是一个通过自然语言交互训练计算病理学全切片图像分类器的平台，支持从无ML背景的病理学家到ML从业者使用，内置32000+病例、66000+张H&E染色全切片图像数据集，采用多实例学习框架和高效超参数搜索，是首个将病理学专业技能暴露给通用AI代理的系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算病理学模型训练需要昂贵的全切片图像数据集、GPU基础设施、机器学习深度专业知识和大量工程工作，存在专业知识门槛高和工程效率低两大瓶颈，限制了诊断病理学中ML的采用和实验扩展。

Method: 构建结构化代理技能架构，通过自然语言交互引导用户完成数据集整理、自动超参数调优、多策略模型比较和人机协同部署；底层采用多实例学习（MIL）框架支持四种分类策略；提出迭代成对超参数搜索（网格或种子随机），相比穷举搜索降低30倍以上调优成本；设计为通用AI代理（任何基于LLM的代理运行时）可调用的病理学专业平台。

Result: 提供了32000+病例和66000+张H&E染色全切片图像的预构建数据集及预提取特征；超参数搜索成本降低30倍以上；实现了从零ML背景用户到专业ML研究人员均可使用的端到端自动化训练流程。

Conclusion: CellDX AI Autopilot 是首个将病理学专业代理技能和训练平台暴露给通用AI代理的系统，解决了ML专业知识瓶颈和工程瓶颈，在无需代理本身具备领域专业知识的情况下实现了端到端自动化模型训练。

Abstract: Training AI models for computational pathology currently requires access to expensive whole-slide-image datasets, GPU infrastructure, deep expertise in machine learning, and substantial engineering effort. We present CellDX AI Autopilot, a platform that lets users -- from pathologists with no ML background to ML practitioners running many parallel experiments -- train, evaluate, and deploy whole-slide image classifiers through natural language interaction with an AI agent. The platform provides a structured set of agent skills that guide the user through dataset curation, automated hyperparameter tuning, multi-strategy model comparison, and human-in-the-loop deployment, all on a pre-built dataset of over 32,000 cases and 66,000 H&E-stained whole-slide images with pre-extracted features. We describe the agent skill architecture, the underlying Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) training framework supporting four classification strategies, and an iterative pairwise hyperparameter search (grid or seeded random) that reduces tuning cost by over 30x compared to exhaustive search. CellDX AI Autopilot is, to our knowledge, the first system to expose pathology-specialized agent skills and a pathology-specialized training platform to general-purpose AI agents (e.g. any LLM-based agent runtime), delivering end-to-end automated model training without requiring the agent itself to be domain-specific. The platform addresses both the ML-expertise bottleneck that limits adoption in diagnostic pathology and the engineering bottleneck that limits how many experiments a researcher can run cost-effectively.

</details>


### [265] [Halo Separation-guided Underwater Multi-scale Image Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10374)
*Jiaxin Yang,Honglin Liu,Yongli Wang,Shuyi Cao,Chengcheng Jiang,Jiale Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对AUV水下图像受人工光源产生光晕干扰的问题，提出一种基于迭代结构的单张光晕图像校正方法，包含光晕层分离子网络和多尺度恢复子网络，引入径向梯度约束消除光晕，提升水下图像恢复效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法未充分考虑人工光源在图像前景产生光晕的关键问题，处理此类场景的鲁棒性差，严重干扰后续视觉任务。

Method: 设计基于迭代结构的单张光晕校正网络，包含两个子网络：1）光晕层分离子网络（通过梯度最小化分离光晕）；2）多尺度恢复子网络（恢复被光晕掩盖的图像信息）。引入径向梯度约束消除光晕，使用UIEB和EUVP合成数据集训练，真实人工光下水下图像测试。

Result: 在大量真实人工光源水下光晕图像上进行了测试，验证了该方法对光晕去除和图像恢复的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效处理水下人工光源产生的光晕问题，提升图像质量，为后续视觉任务提供更好的输入。

Abstract: Underwater images captured by Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) are inevitably affected by artificial light sources, which often produce halos in the foreground of the camera and seriously interfere with the quality of the image. The existing underwater image enhancement methods fail to fully consider this key problem, and the robustness of processing images under artificial light scenes is poor. In practical applications, since underwater image enhancement itself is a very challenging task, the influence of artificial light sources will lead to serious degradation of image performance and affect subsequent vision tasks. In order to effectively deal with this problem, this paper designs a single halo image correction method based on an iterative structure. The network is mainly divided into two sub-networks, one is the halo layer separation sub-network which aims to separate the halo by gradient minimization, and the other is the multi-scale recovery sub-network which aims to recover the image information masked by halo. The UIEB and EUVP synthetic datasets are used for training to ensure that the network can fully learn the characteristics and laws of underwater halo images. Then a large number of halo images taken in an underwater environment with real artificial light are collected for testing. In addition, the brightness distribution characteristics of underwater halo images are analyzed and the radial gradient is introduced to constraint eliminate halo to improve the effect of underwater image restoration.

</details>


### [266] [SleepWalk: A Three-Tier Benchmark for Stress-Testing Instruction-Guided Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10376)
*Niyati Rawal,Sushant Ravva,Shah Alam Abir,Saksham Jain,Aman Chadha,Vinija Jain,Suranjana Trivedy,Amitava Das*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SleepWalk是一个评估视觉语言模型在3D环境中将语言指令转化为空间连贯、可执行轨迹能力的基准测试。通过对2,472个3D环境中的9个指令进行测试，发现现有前沿VLM在空间推理上存在系统性失败，尤其在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令场景下表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管VLM在多模态感知和语言理解方面取得了快速进展，但它们是否能够可靠地将语言指令转化为3D数字环境中空间连贯且可执行的行动轨迹仍不清楚。现有导航基准多聚焦于跨房间的长距离探索，缺乏对局部、交互为中心的具身推理能力的评估。

Method: 构建了一个从文本场景描述生成并经过可导航性过滤的单场景3D世界基准。任务分为三种空间和时间难度层级，采用标准化的逐点评判评估协议，在2,472个精挑细选的3D环境中对三个前沿VLM进行评估，每个环境包含9条指令。

Result: 前沿VLM在空间推理上存在系统性失败，尤其在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令场景下表现不佳。随着任务难度提升，性能明显下降。当前VLM仅能在一定程度上生成空间连贯、可执行且与意图一致的动作轨迹。

Conclusion: SleepWalk通过暴露VLM在受控但可扩展的3D环境中的失败案例，为推进具身多模态推理、具身规划、视觉语言导航以及3D环境中的行动能力体提供了一个关键基准。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly in multimodal perception and language understanding, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably ground language into spatially coherent, plausibly executable actions in 3D digital environments. We introduce SleepWalk, a benchmark for evaluating instruction-grounded trajectory prediction in single-scene 3D worlds generated from textual scene descriptions and filtered for navigability. Unlike prior navigation benchmarks centered on long-range exploration across rooms, SleepWalk targets localized, interaction-centric embodied reasoning: given rendered visual observations and a natural-language instruction, a model must predict a trajectory that respects scene geometry, avoids collisions, and terminates at an action-compatible location. The benchmark covers diverse indoor and outdoor environments and organizes tasks into three tiers of spatial and temporal difficulty, enabling fine-grained analysis of grounding under increasing compositional complexity. Using a standardized pointwise judge-based evaluation protocol, we evaluate three frontier VLMs on 2,472 curated 3D environments with nine instructions per scene. Results reveal systematic failures in grounded spatial reasoning, especially under occlusion, interaction constraints, and multi-step instructions: performance drops as the difficulty level of the tasks increase. In general, current VLMs can somewhat produce trajectories that are simultaneously spatially coherent, plausibly executable, and aligned with intended actions. By exposing failures in a controlled yet scalable setting, SleepWalk provides a critical benchmark for advancing grounded multimodal reasoning, embodied planning, vision-language navigation, and action-capable agents in 3D environments.

</details>


### [267] [Temporal Sampling Frequency Matters: A Capacity-Aware Study of End-to-End Driving Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10388)
*Yumao Liu,Tao Liu,Xiangyu Li,Jiaxiang Li,Ke Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文质疑端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测中最高时间采样频率最优的假设，发现小模型在较低或中等频率下表现更好，而大模型则受益于最高频率。作者建议将时间采样频率作为可调超参数而非固定为最大值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"更高时间采样频率必然带来更好性能"这一普遍假设，探究采样频率对端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测的影响。

Method: 将时间采样频率作为显式训练集设计变量，通过对高频数据集进行时间降采样构建频率扫描训练集；在固定协议下训练和评估模型，从容量感知角度分析频率响应。

Result: 小模型在较低或中间频率达到最佳3秒ADE，呈现非单调或平台趋势；AutoVLA大模型在所有数据集上于最高频率取得最佳3秒ADE和FDE。

Conclusion: 时间采样频率应作为可报告和可调的超参数，而非固定为最高可用值，因为最佳频率取决于模型容量和数据集特性。

Abstract: End to end (E2E) autonomous driving trajectory prediction is often trained with camera frames sampled at the highest available temporal frequency, assuming that denser sampling improves performance. We question this assumption by treating temporal sampling frequency as an explicit training set design variable. Starting from high frequency E2E driving datasets, we construct frequency sweep training sets by temporally subsampling camera frames along each trajectory. For each model dataset pair, we train and evaluate the same model under a fixed protocol, so the frequency response reflects how prediction performance changes with sampling frequency. We analyze this response from a capacity aware perspective. Sparse sampling may miss driving relevant cues, while dense sampling may add redundant visual content and off manifold noise. For finite capacity models, this can create a driving irrelevant capacity burden. We evaluate three smaller E2E models and a larger VLA style AutoVLA model on Waymo, nuScenes, and PAVE. Results show model and dataset dependent frequency responses. Smaller E2E models often show non monotonic or near plateau trends and achieve their best 3 second ADE at lower or intermediate frequencies. In contrast, AutoVLA achieves its best 3 second ADE and FDE at the highest evaluated frequency on all three datasets. Iteration matched controls suggest that the advantage of lower or intermediate frequencies for smaller models is not explained only by unequal training update counts. These findings show that temporal sampling frequency should be reported and tuned, rather than fixed to the highest available value.

</details>


### [268] [Sens-VisualNews: A Benchmark Dataset for Sensational Image Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10394)
*Andreas Goulas,Damianos Galanopoulos,Evlampios Apostolidis,Vasileios Mezaris*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出“耸动图像检测”任务，旨在识别新闻图像中是否包含震撼、挑逗或情绪化内容，并构建了包含9,576张标注图像的Sens-VisualNews基准数据集，通过实验评估了多种多模态大语言模型在零样本和微调设定下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 耸动性内容会绕过用户的批判性思考，加速虚假信息的传播。现有研究缺乏针对图像层面耸动性检测的系统性工作，因此作者提出该任务并构建基准数据集。

Method: 构建Sens-VisualNews数据集（9,576张新闻图像，标注多种耸动概念/事件），并使用多种开源多模态大语言模型进行零样本和微调实验，评估其提示敏感性、性能和鲁棒性。

Result: 建立了耸动图像检测任务的数据集和评估基准，揭示了多模态大模型在该任务上的表现及提示敏感性等特性。

Conclusion: 该工作为耸动图像检测提供了首个标准化评估框架，有助于后续虚假信息检测和内容审核研究。

Abstract: The detection of sensational content in media items can be a critical filtering mechanism for identifying check-worthy content and flagging potential disinformation, since such content triggers physiological arousal that often bypasses critical evaluation and accelerates viral sharing. In this paper we introduce the task of sensational image detection, which aims to determine whether an image contains shocking, provocative, or emotionally charged features to grab attention and trigger strong emotional responses. To support research on this task, we create a new benchmark dataset (called Sens-VisualNews) that contains 9,576 images from news items, annotated based on the (in-)existence of various sensational concepts and events in their visual content. Finally, using Sens-VisualNews, we study the prompt sensitivity, performance and robustness of a wide range of open SotA Multimodal LLMs, across both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings.

</details>


### [269] [AnomalyClaw: A Universal Visual Anomaly Detection Agent via Tool-Grounded Refutation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10397)
*Xi Jiang,Yinjie Zhao,Zesheng Yang,Feng Zheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AnomalyClaw是一种无需训练的VAD智能体，通过多轮反驳过程将异常判断转化为证据驱动的推理。在12个数据集上相比单步推理提升+3.5~+7.9 pp AUROC，并引入可选的自我进化扩展，无需标签即可达到近似有监督的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VAD模型跨域泛化能力差，而VLMs虽然具备跨域视觉理解能力，但单次推理过于依赖先验知识，缺乏对正常样本参考和细粒度特征证据的利用，导致判断不可靠。

Method: 提出AnomalyClaw框架，将异常判断建模为多轮反驳过程：每轮智能体先提出候选异常，然后利用13种工具（视觉验证、参考解析、冻结专家探针等）将候选与正常样本参照进行反驳验证，逐步逼近可靠结论。可选扩展通过内部分支分歧构建在线规则书实现自我进化。

Result: 在CrossDomainVAD-12基准上，相比单步直接推理，GPT-5.5提升+6.23 pp，Seed2.0-lite提升+7.93 pp，Qwen3.5-VL-27B提升+3.52 pp。自我进化扩展在Qwen3.5-VL-27B上获得+2.09 pp平均增益，接近有监督基线（K=10，+1.99 pp）。

Conclusion: 基于智能体的反驳推理机制能实质性地提升VLMs的异常理解与推理能力，而不仅仅是简单聚合工具输出结果。自我进化扩展无需标签即可获得与有监督方法相当的性能提升。

Abstract: Visual anomaly detection (VAD) is crucial in many real-world fields, such as industrial inspection, medical imaging, infrastructure monitoring, and remote sensing. However, the specific anomaly definitions, data modalities, and annotation standards across different domains make it difficult to transfer single-domain trained VAD models. Vision-language models (VLMs), pre-trained on large-scale cross-domain data, can perform visual perception under task instructions, offering a promising solution for cross-domain VAD. However, single-inference VLM judgments are unreliable, since they rely more on prior knowledge than on normal-sample references or fine-grained feature evidence. We therefore present AnomalyClaw, a training-free VAD agent that turns anomaly judgment into a multi-round refutation process. In each round, the agent proposes candidate anomalies and refutes each against normal-sample references, drawing on a 13-tool library for visual verification, reference parsing, and frozen expert probing. On the CrossDomainVAD-12 benchmark (12 datasets), AnomalyClaw achieves consistent macro-AUROC improvements over single-step direct inference with +6.23 pp on GPT-5.5, +7.93 pp on Seed2.0-lite, and +3.52 pp on Qwen3.5-VL-27B. We further introduce an optional verbalized self-evolution extension. It builds an online rulebook from internal-branch disagreement without oracle labels. On Qwen3.5-VL-27B, it delivers a +2.09 pp mean gain, comparable to a K = 10 oracle-label supervised baseline (+1.99 pp). These results show that agentic refutation improve anomaly understanding and reasoning of VLMs, rather than merely aggregating tool outputs.

</details>


### [270] [Position: Life-Logging Video Streams Make the Privacy-Utility Trade-off Inevitable](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10404)
*Tianyuan Zou,Liang Yue,Yang Liu,Ya-Qin Zhang,Sijie Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文指出，随着始终在线的硬件（如智能眼镜、随身摄像头、家庭安防系统）的普及，生活记录视频流在提升下一代AI系统（如主动智能体和世界模型）实用性的同时，也带来了远超静态图像的严重隐私风险。现有隐私保护方法或攻击特定，或效用损失大，且未考虑整个数据利用管线。作者认为隐私-效用权衡是下一代AI系统的基础性挑战，呼吁研究新的管线感知的隐私保护设计，并指出形式化隐私度量与标准化基准是未来重要方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生活记录视觉感知正变得不可避免，但由此产生的持续视频流在驱动下一代AI系统（主动智能体、世界模型）的同时，会泄露行为模式、情绪状态、社交互动等敏感信息，远超静态图像的隐私风险。现有隐私保护方案（攻击特定或效用损失大）未能解决整个数据利用管线的隐私问题，可能破坏公众信任，阻碍始终在线AI技术的可持续发展。

Method: 本文为观点/立场论文（position paper），并未提出具体方法，而是通过分析问题现状，呼吁提出新的管线感知（pipeline-aware）的隐私保护设计方案，以联合优化长时序生活记录视觉数据的效用与隐私。同时指出需要建立形式化隐私泄漏度量和标准化基准。

Result: 无实验结果。论文以论证和呼吁为主，指出当前研究空白：缺乏管线感知的、联合优化隐私与效用的生活记录视频流保护方案，以及缺乏形式化隐私度量与标准化基准。

Conclusion: 隐私-效用权衡是下一代始终在线AI系统的基础性挑战，需要进一步深入研究。未来方向包括：提出新型管线感知的隐私保护设计以联合优化效用与隐私，以及建立形式化隐私泄漏度量与标准化基准。

Abstract: With the growing prevalence of always-on hardware such as smart glasses, body cameras, and home security systems, life-logging visual sensing is becoming inevitable, forming the backbone of persistent, always-on AI systems. Meanwhile, recent advances in proactive agents and world models signal a fundamental shift from episodic, prompt-driven tools to next-generation AI systems that continuously perceive and react to the physical world. Although life-logging video streams can substantially improve utility of these promising systems, they also introduce significant privacy risks by revealing sensitive information, such as behavioral patterns, emotional states, and social interactions, beyond what isolated images expose. If unresolved, these risks may undermine public trust and hinder the sustainable development of always-on AI technologies. Existing privacy protections are either attack-specific or incur substantial utility loss, and fail to consider the entire data exploitation pipeline. We therefore posit that the privacy-utility trade-off in life-logging video streams is a foundational challenge for next-generation AI systems that demands further investigation. We call for novel pipeline-aware privacy-preserving designs that jointly optimize utility and privacy for long-horizon life-logging visual data. In parallel, formal privacy leakage metrics and standardized benchmarks remain important open directions for future research.

</details>


### [271] [Progressive Photorealistic Simplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10409)
*Adi Rosenthal,Dana Berman,Yedid Hoshen,Ariel Shamir*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种渐进式语义图像简化框架，在保持照片真实感的同时，通过迭代移除和修复场景元素来降低视觉复杂性，并进一步将这一过程蒸馏为图像到视频生成模型，实现高效的简化序列预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像简化技术（如NPR）虽能减少视觉复杂度，但往往牺牲照片真实感。本文希望探索一个互补方向：在保留真实感的前提下简化图像。

Method: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，采用迭代的Select-Remove-Verify流水线：利用视觉语言模型（VLM）识别并排序待移除元素，使用生成式编辑移除元素，再通过学习型验证器确保真实感和连贯性。此外，将这一流程蒸馏为图像到视频生成模型，直接预测简化序列。

Result: 生成了高质量、保持真实感的简化轨迹，支持内容感知去杂乱、语义层分解和交互式编辑等应用。

Conclusion: 通过结构化内容移除进行简化，可作为在照片真实感领域引导视觉解释的实用机制，与传统抽象方法互补。

Abstract: Existing image simplification techniques often rely on Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), transforming photographs into stylized sketches, cartoons, or paintings. While effective at reducing visual complexity, such approaches typically sacrifice photographic realism. In this work, we explore a complementary direction: simplifying images while preserving their photorealistic appearance. We introduce progressive semantic image simplification, a framework that iteratively reduces scene complexity by removing and inpainting elements in a controlled manner. At each step, the resulting image remains a plausible natural photograph. Our method combines semantic understanding with generative editing, leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to identify and prioritize elements for removal, and a learned verifier to ensure photorealism and coherence throughout the process. This is implemented via an iterative Select-Remove-Verify pipeline that produces high-quality simplification trajectories. To improve efficiency, we further distill this process into an image-to-video generation model that directly predicts coherent simplification sequences from a single input image. Beyond generating cleaner and more focused compositions, our approach enables applications such as content-aware decluttering, semantic layer decomposition, and interactive editing. More broadly, our work suggests that simplification through structured content removal can serve as a practical mechanism for guiding visual interpretation within the photorealistic domain, complementing traditional abstraction methods.

</details>


### [272] [CoWorld-VLA: Thinking in a Multi-Expert World Model for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10426)
*Minqing Huang,Yujiao Xiang,Zihan Liang,Jiajie Huang,Jingqi Wang,Zhi Xu,Feiyang Tan,Hangning Zhou,Mu Yang,Gong Che*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CoWorld-VLA提出多专家世界推理框架，将世界表示作为显式条件来引导自动驾驶动作规划，通过语义交互、几何结构、动态演化和自车轨迹四种专家令牌，结合扩散分层融合规划器，在NAVSIM v1基准上取得竞争性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在自动驾驶中缺乏面向规划的中间表示：文本Chain-of-Thought无法保留连续时空结构，而隐式世界推理又难以直接作为动作生成的条件。

Method: 构建四种专家令牌（语义交互、几何结构、动态演化、自车轨迹），通过多源监督提取互补世界信息，编码为VLA中的显式条件信号；采用基于扩散的分层多专家融合规划器，联合场景上下文去噪生成连续自车轨迹。

Result: 在NAVSIM v1基准上，未来场景生成和规划任务均取得竞争性结果，在避障和轨迹精度上表现优异。

Conclusion: 专家令牌具有互补性，且作为规划条件对动作生成有效，验证了世界表示作为显式条件引导动作规划的可行性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing reasoning mechanisms still struggle to provide planning-oriented intermediate representations: textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fails to preserve continuous spatiotemporal structure, while latent world reasoning remains difficult to use as a direct condition for action generation. In this paper, we propose CoWorld-VLA, a multi-expert world reasoning framework for autonomous driving, where world representations serve as explicit conditions to guide action planning. CoWorld-VLA extracts complementary world information through multi-source supervision and encodes it into expert tokens within the VLA, thereby providing planner-accessible conditioning signals. Specifically, we construct four types of tokens: semantic interaction, geometric structure, dynamic evolution, and ego trajectory tokens, which respectively model interaction intent, spatial structure, future temporal dynamics, and behavioral goals. During action generation, CoWorld-VLA employs a diffusion-based hierarchical multi-expert fusion planner, which is coupled with scene context throughout the joint denoising process to generate continuous ego trajectories. Experiments show that CoWorld-VLA achieves competitive results in both future scene generation and planning on the NAVSIM v1 benchmark, demonstrating strong performance in collision avoidance and trajectory accuracy. Ablation studies further validate the complementarity of expert tokens and their effectiveness as planning conditions for action generation. Code will be available at https://github.com/potatochip1211/CoWorld-VLA.

</details>


### [273] [WorldReasonBench: Human-Aligned Stress Testing of Video Generators as Future World-State Predictors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10434)
*Keming Wu,Yijing Cui,Wenhan Xue,Qijie Wang,Xuan Luo,Zhiyuan Feng,Zuhao Yang,Sudong Wang,Sicong Jiang,Haowei Zhu,Zihan Wang,Ping Nie,Wenhu Chen,Bin Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出WorldReasonBench基准，通过世界状态预测重构视频生成评估，包含436个测试用例和22个子类别，揭示当前视频生成器在视觉可信度与世界推理之间存在的持续性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成评估缺乏对模型是否具备世界推理能力（物理、社会、逻辑、信息一致性）的直接测试，作者希望填补这一空白。

Method: 构建WorldReasonBench（436个测试用例，四维度22子类），提出两阶段评估方法：1）过程感知推理验证（结构化QA+推理阶段诊断）2）多维度质量评估（推理质量、时间一致性、视觉美学）。同时构建WorldRewardBench偏好基准（约6K专家标注对）。

Result: 现代视频生成器存在视觉可信度与世界推理之间的显著差距：视频看起来可信，但在动力学、因果关系或信息保存方面存在失败。

Conclusion: 当前视频生成模型尚未真正具备世界模拟能力，需要社区在真实世界感知的视频生成方向上持续研究。

Abstract: Commercial video generation systems such as Seedance2.0 and Veo3.1 have rapidly improved, strengthening the view that video generators may be evolving into "world simulators." Yet the community still lacks a benchmark that directly tests whether a model can reason about how an observed world should evolve over time. We introduce WorldReasonBench, which reframes video generation evaluation as world-state prediction: given an initial state and an action, can a model generate a future video whose state evolution remains physically, socially, logically, and informationally consistent? WorldReasonBench contains 436 curated test cases with structured ground-truth QA annotations spanning four reasoning dimensions and 22 subcategories. We evaluate generated videos with a human-aligned two-part methodology: Process-aware Reasoning Verification uses structured QA and reasoning-phase diagnostics to detect temporal and causal failures, while Multi-dimensional Quality Assessment scores reasoning quality, temporal consistency, and visual aesthetics for ranking and reward modeling. We further introduce WorldRewardBench, a preference benchmark with approximately 6K expert-annotated pairs over 1.4K videos, supporting pair-wise and point-wise reward-model evaluation. Across modern video generators, our results expose a persistent gap between visual plausibility and world reasoning: videos can look convincing while failing dynamics, causality, or information preservation. We will release our benchmarks and evaluation toolkit to support community research on genuinely world-aware video generation at https://github.com/UniX-AI-Lab/WorldReasonBench/.

</details>


### [274] [Filtering Memorization from Parameter-Space in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10439)
*Yu Zhe,Yang Jiayan,Wei Junhao,Yu-Lin Tsai,Wang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)，一种无需训练和数据的后处理方法，通过频谱分解抑制扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化问题，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA在扩散模型微调中可能记忆训练图像，导致生成版权或敏感内容，而现有方法需要访问训练流水线、数据或推理过程，无法应对仅发布LoRA权重的场景。

Method: BAF将LoRA更新分解为频谱通道，并衡量每个通道与预训练主干主子空间的对齐程度，保留强对齐（可泛化）通道，抑制弱对齐（可能记忆化）通道。

Result: 在多个数据集和扩散骨干网络上，BAF持续降低记忆化现象，同时保持甚至提升生成质量。

Conclusion: BAF是一种有效的后处理记忆化缓解框架，不依赖训练数据或推理控制，适用于LoRA共享生态中的隐私保护场景。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely used mechanism for customizing diffusion models, enabling users to inject new visual concepts or styles through lightweight parameter updates. However, LoRAs can memorize training images, causing generated outputs to reproduce copyrighted or sensitive content. This risk is particularly concerning in LoRA-sharing ecosystems, where users distribute trained LoRAs without releasing the underlying training data. Existing approaches for mitigating memorization rely on access to the training pipeline, training data, or control over the inference process, making them difficult to apply when only the released LoRA weights are available. We propose \textbf{Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)}, a training-free and data-free framework for post-hoc memorization mitigation in diffusion LoRAs. BAF decomposes LoRA updates into spectral channels and measures their alignment with the principal subspace of the pretrained backbone. Channels strongly aligned with this subspace are retained as generalizable adaptations, while weakly aligned channels are suppressed as potential carriers of memorized content. Experiments on multiple datasets and diffusion backbones demonstrate that BAF consistently reduces memorization while preserving or even improving generation quality. Our code is available in the supplementary material.

</details>


### [275] [Uni-Synergy: Bridging Understanding and Generation for Personalized Reasoning via Co-operative Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10445)
*Zijun Shen,Sihan Yang,Ruichuan An,Ziyu Guo,Hao Liang,Ming Lu,Renrui Zhang,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Sync-R1框架，通过端到端强化学习（Sync-GRPO + 动态组缩放DGS）统一多模态模型的个性化理解与生成，在UnifyBench++基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一多模态模型（UMMs）在通用任务上表现优异，但缺乏对个性化理解与生成之间协同作用的显式建模；监督微调的隐式token级对齐不足以充分捕捉理解与创作之间的潜在协同。

Method: (1) Sync-R1：端到端强化学习框架，将个性化理解与生成联合优化在同一个显式推理循环中；(2) Sync-GRPO：集成奖励系统的强化学习方法，实现双任务协同；(3) 动态组缩放（DGS）：自适应过滤低潜力轨迹，减少梯度方差并加速收敛；(4) 提出UnifyBench++：包含更密集文本描述和更丰富用户上下文的新基准。

Result: 在UnifyBench++等基准上达到SOTA性能，展现出优越的跨任务推理能力和鲁棒个性化能力，且无需复杂的冷启动流程。

Conclusion: Sync-R1通过显式的推理循环和统一的奖励反馈机制，有效桥接了个性化理解与生成之间的鸿沟，验证了强化学习在多模态个性化任务上的潜力。

Abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) excel in general tasks but struggle to bridge the gap between personalized understanding and generation. Prior works largely rely on implicit token-level alignment via supervised fine-tuning, which fails to fully capture the potential synergy between comprehension and creation. In this work, we propose Sync-R1, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes personalized understanding and generation within a single, explicit reasoning loop. Through this unified feedback process, Sync-R1 enables personalized comprehension to guide content creation, while the resulting generation quality reciprocally refines understanding within an integrated reward landscape. To efficiently orchestrate this dual-task synergy, we introduce Sync-GRPO, a reinforcement learning method utilizing an ensemble reward system. Furthermore, we propose Dynamic Group Scaling (DGS), which adaptively filters low-potential trajectories to reduce gradient variance and accelerate convergence. To better reflect real-world complexity, we introduce UnifyBench++, featuring denser textual descriptions and richer user contexts. Experimental results demonstrate that Sync-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, showcasing superior cross-task reasoning and robust personalization without requiring complex cold-start procedures. The code and the UnifyBench++ dataset will be released at: https://github.com/arctanxarc/UniCTokens.

</details>


### [276] [Automated high-frequency quantification of fish communities and biomass using computer vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10449)
*Kota Ishikawa,Takuma Masui,Keita Koeda,Rickdane Gomez,Lucas Yutaka Kimura,Michio Kondoh*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉和立体摄像系统的自动化框架，用于从水下视频中量化鱼类群落结构，实现了物种级别的丰度和生物量估计，并在20天的连续观测中揭示了鱼类群落的动态变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统鱼类调查方法（如捕捞、水下目视普查和环境DNA宏条形码）存在劳动强度大、缺乏高频定量观测能力等问题，亟需一种连续、非侵入性且可量化的监测方法。

Method: 利用定制立体摄像系统获取水下视频，整合深度学习鱼类识别、多目标跟踪和三维重建技术，自动估算物种级别的丰度和生物量。

Result: 在20天内每小时白天观测中，成功揭示了鱼类物种丰富度、丰度和生物量的动态波动，并与目视普查和环境DNA调查进行了对比验证。

Conclusion: 该方法为长期监测提供了可扩展的基础，提升了对鱼类群落精细时间尺度动态的分辨能力，是对传统方法的有效补充。

Abstract: Quantifying fish community structure is essential for understanding biodiversity and ecosystem responses in a changing environment, yet existing survey methods provide limited high-frequency, quantitative observations. Conventional approaches, including catch-based methods, underwater visual censuses, and environmental DNA metabarcoding, either require intensive labor or lack reliable estimates of abundance and biomass. Here, we develop an automated framework for quantifying fish communities from underwater video using computer vision. Using videos acquired with a custom-made stereo camera system, the framework integrates deep learning-based fish identification, multi-object tracking, and 3D reconstruction to estimate species-level abundance and biomass. We applied the approach to a reef fish community over a 20-day period with hourly daytime observations, revealing dynamic fluctuations in species richness, abundance, and biomass associated with changes in species composition. By comparing fish communities estimated from visual census and environmental DNA surveys, we demonstrate that our method provides complementary strengths for continuous, non-invasive, and quantitative monitoring of consistently observed species. This approach provides a scalable foundation for long-term monitoring and advances the capacity to resolve fine-scale temporal dynamics in fish communities.

</details>


### [277] [Automated Detection of Abnormalities in Zebrafish Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10464)
*Sarath Sivaprasad,Hui-Po Wang,Anna-Lisa Jäckel,Jonas Baumann,Carole Baumann,Jennifer Herrmann,Mario Fritz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个大规模斑马鱼胚胎显微图像数据集，并构建了基于Transformer的时空特征模型，在受精率分类（98%准确率）和毒性评估（92%准确率）两项任务上取得了优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 斑马鱼胚胎是药物发现的重要模型，但当前依赖人工检测，成本高且效率低。机器学习虽具自动化潜力，却缺乏大规模标注数据集，限制了该领域的发展。

Method: 构建了大规模高分辨显微图像序列数据集（含正常和3,4-二氯苯胺暴露条件），配备专家细粒度时序标注；提出首个基于Transformer的时空特征融合模型，用于早期发育异常预测。

Result: 受精率分类任务（130,368张图像）达98%准确率；毒性评估任务（55,296张图像）达92%准确率。

Conclusion: 自动化方法在斑马鱼毒性分析中具有显著潜力，所提出的数据集和基线模型可为后续研究提供有力支撑。

Abstract: Zebrafish embryos are a valuable model for drug discovery due to their optical transparency and genetic similarity to humans. However, current evaluations rely on manual inspection, which is costly and labor-intensive. While machine learning offers automation potential, progress is limited by the lack of comprehensive datasets. To address this, we introduce a large-scale dataset of high-resolution microscopic image sequences capturing zebrafish embryonic development under both control conditions and exposure to compounds (3,4-dichloroaniline). This dataset, with expert annotations at fine-grained temporal levels, supports two benchmarking tasks: (1) fertility classification, assessing zebrafish egg viability (130,368 images), and (2) toxicity assessment, detecting malformations induced by toxic exposure over time (55,296 images). Alongside the dataset, we present the first transformer-based baseline model that integrates spatiotemporal features to predict developmental abnormalities at early stages. Experimental results present the model's effectiveness, achieving 98% accuracy in fertility classification and 92% in toxicity assessment. These findings underscore the potential of automated approaches to enhance zebrafish-based toxicity analysis.

</details>


### [278] [Adaptive Context Matters: Towards Provable Multi-Modality Guidance for Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10470)
*Jinyi Luo,Minghao Liu,Yifan Li,Zejia Fan,Jiaying Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文首次对多模态超分进行理论建模，指出先前方法在模态利用上存在瓶颈，并提出了基于混合专家模型的多模态超分框架(M³ESR)，通过动态模态加权和温度调度机制实现了更好的泛化性能和语义一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超分辨率是严重病态的逆问题，现有语义引导和多模态方法虽利用大模型或外部先验增强语义对齐，但异构模态的融合在实践和理论上仍未被充分理解。作者希望通过理论建模揭示现有方法的局限性，并设计更优的模态融合策略。

Method: 提出多模态混合专家超分框架(M³ESR)，包含：(1) 空间动态模态加权模块，实现灵活的模态权重分配；(2) 时间自适应模态温度调度机制，实现时空联合的模态权重自适应调节，从而优化泛化风险控制。

Result: 大量实验表明M³ESR在泛化性能和语义一致性上均有显著提升，验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过理论分析证明了模态权重与有效贡献的对齐以及降低表示复杂度可以改进泛化风险界，所提动态融合框架有效解决了模态利用次优的问题。

Abstract: Super-resolution (SR) is a severely ill-posed problem with inherent ambiguity, as widely recognized in both empirical and theoretical studies. Although recent semantic-guided and multi-modal SR methods exploit large models or external priors to enhance semantic alignment, the fusion of heterogeneous modalities remains insufficiently understood in practice and theory. In this work, we provide the first theoretical modeling of multi-modal SR, revealing that prior methods are bottlenecked by sub-optimal modality utilization. Our analysis shows that the generalization risk bound can be improved by strengthening the alignment between modality weights and their effective contributions, while reducing representation complexity. This theoretical insight inspires us to propose the novel Multi-Modal Mixture-of-Experts Super-Resolution framework (M$^3$ESR) that employs generalization-oriented dynamic modality fusion for accurate risk control and modality contribution optimization. In detail, we propose a novel spatially dynamic modality weighting module and a temporally adaptive modality temperature scheduling mechanism, enabling flexible and adaptive spatial-temporal modality weighting for effective risk control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our M$^3$ESR significantly boosts generalization and semantic consistency performances, which confirms our superiority.

</details>


### [279] [OpenSGA: Efficient 3D Scene Graph Alignment in the Open World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10484)
*Gang Chen,Sebastián Barbas Laina,Stefan Leutenegger,Javier Alonso-Mora*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出OpenSGA，一个统一的3D场景图对齐框架，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征，并构建了包含70万+样本的大规模数据集ScanNet-SG，在帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描两种对齐任务上均取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有场景图对齐方法主要关注子扫描到子扫描的对齐，严重依赖几何点云特征，而帧到扫描对齐和开放集视觉-语言特征尚未被充分探索；同时现有数据集规模小、物体类别有限，限制了系统的训练和评估。

Method: 提出统一框架，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征与空间上下文，包含距离门控空间注意力编码器、基于最小费用流的分配器和全局场景嵌入生成器，实现大坐标差异下的精确对齐。同时通过自动化标注流程构建了ScanNet-SG大规模数据集。

Result: 在帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描两项任务上均取得最佳整体性能，显著优于现有场景图对齐方法。

Conclusion: 融合多模态特征和空间上下文能有效提升3D场景图对齐精度，大规模多样化数据集对系统训练和评估至关重要。

Abstract: Scene graph alignment establishes object correspondences between two 3D scene graphs constructed from partially overlapping observations. This enables efficient scene understanding and object-level relocalization when a robot revisits a place, as well as global map fusion across multiple agents. Such capabilities are essential for robots that require long-term memory for long-horizon tasks involving interactions with the environment. Existing approaches mainly focus on subscan-to-subscan (S2S) alignment and depend heavily on geometric point-cloud features, leaving frame-to-scan (F2S) alignment and open-set vision-language features underexplored. In addition, existing datasets for scene graph alignment remain small-scale with limited object diversity, constraining systematic training and evaluation. We present a unified and efficient scene graph alignment framework that predicts object correspondences by fusing vision-language, textual, and geometric features with spatial context. The framework comprises modules such as a distance-gated spatial attention encoder, a minimum-cost-flow-based allocator, and a global scene embedding generator to achieve accurate alignment even under large coordinate discrepancies. We further introduce ScanNet-SG, a large-scale dataset generated via an automated annotation pipeline with over 700k samples, covering 509 object categories from ScanNet labels and over 3k categories from GPT-4o-based tagging. Experiments show that our method achieves the best overall performance on both F2S and S2S tasks, substantially outperforming existing scene graph alignment methods. Our code and dataset are released at: https://autonomousrobots.nl/paper_websites/opensga.

</details>


### [280] [M$^2$E-UAV: A Benchmark and Analysis for Onboard Motion-on-Motion Event-Based Tiny UAV Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10496)
*Weiqi Yan,Lixin Chen,Xiangrui Hou,Zhipeng Cai,Youbiao Wang,Yangyang Shi,Yu Zang,Cheng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了M²E-UAV，一个面向运动-运动场景（即观察者与目标同时运动）的无人机小目标检测基准。该基准包含87,223个训练样本和21,395个验证样本，覆盖四种场景。基于此，作者提出点级事件基线模型M²E-Point及其IMU条件变体，验证了点级事件建模的有效性，并发现简单IMU条件化带来的提升有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有事件相机无人机检测研究多假设观察者静止或目标运动模式简单，而实际中观察者与目标同时运动（motion-on-motion）时，自运动（ego-motion）会激活大量背景事件（建筑物、植被、地平线等），使UAV的稀疏事件簇难以被检测。这一重要但未充分探索的问题亟需基准与基线方法。

Method: 提出M²E-Point模型：将事件编码为[x,y,t,p]点集，利用EdgeConv提取局部事件结构，预测事件级UAV前景分数，再通过DBSCAN聚类生成边界框。同时提出IMU条件变体M²E-Point+IMU，引入惯性测量单元信息辅助检测。

Result: 在验证集上，M²E-Point达到0.9673 F1和0.5501 mAP50-95。IMU条件变体达到0.5561 mAP50-95，边际提升较小，表明简单IMU融合在当前设定下收益有限。

Conclusion: 点级事件建模是运动-运动场景下事件相机UAV检测的强基线，简单IMU条件化仅带来边际性能变化。M²E-UAV为这一困难问题提供了首个基准，为后续研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Tiny UAV detection from an onboard event camera is difficult when the observer and target move at the same time. In this motion-on-motion regime, ego-motion activates background edges across buildings, vegetation, and horizon structures, while the UAV may appear as a sparse event cluster. To explore this practical problem, we present M$^2$E-UAV, a benchmark and analysis setup for onboard motion-on-motion event-based tiny UAV detection. The processed M$^2$E-UAV benchmark contains 87,223 training samples and 21,395 validation samples across four scene families: sunny building-forest, sunny farm-village, sunset building-forest, and sunset farm-village. We provide M$^2$E-Point, a point-based event baseline, and M$^2$E-Point + IMU, an IMU-conditioned variant, to analyze the role of inertial cues under onboard motion-on-motion detection. M$^2$E-Point encodes events as $[x,y,t,p]$ point sets, extracts local event structure with EdgeConv, and predicts event-level UAV foreground scores, from which bounding boxes are derived via DBSCAN. Our validation-stage analysis shows that point-based event modeling is a strong baseline, while simple IMU conditioning provides only marginal aggregate gains. Under the train/validation split, M$^2$E-Point achieves 0.9673 F1 and 0.5501 mAP50-95, while the IMU-conditioned variant reaches 0.5561 mAP50-95 with only marginal aggregate changes, serving as an initial baseline for future exploration in this domain. Code will be ready in https://github.com/Wickyan/M2E-UAV.

</details>


### [281] [Simultaneous Long-tailed Recognition and Multi-modal Fusion for Highly Imbalanced Multi-modal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10498)
*Heegeon Yoon,Heeyoung Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向长尾分布的多模态融合框架，通过置信度引导的动态加权机制，有效整合图像与表格等多源异构数据，在类别不平衡场景下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长尾识别方法仅针对单模态输入，无法充分利用多源数据的互补信息，在多模态场景下性能受限。

Method: 扩展多专家架构至多模态设置，利用模态特定网络估计各模态的信息量，通过置信度引导的权重动态调制融合过程，并设计适配不同模态组合（如图像+表格数据）的训练与测试流程。

Result: 在基准和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法不仅有效整合多模态信息，且在长尾类别不平衡场景下优于现有方法，展现鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: 置信度引导的动态多模态融合策略是解决长尾识别问题的有效途径，能够充分挖掘多源数据的互补优势。

Abstract: Long-tailed distributions in class-imbalanced data present a fundamental challenge for deep learning models, which tend to be biased toward majority classes. While recent methods for long-tailed recognition have mitigated this issue, they are largely restricted to single-modal inputs and cannot fully exploit complementary information from diverse data sources. In this work, we introduce a new framework for long-tailed recognition that explicitly handles multi-modal inputs. Our approach extends multi-expert architectures to the multi-modal setting by fusing heterogeneous data into a unified representation while leveraging modality-specific networks to estimate the informativeness of each modality. These confidence-guided weights dynamically modulate the fusion process, ensuring that more informative modalities contribute more strongly to the final decision. To further enhance performance, we design specialized training and test procedures that accommodate diverse modality combinations, including images and tabular data. Extensive experiments on benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach not only effectively integrates multi-modal information but also outperforms existing methods in handling long-tailed, class-imbalanced scenarios, highlighting its robustness and generalization capability.

</details>


### [282] [DuetFair: Coupling Inter- and Intra-Subgroup Robustness for Fair Medical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10521)
*Yiqi Tian,Sangjoon Park,Bo Zeng,Pengfei Jin,Yujin Oh,Quanzheng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DuetFair双轴公平框架及其实现的FairDRO方法，通过分布感知的混合专家模型结合子群体条件DRO损失聚合，解决医学图像分割中群体内隐藏失败问题，在多个基准上提升最差子组和公平性性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平性方法通常只关注提升平均子组性能，隐含地将每个子组视为内部同质，导致子组内高损失样本被均值掩盖，造成群体内隐藏失败问题。

Method: 提出DuetFair双轴公平框架：1）组间自适应轴；2）组内鲁棒轴。基于此实现FairDRO，结合分布感知混合专家模型(dMoE)和子组条件分布鲁棒优化(DRO)损失聚合。

Result: 在Harvard-FairSeg上达到最佳公平性缩放性能；在HAM10000上年龄和种族分组均提升最差子组性能；在3D放疗靶区数据集上，肿瘤分期分组提升最差组Dice 3.5点(6.0%)，机构分组提升4.1点(7.4%)。

Conclusion: FairDRO能有效同时处理组间适应和组内鲁棒性问题，在保证整体性能的同时显著提升最差子组表现，减少隐藏失败。

Abstract: Medical image segmentation models can perform unevenly across subgroups. Most existing fairness methods focus on improving average subgroup performance, implicitly treating each subgroup as internally homogeneous. However, this can hide difficult cases within a subgroup, where high-loss samples are obscured by the subgroup mean. We call this problem \textbf{intra-group hidden failure}. To solve this, we propose \textbf{DuetFair} mechanism, a dual-axis fairness framework that jointly considers inter-subgroup adaptation and intra-subgroup robustness. Based on DuetFair, we introduce \textbf{FairDRO}, which combines distribution-aware mixture-of-experts (dMoE) with subgroup-conditioned distributionally robust optimization (DRO) loss aggregation. This design allows the model to adapt across subgroups while also reducing hidden failures within each subgroup. We evaluate FairDRO on three medical image segmentation benchmarks with varying degrees of within-group heterogeneity. FairDRO achieves the best equity-scaled performance on Harvard-FairSeg and improves worst-case subgroup performance on HAM10000 under both age- and race-based grouping schemes. On the 3D radiotherapy target cohort, FairDRO further improves worst-group Dice by 3.5 points ($\uparrow 6.0\%$) under the tumor-stage grouping and by 4.1 points ($\uparrow 7.4\%$) under the institution grouping over the strongest baseline.

</details>


### [283] [Improving Human Image Animation via Semantic Representation Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10523)
*Chang Liu,Mengting Chen,Yixuan Huang,Haoning Wu,Chen Ju,Shuai Xiao,Jinsong Lan,Yanfeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SemanticREPA方法，通过结构对齐和ID对齐模块，利用语义表示作为监督信号而非条件，改善图像到视频生成中的人体扭曲和面部失真问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像到视频生成方法在长视频或剧烈运动时存在肢体扭曲、面部失真等问题；引入人体语义表示（如密集姿态、ID嵌入）作为额外条件会降低生成灵活性，且RGB像素监督缺乏对3D几何关系和时序一致性的学习。

Method: 1. 训练结构对齐模块，将视频潜在特征中的结构表示与深度估计特征对齐；2. 固定预训练模块，为扩散模型的结构表示提供额外监督，实现结构矫正；3. 开发ID对齐模块，将生成视频的ID表示与面部识别特征对齐；4. 利用预测的结构表示在相关区域优化身份恢复。

Result: 在扩展的人物运动和人物一致性上表现出更优的质量。

Conclusion: 通过将语义表示作为监督信号而非条件进行表示对齐，能有效提升图像到视频生成的结构稳定性和身份一致性。

Abstract: The field of image-to-video generation has made remarkable progress. However, challenges such as human limb twisting and facial distortion persist, especially when generating long videos or modeling intensive motions. Existing human image animation works address these issues by incorporating human-specific semantic representations, e.g., dense poses or ID embeddings, as additional conditions. However, conditioning on these representations could decrease the generation flexibility. Moreover, their reliance on RGB pixel supervision also lacks emphasis on learning necessary 3D geometric relationships and temporal coherence. In contrast, we introduce a novel approach named SemanticREPA that leverages these semantic representations as supervision signals through representation alignment. Specifically, we begin by training a structure alignment module that aligns the structure representations obtained from video latents with video depth estimation features. We then fix the pretrained module, and utilize it to provide additional supervision on the structure representations of the diffusion models, achieving structure rectification to generate coherent and stable human structures. Simultaneously, we develop an ID alignment module to align the ID representations of the generated videos to face recognition features. We further propose to use the predicted structure representations to refine identity restoration in relevant regions. With structure and ID alignment, our method demonstrates superior quality on extended character motions and enhanced character consistency.

</details>


### [284] [GemDepth: Geometry-Embedded Features for 3D-Consistent Video Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10525)
*Yuecheng LiulJunda Cheng,Longliang Liu,Wenjing Liao,Hanrui Cheng,Yuzhou Wang,Xin Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GemDepth 通过显式的几何嵌入（相机运动先验）和交替时空Transformer，解决了视频深度估计中的空间模糊和时序不一致问题，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖Transformer进行时序平滑，但难以在旋转或剧烈视角变化下保持严格的3D几何一致性，导致细粒度区域模糊和时序抖动。

Method: 1) 几何嵌入模块（GEM）：预测帧间相机位姿，生成隐式几何嵌入，注入运动先验；2) 交替时空Transformer（ASTT）：利用几何线索捕获点级对应，同时提升空间精度和时序一致性；3) 数据高效训练策略。

Result: 在多个数据集上，特别是复杂动态场景中，达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 显式建模相机运动与全局3D结构是保证视频深度估计中3D一致性的关键前提，GemDepth有效融合几何先验与Transformer实现了精度与一致性的兼得。

Abstract: Video depth estimation extends monocular prediction into the temporal domain to ensure coherence. However, existing methods often suffer from spatial blurring in fine-detail regions and temporal inconsistencies. We argue that current approaches, which primarily rely on temporal smoothing via Transformers, struggle to maintain strict 3D geometric consistency-particularly under rotations or drastic view changes. To address this, we propose GemDepth, a framework built on the insight that an explicit awareness of camera motion and global 3D structure is a prerequisite for 3D consistency. Distinctively, GemDepth introduces a Geometry-Embedding Module (GEM) that predicts inter-frame camera poses to generate implicit geometric embeddings. This injection of motion priors equips the network with intrinsic 3D perception and alignment capabilities. Guided by these geometric cues, our Alternating Spatio-Temporal Transformer (ASTT) captures latent point-level correspondences to simultaneously enhance spatial precision for sharp details and enforce rigorous temporal consistency. Furthermore, GemDepth employs a data-efficient training strategy, effectively bridging the gap between high efficiency and robust geometric consistency. As shown in Fig.2, comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that GemDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets, particularly in complex dynamic scenarios. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Yuecheng919/GemDepth

</details>


### [285] [TIE: Time Interval Encoding for Video Generation over Events](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10543)
*Zhilei Shu,Shangwen Zhu,Zihang Liang,Xiaofan Li,Qianyu Peng,Xinyu Cui,Bo Ye,Yiming Li,Fan Cheng,Jian Zhao,Yang Cao,Zheng-Jun Zha,Ruili Feng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出时间区间编码（TIE），将时间区间作为DiT交叉注意力的一等公民，通过sinc闭式解统一表征重叠事件，在OmniEvents上约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，边界误差从0.261s降至0.073s。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成器（如DiT）将时间表示为离散点，无法数学表示重叠事件的连续区间，而68%的通用视频和99%以上的机器人/游戏视频包含重叠事件。

Method: 基于RoPE兼容的双线性注意力，提出时间区间编码（TIE），遵循时间可积性（聚合区间内所有位置证据）和持续时间不变性（消除对长区间的偏置），在均匀核下导出sinc闭式解。

Result: 在OmniEvents数据集上，时间约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，时间边界误差从0.261s降至0.073s，轨迹级时间对齐指标也有提升，且不损视觉质量。

Conclusion: TIE是一种即插即用的区间感知旋转位置编码，使DiT能够原生处理重叠时间区间，显著提升时间可控性，代码已开源。

Abstract: Director-style prompting, robotic action prediction, and interactive video agents demand temporal grounding over concurrent events -- a regime in which 68% of general clips and over 99% of robotics/gameplay clips contain overlapping events, yet existing multi-event generators rest on a single-active-prompt assumption. However, modern video generators, such as Diffusion Transformers (DiT), represent time as discrete points through point-wise positional encodings. This formulation creates a fundamental dimension mismatch: temporally extended intervals and overlapping events are mathematically unrepresentable to the attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose Time Interval Encoding (TIE), a principled, plug-and-play interval-aware generalization of rotary embeddings that elevates time intervals to first-class primitives inside DiT cross-attention. Rather than introducing another heuristic interval embedding, we show that, within RoPE-compatible bilinear attention, TIE is characterized by two basic principles: Temporal Integrability, which requires an event to aggregate positional evidence over its full duration, and Duration Invariance, which removes the trivial bias toward longer intervals. Under a uniform kernel, this characterization yields an efficient closed-form sinc-based solution that preserves the standard attention interface and naturally attenuates boundary noise through interval integration. Empirically, TIE preserves the visual quality of the base DiT model while substantially improving temporal controllability. In our experiments on the OmniEvents dataset, it improves human-verified Temporal Constraint Satisfaction Rate from 77.34% to 96.03% and reduces temporal boundary error from 0.261s to 0.073s, while also improving trajectory-level temporal alignment metrics. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/MatrixTeam-AI/TIE.

</details>


### [286] [EnergyLens: Interpretable Closed-Form Energy Models for Multimodal LLM Inference Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10556)
*Vittorio Palladino,Gianluca Palermo,Michael E. Papka,Zhiling Lan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出EnergyLens，一种基于符号回归的闭式能量模型，仅需50个profiling样本即可准确预测LLM推理能耗，在配置选择准确率上达88.2%，远超现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将延迟作为能耗代理或使用数据密集的黑盒代理，在并行策略变化时延迟与能耗最优解存在分歧（>20%配置），且黑盒代理需大量样本才能泛化。

Method: 使用符号回归从profiling数据中发现结构，推导出仅含12个参数的闭式能量模型，解耦张量并行和流水线并行贡献，分离prefill和解码阶段能耗。

Result: 88.2% Top-1配置选择准确率（对比最接近基线60.9%），与集成ML方法相当但只需1/10的profiling样本，可外推到未见过的批量大小和硬件平台。

Conclusion: EnergyLens是一种实用、可解释的LLM推理能耗优化工具，在效率、准确性和泛化能力上均优于现有方法。

Abstract: As large language models span dense, mixture-of-experts, and state-space architectures and are deployed on heterogeneous accelerators under increasingly diverse multimodal workloads, optimising inference energy has become as critical as optimizing latency and throughput. Existing approaches either treat latency as an energy proxy or rely on data-hungry black-box surrogates. Both fail under varying parallelism strategies: latency and energy optima diverge in over 20% of configurations we tested, and black-box surrogates require hundreds of profiling samples to generalize across model families and hardware. We present EnergyLens, which uses symbolic regression as a structure-discovery tool over profiling data to derive a single twelve-parameter closed-form energy model expressed in terms of system properties such as degree of parallelism, batch size, and sequence length. Unlike black-box surrogates, EnergyLens decouples tensor and pipeline parallelism contributions and separates prefill from decode energy, making its predictions physically interpretable and actionable. Fitted from as few as 50 profiling measurements, EnergyLens achieves 88.2% Top-1 configuration selection accuracy across many evaluation scenarios compared to 60.9% for the closest prior analytical baseline, matches the predictive accuracy of ensemble ML methods with 10x fewer profiling samples, and extrapolates reliably to unseen batch sizes and hardware platforms without structural modification, making it a practical, interpretable tool for energy-optimal LLM deployment.

</details>


### [287] [DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10564)
*Lingjun Zhang,Changjie Wu,Linzhe Shi,Jiangyang Li,Jiaxin Liu,Lei Yang,Hang Zhang,Mu Xu,Hong Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一个端到端自动驾驶系统，通过BEV空间中的未来帧潜语义特征并行预测构建驾驶世界模型，并结合社交知识和推理能力的自适应文本推理机制，在Bench2drive基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM自动驾驶方法直接将通用领域的推理机制迁移到驾驶场景，缺乏针对自动驾驶（尤其是视觉推理模块）的深度探索，难以应对长尾场景。

Method: 1) 在BEV空间中对连续未来帧的潜语义特征进行并行预测，构建驾驶世界模型实现长时序世界状态建模；2) 引入高效自适应文本推理机制，利用额外社交知识和推理能力提升长尾场景表现。

Result: 在闭环Bench2drive基准上达到当前最优（SOTA）结果。

Conclusion: 通过世界模型并行预测+社交知识文本推理的双重设计，有效提升了自动驾驶在挑战性场景下的决策性能。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are increasingly integrating Vision-Language Model (VLM) architectures, incorporating text reasoning or visual reasoning to enhance the robustness and accuracy of driving decisions. However, the reasoning mechanisms employed in most methods are direct adaptations from general domains, lacking in-depth exploration tailored to autonomous driving scenarios, particularly within visual reasoning modules. In this paper, we propose a driving world model that performs parallel prediction of latent semantic features for consecutive future frames in the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space, thereby enabling long-horizon modeling of future world states. We also introduce an efficient and adaptive text reasoning mechanism that utilizes additional social knowledge and reasoning capabilities to further improve driving performance in challenging long-tail scenarios. We present a novel, efficient, and effective approach that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on the closed-loop Bench2drive benchmark. Codes are available at: https://github.com/hotdogcheesewhite/DeepSight.

</details>


### [288] [VeloGauss: Learning Physically Consistent Gaussian Velocity Fields from Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10567)
*Nengbo Lu,Bin Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VeloGauss通过为每个高斯粒子引入物理编码和粒子动力学系统，在无需任何物理先验的情况下，从动态多视角视频中联合学习3D场景的几何、外观和物理信息，在新视角插值和未来帧外推任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅将物理损失作为软约束或集成物理仿真到神经网络中，无法有效学习复杂运动物理，尤其缺乏对刚性与非刚性粒子间交互机制的正确建模。

Method: 提出VeloGauss，为每个高斯粒子学习速度场，引入物理编码（Physics Code）和粒子动力学系统（Particle Dynamics System），并通过全局物理约束（Global Physical Constraints）保证场景的物理一致性。

Result: 在四个公开数据集上，VeloGauss在新视角插值和未来帧外推两项任务中均达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: 证明了无需物理先验，仅通过为粒子建模速度场并施加物理约束，即可有效学习复杂动态3D场景的物理属性。

Abstract: In this paper, we aim to jointly model the geometry, appearance, and physical information of 3D scenes solely from dynamic multi-view videos, without relying on any physical priors. Existing works typically employ physical losses merely as soft constraints or integrate physical simulations into neural networks; however, these approaches often fail to effectively learn complex motion physics. Although modeling velocity fields holds the potential to capture authentic physical information, due to the lack of appropriate physical constraints, current methods are unable to correctly learn the interaction mechanisms between rigid and non-rigid particles. To address this, we propose VeloGauss, designed to learn the physical properties of complex dynamic 3D scenes without physical priors. Our method learns the velocity field for each Gaussian particle by introducing a Physics Code and a Particle Dynamics System, and ultimately incorporates Global Physical Constraints to ensure the physical consistency of the scene. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms achieves state-of-the-art performance in both Novel View Interpolation and Future Frame Extrapolation tasks.

</details>


### [289] [SenseBench: A Benchmark for Remote Sensing Low-Level Visual Perception and Description in Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10576)
*Chen Zhong,Xiao An,Jiaxing Sun,Zihan Gui,Guangyi Yang,Wei He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SenseBench是首个面向遥感图像低级视觉感知与描述的诊断基准，包含超过1万实例、6大类22细粒度退化类别，通过客观感知与主观描述双协议评估29个VLM，揭示了领域先验偏差、多失真混淆、流畅性幻觉及感知-描述反转现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遥感图像质量评估方法输出不可解释的标量分数，偏离专家诊断需求；VLM虽可提供语言化评估，但其视觉先验严重偏向地面自然图像，能否克服领域鸿沟感知并描述遥感伪影尚未充分研究。

Method: 构建基于物理分层分类法的SenseBench基准，涵盖无参考与全参考范式；设计客观低级视觉感知与主观诊断描述两个互补协议；在29个SOTA VLM上进行全面评估。

Result: 发现VLM存在领域先验偏差、多失真混淆、流畅性幻觉（fluency illusion）以及感知-描述反转效应（perception-description inversion）。

Conclusion: SenseBench为遥感低级感知提供了鲁棒的评估平台与高质量诊断数据，有望推动VLM在该领域的发展。

Abstract: Low-level visual perception underpins reliable remote sensing (RS) image analysis, yet current image quality assessment (IQA) methods output uninterpretable scalar scores rather than characterizing physics-driven RS degradations, deviating markedly from the diagnostic needs of RS experts. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) present a compelling alternative by delivering language-grounded IQA, their visual priors are heavily biased toward ground-level natural images. Consequently, whether VLMs can overcome this domain gap to perceive and articulate RS artifacts remains insufficiently studied. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{SenseBench}, the first dedicated diagnostic benchmark for RS low-level visual perception and description. Driven by a physics-based hierarchical taxonomy that unifies both non-reference and reference-based paradigms, SenseBench features over 10K meticulously curated instances across 6 major and 22 fine-grained RS degradation categories. Specifically, two complementary protocols are designed for evaluation: objective low-level visual \textit{perception} and subjective diagnostic \textit{description}. Comprehensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art VLMs reveals not only skewed domain priors and multi-distortion collapse, but also \textit{fluency illusion} and a \textit{perception-description inversion} effect. We hope SenseBench provides a robust evaluation testbed and high-quality diagnostic data to advance the development of VLMs in RS low-level perception. Code and datasets are available \href{https://github.com/Zhong-Chenchen/SenseBench}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

</details>


### [290] [Polygon-mamba: Retinal vessel segmentation using polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10581)
*Yuanyuan Peng,Wen Li,Xiong Li,Juan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合CNN-Mamba融合网络，结合多边形扫描Mamba和空频协同注意力机制，用于视网膜小血管分割。在DRIVE、STARE和CHASE_DB1三个数据集上取得了优异性能（F1分数约0.83，AUC约0.98）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视网膜小血管分割一直是挑战性任务，传统Mamba的水平和垂直扫描会破坏小血管拓扑完整性，导致局部不连续和信息丢失。

Method: 1) 提出多边形扫描视觉状态空间模型(PS-VSS)，通过多层反向扫描方式保留像素连通性；2) 设计空频协同注意力机制(SFCAM)集成在跳跃连接中，融合空间域的位姿结构信息和频率域的全局感知与局部细节。

Result: 在DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1上，F1分别为0.8283/0.8282/0.8251，AUC为0.9806/0.9840/0.9866，SE为0.8268/0.8314/0.8484。

Conclusion: 通过视觉检查和定量分析验证了模型的有效性，所提方法能精准分割视网膜小血管。

Abstract: Retinal vessel segmentation is crucial for diagnosis and assessment of ocular diseases. Notably, segmentation of small retinal vessels has been consistently recognized as a challenging and complex task. To tackle this challenge, we design a hybrid CNN-Mamba fusion network that integrates polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism for the detection of small vessels. Considering that the traditional mamba architecture with horizontal-vertical scanning may compromise the topological integrity of target structures and result in local discontinuities in small retinal vessels, we present a polygon scanning visual state space model (PS-VSS) to identify small vessel structural features by multi-layer reverse scanning way. Which effectively preserves pixels connectivity, thereby substantially mitigating the loss of information pertaining to small vessels. Furthermore, as we all known that the spatial domain prioritizes positional and structural information, while the frequency domain emphasizes global perception and local detail components, a space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism (SFCAM) is introduced within the skip connection to extract efficient features from the spatial and frequency domains. This strategy empowers the model to dynamically enhance the key features while effectively suppressing clutters. To assess the efficacy of our model, it was tested on three publicly available datasets: DRIVE, STARE, and CHASE_DB1. Compared to manual annotations, our model demonstrated F1 scores of 0.8283, 0.8282, and 0.8251, Area Under Curve (AUC) values of 0.9806, 0.9840, and 0.9866, and Sensitivity (SE) values of of 0.8268, 0.8314, and 0.8484 across three datasets, respectively. The effectiveness of our model was validated through both visual inspection and quantitative analysis.

</details>


### [291] [FrequencyCT: Frequency domain pseudo-label generation for self-supervised low-dose CT denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10583)
*Guoquan Wei,Liu Shi,Chong Chen,Qiegen Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FrequencyCT是首个在频域中利用零样本自监督方法进行低剂量CT去噪的技术，通过低频锚定、相位保持幅度调制和高频掩膜扰动生成伪标签数据，有效去噪并稳定优化梯度，在多项数据集上验证了临床潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CT去噪研究很少利用投影域数据特性来减轻噪声相关性，因此需要一种能够充分利用频域特性进行去噪的新方法。

Method: 提出FrequencyCT：1）利用频域低中频区域将噪声与干净信号分离；2）采用区域低频锚定技术；3）相位保持幅度调制与高频区域掩膜扰动生成伪标签数据；4）在投影域对生成样本进行截断以稳定优化梯度。

Result: 在多个公开和真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性，展示了临床应用潜力。

Conclusion: FrequencyCT作为首个频域零样本自监督去噪方法，将对CT去噪领域产生革命性影响，代码已开源。

Abstract: Despite extensive research on computed tomography (CT) denoising, few studies exploit projection-domain data characteristics to mitigate noise correlation. To address this, this work proposes FrequencyCT, the first zero-shot self-supervised method for pseudo-label generation in the frequency domain for low-dose CT denoising. Leveraging the characteristic of the frequency domain that largely isolates noise from clean signals, a regional low-frequency anchoring technique is proposed. Phase-preserving amplitude modulation and mask perturbation in the high-frequency region generate pseudo-label data for self-supervision. The fluctuating noise variance in the projection domain prompts truncation of the generated samples to stabilize the network's optimization gradient. Evaluation results on multiple public and real-world datasets confirm the clinical application potential of this research, which will have a revolutionary impact on the field of denoising. The code can be obtained from https://github.com/yqx7150/FrequencyCT.

</details>


### [292] [CausalGS: Learning Physical Causality of 3D Dynamic Scenes with Gaussian Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10586)
*Nengbo Lu,Minghua Pan*

Main category: cs.CV
