To deliver the goal, we only need to train the model to converge on a small-scale task set using two distinct training strategies, resulting in two finetuned models. The parameters' difference between the two models can then be interpreted as capability vectors provided by auxiliary objectives. These vectors are then merged with pretrained parameters to form a capability-enhanced meta model. Moreover, when standard SFT is augmented with a lightweight orthogonal regularization loss, the merged model attains performance comparable to auxiliary finetuned baselines with reduced computational overhead. Internal and external experiments demonstrate that our capability vectors (1) are effective and versatile across diverse models, (2) can generalize to novel environments and embodiments out of the box.

</details>


### [328] [Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10916)
*Md. Sultan Al Rayhan,Maheen Islam*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于置信度引导的扩散增强框架，用于低分辨率孟加拉复合字符识别。该框架结合类别条件扩散模型与分类器引导，生成高质量手写样本，并通过Squeeze-and-Excitation增强残差块改进生成质量。置信度过滤机制确保仅保留高类别一致性的合成样本，最终在AIBangla数据集上，使用ResNet50等多种架构取得了89.2%的分类准确率，显著优于此前基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉复合字符识别因结构复杂、类内差异大、高质量标注数据稀缺而极具挑战，现有系统难以泛化至多样化书写风格，特别是在包含复杂连字和变音符号的复合字符上表现不佳。

Method: 1) 构建类别条件扩散模型，结合分类器引导生成手写样本；2) 在U-Net骨干中引入Squeeze-and-Excitation增强残差块提升生成质量；3) 设计置信度过滤机制，由预训练分类器筛选高类别一致性样本；4) 将过滤后的合成样本与原始训练数据融合，重新训练多种分类架构（ResNet50、DenseNet121、VGG16、Vision Transformer）。

Result: 在AIBangla复合字符数据集上，所有架构均取得一致性提升，最佳模型达到89.2%分类准确率，大幅超越此前公布的AIBangla基准。

Conclusion: 质量感知的扩散增强方法能够有效提升低资源文字领域的手写字符识别性能。

Abstract: Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across diverse writing styles, particularly for compound characters containing intricate ligatures and diacritical variations. In this work, we propose a confidence-guided diffusion augmentation framework for low-resolution Bangla compound character recognition. Our framework combines class-conditional diffusion modeling with classifier guidance to synthesize high-quality handwritten compound character samples. To further improve generation quality, we introduce Squeeze-and-Excitation enhanced residual blocks within the diffusion model's U-Net backbone. We additionally propose a confidence-based filtering mechanism where pre-trained classifiers act as quality gates to retain only highly class-consistent synthetic samples. The filtered synthetic images are fused with the original training data and used to retrain multiple classification architectures. Experiments conducted on the AIBangla compound character dataset demonstrate consistent performance improvements across ResNet50, DenseNet121, VGG16, and Vision Transformer architectures. Our best-performing model achieves 89.2\% classification accuracy, surpassing the previously published AIBangla benchmark by a substantial margin. The results demonstrate that quality-aware diffusion augmentation can effectively enhance handwritten character recognition performance in low-resource script domains.

</details>


### [329] [Pixal3D: Pixel-Aligned 3D Generation from Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10922)
*Dong-Yang Li,Wang Zhao,Yuxin Chen,Wenbo Hu,Meng-Hao Guo,Fang-Lue Zhang,Ying Shan,Shi-Min Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Pixal3D提出了一种像素对齐的3D生成范式，通过像素反投影条件化机制建立直接的像素到3D对应关系，大幅提升了图像到3D生成任务的保真度，可扩展至多视角生成和场景合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D生成模型虽然质量有所提升，但在像素级保真度上仍是瓶颈，根本原因在于隐式的2D-3D对应问题——大多数3D原生生成器在规范空间生成形状，通过注意力机制注入图像线索，导致像素到3D的对应关系不明确。

Method: 提出像素对齐的3D生成范式Pixal3D：1) 直接在输入视角对齐的空间中生成3D，而非规范姿态；2) 引入像素反投影条件化机制，将多尺度图像特征显式提升到3D特征体，建立明确的像素到3D对应关系；3) 通过跨视角聚合反投影特征体自然扩展到多视角生成。

Result: Pixal3D不仅可扩展且能生成高质量3D资产，还大幅提升了保真度，接近重建方法的保真度水平。首次在大规模上展示了3D原生像素对齐生成。

Conclusion: Pixal3D为从单/多视角图像生成高保真3D物体或场景提供了新方向，证明了像素对齐生成对保真度的关键作用，场景合成实验也展示了这一范式的广泛适用性。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D generative models have rapidly improved image-to-3D synthesis quality, enabling higher-resolution geometry and more realistic appearance. Yet fidelity, which measures pixel-level faithfulness of the generated 3D asset to the input image, still remains a central bottleneck. We argue this stems from an implicit 2D-3D correspondence issue: most 3D-native generators synthesize shape in canonical space and inject image cues via attention, leaving pixel-to-3D associations ambiguous. To tackle this issue, we draw inspiration from 3D reconstruction and propose Pixal3D, a pixel-aligned 3D generation paradigm for high-fidelity 3D asset creation from images. Instead of generating in a canonical pose, Pixal3D directly generates 3D in a pixel-aligned way, consistent with the input view. To enable this, we introduce a pixel back-projection conditioning scheme that explicitly lifts multi-scale image features into a 3D feature volume, establishing direct pixel-to-3D correspondence without ambiguity. We show that Pixal3D is not only scalable and capable of producing high-quality 3D assets, but also substantially improves fidelity, approaching the fidelity level of reconstruction. Furthermore, Pixal3D naturally extends to multi-view generation by aggregating back-projected feature volumes across views. Finally, we show pixel-aligned generation benefits scene synthesis, and present a modular pipeline that produces high-fidelity, object-separated 3D scenes from images. Pixal3D for the first time demonstrates 3D-native pixel-aligned generation at scale, and provides a new inspiring way towards high-fidelity 3D generation of object or scene from single or multi-view images. Project page: https://ldyang694.github.io/projects/pixal3d/

</details>


### [330] [Personal Visual Context Learning in Large Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10936)
*Zihui Xue,Ami Baid,Sangho Kim,Mi Luo,Kristen Grauman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出并形式化了可穿戴设备中多模态大模型的"个人视觉上下文学习"能力，构建了Personal-VCL-Bench基准，发现现有模型存在严重的上下文利用差距，并提出Agentic Context Bank作为推理时基线方法，显著提升了个性化查询的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可穿戴设备（如智能眼镜）将大模型融入用户的连续第一人称视觉流，模型要成为真正的个人助理，必须能够推理用户特有的视觉信息。然而当前模型在利用个人视觉上下文方面存在严重不足，相关机制缺乏研究。

Method: 1. 形式化定义Personal VCL任务；2. 构建Personal-VCL-Bench基准，涵盖人物、物体、行为三类个性化视觉上下文；3. 分析前沿LMMs的上下文利用能力；4. 提出Agentic Context Bank——将用户视觉上下文构建为自优化记忆库，并采用查询自适应证据选择。

Result: 前沿LMMs存在显著的上下文利用差距，尤其是在聚合多个视觉观察方面表现不足。提出的Agentic Context Bank方法在各类任务和骨干网络上持续优于标准上下文提示方法。

Conclusion: 个人视觉上下文学习是LMMs演变为真正个人助理的关键能力，当前模型在这一能力上存在明显短板。Agentic Context Bank提供了一条实用的改进路径，为未来个性化多模态模型的发展奠定了基础。

Abstract: As wearable devices like smart glasses integrate Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) into the continuous first-person visual streams of individual users, the evolution of these models into true personal assistants hinges on visual personalization: the ability to reason over visual information unique to the wearer. We formalize this capability as Personal Visual Context Learning (Personal VCL), the prompt-time capability of using user-specific visual context to resolve personalized queries. To systematically evaluate this, we present Personal-VCL-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark capturing the personal visual world across persons, objects, and behaviors. Our analysis of frontier LMMs identifies a profound context utilization gap, revealing that the mechanisms for leveraging visual evidence, as well as aggregating multiple visual observations, remain critically understudied. Motivated by these findings, we propose the Agentic Context Bank, a strong inference-time baseline that structures a user's visual context into a self-refining memory bank and employs query-adaptive evidence selection. Our baseline approach consistently improves over standard context prompting regimes across tasks and evaluated backbones, demonstrating a practical path towards future personalized LMMs.

</details>


### [331] [Power Reinforcement Post-Training of Text-to-Image Models with Super-Linear Advantage Shaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10937)
*Haoyuan Sun,Jing Wang,Yuxin Song,Yu Lu,Bo Fang,Yifu Luo,Jun Yin,Pengyu Zeng,Miao Zhang,Tiantian Zhang,Xueqian Wang,Shijian Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Super-Linear Advantage Shaping (SLAS)方法，通过信息几何视角重塑策略更新，解决文本到图像模型中强化学习后训练阶段的奖励黑客问题，在多个基准上超越DanceGRPO基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于GRPO的后训练方法在文本到图像模型中容易出现奖励黑客问题（reward hacking），即模型利用奖励函数的偏见而非真正提升性能。标准的归一化会导致校准错误，直接移除标准差项虽能得到线性优势的优化方向，但仍无法有效区分真实信号与噪声。

Method: 从信息几何视角重新审视策略更新，通过扩展Fisher-Rao信息度量，引入优势依赖的权重，提出Super-Linear Advantage Shaping (SLAS)。该方法在高优势方向放松约束以放大信息更新，在低优势区域收紧约束以抑制虚假梯度，并采用批次级归一化稳定训练。

Result: 在多个骨干网络和基准（GenEval、UniGenBench++）上一致超越DanceGRPO基线，训练速度更快，域外泛化性能提升，对模型扩展更鲁棒，同时缓解了奖励黑客问题，保持了生成结果的语义和组合保真度。

Conclusion: SLAS通过非线性几何结构有效解决了奖励黑客问题，为文本到图像模型的后训练提供了一种更稳健且高效的优化范式。

Abstract: Recently, post-training methods based on reinforcement learning, with a particular focus on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), have emerged as the robust paradigm for further advancement of text-to-image (T2I) models. However, these methods are often prone to reward hacking, wherein models exploit biases in imperfect reward functions rather than yielding genuine performance gains. In this work, we identify that normalization could lead to miscalibration and directly removing the prompt-level standard deviation term yields an optimal policy ascent direction that is linear in the advantage but still limits the separation of genuine signals from noise. To mitigate the above issues, we propose Super-Linear Advantage Shaping (SLAS) by revisiting the functional update from an information geometry perspective. By extending the Fisher-Rao information metric with advantage-dependent weighting, SLAS introduces a non-linear geometric structure that reshapes the local policy space. This design relaxes constraints along high-advantage directions to amplify informative updates, while tightening those in low-advantage regions to suppress illusory gradients. In addition, batch-level normalization is applied to stabilize training under varying reward scales. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SLAS consistently surpasses the DanceGRPO baseline across multiple backbones and benchmarks. In particular, it yields faster training dynamics, improved out-of-domain performance on GenEval and UniGenBench++, and enhanced robustness to model scaling, while mitigating reward hacking and preserving semantic and compositional fidelity in generations.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [332] [SalesSim: Benchmarking and Aligning Multimodal Language Models as Retail User Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08334)
*Yada Pruksachatkun,Elaine Wan,Lyanna Chen,Kai-Wei Chang,Chien-Sheng Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SalesSim是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在在线零售对话中模拟真实用户行为的框架和测试平台。研究发现现有模型存在词汇多样性低、过度披露信息、容易被销售说服等问题，并提出了UserGRPO方法，通过多轮多目标强化学习将决策对齐率提升13.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有用户模拟工作仅停留在表面级别的对话生成，缺乏对零售交互中基于个性化特征（背景、偏好、底线条件）的决策过程的建模，因此需要构建一个能够评估MLLM模拟真实、个性化用户行为的测试平台。

Method: 1. 提出SalesSim框架，建模多轮、多模态、工具增强的在线零售对话中的用户决策过程；2. 设计基于决策对齐（决策与个性规格的一致性）和对话质量的评估指标；3. 提出UserGRPO，一种多轮、多目标强化学习训练方案，同时优化对话流畅性和决策对齐。

Result: 对6个开源和闭源SOTA模型进行基准测试后发现：模型对话流畅但词汇多样性低、过度披露个性信息、容易被销售建议说服而偏离个性规格；最强模型仅达79%以下对齐率。UserGRPO将基线模型决策对齐率提升13.8%，同时改善对话质量。

Conclusion: SalesSim为社区提供了评估和改进目标导向场景下用户模拟器行为的新测试平台，揭示了现有MLLM在模拟真实用户决策方面的显著缺陷，并展示了UserGRPO作为有效解决方案的潜力。

Abstract: We present SalesSim, a framework and testbed for evaluating the ability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to simulate realistic, persona-driven customer behavior in multi-turn, multi-modal, tool-augmented online retail conversations. Unlike prior work that treat user simulation as surface-level dialogue generation, SalesSim models retail interaction and decision-making as a grounded, agentic process, where shoppers with diverse backgrounds, preferences, and dealbreakers interact with a sales agent, seek clarifications, and make informed purchasing decisions. For evaluation, we design a suite of metrics centered on decision alignment, measuring the consistency between the simulator's actions and its persona specifications, as well as conversational quality. We find several behavioral gaps after benchmarking 6 open and closed-source state-of-the-art models. First, while models produce fluent conversations, they display significantly lower lexical diversity and overdisclosure of criteria across personas compared to human conversations. Second, models tend to be persuaded by sales agent suggestions and drift from persona specifications. Even the strongest model achieves less than 79% average alignment with its underlying persona specifications. To make progress on these limitations, we propose UserGRPO, a multi-turn, multi-objective reinforcement learning recipe to optimize both conversational fluency and decision alignment under persona specifications. Our experiments demonstrate that UserGRPO boosts decision alignment of the baseline model by 13.8% while improving conversational quality. By introducing SalesSim, we provide a new testbed for the community to investigate and improve the adherence of user simulators in goal-oriented settings.

</details>


### [333] [Sanity Checks for Long-Form Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08346)
*Geigh Zollicoffer,Minh Vu,Hongli Zhan,Raymond Li,Manish Bhattarai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受控不变性方法，通过Force（保留推理轨迹但替换最终答案为正确答案）和Remove（移除答案声明步骤）两种测试，揭示了现有幻觉检测方法主要依赖最终答案的表面特征而非推理过程本身。并提出了基于词法轨迹特征的轻量级检测器TRACT，在控制答案伪影后表现稳健。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM幻觉检测方法虽关注推理链（chain-of-thought），但不确定它们是真的评估推理质量，还是仅利用最终答案的表面相关性（如答案格式、措辞等伪影）。作者希望揭示并分离这种混淆。

Method: 提出两种"oracle"测试：Force（保留推理轨迹，替换最终答案为正确答案）和Remove（移除答案声明步骤，保留推理路径）。基于此提出TRACT：一个基于词法轨迹特征的轻量级评分器，包括犹豫趋势（hedging trends）、步骤长度动态（step-length dynamics）、跨响应词汇收敛（cross-response vocabulary convergence）。

Result: 一旦控制答案伪影，TRACT在未扰动轨迹上达到或超过现有基线，强鲁棒性表明检测信号存在于推理轨迹中而非仅端点特征。

Conclusion: 当前推理感知幻觉检测的核心挑战不是轨迹中缺乏信号，而是未能将其与端点线索（最终答案伪影）分离。

Abstract: Hallucination detection methods for large language models increasingly operate on chain-of-thought reasoning traces, yet it remains unclear whether they evaluate the reasoning itself or merely exploit surface correlates of the final answer. We introduce a controlled-invariance methodology that exposes this distinction through two oracle tests: \textsc{Force}, which replaces each response's final answer with the ground truth while preserving the reasoning trace, and \textsc{Remove}, which strips answer-announcement steps while leaving the trajectory intact. This reveals if their predictive power derives from answer-level artifacts rather than from the structure or validity of intermediate reasoning. We further show that once these artifacts are controlled for, effective detection does not necessarily require complex learned representations: TRACT, a lightweight scorer built on lexical trajectory features (hedging trends, step-length dynamics, and cross-response vocabulary convergence), achieves strong robustness while remaining competitive with or outperforming existing baselines on unperturbed traces. These findings suggest that the current central challenge in reasoning-aware hallucination detection is not the absence of signal in the trace, but the failure to isolate it from endpoint cues.

</details>


### [334] [How Much Do Circuits Tell Us? Measuring the Consistency and Specificity of Language Model Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08348)
*Michael Li,Nishant Subramani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过边归因修补法，在6个任务和7个模型中测量电路复用程度，发现任务内复用率高且共享组件对任务性能至关重要（消融导致~100%准确率下降），但电路并非任务特异——消融一个任务的电路对另一任务性能的损害几乎与消融该任务自身电路相当，原因是跨任务电路存在大量因果重叠。尽管存在少量任务特定组件，但其对性能贡献有限，挑战了电路发现支持精准干预的假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机械可解释性研究主要关注电路的必要性和充分性，但缺乏对电路复用（一致性：任务内组件复现频率；特异性：组件对任务的独特性）这两个关键属性的系统研究。

Method: 采用边归因修补法，在6个NLP任务和7个不同规模的模型中，计算每个样本的电路，分析任务内（一致性）和跨任务（特异性）的组件复用模式，并通过消融实验评估共享和特有组件的因果重要性。

Result: 1) 任务内电路复用率高，共享组件是任务性能的必要条件；2) 跨任务电路并非特异，消融一个任务的电路会严重损害另一任务性能；3) 跨任务电路存在大量因果重叠；4) 任务特定组件存在但仅贡献部分性能。

Conclusion: 当前注意力头和MLP层级别的电路发现虽然能识别重要组件，但其缺乏任务特异性，这质疑了电路能否真正支持对模型行为的精确理解和干预。

Abstract: The circuits framework in mechanistic interpretability aims to identify causally important sparse subgraphs of model components, typically evaluated by measuring necessity and sufficiency. We measure circuit reuse, the proportion of components shared across per-example circuits within a task, and investigate two less-studied properties of this: consistency, the recurrence of components within a task, and specificity, their uniqueness to a task. Using edge attribution patching across six tasks and seven models, we find that within-task reuse is high and that shared components are necessary for task performance, with ablations causing up to $\sim$100% relative accuracy drops. However, circuits turn out not to be task-specific: ablating one task's circuit damages another task's performance about as much as that task's own circuit does. We discover that this is due to substantial overlap between circuits across tasks, which are causally important for performance. Some circuits do contain a smaller set of task-specific components, but these account for only a modest portion of circuit performance. Overall, our findings suggest that while circuit discovery at the level of attention heads and MLP layers identifies important components, their lack of task-specificity raises questions about the degree to which circuits can support targeted understanding and intervention on model behavior.

</details>


### [335] [Change My View? The Dynamics of Persuasion and Polarization in Online Discourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08383)
*David Freeborn,Malihe Alikani,Anthony Sicilia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究利用大型语言模型分析Reddit r/ChangeMyView论坛的辩论语料，发现让步和共情策略能显著提升观点转变概率，而正面反驳、可信度攻击和话题转移则降低这一概率，表明有效公共推理既依赖证据内容也依赖关系框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 哲学上的说服理论通常假设共享证据和理性论证会导致观点趋同，但日常对话显示并非如此。作者试图探究哪些修辞策略真正促进观点改变，以弥合理论与现实的差距。

Method: 1) 使用大语言模型在对话中途预测观点改变的概率作为基线；2) 通过混合机器辅助编码，对十种修辞策略（让步、共情、逻辑挑战、可信度诉求等）进行标注；3) 将这些策略特征加入预测模型，评估其对预测能力的提升。

Result: 加入修辞策略特征显著提升预测能力。让步和共情策略大幅增加观点改变概率，而正面反驳、可信度攻击和话题转移则降低该概率。存在一致的模式。

Conclusion: 有效公共推理既依赖关系框架（情感联结、尊重）也依赖证据内容，这邀请我们对理性对话的规范性理论进行修正。

Abstract: Philosophical accounts of persuasion often assume that shared evidence and rational argumentation should lead to a convergence of views between peers, yet everyday discourse often suggests otherwise. In this study, we use large language models to analyze a corpus of debates on Reddit's r/ChangeMyView, where belief revision is publicly signaled. Large language models were asked, halfway through each discussion, to forecast whether such an acknowledgement would arise; their probabilistic estimates serve as a conversational baseline. Each reply was then coded, through a hybrid machine-assisted procedure, for ten familiar rhetorical strategies -- concession, empathy, logical challenge, credibility appeals, and so forth. Adding these strategic features markedly improves predictive power and yields a consistent pattern: moves that express concession or empathetic alignment substantially increase the prospect of belief change, whereas frontal refutation, credibility attacks, and topic deflection diminish it. The findings indicate that effective public reasoning depends as much on relational framing as on evidential content, and they invite a refinement of normative accounts of rational dialogue.

</details>


### [336] [jina-embeddings-v5-omni: Text-Geometry-Preserving Multimodal Embeddings via Frozen-Tower Composition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08384)
*Florian Hönicke,Michael Günther,Andreas Koukounas,Kalim Akram,Scott Martens,Saba Sturua,Han Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出冻结编码器模型组合方法，通过仅训练0.35%的连接组件，将Jina Embeddings v5文本模型扩展为支持文本、图像、音频和视频的多模态嵌入模型，在保持文本嵌入能力不变的同时达到与大型多模态模型竞争的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态嵌入模型通常需要全参数重新训练，计算成本高且会改变原有文本嵌入能力。作者希望以高效方式扩展已有高质量文本嵌入模型，使其支持多种模态输入，同时保持原有文本嵌入不变。

Method: 采用VLM架构，在冻结的文本嵌入模型和新增的非文本编码器（图像、音频）之间仅训练连接组件（占模型总权重的0.35%），实现多模态输入的单一语义嵌入空间。

Result: 训练效率极高（仅训练0.35%参数），对文本输入的嵌入完全保持不变，在多模态任务上性能与更大规模的多模态嵌入模型相当，达到竞争性水平。

Conclusion: 冻结编码器模型组合是一种高效且有效的多模态嵌入模型构建方法，能在极低计算成本下扩展文本模型的多模态能力，同时保持原有性能。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce frozen-encoder model composition, a novel approach to multimodal embedding models. We build on the VLM-style architecture, in which non-text encoders are adapted to produce input for a language model, which in turn generates embeddings for all varieties of input. We present the result: the jina-embeddings-v5-omni suite, a pair of models that encode text, image, audio, and video input into a single semantic embedding space. Our method is to extend the two Jina Embeddings v5 Text models to support additional media by adding encoders for images and audio. The backbone text embedding models and the added non-text media encoders remain frozen. We only trained the connecting components, representing 0.35% of the total weights of the joint model. Training is therefore much more efficient than full-parameter retraining. Additionally, the language model remains effectively unaltered, producing exactly the same embeddings for text inputs as the Jina Embeddings v5 Text models. Our evaluations show that this approach produces results that are competitive with the state-of-the-art, yielding nearly equal performance to larger multimodal embedding models.

</details>


### [337] [AIPO: : Learning to Reason from Active Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08401)
*Junnan Liu,Linhao Luo,Thuy-Trang Vu,Gholamreza Haffari*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AIPO是一个通过主动多智能体交互增强LLM推理的强化学习框架，在训练中引入验证、知识和推理三个协作智能体提供细粒度指导，扩展策略模型的能力边界，并在多个推理基准上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR算法中，策略模型的探索受限于自身能力边界，而引入外部专家演示的方法依赖完整轨迹级指导，存在样本效率低、信息稀疏、探索空间受限等问题。作者希望通过多智能体系统的潜力，在探索阶段提供细粒度、有针对性的指导，主动扩展策略模型的能力边界。

Method: 提出AIPO框架，在RLVR训练中引入三个协作智能体：Verify Agent（验证）、Knowledge Agent（知识）、Reasoning Agent（推理），当策略模型遇到推理瓶颈时可主动咨询这些智能体获得细粒度指导。同时引入重要性采样系数和裁剪策略，缓解从智能体反馈学习时的off-policy偏差和梯度消失问题。训练完成后，策略模型可独立推理无需依赖协作智能体。

Result: 在AIME、MATH500、GPQA-Diamond、LiveCodeBench等多个推理基准上，AIPO一致性地提升了推理性能，在不同策略模型和RLVR算法下均表现出良好的鲁棒泛化性，有效扩展了策略模型的推理能力边界。

Conclusion: AIPO通过主动多智能体交互的细粒度指导，有效克服了传统RLVR方法探索受限的问题，是一种样本高效、可泛化的LLM推理增强框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely stimulated by Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, existing RL algorithms face a fundamental limitation: their exploration remains largely constrained by the inherent capability boundary of the policy model. Although recent methods introduce external expert demonstrations to extend this boundary, they typically rely on complete trajectory-level guidance, which is sample-inefficient, information-sparse, and may confine exploration to a static guidance space. Inspired by the potential of multi-agent systems, we propose $\textbf{AIPO}$, an enhanced reinforcement learning framework that improves LLM reasoning through active multi-agent interaction during exploration. Specifically, AIPO enables the policy model to proactively consult three functional collaborative agents, $\textit{Verify Agent}$, $\textit{Knowledge Agent}$, and $\textit{Reasoning Agent}$, when encountering reasoning bottlenecks, thereby receiving fine-grained and targeted guidance to actively expand its capability boundary during training. We further introduce a tailored importance sampling coefficient together with a clipping strategy to mitigate the off-policy bias and gradient vanishing issues that arise when learning from agent-provided feedback. After training, the policy model performs reasoning independently without relying on collaborative agents. Extensive experiments on diverse reasoning benchmarks, including AIME, MATH500, GPQA-Diamond, and LiveCodeBench, show that AIPO consistently improves reasoning performance, generalizes robustly across different policy models and RLVR algorithms, and effectively expands the reasoning capability boundary of the policy model.

</details>


### [338] [Built Environment Reasoning from Remote Sensing Imagery Using Large Vision--Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08404)
*Dongdong Wang,Deepak Balakrishnan,Ravi Srinivasan,Shenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究探索利用大语言模型结合多尺度遥感影像，为智慧城市提供建筑设计、施工评估、土地利用和风险识别等决策支持，实验显示InternVL和Qwen等模型在环境推理中具有良好潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智慧城市决策依赖人工分析效率低，缺乏自动化手段。利用LLM结合遥感影像可自动理解建成环境，提升城市规划与管理的智能化水平。

Method: 使用多空间尺度遥感影像作为多模态语言模型输入，评估不同尺度对建成环境推理的影响；对比InternVL、Qwen等多个先进LLM在生成环境建议时的准确性与可靠性。

Result: 多尺度遥感影像与LLM结合可有效辅助建成环境相关推理，不同模型间存在性能差异，总体展现了良好的应用潜力。

Conclusion: 将遥感影像与大语言模型集成有助于智慧城市建设与决策，未来可进一步优化模型精度与多尺度融合策略。

Abstract: This work investigates the use of large language models (LLMs) for tasks in smart cities. The core idea is to leverage remote sensing imagery to characterize the built environment, including design suggestions, constructability assessment, landuse patterns, and risk identification. We examine remote sensing imagery at multiple spatial scales as inputs for multimodal language modeling and evaluate their effects on built-environment-related reasoning. In addition, we compare state-of-the-art LLMs, including InternVL and Qwen, in terms of accuracy and reliability when generating built environment recommendations. The results demonstrate the potential of integrating remote sensing imagery with large language models to assist smart cities and decision-making.

</details>


### [339] [Effective Explanations Support Planning Under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08406)
*Hanqi Zhou,Britt Besch,Charley M. Wu,Tobias Gerstenberg*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个计算模型，将解释性语言转化为行动规划，并通过四个实验证明，高质量（高效、可靠）的解释能显著提升导航表现，且被认为更有帮助。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释如何从A到B的过程具有挑战性，因为需要模拟听者根据指令采取的行动。现有方法缺乏对解释质量与行动效果之间关系的系统建模。

Method: 使用大型语言模型将解释转化为策略先验和价值地图，再由规划智能体在部分可观测环境下执行。通过路径效率和可靠性来评分解释质量，惩罚需要重新规划的情况。

Result: 在24张地图上收集了1,200条解释，进行了四项预注册实验。高评分的解释被认为更有帮助，且显著提升导航表现：有解释的参与者优于无解释的，高质量解释优于低质量解释。

Conclusion: 程序性解释是一种以效用为导向的沟通行为，其质量取决于语言如何在不确定性下被转化为实际行动。

Abstract: Explaining how to get from A to B can be challenging. It requires mentally simulating what the listener will do based on what they are told. To capture this process, we propose a computational model that converts utterances into action plans: a large language model translates an explanation into program-like guidance (a policy prior and value map), and a planning agent executes it under partial observability. We score explanations by the efficiency and reliability of the resulting paths, penalizing replanning. Across four preregistered experiments, we collect a corpus of 1,200 explanations over 24 maps, elicit helpfulness judgments, measure baseline navigation, and test behavior with explanations of differing quality. Higher-scored explanations are judged more helpful and improve navigation: participants with explanations outperform those without, and high-scoring explanations help more than low-scoring ones. Together, these results show procedural explanation as utility-guided communication shaped by how language can be grounded into action under uncertainty.

</details>


### [340] [A Semantic-Sampling Framework for Evaluating Calibration in Open-Ended Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08432)
*Zhanliang Wang,Jiancong Xiao,Ruochen Jin,Shu Yang,Bojian Hou,Li Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对开放域问答场景下的LLM校准评估问题，提出Sem-ECE框架，通过语义采样将模型答案分组为语义类并计算置信度，包含两种估计量Sem₁-ECE和Sem₂-ECE，理论上证明其渐进无偏性，实验表明优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有校准评估方法在开放域问答这一LLM最常用部署场景中存在明显不足：基于logit的方法需要受限输出格式，口头置信度往往过度自信，基于采样的方法缺乏清晰的有限样本目标。

Method: 提出Sem-ECE框架，通过对模型多次采样答案，将答案按语义分组为语义类，使用各类别出现频率作为置信度。框架内含两种估计量：Sem₁-ECE（同样本自一致性分数）和Sem₂-ECE（分离答案选择与置信度评估的留出变体）。

Result: 实验表明Sem-ECE优于口头置信度和现有采样方法，与基于logit的评估互补。Sem₁和Sem₂在简单问题上一致，在困难问题上出现分歧，且Sem₂的校准误差严格更小，二者差距可作为问题难度的诊断指标。

Conclusion: Sem-ECE为开放域问答场景下的LLM校准评估提供了理论上严谨、实践中有效的解决方案，填补了该领域的方法空白。

Abstract: Calibration measures whether a model's predicted confidence aligns with its empirical accuracy, and is central to the reliable deployment of large language models (LLMs) in high-stakes domains such as medicine and law. While much recent work focuses on improving LLM calibration, the equally important question of how to evaluate it in realistic settings remains underdeveloped. Open-ended question answering (QA), the most common deployment setting for modern LLMs, is where existing evaluation methods fall short: logit-based metrics need restricted output formats and internal probabilities; verbalized confidence is self-reported and often overconfident; and sampling-based methods rely on task-specific extraction rules without a clear finite-sample target. We introduce Sem-ECE (Semantic-Sampling Expected Calibration Error), a calibration evaluation framework for open-ended QA that samples answers from the model, groups them into semantic classes, and uses the resulting frequencies as confidence. We study two estimators within this framework: Sem$_1$-ECE, the same-sample self-consistency score, and Sem$_2$-ECE, a held-out variant that separates answer selection from confidence evaluation. We prove both are asymptotically unbiased, and further show that they agree on easy questions but diverge on hard ones with Sem$_2$ achieving strictly smaller calibration error, so their gap also serves as a diagnostic for question difficulty. Experiments on three open-ended QA benchmarks across five leading commercial LLMs match our theoretical predictions and show that Sem-ECE outperforms verbalized confidence and existing sampling-based methods, while complementing logit-based evaluation when internal probabilities are unavailable.

</details>


### [341] [Magis-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Magistrate-Level Legal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08437)
*Ramon Pires,Thales Sales Almeida,Celio Larcher Junior,Giovana Bonás,Hugo Abonizio,Marcos Piau,Roseval Malaquias Junior,Thiago Laitz,Rodrigo Nogueira*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了Magis-Bench，一个评估大语言模型（LLM）在司法级别法律推理与写作能力的基准。该基准包含来自2023-2025年巴西司法考试的真实考题，涵盖多轮论辩分析与完整判决书写作任务。评估了23个前沿LLM，结果显示即便是最佳模型（Gemini-3-Pro-Preview）平均得分也仅为6.97/10，表明当前LLM在司法级法律推理上仍有显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有法律AI基准主要评估LLM产生法律论据或文档的能力，但忽略了对法律论证进行裁决的能力——即权衡竞争主张、将法律原则应用于事实并做出合理判决——这一能力与法律系统中倡导能力同样基础且重要。

Method: 构建了包含74道题目、来自巴西司法考试（2023-2025年）的Magis-Bench基准，包含多轮论辩分析题和完整民刑判决书写作题；采用LLM-as-a-judge方法，使用4个独立前沿模型作为评估者。

Result: 评估了23个LLM，评估者间高度一致（Kendall's W=0.984，成对Kendall's τ≥0.897）。Gemini-3-Pro-Preview得分最高（6.97/10），其后为Gemini-3-Flash-Preview（6.67）和Claude-4.5-Opus（6.46）。最佳模型得分仍低于满分70%。

Conclusion: 司法级别的法律推理与写作对当前LLM仍具挑战性，该领域存在显著提升空间。

Abstract: Existing benchmarks for legal AI focus primarily on tasks where LLMs must produce legal arguments or documents, yet the capacity to \emph{judge} such arguments -- weighing competing claims, applying doctrine to facts, and rendering reasoned decisions -- is arguably as fundamental to a well-functioning legal system as advocacy itself. We introduce Magis-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on magistrate-level writing tasks derived from recent Brazilian competitive examinations for judicial positions. Magis-Bench comprises 74 questions from eight examinations conducted between 2023 and 2025, including discursive legal analysis questions with multi-turn structure and practical exercises requiring the composition of complete civil and criminal judicial sentences. We evaluate 23 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge methodology with four independent frontier models as evaluators. Our results show strong inter-judge agreement (Kendall's $W = 0.984$; pairwise Kendall's $τ\ge 0.897$), with Google's Gemini-3-Pro-Preview achieving the highest average score (6.97/10), followed by Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (6.67) and Claude-4.5-Opus (6.46). Even the best-performing models score below 70\% of the maximum, indicating that judicial-level legal reasoning and writing remain challenging for current LLMs. We release the complete benchmark, model outputs, and evaluation code to support further research on legal AI capabilities.

</details>


### [342] [Can Language Models Identify Side Effects of Breast Cancer Radiation Treatments?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08439)
*Natalie Seah,Danielle S. Bitterman,Daphna Spiegel,Thomas Hartvigsen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向部署的LLM压力测试框架，评估LLM在乳腺癌放疗副作用列表生成中的表现。研究发现LLM对文档变化敏感，存在精确率与召回率的权衡，且系统性地遗漏罕见和长期副作用。将输出锚定在临床医生整理的副作用列表上可显著提升可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确传达癌症治疗的副作用对癌症幸存者至关重要，尤其在知情同意场景中。然而，临床知识不足和EHR系统碎片化使这一任务挑战重重。LLM有潜力辅助这一任务，但其在肿瘤学幸存者护理中的可靠性尚不清楚。

Method: 使用21个乳腺癌患者档案构建配对临床场景（仅放疗方案不同），在多种提示机制下评估7种指令微调LLM。将LLM输出与两个主要学术医疗中心的临床医生整理的知情同意文档参考标准进行比较。

Result: LLM对文档变化敏感，精确率和召回率之间存在权衡，系统性地低估罕见和长期副作用。单独使用时限制副作用数量会降低精确率，而将输出锚定在临床医生整理的副作用列表上则显著提高了可靠性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了LLM在肿瘤学中应用的重要局限性，并为构建更安全、更有效的幸存者护理应用提出了实用设计选择。

Abstract: Accurately communicating the side effects of cancer treatments to cancer survivors is critical, particularly in settings such as informed consent, where clinicians must clearly and comprehensively convey potential treatment toxicities. However, this task remains challenging due to clinical knowledge deficits about adverse treatment effects and fragmentation across electronic health record (EHR) systems. Large language models (LLMs) have the potential to assist in this task, though their reliability in oncology survivorship contexts remains poorly understood. We present a deployment-oriented stress-testing framework for evaluating LLM-generated radiation side effect lists in breast cancer treatment and survivorship care. Using 21 breast cancer patient profiles, we construct paired patient clinical scenarios that differ only in radiotherapy regimens to evaluate seven instruction-tuned LLMs under multiple prompting regimes. We then compare LLM outputs to a clinician-curated reference derived from informed consent documents at two major academic medical centers and developed by a team including more than seven breast radiation oncologists. The reference maps radiation dose-fractionation, fields, and locations to associated toxicities, broken down by frequency and temporal onset. Across models, we reveal sensitivity to minor documentation changes, trade-offs between precision and recall, and systematic under-recall of rare and long-term side effects. When used alone, constraints on the number of side effects generated reduce precision, and grounding outputs in clinician-curated side effect lists substantially improves reliability and robustness. These findings highlight important limitations of LLM use in oncology and suggest practical design choices for safer and more informative survivorship-focused applications.

</details>


### [343] [Revisiting the syntax of imperatives in Yemeni Arabic: An Agree across phases approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08447)
*Mohammed Q. Shormani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文重新审视也门阿拉伯语祈使句的句法，提出跨语段一致（AAP）方法，认为祈使句中的主语是第二人称pro，而前置成分是话题，通过匹配操作形成A'链。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对也门阿拉伯语祈使句的句法分析不足，特别是复杂祈使结构和A'链结构尚未得到充分解释，需要建立句法与话语之间的接口机制。

Method: 采用跨语段一致（AAP）方法，分析简单和复杂祈使句，区分主语（2-person pro）与话题（C域成分），通过匹配操作建立核心指称关系形成A'链。

Result: AAP方法成功解释了祈使句中的A'链结构，包括局部和非局部链；核心祈使句（无显性话题）通过空话题合并到TopP的Spec位置来获得解释。

Conclusion: 祈使句的句法分析必须考虑句法与话语的接口，话题作为逻辑主语与pro建立核心指称关系，这种分析对理解祈使句的解读和表现功能具有重要意义。

Abstract: This article revisits the syntax of imperatives in Yemeni Arabic proposing an Agree acros phases (AAP) approach. I argue that the AAP approach successfully accounts for both simple and complex imperative constructions, including A'-chain structures, by establishing a close interactions between syntax and discourse. The study demonstrates that this interface is motivated by the interpretive and performative functions associated with imperatives, linking informational structure with propositional structure. It is also proposed that the thematic subject of imperatives is a 2-person pro, whereas any overt pronominal or nominal element occurring preverbally is not a subject, but rather a C-domain element, precisely aboutness topic. These topics serve as the logical subjects of imperatives and enter into a coreferentiality relationship with pro. This relation is analyzed as APP involving Match, yielding both local and non-local A'-chains. For core imperatives, viz., lacking an overt topic, I propose a null topic to (re)merge in Spec,TopP, whose interpretation depends on the discourse.

</details>


### [344] [Do Benchmarks Underestimate LLM Performance? Evaluating Hallucination Detection With LLM-First Human-Adjudicated Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08462)
*I. F. Atasoy,B. Mutlu,E. A. Sezer,A. Wahdan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究通过人类仲裁流程重新评估了QAGS-C和SummEval数据集中人类标注与LLM判断的冲突样本，发现三重一致性提升6-8%，模型准确率提高2-9%，仲裁员在LLM提供明确推理时更常支持模型判断，表明单次标注在模糊任务中不可靠，模型辅助重新评估可产生更可靠的基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在上下文接地任务（如RAG和Agent系统）中仍存在幻觉问题，而现有基准数据集的人类标注可能与LLM判断存在系统性分歧，需要更可靠的评估标准。

Method: 分析QAGS-C和SummEval数据集，比较原始基准标注与Gemini 2.5 Flash和GPT-5 Mini的推理及span预测，对冲突样本进行跨文化人类仲裁重新评估。

Result: 重新评估后，三重一致性提升6.38%（QAGS-C）和7.62%（SummEval）；GPT准确率提升4.25%和2.34%；Gemini准确率提升8.51%和3.80%。仲裁员整体一致性达83%-87%，且更倾向于支持提供明确推理的LLM判断。

Conclusion: 对于歧义性任务，单次人工标注可能不足，模型辅助的重新评估能产生更可靠的基准。

Abstract: Hallucination remains a persistent challenge in Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly in context-grounded settings such as RAG and agentic AI systems. This study focuses on contextual hallucination detection in summarization tasks. We analyze the QAGS-C and SummEval datasets by comparing original benchmark annotations with reason and span-based predictions from Gemini 2.5 Flash and GPT-5 Mini. To address systematic divergences between human labels and LLM judgments, we re-evaluated all conflicted samples through a human adjudication process involving 2 cross-cultural adjudicators. Following this re-evaluation, triple agreement (between human, GPT, and Gemini) increased by 6.38% for QAGS-C and 7.62% for SummEval. Similarly, model accuracy improved, with GPT increasing by 4.25% on QAGS-C and 2.34% on SummEval, while Gemini showed gains of 8.51% and 3.80%, respectively. Notably, adjudicators frequently sided with the models' judgments over original human annotations when LLMs provided explicit reasoning. Overall human adjudicator agreement ranged between 83% and 87%. These findings suggest that for ambiguity-prone tasks, single-pass annotations may be insufficient, and model-assisted re-evaluation yields more reliable benchmarks.

</details>


### [345] [PYTHALAB-MERA: Validation-Grounded Memory, Retrieval, and Acceptance Control for Frozen-LLM Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08468)
*Mehmet Iscan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出PYTHALAB-MERA，一种轻量级外部控制器，通过冻结的本地语言模型、失败快速验证管道、TD(λ)资格迹延迟信用分配和AST派生技能检索，在强化学习编码任务中显著提升了验证通过率（8/9 vs 基线0/9）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（静态检索、长上下文提示、自优化、执行反馈修复、强化学习）各自解决了局部问题，但未能联合提供验证驱动的情景记忆、自适应检索-行动选择、延迟信用分配和结构化技能复用，且均围绕冻结的本地模型展开。

Method: PYTHALAB-MERA是一个外部控制器，核心流程为：1) 冻结的LLM生成完整源代码文件；2) 控制器决定哪些记忆记录和AST派生技能进入下一轮提示；3) 通过快速失败验证管道验证每个候选；4) 将验证结果转化为有界塑形奖励；5) 通过TD(λ)风格资格迹传播延迟信用。

Result: 在三个强化学习编码任务、三次重复、三次尝试预算的硬RL设定下，PYTHALAB-MERA通过了8/9的严格验证，而自我优化基线和GRACE扩展均通过0/9。

Conclusion: 外部记忆与检索控制器在该设定下显著提升了验证成功率，但结果不推广至通用代码合成、SOTA性能、形式正确性或形式安全性。

Abstract: Local LLM-based coding agents increasingly work in settings where correctness is earned through execution feedback, persistent state, and bounded repair, not through a single fluent answer. Static retrieval, long-context prompting, self-refinement, execution-feedback repair, and reinforcement learning over model weights each address part of this setting, but they do not jointly provide validation-grounded episodic memory, adaptive retrieval-action selection, delayed credit assignment, and structural skill reuse around a frozen local model. We introduce PYTHALAB-MERA, a lightweight external controller for local validation-conditioned code generation. The frozen language model proposes complete source files; the controller decides which memory records and AST-derived skills should enter the next prompt, validates each candidate through a fail-fast pipeline, converts validation outcomes into bounded shaped rewards, and propagates delayed credit through TD(lambda)-style eligibility traces. We evaluate the implementation as a local CLI artifact on reinforcement-learning coding tasks with strict validation gates. In the measured hard RL setting with three tasks, three repetitions, and a three-attempt budget, PYTHALAB-MERA passed 8/9 strict validations; the self-refinement baseline and the investigated GRACE extension each passed 0/9. These results support a deliberately bounded claim: in this recorded setting, the external memory-and-retrieval controller improved validation success. They do not establish general-purpose code synthesis, state-of-the-art performance, formal program correctness, or formal safety.

</details>


### [346] [A Computational Operationalisation of Competing Maturational Theories of Syntactic Development via Statistical Grammar Induction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08476)
*Mila Marcheva,Suchir Salhan,Weiwei Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过统计语法归纳方法，比较了儿童语言发展中两种句法范畴习得顺序假说（自下而上 GROWING vs. 内向型 INWARD），发现 GROWING 假说在三项评估指标上显著优于 INWARD 假说。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究儿童在第一语言习得过程中，中间句法范畴出现的顺序问题，验证不同成熟理论（自下而上与内向型）的预测。

Method: 使用统计语法归纳方法对两种句法阶段性涌现假说（GROWING 和 INWARD）进行计算操作化，在保持输入和学习算法不变的情况下，比较不同成熟顺序对可学习结构的影响。

Result: 在三种评估指标上，自下而上的 GROWING 假说显著优于内向型的 INWARD 假说。

Conclusion: 儿童语言发展中，词汇和屈折结构（自下而上）先出现的假说比话语相关范畴先出现的假说更具学习优势，支持 GROWING 理论。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with what intermediate syntactic categories children acquire during first language development, and in what order. Maturational theories make different predictions. Bottom-up accounts (GROWING) propose that lexical and inflectional structure emerges first, while inward accounts (INWARD) predict early access to discourse-related categories. We computationally operationalise these hypotheses of staged syntactic emergence using statistical grammar induction, asking what each proposed ordering makes learnable when input and learning algorithm are held constant. Our framework makes category acquisition explicit and allows us to explore how different maturational orderings shape the structure that can be learned under identical conditions. Based on this operationalisation, the GROWING account significantly outperforms the INWARD account across three evaluation metrics.

</details>


### [347] [Do Agents Need to Plan Step-by-Step? Rethinking Planning Horizon in Data-Centric Tool Calling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08477)
*Naoki Otani,Nikita Bhutani,Hannah Kim,Dan Zhang,Estevam Hruschka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM-based agent在数据密集型任务中的规划策略，发现全水平规划（FH）在准确率上与单步水平规划（SH）相当，但可节省2-3倍的token消耗，表明在明确定义的数据任务中，急切的分步监控往往是不必要的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在数据密集型任务中，LLM-based agent是否需要急切的分步监控（单步规划），还是全水平规划（延迟重规划）即可达到同样效果，以寻找更高效的默认规划策略。

Method: 通过受控实验，将规划水平（全水平 vs 单步）作为核心架构特征进行隔离，系统分析了拓扑复杂度（深度、广度）和工具鲁棒性对两种范式的影响。实验在Knowledge Base QA和Multi-hop QA任务上进行。

Result: 全水平规划（FH）在准确率上与单步规划（SH）持平，同时token消耗减少2-3倍。

Conclusion: 对于明确定义的数据密集型任务，急切的分步监控并非必要，全水平规划配合按需重规划可以作为一种更高效的默认策略。

Abstract: Explicit planning is a critical capability for LLM-based agents solving complex data-centric tasks, which require precise tool calling over external data sources. Existing strategies fall into two paradigms based on planning horizon: (1) full-horizon (FH), which generates a complete plan before execution, and (2) single-step horizon (SH), which interleaves each action (tool call) with incremental reasoning and observation. While step-by-step execution is a common default under the assumption that eager execution monitoring is necessary for adaptability, we revisit this assumption for well-defined data-centric tasks. Our controlled empirical study isolates planning horizon as the key architectural feature and systematically analyzes the effects of topological complexity and tool robustness on both paradigms. Our experiments across Knowledge Base Question Answering and Multi-hop QA show that FH planning with lazy replanning achieves accuracy parity with SH across varying depths, breadths, and robustness levels, while using 2-3x fewer tokens. These findings suggest that for well-defined data-centric tasks, eager step-wise monitoring is often unnecessary, and full-horizon planning with on-demand replanning can offer a more efficient default.

</details>


### [348] [NARRA-Gym for Evaluating Interactive Narrative Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08503)
*Yue Huang,Yuchen Ma,Jiayi Ye,Wenjie Wang,Zipeng Ling,Xingjian Hu,Yuexing Hao,Zichen Chen,Zhangchen Xu,Yunhong He,Zhengqing Yuan,Yujun Zhou,Kehan Guo,Chaoran Chen,Toby Jia-Jun Li,Stefan Feuerriegel,Xiangliang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出NARRA-Gym，一个用于评估LLM在交互式叙事任务中的可执行评测环境，通过将稀疏情感种子扩展为完整交互故事并记录全轨迹，评测了9个前沿LLM，发现模型在流畅性之外还存在鲁棒性、用户体验和个性化等方面的显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评测多聚焦于静态提示或孤立故事生成，缺乏能同时评估故事生成、长上下文状态管理、角色模拟、共情个性化等多维能力的交互式叙事基准。

Method: 构造NARRA-Gym环境：将稀疏情感种子转化为完整交互故事，记录模型在环轨迹（故事构建、记忆更新、规划、节奏干预、神器合成）。使用LLM-as-judge对8个锚定人物进行系统评测，并辅以人类评估。

Result: 9个前沿LLM在流畅性、鲁棒性、用户体验、个性化等维度上表现出显著差异，流畅性高的模型在鲁棒性或个性化上仍可能失败。

Conclusion: 交互式叙事可作为评估LLM长程、用户自适应行为的有用基准，超越了孤立故事质量的评估范畴。

Abstract: Interactive narrative tasks require LLMs to sustain a coherent, evolving story while adapting to a user over multiple turns. However, suitable benchmarks for this setting are limited: existing evaluations often focus on static prompts, isolated story generations, or post-hoc ratings, and therefore miss whether models can jointly manage story generation, long-context state and pacing, character simulation, empathic personalization, and story-grounded artifacts. We introduce NARRA-Gym, an executable evaluation environment that turns a sparse emotional seed into a complete interactive story episode and logs the full model-in-the-loop trajectory, including story construction, memory updates, planning, pacing interventions, and optional artifact synthesis. We evaluate nine frontier LLMs using a controlled LLM-as-judge sweep over eight benchmark personas and a human evaluation in which participants rate customized model outputs. Our results show substantial variation across models, personas, and evaluation dimensions: models that produce fluent stories can still fail on robustness, user experience, or resistance-sensitive personalization. These findings suggest that interactive narrative offers a useful benchmark for evaluating long-horizon, user-adaptive LLM behavior beyond isolated story quality.

</details>


### [349] [A Single Layer to Explain Them All:Understanding Massive Activations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08504)
*Zeru Shi,Zhenting Wang,Fan Yang,Qifan Wang,Ruixiang Tang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现了大型语言模型中的“大规模涌现层”（ME Layer），该层是巨量激活首次出现并通过残差连接传播的关键层。ME层中RMSNorm和FFN参数共同导致巨量激活，且一旦形成，表征在不同层间高度固化，降低了隐藏表示的多样性。作者提出了一种简单有效的方法来减少这种固化，在免训练和微调设置下均提升了指令遵循和数学推理等任务性能，同时还能缓解注意力汇聚问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型中大规模激活现象的起源，识别其出现的具体层位置及形成机制，并理解其对模型表征多样性和注意力机制的影响。

Method: 1. 识别Massive Emergence Layer (ME Layer)作为巨量激活首次出现并传播的关键层；2. 分析ME层内RMSNorm和FFN参数对巨量激活的贡献；3. 提出一种减少巨量激活表征固化、增强隐藏表示多样性的方法。

Result: 该方法在免训练和微调场景下一致提升LLM在指令遵循和数学推理等任务上的性能，同时通过削弱注意力汇聚的影响来缓解该问题。

Conclusion: 巨量激活的起源可定位于ME层，其形成机制与RMSNorm和FFN相关；提出的缓解方法不仅能提升模型性能，还从隐藏状态层面揭示了注意力汇聚的成因，为设计更有效的缓解策略提供了新视角。

Abstract: We investigate the origins of massive activations in large language models (LLMs) and identify a specific layer named the \textbf{Massive Emergence Layer (ME Layer)}, that is consistently observed across model families, where massive activations first emerge and subsequently propagate to deeper layers through residual connections. We show that, within the ME Layer both the RMSNorm and the FFN parameters jointly contribute to the emergence of massive activations. Once formed, the massive activation token representation remains largely invariant across layers, reducing the diversity of hidden representations passed to the attention module. Motivated by this limitation, we propose a simple and effective method to reduce the rigidity of the massive activation token. Our approach consistently improves LLM performance across multiple tasks, including instruction following and math reasoning, in both training free and fine tuning settings. Moreover, we show that our method mitigates attention sinks by selectively weakening their influence, elucidating their origin at the hidden state level and shedding new light on principled mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [350] [A Single Neuron Is Sufficient to Bypass Safety Alignment in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08513)
*Hamid Kazemi,Atoosa Chegini,Maria Safi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现语言模型的安全对齐依赖于两种机制不同的神经元：拒绝神经元（控制有害知识是否表达）和概念神经元（编码有害知识本身）。通过分别调控单个神经元，无需训练或提示工程，即可绕过安全对齐或从无害提示中诱导有害内容，且该现象在多个模型家族和参数规模中普遍存在，表明安全对齐并未稳健分布，而是由少数因果充分的神经元介导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型安全对齐机制的脆弱性，验证安全对齐是否真正鲁棒地分布在模型权重中，还是依赖于少数关键神经元。

Method: 识别两类机制不同的神经元（拒绝神经元和概念神经元），通过分别抑制或放大单个神经元来操控模型的安全行为，在7个模型（涵盖两个模型家族、1.7B至70B参数）上进行验证。

Result: 抑制任意一个拒绝神经元即可绕过安全对齐回应有害请求；放大概念神经元可从无害提示中诱导有害内容。该方法无需训练或提示工程即可生效。

Conclusion: 安全对齐并未鲁棒地分布在模型参数中，而是由少数因果充分的单个神经元介导，这些神经元是安全对齐的关键脆弱点。

Abstract: Safety alignment in language models operates through two mechanistically distinct systems: refusal neurons that gate whether harmful knowledge is expressed, and concept neurons that encode the harmful knowledge itself. By targeting a single neuron in each system, we demonstrate both directions of failure -- bypassing safety on explicit harmful requests via suppression, and inducing harmful content from innocent prompts via amplification -- across seven models spanning two families and 1.7B to 70B parameters, without any training or prompt engineering. Our findings suggest that safety alignment is not robustly distributed across model weights but is mediated by individual neurons that are each causally sufficient to gate refusal behavior -- suppressing any one of the identified refusal neurons bypasses safety alignment across diverse harmful requests.

</details>


### [351] [Coordinates of Capability: A Unified MTMM-Geometric Framework for LLM Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08522)
*Adib Sakhawat,Tahsin Islam,Takia Farhin,Syed Rifat Raiyan,Hasan Mahmud,Md Kamrul Hasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个多特质多方法（MTMM）框架，将九种评估指标统一为几何测量，把大模型行为分解为三个正交潜维度，以解决LLM评估中的构念效度问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评估面临构念效度危机——碎片化的基准和临时性指标常将方法方差（如提示敏感性）与真实潜能力混为一谈，缺乏系统化的理论框架来区分任务无关扰动与真实能力跨度。

Method: 提出泛化的多特质多方法（MTMM）评估框架，形式化并统一九种评估指标（包括Paraphrase Instability、Drift Score等），将其解释为共享潜坐标空间中的几何测量，通过空间统一将模型行为分解为三个正交潜维度。

Result: 将模型行为分解为三个正交潜维度：（1）不稳定性和敏感性；（2）立场与对齐；（3）覆盖度与表现力。并基于此提供了理论上扎实且领域无关的分类体系。

Conclusion: 该框架通过系统分离任务无关扰动与真实能力跨度，为稳健且经验稳定的基准设计提供了理论依据，有望解决当前LLM评估中的构念效度问题。

Abstract: The evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) faces a critical challenge in construct validity, where fragmented benchmarks and ad hoc metrics frequently conflate method variance, such as prompt sensitivity, with true latent capabilities. Concurrently, emerging research suggests that LLM capabilities and outputs can be modeled as continuous geometric manifolds. In this Systematization of Knowledge (SoK), we bridge these paradigms by proposing a generalized Multi-Trait Multi-Method (MTMM) framework for LLM evaluation. We formalize and unify nine evaluation metrics, including Paraphrase Instability, Drift Score, Overton Width, and Pluralism Score, interpreting them not as isolated scalar values but as geometric measurements within a shared latent coordinate space. This spatial unification factorizes model behavior into three orthogonal latent dimensions: (1) Instability and Sensitivity, (2) Position and Alignment, and (3) Coverage and Expressiveness. By systematically separating task-irrelevant perturbations from true capability spans, the framework provides a theoretically grounded and domain-agnostic taxonomy for robust and empirically stable benchmark design.

</details>


### [352] [AgentForesight: Online Auditing for Early Failure Prediction in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08715)
*Boxuan Zhang,Jianing Zhu,Zeru Shi,Dongfang Liu,Ruixiang Tang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentForesight框架，将多智能体系统中的事后失败归因重构为在线审计问题，通过训练AgentForesight-7B模型在轨迹执行过程中实时检测早期关键错误，相比GPT-4.1等模型性能提升最高19.9%，步骤定位误差降低3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅在轨迹结束后进行事后失败归因，无法在轨迹执行过程中进行干预。一个关键性错误会被下游智能体逐步放大，最终导致整个轨迹失败，因此亟需能在线上实时审计并早期报警的框架。

Method: 构建AFTraj-2K数据集（包含安全轨迹与在关键错误步骤标注的不安全轨迹），训练AgentForesight-7B紧凑型在线审计模型。采用粗到细的强化学习策略：先通过相邻安全/不安全前缀对建立风险预期先验，再通过三轴奖励（what错误类型、where错误位置、who责任智能体）进行精细步骤级定位。

Result: 在AFTraj-2K和外部Who&When基准上，AgentForesight-7B超越GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-V4-Pro等领先闭源模型，性能提升达19.9%，步骤定位误差降低3倍。

Conclusion: 从事后失败检测转向部署时在线干预，为长周期多智能体系统的实时监控和及时干预开辟了新路径。

Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks, but a single decisive error is often accepted by downstream agents and cascades into trajectory-level failure. Existing work frames this as \emph{post-hoc failure attribution}, diagnosing the responsible agent and step after the trajectory has ended. However, this paradigm forfeits any opportunity to intervene while trajectory is still unfolding. In this work, we introduce AgentForesight, a framework that reframes this problem as online auditing: at each step of an unfolding trajectory, an auditor observes only the current prefix and must either continue the run or alarm at the earliest decisive error, without access to future steps. To this end, we curate AFTraj-2K, a corpus of agentic trajectories across Coding, Math, and Agentic domains, in which safe trajectories are retained under a strict curation pipeline and unsafe trajectories are annotated at the step of their decisive error via consensus among multiple LLM judges. Built on that, we develop AgentForesight-7B, a compact online auditor trained with a coarse-to-fine reinforcement learning recipe that first equips it with a risk-anticipation prior at the failure boundary on adjacent safe/unsafe prefix pairs, then sharpens this prior into precise step-level localization under a three-axis reward jointly targeting the what, where, and who of an audit verdict. Across AFTraj-2K and an external Who\&When benchmark, AgentForesight-7B outperforms leading proprietary models, including GPT-4.1 and DeepSeek-V4-Pro, achieving up to +19.9% performance gain and 3$\times$ lower step localization error, opening the loop from post-hoc failures detection to enabling deployment-time intervention. Project page: https://zbox1005.github.io/agent-foresight/

</details>


### [353] [Source or It Didn't Happen: A Multi-Agent Framework for Citation Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08583)
*Mingzhe Li,Zhiqiang Lin,Shiqing Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CiteTracer，一个基于12类引用分类法的级联多智能体检测器，用于检测大语言模型生成的虚假引用，在合成基准上达97.1%准确率，真实场景下检测出97.1%的伪造引用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在科学写作中常生成看似合理但实际无法验证的虚假引用，现有检测器仅做二元分类，依赖脆弱的解析和不完整的检索，缺乏细粒度信号。

Method: 提出12类引用分类法（真实/潜在/虚假三类），构建CiteTracer级联多智能体系统：从PDF和BibTeX提取结构化引用，通过缓存查找、URL获取、学术连接器、网页搜索等多途径检索证据，进行确定性字段匹配，并将模糊案例交给类别专家判断。

Result: 合成基准上准确率97.1%，三类F1分别为97.0（Real）、95.8（Potential）、98.5（Hallucinated）；真实伪造引用（ICLR 2026及匿名会议）检测率97.1%，无弃权。

Conclusion: CiteTracer通过细粒度分类和级联多智能体架构，显著优于现有二元检测方法，为引用真实性审计提供了更丰富的现场级信号。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in scientific writing, yet they can fabricate citation-shaped references that appear plausible but fail bibliographic verification. Existing detectors often reduce verification to binary found/not-found decisions and rely on brittle parsing or incomplete retrieval, offering little field-level signal to auditors. We reframe citation hallucination detection as taxonomy-aligned field-level adjudication and introduce a 12-code taxonomy spanning Real, Potential, and Hallucinated citations. Based on this taxonomy, we build CiteTracer, a cascading multi-agent detector that extracts structured citations from PDF and BibTeX, retrieves evidence through cache lookup, URL fetch, scholar connectors, and web search, applies deterministic field matching, and routes ambiguous cases to class-specialist judgers. We release a benchmark of 2,450 synthetic citations built from real seeds with controlled LLM mutations, paired with 957 real-world fabricated citations drawn from ICLR 2026 and an anonymous conference desk-rejected submissions. CiteTracer reaches 97.1% accuracy on the synthetic benchmark, with class-level F1 scores of 97.0, 95.8, and 98.5 for Real, Potential, and Hallucinated, respectively, and detects 97.1% of fabrications on the real-world set without abstaining. Code: https://github.com/aaFrostnova/CiteTracer.

</details>


### [354] [100,000+ Movie Reviews from Kazakhstan: Russian, Kazakh, and Code-Switched Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08600)
*Rustem Yeshpanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了来自哈萨克斯坦kino.kz网站的电影评论数据集，包含100,502条多语言评论（俄语、哈萨克语及代码转换文本），手动标注了语言和情感极性。实验表明，Transformer模型在三类极性分类上优于传统方法，但五类评分分类因类别不平衡和相邻评分区分困难而仍具挑战性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 填补哈萨克斯坦电影评论领域的资源空白，提供一个公开可用的多语言（俄语、哈萨克语及代码转换）情感分析数据集，并探索不同模型在该数据集上的情感分类性能。

Method: 构建了一个包含100,502条电影评论的数据集，手动标注语言和情感极性，并定义了三个类别的极性分类和五个类别的评分分类任务。使用BoW/TF-IDF作为传统基线，对比了mBERT、XLM-RoBERTa、RemBERT等多语言Transformer模型。

Result: Transformer模型在三类极性分类上一致优于传统基线方法。五类评分分类在泄漏控制评估下仍具挑战性，主要受类别严重不平衡和相邻评分等级之间细微差异的影响。

Conclusion: 多语言Transformer模型在情感极性分类任务上表现更好，但更细粒度的评分分类仍需解决类别不平衡和等级区分问题，提示未来研究需关注这些难点。

Abstract: We present a new publicly available corpus of 100,502 movie reviews from Kazakhstan collected from kino.kz, spanning 2001-2025 and covering 4,943 unique titles. The dataset is multilingual, consisting mainly of Russian reviews alongside Kazakh and code-switched texts. Reviews are manually annotated for language and sentiment polarity, and 11,309 reviews additionally contain explicit user-provided ratings. We define two sentiment tasks -- three-way polarity classification and five-class score classification -- and benchmark classical BoW/TF-IDF baselines against multilingual transformer models (mBERT, XLM-RoBERTa, RemBERT). Experimental results show that transformer models consistently outperform classical baselines on polarity classification, while score classification remains challenging under leakage-controlled evaluation due to severe class imbalance and subtle distinctions between adjacent rating levels.

</details>


### [355] [PARD-2: Target-Aligned Parallel Draft Model for Dual-Mode Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08632)
*Zihao An,Taichi Liu,Ziqiong Liu,Dong Li,Ruofeng Liu,Emad Barsoum*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PARD-2提出了一种双重模式推测解码框架，通过置信度自适应令牌优化，将草稿模型的训练目标从预测准确率转向最大化接受长度，在多种任务上实现高达6.94倍无损加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有草稿模型的训练目标（令牌预测准确率）与推理阶段最大化连续令牌接收率的目标不一致，导致推理效率无法达到最优。

Method: 基于PARD提出PARD-2框架，引入置信度自适应令牌（CAT）优化，根据每个令牌的置信度自适应调整权重，使其更好地对齐验证过程；同时支持目标依赖和目标独立两种模式。

Result: 在多种模型和任务上，PARD-2实现高达6.94倍无损加速；在Llama3.1-8B上，比EAGLE-3快1.9倍，比PARD快1.3倍。

Conclusion: 通过重塑草稿模型的训练目标（从令牌预测准确率转向整体接受长度），并结合CAT优化与双模式框架，PARD-2显著提升了推测解码的加速效果。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Models (LLMs) inference by using a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens that are verified in parallel by the target model. However, existing draft model training objectives are not directly aligned with the inference-time goal of maximizing consecutive token acceptance. To address this issue, we reformulate the draft model optimization objective, shifting the focus from token prediction accuracy to the overall acceptance length. In this paper, we build upon PARD to propose PARD-2, a dual-mode speculative decoding framework with Confidence-Adaptive Token (CAT) optimization. This approach adaptively reweights each token to better align with the verification process. Notably, PARD-2 enables a single draft model to support both target-dependent and target-independent modes. Experiments across diverse models and tasks demonstrate that PARD-2 achieves up to 6.94$\times$ lossless acceleration, surpassing EAGLE-3 by 1.9$\times$ and PARD by 1.3$\times$ on Llama3.1-8B. Our code is available at https://github.com/AMD-AGI/PARD.

</details>


### [356] [EdgeFlowerTune: Evaluating Federated LLM Fine-Tuning Under Realistic Edge System Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08636)
*Jiaxiang Geng,Yiyi Lu,Lunyu Zhao,Yan Gao,Nicholas D. Lane,Bing Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出EdgeFlowerTune，一个面向真实边缘系统约束的联邦大模型微调基准测试平台，联合评估模型质量与系统成本（通信、延迟、内存、能耗、鲁棒性），并通过三项协议（Quality-under-Budget、Cost-to-Target、Robustness）全面比较方法，实验表明仅凭精度评估会产生误导性结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦大模型微调研究多基于跨孤岛或仿真设置，忽略了真实边缘设备的资源与运行时约束，因此无法判断方法是否能在真实边缘系统上部署。

Method: 提出EdgeFlowerTune部署导向基准，联合评估模型质量与系统成本（通信、延迟、内存、能耗、鲁棒性），引入三种互补评估协议：Quality-under-Budget（给定预算下的质量）、Cost-to-Target（达到目标质量的成本）、Robustness（鲁棒性），并在基于Flower和MobileFineTuner的真实安卓手机与英伟达边缘开发板上实现。

Result: 实验表明，仅基于精度的评估会得出误导性结论；在考虑真实系统约束后，最终质量相似的方法在可部署性上存在显著差异。

Conclusion: EdgeFlowerTune为联邦大模型微调在边缘场景下的系统感知评估提供了可复现的基准，强调必须将系统成本纳入考量才能做出合理的部署决策。

Abstract: Federated fine-tuning offers a promising paradigm for adapting large language models (LLMs) on edge devices by leveraging the rich, diverse, and continuously generated data from smartphones and IoT devices without compromising user data privacy. Such edge-side adaptation can improve model personalization, robustness, and responsiveness to local contexts. However, the practical feasibility of federated LLM fine-tuning on real edge devices remains unclear, as most existing work focuses on cross-silo or simulation-based settings, overlooking the resource and runtime constraints that determine whether a method is deployable on real edge systems. We present EdgeFlowerTune, a deployment-oriented benchmark for federated LLM fine-tuning under realistic edge-system constraints. EdgeFlowerTune jointly evaluates model quality and system costs, including communication, wall-clock latency, memory usage, energy consumption, and robustness to dynamic edge conditions. To compare methods in terms of effectiveness, efficiency, and robustness, EdgeFlowerTune introduces three complementary protocols: Quality-under-Budget, Cost-to-Target, and Robustness. We instantiate EdgeFlowerTune as a real-device platform built on Flower and MobileFineTuner, spanning commercial Android smartphones and NVIDIA edge development boards. Our benchmark results show that accuracy-only evaluation can lead to misleading conclusions: methods with similar final quality may differ substantially in deployability once realistic system constraints are considered. EdgeFlowerTune provides a reproducible benchmark for system-aware evaluation of federated LLM fine-tuning at the edge.

</details>


### [357] [AgentCollabBench: Diagnosing When Good Agents Make Bad Collaborators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08647)
*Aritra Mazumder,Shubhashis Roy Dipta,Nusrat Jahan Lia,Tanzila Khan,Kainat Raisa Hossain,Nehaa Shri,Shubhrangshu Debsarkar,Humayra Tasnim,Gour Gupal Talukder Shawon,Debjoty Mitra,Sumaiya Ahmed Rani,Al Jami Islam Anik,Al Nafeu Khan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentCollabBench基准，系统评估多智能体系统中约束丢失、错误传播等隐性流程故障，发现通信拓扑结构比模型能力更影响多跳信息可靠性，证明多智能体系统可靠性本质上是结构问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终输出结果，无法捕捉多跳推理链中约束被静默丢弃、错误信息传播等隐性流程故障，需要一种能系统量化这些漏洞的诊断工具。

Method: 构建包含900个人类验证任务的基准AgentCollabBench，隔离四种行为风险（指令衰减、错误信念传播、上下文泄漏、追踪器持久性），在四种LLM上测试并分析通信拓扑结构的影响。

Result: 发现模型特异性脆弱性画像（如Qwen-3.5在指令稳定性和追踪持久性领先，GPT 4.1 mini在泄漏控制和错误信念抵抗领先）；通信拓扑结构解释了7-40%的多跳信息存活方差，收敛DAG节点存在"综合瓶颈"导致少数分支约束被丢弃。

Conclusion: 多智能体可靠性本质上是结构问题，次优拓扑可静默抹去高性能模型的安全保障，仅提升模型能力无法替代架构优化。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems achieve state-of-the-art outcomes through peer collaboration. However, when an agent in the pipeline silently drops a constraint, the system's final output may look correct even though the reasoning chain was quietly corrupted, and existing outcome-based evaluations are blind to such multi-hop process failures. To make these vulnerabilities measurable before deployment, we introduce AgentCollabBench, a diagnostic benchmark of 900 human-validated tasks spanning software engineering, DevOps, and data engineering. Each task isolates one of four behavioral risks: instruction decay (does a constraint survive peer pressure?), false-belief contagion (does a falsehood spread through consensus?), context leakage (does information bleed between tasks?), and tracer durability (does marked data reach the final agent?). Evaluating four modern LLMs (GPT 4.1 mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, and Llama 3.1 8B Instruct), we expose model-specific vulnerability profiles invisible to outcome-only evaluation; Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, for example, leads on tracer durability and instruction stability, while GPT 4.1 mini leads on leakage containment and false-belief resistance. Beyond per-model differences, communication topology emerges as a primary risk factor that explains 7-40% of the variance in multi-hop information survival. The effect traces to a synthesis bottleneck specific to converging-DAG nodes: an agent weighing competing parent inputs discards constraints carried by a minority branch, a bottleneck structurally absent from linear chains. AgentCollabBench demonstrates that suboptimal topology can silently erase the safeguards of highly capable models, arguing that multi-agent reliability is fundamentally a structural problem and that scaling model intelligence alone is no substitute for architecture.

</details>


### [358] [Hint Tuning: Less Data Makes Better Reasoners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08665)
*Siqi Fan,Minghao Li,Xiaoqian Ma,Xiusheng Huang,Zhuo Chen,Bowen Qin,Liujie Zhang,Shuo Shang,Weihang Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Hint Tuning方法，通过让推理模型根据问题难度自适应调整推理深度，仅用1K自标注样本即可在保持精度的前提下减少24-66%的token生成。核心思想是利用instruct模型作为难度探针，自动构建三种提示状态（无提示、稀疏提示、完整提示）的训练数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在链式推理中无论问题难易都生成过多冗余token（比必要量多5-8倍），缺乏推理深度的自适应能力，导致计算资源浪费。

Method: 提出Hint Tuning：(1) 将instruct模型作为难度探针，通过测试其在不同程度提示下的表现自动标注数据；(2) 构建三种状态数据：No-Hint（直接回答）、Sparse-Hint（最小前缀）、Full-Hint（完整推理）；(3) 仅用1K自标注样本进行微调对齐。

Result: 在多个主流推理模型（Qwen3-Thinking、DeepSeek-R1-Distill，4B-32B）上实现24-66%的token缩减（平均31.5%），同时在五个基准测试上保持竞争性准确率。

Conclusion: 通过简单的instruct模型能力对齐，无需大规模蒸馏数据集或昂贵的强化学习，即可高效实现推理深度校准，证明了难度感知推理的有效性。

Abstract: Large reasoning models achieve high accuracy through extended chain-of-thought but generate 5--8 more tokens than necessary, applying verbose reasoning uniformly regardless of problem difficulty. We propose Hint Tuning, a data-efficient approach that teaches models to calibrate reasoning depth. Our key insight: the corresponding instruct model serves as an ideal difficulty probe. By testing what the instruct model can solve with varying guidance, we automatically construct training data across three states: No-Hint (direct answer), Sparse-Hint (minimal prefix), and Full-Hint (complete reasoning). This converts the abstract challenge of difficulty labeling into a measurable consistency check between the instruct and reasoning models. With only 1K self-annotated samples, Hint Tuning achieves 24--66% token reduction (31.5% average) across mainstream reasoning models (Qwen3-Thinking, DeepSeek-R1-Distill) at multiple scales (4B--32B) while maintaining competitive accuracy on five benchmarks. Unlike methods requiring massive distillation datasets or expensive RL, we achieve superior efficiency through simple alignment with the instruct model's capabilities.

</details>


### [359] [Explanation Fairness in Large Language Models: An Empirical Analysis of Disparities in How LLMs Justify Decisions Across Demographic Groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08671)
*Gautam Veldanda*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出解释公平性分类法（EFT），系统评估LLM在不同人口群体间解释决策时的质量差异。通过五个维度、八个指标（包括两个新提出的黑盒指标），在多个模型和决策场景中均发现显著统计差异。提示工程缓解策略可减少决策相关解释差异（78-95%），但无法消除风格层面（如冗长度、情感）的不平等，表明后者编码于预训练分布中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然AI决策的公平性已被广泛研究，但AI解释的公平性（即LLM是否以相同质量、深度、语气和语言复杂度向不同人口群体解释决策）却鲜有关注。论文旨在系统性地定义、测量和缓解这种解释层面的公平性问题。

Method: 提出解释公平性分类法（EFT），包含五个正式定义的可操作维度：冗长度差异、情感差异、认知性模糊限制差异、决策关联解释差异、词汇复杂度差异。在80个提示模板、四个决策领域（招聘、医疗分诊、信贷评估、法律判决）和五个LLM上进行控制实验。引入两个新黑盒指标：模糊密度分数（HDS）和解释忠实度代理（EFP）。

Result: 在多达400组提示对中，所有八个EFT指标均表现出统计显著差异（Cohen's d从较小到较大，所有p_BH < 10^(-62)）。Qwen3 32B的冗长度差异是LLaMA 3.3 70B的5.9倍。基于提示的缓解措施可使EFP差异减少78-95%，但对风格维度无显著效果。

Conclusion: 风格性的解释不平等编码于预训练分布中，无法通过部署层面的指令解决。提供了可复现的解释级公平性审计框架，对AI监管和部署实践具有重要启示。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed not only to make decisions but to explain them. While AI decision fairness has been studied extensively, the fairness of AI explanations (whether LLMs justify decisions with equal quality, depth, tone, and linguistic sophistication across demographic groups) has received little attention. This paper introduces the Explanation Fairness Taxonomy (EFT), a framework comprising five formally defined, operationalizable dimensions: Verbosity Disparity, Sentiment Disparity, Epistemic Hedging Disparity, Decision-Linked Explanation Disparity, and Lexical Complexity Disparity. The taxonomy is instantiated in a controlled empirical study across 80 prompt templates, four consequential decision domains (hiring, medical triage, credit assessment, legal judgment), and five LLMs: GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet, LLaMA 3.3 70B, GPT-OSS 120B, and Qwen3 32B. Two novel black-box metrics are introduced: the Hedging Density Score (HDS) and the Explanation Faithfulness Proxy (EFP), a heuristic indicator of decision-linked explanation variation. Across up to 400 prompt pairs, all eight EFT metrics show statistically significant disparities (Cohen's d ranging from small to large, all p_BH < 10^(-62)). Model choice is strongly associated with disparity magnitude: Qwen3 32B exhibits verbosity disparities 5.9x larger than LLaMA 3.3 70B. Two prompting-based mitigations show significant reductions in EFP disparity (78-95%) but no significant effect on stylistic dimensions, consistent with the hypothesis that stylistic explanation inequalities are encoded in pre-training distributions and are not resolvable through deployment-level instruction alone. A reproducible measurement framework is offered for explanation-level fairness auditing, with implications for AI regulation and deployment practice.

</details>


### [360] [Structured Recurrent Mixers for Massively Parallelized Sequence Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08696)
*Benjamin L. Badger*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Structured Recurrent Mixer (SRM)架构，支持训练时序列并行与推理时循环表示之间的代数转换，无需专用内核。实验表明SRM在训练效率、输入信息容量和推理吞吐量上优于其他线性复杂度模型，在Mojo/MAX上相比vLLM的Transformer实现吞吐量提升12倍、并发性提升170倍，并展示其在强化学习中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统循环架构训练效率低，非循环架构推理吞吐量受限。作者希望设计一种架构，既能享受训练时的并行计算优势，又能保留推理时的循环高效特征，同时避免专用硬件的依赖。

Method: 提出Structured Recurrent Mixer (SRM)架构，支持训练时的序列并行表示与推理时的循环表示之间的代数转换，无需专用内核或设备特定的内存管理。

Result: Mojo/MAX推理实现相比vLLM上的Transformer，吞吐量提升12倍，并发性提升170倍；PyTorch实现下计算常数GSM8k Pass@k提升30%。

Conclusion: 循环模型不适合信息密集型长序列输入，但适合批量维度的扩展；SRM是有效的强化学习训练候选架构。

Abstract: Over the last two decades, language modeling has experienced a shift from predominantly recurrent architectures that process tokens sequentially during training and inference to non-recurrent models that process sequence elements in parallel during training, which results in greater training efficiency and stability at the expense of lower inference throughput. Here we introduce the Structured Recurrent Mixer, an architecture that allows for algebraic conversion between a sequence parallel representation at train time and a recurrent representation at inference, notably without the need for specialized kernels or device-specific memory management. We show experimentally that this dual representation allows for greater training efficiency, higher input information capacity, and larger inference throughput and concurrency when compared to other linear complexity models. We postulate that recurrent models are poorly suited to extended sequence length scaling for information-rich inputs typical of language, but are well suited to scaling in the sample (batch) dimension due to their constant memory per sample. We provide Mojo/MAX inference implementations of SRMs exhibiting 12x the throughput and 170x the concurrency of similarly powerful Transformers inferenced on vLLM, increases characteristic of Pytorch implementations resulting in a 30\% increase in compute-constant GSM8k Pass@k. We conclude by demonstrating that SRMs are effective reinforcement learning training candidates.

</details>


### [361] [Breaking the Impasse: Dual-Scale Evolutionary Policy Training for Social Language Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08721)
*Minzheng Wang,Run Luo,Yanbo Wang,Zichen Liu,Yuqiao Tan,Tao Tan,Xu Nan,Yinhe Zheng,Wenji Mao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在开放社交语言游戏中存在的策略同质化与进化停滞问题，提出双尺度进化策略训练（DEPT），通过时间尺度进化感知机制检测停滞，并利用非对称优势重塑动态调节优化景观，从而恢复梯度信号并促进持续策略探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR在封闭任务中表现优异，但扩展到开放社交语言游戏时，由于策略空间巨大，智能体容易收敛到同质化行为，导致对局结果确定性增强，梯度信号消失，策略进化陷入停滞（进化停滞问题）。

Method: 提出DEPT框架：1) 时间尺度进化感知机制，通过双尺度价值基线差异和对局熵量化检测进化停滞；2) 非对称优势重塑，在检测到停滞时动态调整优化景观，恢复梯度信号并强制进行持续策略探索。

Result: 在多个社交语言游戏上的实验表明，DEPT显著优于强基线方法，有效避免策略退化，驱动社交语言智能体的持续进化。

Conclusion: DEPT成功解决了RLVR在开放社交语言游戏中面临的进化停滞问题，通过动态干预机制维持了策略多样性，为开放式多智能体语言博弈中的持续学习提供了有效方案。

Abstract: While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has proven effective for closed-ended tasks, extending it to open-ended social language games via self-play reveals a critical issue: evolution impasse. Due to the vast strategy space, language agents frequently converge to homogenized behaviors, leading to deterministic match outcomes that eliminate the gradient signals necessary for policy evolution. To tackle this issue, we propose Dual-scale Evolutionary Policy Training (DEPT) for social language games. DEPT introduces a time-scaled evolutionary perception mechanism that detects impasse by quantifying dual-scale value baseline divergence alongside match entropy. Upon perceiving the collapse, it then activates asymmetric advantage reshaping to dynamically modulate the optimization landscape for intervention. Thus, our method effectively restores gradient signals and enforces sustained strategic exploration. Extensive experiments on multiple social language games demonstrate that DEPT outperforms strong baselines, avoiding policy degeneration and driving the continuous evolution of social language agents.

</details>


### [362] [Training with Harnesses: On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation for Complex Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08741)
*Zhengyang Zhao,Lu Ma,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出OPHSD方法，通过将增强型推理流程（harness）作为教师进行自蒸馏，把推理能力内化到基础模型中，使模型无需外部流程就能独立解决复杂推理任务。实验表明该方法显著优于基线，且推理时重新挂载流程反而可能降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的推理时增强方法（如draft-verify、plan-solve等）虽然能提升大模型在复杂推理任务上的表现，但这些外部流程并未真正改变模型自身的能力。一旦移除这些流程，模型性能就会回落。作者希望找到一种方式，将这些外部流程带来的能力内化到模型本身中。

Method: 提出On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation (OPHSD)：使用当前模型加上推理harness（如draft-verify、plan-solve）作为教师，对学生模型进行自蒸馏，将harness带来的额外监督信号（超越原始训练数据）内化到学生模型中。训练时采用on-policy方式，即教师和学生模型同步更新。

Result: 在文本分类的draft-verify框架和数学推理的plan-solve框架上评估，OPHSD consistently outperforms strong baselines，例如在HMMT25数据集上比OPSD高出10.83%。进一步分析发现，推理时重新挂载harness不仅没有额外收益，甚至可能降低性能。

Conclusion: 复杂的推理harness不一定是永久性的外部组件，它们可以充当临时训练支架（training scaffolds），其带来的能力提升可以被永久性地回馈到基础模型中。这意味着推理时增强与模型能力内化可以形成互补关系：先用harness提升推理性能，再通过蒸馏将这种能力固化到模型参数中。

Abstract: Inference-time harnesses substantially improve large language models on complex reasoning tasks. However, the intrinsic capabilities of the underlying model remain unchanged by the addition of these external workflows. To bridge this gap, we introduce \emph{On-Policy Harness Self-Distillation} (OPHSD), which employs the harness-augmented current model as a teacher for self-distillation, thereby introducing extra supervisory signals from the harness beyond training data. OPHSD internalizes task-specific harness capabilities into the student model, yielding robust generalizability and strong standalone performance across diverse reasoning tasks. Evaluated across draft--verify harness for text classification and plan--solve for mathematical reasoning tasks, OPHSD consistently outperforms strong baselines (e.g., +10.83\% over OPSD on HMMT25). Our analysis further indicates that reattaching the harness during inference yields no additional benefits and can even degrade performance, suggesting that complex harnesses need not always be permanent fixtures; instead, they can serve as temporary training scaffolds whose benefits are permanently fed back into the base model. Our code and training data are available at https://github.com/zzy1127/OPHSD-On-Policy-Harness-Self-Distillation.

</details>


### [363] [Narrative Landscape: Mapping Narrative Dispositions Across LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08742)
*Donghoon Jung,Jiwoo Choi,Songeun Chae,Seohyon Jung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究提出一个量化框架，通过受控重复诱发条件下的输出规律来刻画LLM的"倾向性"（dispositions），将倾向性分解为"一致性"（Jaccard相似度）和"多样性"（逆Simpson指数）两个维度，并借助PCA可视化揭示不同模型在"刚性-探索"谱系上的位置及指令类型对选择拓扑结构的隐性影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估多关注单次输出的正确性或质量，缺乏对模型在重复、受控条件下表现出的稳定、模型特异性的输出规律（即"倾向性"）的系统性刻画，无法区分不同模型的固有个性特征。

Method: 设计了结构化叙事约束选择任务，在6个前沿模型和3种指令类型下进行重复诱发；用Jaccard相似度衡量"一致性"，用逆Simpson指数衡量"多样性"；通过PCA（Narrative Landscape）将模型选择轮廓映射到共享空间进行可视化比较。

Result: 发现模型家族间存在清晰的"刚性-探索"谱系；不同指令类型即使使得标量指标（如一致性和多样性分数）看似相似，也会改变选择空间的几何结构，说明可比分数可能掩盖截然不同的选择拓扑。

Conclusion: 标量指标不足以全面刻画LLM的倾向性特征，需结合拓扑可视化；指令类型对模型行为的影响不仅体现在数值层面，更体现在选择空间的几何结构层面，这为理解LLM的稳定个性特征提供了新视角。

Abstract: This study proposes a quantitative framework for profiling LLM dispositions as stable, model-specific regularities in output under repeated, controlled elicitation. Using a structured narrative constraint-selection task administered across six frontier models and three instruction types, we operationalize disposition through two dimensions: "consistency", measured as cross-replication selection overlap via Jaccard similarity, and "diversity", measured as dispersion across options via the inverse Simpson index. We further introduce Narrative Landscape, a PCA-based visualization that maps each model's selection profile into a shared space for direct comparison. Results reveal a clear rigidity-exploration spectrum across model families and show that instruction types shift the geometry of selection spaces even when scalar metrics appear similar, indicating that comparable scores can mask qualitatively distinct selection topologies.

</details>


### [364] [SimReg: Achieving Higher Performance in the Pretraining via Embedding Similarity Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08809)
*Yan Sun,Guoxia Wang,Jinle Zeng,JiaBin Yang,Shuai Li,Li Shen,Dacheng Tao,DianHai Yu,Haifeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出SimReg，一种嵌入相似性正则化损失，通过在预训练中鼓励同标签token表示更相似、异标签token更分离，加速LLM训练收敛30%以上，并在零样本下游任务中提升1%以上性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM基于下一个token预测的预训练方式导致token嵌入存在高类内方差和低类间相似性，限制了表示学习效率。虽然相似性正则化在监督微调和分类任务中已被证明有效，但其在大规模LLM预训练中的应用尚未充分探索。

Method: 提出SimReg损失函数，包含两个部分：(1) 鼓励同一序列中具有相同真实标签的token表示更相似的正则化项；(2) 通过对比损失强制不同标签token表示相互分离。该机制通过扩大多分类边界来提升分类效率。

Result: 在密集架构和MoE架构上的大量实验表明，SimReg一致地将训练收敛速度提升超过30%，并在标准基准测试上将平均零样本下游性能提升超过1%。
