TL;DR: 本文提出GONE基准测试和NEDS框架，用于评估和解决LLM中结构化知识图谱事实的遗忘问题，在LLaMA-3-8B和Mistral-7B上取得了优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遗忘方法聚焦于扁平句子级数据，忽视了结构化数据中的关系型、多跳和推理知识，导致安全、隐私和知识产权问题未能有效解决。

Method: 提出GONE基准（基于知识图谱，可解耦遗忘的三种效应）和NEDS框架（利用图连通性识别锚定相关邻居，在遗忘事实与语义邻居间建立精确决策边界）。

Result: 在LLaMA-3-8B和Mistral-7B上，NEDS在GONE及其他基准上表现优异（遗忘效果1.000，局部性0.839）。

Conclusion: 基于知识图谱的遗忘评估与结构化学习方法能更有效地应对LLM中的关系型知识遗忘挑战，NEDS框架在保持模型局部性的同时实现了高遗忘效果。

Abstract: Unlearning knowledge is a pressing and challenging task in Large Language Models (LLMs) because of their unprecedented capability to memorize and digest training data at scale, raising more significant issues regarding safety, privacy, and intellectual property. However, existing works, including parameter editing, fine-tuning, and distillation-based methods, are all focused on flat sentence-level data but overlook the relational, multi-hop, and reasoned knowledge in naturally structured data. In response to this gap, this paper introduces Graph Oblivion and Node Erasure (GONE), a benchmark for evaluating knowledge unlearning over structured knowledge graph (KG) facts in LLMs. This KG-based benchmark enables the disentanglement of three effects of unlearning: direct fact removal, reasoning-based leakage, and catastrophic forgetting. In addition, Neighborhood-Expanded Distribution Shaping (NEDS), a novel unlearning framework, is designed to leverage graph connectivity and identify anchor correlated neighbors, enforcing a precise decision boundary between the forgotten fact and its semantic neighborhood. Evaluations on LLaMA-3-8B and Mistral-7B across multiple knowledge editing and unlearning methods showcase NEDS's superior performance (1.000 on unlearning efficacy and 0.839 on locality) on GONE and other benchmarks. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GONE-4679/.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [515] [Reinforcement learning for inverse structural design and rapid laser cutting of kirigami prototypes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08098)
*Milad Yazdani,Shahriar Shalileh,Dena Shahriari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RL-Kirigami框架，结合最优传输条件流匹配（OT-CFM）与强化学习（GRPO），用于可重构平行四边形剪纸超材料的逆向设计。该方法通过 marching 解码器保证几何兼容性，GRPO优化不可微奖励。单次采样达到94.2% sIoU，GRPO提升至94.91%，并降低了TV值。生成设计可直接导出DXF并激光切割制作原型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Kirigami（剪纸）是一种有用的 fabrication 方法，可生成形状可编程的超材料结构。然而，逆向设计仍然困难，因为展开过程是非线性的，可行的切割布局必须满足离散兼容性规则、避免重叠，并将一个目标形状映射到有效设计。

Method: 提出RL-Kirigami框架，结合最优传输条件流匹配（OT-CFM）与强化学习（GRPO），生成兼容比例场。使用 marching 解码器确保全局几何兼容性，GRPO对齐生成器与不可微奖励（轮廓匹配、可行性、比例场正则性）。

Result: 单次OT-CFM采样达94.2% sIoU，优于求解器基线，正向模拟评估从数百次降至1次。GRPO将准确率提升至94.91% sIoU，加入正则性后TV(x)从0.95降至0.81，sIoU保持94.83%。生成布局可导出DXF并激光切割，每个零件制作时间8.0±1.0分钟。

Conclusion: RL-Kirigami支持制造感知的逆向设计工作流，可在硬几何可行性约束下生成可展开的剪纸超材料设计。

Abstract: Kirigami is an increasingly useful fabrication method to produce shape-programmable metamaterial structures. However, inverse design remains difficult because deployment is nonlinear, and feasible cut layouts must satisfy discrete compatibility rules, avoid overlap, and map one target shape to valid designs. We present RL-Kirigami, an inverse design framework that combines optimal-transport conditional flow matching (OT-CFM) with reinforcement learning to generate compatible ratio fields for compact reconfigurable parallelogram quad kirigami. A marching decoder enforces global geometric compatibility, and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aligns the generator with nondifferentiable rewards for silhouette matching, feasibility, and ratio-field regularity. Across procedurally generated target shape instances, a single sample from the pretrained OT-CFM prior reached $94.2%$ sIoU and outperformed solver baselines while reducing forward simulator evaluations from hundreds to 1. GRPO improved accuracy to $94.91%$ sIoU and, with regularity included, reduced $\mathrm{TV}(\mathbf{x})$ from 0.95 to 0.81 while maintaining $94.83%$ sIoU. Generated layouts were exported to DXF and laser-cut in $50~μ\mathrm{m}$ polymeric sheets to produce deployable prototypes in $8.0 \pm 1.0$ minutes per part. These results support a manufacturing-aware inverse design workflow for deployable kirigami metamaterials under hard geometric feasibility constraints.

</details>


### [516] [Path-Based Gradient Boosting for Graph-Level Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08102)
*Claudio Meggio,Johan Pensar,Riccardo De Bin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PathBoost，一种基于梯度提升树的图分类与回归方法，通过学习判别性路径特征，在图结构数据上取得了与复杂黑盒方法相竞争的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了在图分类与回归任务中开发一种可解释性强且能与复杂黑盒模型（如GNN和图核方法）竞争的基于路径特征的梯度提升方法。

Method: 基于梯度树提升，扩展了三个关键点：(i) 通过逻辑损失适应二分类任务；(ii) 利用前缀分解将节点和边属性纳入路径特征空间；(iii) 基于类别属性多样性自动选择锚节点。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上与GNN和图核方法对比，一半任务上获得更优结果，其余任务上结果相当；在平均节点数较大的图上表现更好。

Conclusion: 基于路径的梯度提升方法能够与更复杂的黑盒模型竞争，且具有较好的可解释性和竞争力。

Abstract: We propose PathBoost, a gradient tree boosting method for graph-level classification and regression that learns discriminative path-based features directly from the input graph structure. Building on a previous work, which was tailored to a specific chemistry application, PathBoost introduces three key extensions: (i) adaptation to binary classification through gradient boosting with a logistic loss, (ii) incorporation of multiple node and edge attributes into the path feature space via a prefix-based decomposition, and (iii) automatic anchor node selection based on categorical attribute diversity, eliminating the need for the user to specify the starting point of the considered path features. We compared PathBoost to graph neural networks and graph kernel approaches on several benchmark datasets, obtaining better results in half of them, and comparable results in the rest. PathBoost shows better performances on graphs with larger average node counts. Overall, the results demonstrate that path-based boosting methods can be competitive with more complex black-box approaches.

</details>


### [517] [Distributional Reinforcement Learning via the Cramér Distance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08104)
*Vanya Aziz,Ivo Nowak,E. M. T Hendrix*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出C-DSAC算法，在分布式强化学习框架下结合SAC与Cramér距离，在复杂机器人任务中超越基线方法，并揭示了置信度驱动的Q值更新机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索Soft Actor-Critic算法在分布式强化学习中的应用，并提升其在复杂环境下的性能表现。

Method: 采用分布式强化学习表示状态-动作值，使用平方Cramér距离进行分布学习，提出C-DSAC算法。

Result: 在多种机器人基准测试中，C-DSAC表现优于基线SAC和现有分布式方法，在复杂环境中优势更明显。

Conclusion: C-DSAC的性能优势部分源于置信度驱动的Q值更新机制：高方差目标分布导致更保守的模型更新，减轻了过估计值的负面影响。

Abstract: This paper explores the application of the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm within a Distributional Reinforcement Learning setting and introduces an implementation of such algorithm named Cramér-based Distributional Soft Actor-Critic (C-DSAC). The novel approach employs distributional reinforcement learning to represent state-action values, and minimizes the squared Cramér distance for learning the distribution. Empirical results across various robotic benchmarks indicate that our algorithm surpasses the performance of baseline SAC and contemporary distributional methods, with the performance advantage becoming increasingly pronounced in high-complexity environments. To explain the efficiency of the new approach, we conduct an analysis showing that its superior performance is partly due to \textit{confidence-driven} Q-value updates: High-variance target distributions (low confidence in target) lead to more conservative model updates, thereby attenuating the impact of overestimated values. This work deepens the understanding of distributional reinforcement learning, offering insights into the algorithmic mechanisms governing convergence and value estimation.

</details>


### [518] [Geometry-free prediction of inertial lift forces in microfluidic devices using deep learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08109)
*Jesse Ward-Bond,Ali Mashadian,Timothy C. Y. Chan,Edmond W. K. Young*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文开发了一种无需显式几何参数即可预测惯性微流控器件中颗粒升力的神经网络模型，该模型能有效泛化到未见过的通道几何形状，并可用于粒子追踪模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法需要为每种通道截面形状单独训练模型，训练负担重；现有ML模型泛化能力差，无法处理未见过的几何形状。

Method: 提出一种不含显式几何参数的新参数集，训练神经网络模型预测颗粒升力，使其能够泛化到未知通道几何形状。

Result: 该模型在训练集上的性能与现有模型相当，但对未见过的通道几何形状具有更强的泛化能力，且可无缝集成到粒子追踪模拟软件中。

Conclusion: 新方法有效解决了IMD模拟中模型泛化性差的问题，为不同通道设计下的颗粒迁移预测提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Inertial microfluidic devices (IMDs) offer low-cost, high-throughput alternative techniques for many traditional particle- (or cell-) manipulation tasks, but simulating them requires being able to predict particle migration, and thus particle lift forces, under a variety of possible channel geometries. Recent work has demonstrated that machine learning models can be used to drastically speed up these numerical simulations, but doing so required training individual models for every unique channel cross-section type (e.g., rectangular, triangular) -- shifting the burden from the simulation step to the training step. In this paper, we develop a novel approach for predicting particle lift forces that contains no explicit geometric parameters. We train a neural network model using a new parameter set and show that while it performs comparably to existing models on channel geometries in the training set, it is able to generalize to unseen channel geometries far more effectively. We show that the lift force model developed herein can be easily transferred to particle tracing simulation software, where it is capable of predicting particle migration patterns consistent with the literature across a variety of channel designs.

</details>


### [519] [BaLoRA: Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Scale Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08110)
*Dario Coscia,Sindy Löwe,Max Welling*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出BaLoRA，一种贝叶斯扩展的LoRA方法，通过输入自适应贝叶斯参数化在几乎不增加参数和计算量的情况下，既提供了良好校准的不确定性估计，又通过自适应噪声注入显著提升了预测精度，缩小了与全微调的性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准LoRA的低秩点估计限制了表达能力，与全微调存在精度差距，且缺乏不确定性量化，在可靠性重要的场景中应用受限。

Method: 提出BaLoRA，对LoRA矩阵进行输入自适应的贝叶斯参数化，引入自适应噪声注入，仅增加极少量参数和计算。

Result: 在自然语言推理和视觉任务上缩小了与全微调的精度差距；在MOF带隙预测任务中，BaLoRA的零样本测试时不确定性与模型误差的相关性优于训练的LoRA集成，且随计算量增加单调提升，同时不牺牲精度。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯扩展不仅提供了校准的不确定性估计，其自适应噪声注入还意外地提升了预测精度，使LoRA向全微调性能靠拢，适用于对可靠性和精度同样重要的场景。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for fine-tuning large pre-trained models at reduced computational cost. However, its low-rank point-estimate updates limit expressiveness, leave a persistent gap relative to full fine-tuning accuracy, and provide no built-in uncertainty quantification, limiting its applicability in settings where reliability matters as much as accuracy. We introduce BaLoRA, a Bayesian extension of LoRA with a novel input-adaptive Bayesian parameterization of LoRA matrices that adds minimal parameters and compute. Surprisingly, not only does the Bayesian extension yield well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, but the adaptive noise injection underlying our approach also significantly improves prediction accuracy, narrowing the gap with full fine-tuning across both natural language reasoning and vision tasks. When applied to band gap prediction in metal-organic frameworks, BaLoRA produces zero-shot test-time uncertainty estimates that correlate more strongly with model error than a trained ensemble of LoRA models, and improve monotonically with compute without sacrificing accuracy.

</details>


### [520] [TTCD:Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery from Non-Stationary Time Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08111)
*Omar Faruque,Sahara Ali,Xue Zheng,Jianwu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为TTCD的端到端框架，通过Transformer架构与非平稳特征学习、重建引导的因果信号蒸馏等技术，从非平稳时间序列中发现同期和滞后因果关系，在合成、基准和真实数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法在处理非平稳、非线性和有噪声的时间序列数据时存在局限：基于约束的方法依赖条件独立检验，在小样本和复杂分布下表现不佳；基于评分的方法假设过强；近期方法只能处理特例而缺乏统一方案。

Method: TTCD框架包含两个核心组件：1) 非平稳特征学习器，融合时域和频域注意力以及动态非平稳性分析；2) 因果结构学习器。关键创新是重建引导的因果信号蒸馏，通过Transformer解码器的重建过程过滤噪声和伪相关，保留有意义的因果依赖关系。

Result: 在合成、基准和真实世界数据集上，TTCD在准确性和与领域知识的一致性方面 consistently 优于现有最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: TTCD为从非平稳时间序列中发现因果关系提供了一种有效且统一的端到端解决方案，在具有挑战性的真实场景中表现出色。

Abstract: The widespread availability of complex time series data in various domains such as environmental science, epidemiology, and economics demands robust causal discovery methods that can identify intricate contemporaneous and lagged relationships in non-stationary, nonlinear, and noisy settings. Existing constraint-based methods often rely heavily on conditional independence tests that degrade for limited data samples and complex distributions, while score-based methods impose strong statistical assumptions. Recent methods address special cases such as change point detection or distribution shifts, but struggle to provide a unified solution. We propose the Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery (TTCD) Framework, a novel end-to-end approach that learns contemporaneous and lagged causal relations from non-stationary time series. TTCD introduces a Non-Stationary Feature Learner integrating temporal and frequency-domain attention with dynamic non-stationarity profiling, and a custom Causal Structure Learner. A key innovation is reconstruction-guided causal signal distillation, to distill essential causal signals through the reconstruction process of the transformer decoder, which mitigates noise and spurious correlations while preserving meaningful dependencies. The Causal Structure Learner operates on distilled reconstructed signals to infer the underlying causal graph without restrictive assumptions on noise distributions or data generation processes. Experiments on synthetic, benchmark, and real world datasets show that TTCD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and consistency with domain knowledge, demonstrating the approach's effectiveness for causal discovery in challenging real world contexts.

</details>


### [521] [Do Foundation Model Embeddings Improve Cross-Country Crop Yield Generalisation? A Leave-One-Country-Out Evaluation in Sub-Saharan Africa](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08113)
*Yaw Osei Adjei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文发现，在跨国家情境下，基于卫星图像的地理空间基础模型（Prithvi-EO）对非洲小农玉米产量的预测能力并不优于传统光谱特征，且所有方法在留一国家交叉验证下均表现不佳（R²为负），主要原因在于国家间产量分布的差异而非特征表征质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准大多报告的是国内表现，高估了模型在跨国家情境下的泛化能力，而粮食安全规划需要的是跨国级别准确预测。

Method: 基于来自五个非洲国家的6,404个玉米田观测数据，采用Leave-One-Country-Out交叉验证方案，对比Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M、ViT-Base与传统Sentinel-2光谱特征的表现。

Result: 国内随机交叉验证得到中等R²，但所有特征集在跨国家测试中均表现极差（R²均为负值），Prithvi-EO冻结嵌入并无优势。

Conclusion: 跨国家预测的主要限制在于国家间产量分布的差异，而非特征表示质量；该论文提供了一个可复现的负面基准。

Abstract: Accurate predictions of smallholder maize yields across national boundaries are critical for food security planning in sub-Saharan Africa, yet most published benchmarks report within-country performance that overstates true generalisability. This paper evaluates whether geospatial foundation model embeddings, specifically Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M and ViT-Base, outperform traditional Sentinel-2 spectral features under a Leave-One-Country-Out cross-validation scheme on 6,404 maize field observations from five African countries. The results show a clear generalisability gap: within-country random cross-validation yields moderate R^2 values, but all feature sets perform poorly under cross-country testing, with universally negative R^2. Frozen Prithvi-EO embeddings provide no meaningful advantage over engineered spectral features for cross-country prediction in this setting. The paper argues that the main limitation is a shift in yield distribution between countries rather than representation quality and releases a reproducible negative benchmark for future work.

</details>


### [522] [Statistical Inference and Quality Measures of KV Cache Quantisations Inspired by TurboQuant](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08114)
*Paolo D'Alberto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在公平比特预算下分析了三种KV缓存量化方案（KV、KQV、QKQV），发现KQV在n=4时全面最优，揭示了K-V不对称性，并给出了一个预算相关的交叉现象及其统计机制解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大语言模型推理中，KV缓存量化是降低显存开销的关键技术，但不同量化方案在不同比特预算下的表现差异缺乏系统的统计分析和理论解释。本文旨在公平对比三种方案，揭示其性能差异的统计根源。

Method: 从超球面上的Beta分布出发，分析QJL操作对K向量内积方差的放大效应（π/2因子），并结合softmax的Jensen不等式非线性放大，构建统计推断和信息度量框架，比较三种方案（标量MSE基线、WHT+MSE、WHT+MSE+QJL）的KL散度、几何K误差和6D距离等指标。

Result: (1) n=4时KQV在所有指标、分布和秩上全面最优；(2) K-V不对称性无条件成立，QKQV的KL散度始终劣于KQV；(3) 存在预算依赖的交叉现象：n∈{2,3,5}时QKQV几何K重建更好，n∈{4,6}时KQV更好，且该现象对秩和尾部权重不变。

Conclusion: 提出Jensen机制（softmax对QJL放大方差的非线性放大）是n=4交叉现象的根本原因：n=4时QKQV的K误差和KL散度升高，表明该机制生效；而n∈{2,3,5}时假设不成立，QKQV在几何上胜出。这一视角为KV缓存量化方案选择提供了统计理论基础。

Abstract: We analyse three KV cache quantization schemes under a fair bit budget: \textbf{KV} (scalar MSE baseline), \textbf{KQV} (WHT + MSE on $K$; WHT + MSE + QJL on $V$), and \textbf{QKQV} (WHT + MSE + QJL on both). Starting from the Beta distribution on the hypersphere, we trace how QJL on $K$ inflates inner product variance by $π/2$, which softmax amplifies nonlinearly via Jensen's inequality, and we present statistical inference and information metrics to highlight practical differences.
  Three empirical findings emerge. (1)~At $n=4$ (the practically dominant budget), KQV wins on every measure -- KL divergence, geometric $K$ error, and 6D distance -- across all distributions and ranks tested. (2)~The K--V asymmetry is unconditional: QKQV is consistently worse than KQV in KL divergence at every budget and distribution. (3)~A budget-dependent crossover exists: QKQV achieves better geometric $K$ reconstruction at $n \in \{2,3,5\}$, KQV at $n \in \{4,6\}$, invariant to rank and tail weight -- an open rate-distortion problem.
  $\mathrm{KL}(p_{\mathrm{ref}} \| p_{\mathrm{quant}})$, K-only by construction, bridges K direction error to routing corruption and output collapse. We present a sufficient condition when the Jensen mechanism amplifies superlinearly through the softmax. At $n \in \{2,3,5\}$, QKQV wins geometrically because this assumption does not bind. At $n=4$, elevated K error and KL divergence for QKQV strongly suggest the Jensen mechanism is the operative cause of the crossover, providing a new perspective and explanation.

</details>


### [523] [The Safety-Aware Denoiser for Text Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08116)
*Amman Yusuf,Zhejun Jiang,Mijung Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出安全感知去噪器(SAD)，一种用于文本扩散模型的安全引导框架，通过在迭代去噪过程中引导文本样本进入可证明的安全区域，在不重新训练模型的情况下有效提升生成文本的安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全方法主要针对自回归模型，依赖事后过滤或推理时干预，无法有效处理文本扩散模型的安全风险。

Method: 提出SAD框架，在去噪过程中修改迭代过程，将最终文本样本引导至可证明的安全区域，是一种推理时方法。

Result: 在危害分类、记忆和越狱攻击三个维度上，SAD显著减少了不安全生成，同时保持生成质量、多样性和流畅性，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 去噪过程中的安全引导为文本扩散模型提供了有效且可扩展的安全约束机制。

Abstract: Recent work on text diffusion models offers a promising alternative to autoregressive generation, but controlling their safety remains underexplored. Existing safety approaches are geared toward autoregressive models and typically rely on post-hoc filtering or inference-time interventions. These are inadequate for effectively addressing safety risks in text diffusion models. We propose the Safety-Aware Denoiser (SAD), a safety-guidance framework in text diffusion models. The SAD modifies the iterative denoising process such that the text sample at the final denoising step is steered toward provably safe regions of the text space. This inference-time method can integrate safety constraints into the denoiser, avoiding computationally expensive retraining of the underlying diffusion model and enabling flexible, lightweight safety guidance. We evaluate the safety of the generated text using the SAD, with respect to hazard taxonomy, memorization, and jailbreak. Experimental results show that SAD substantially reduces unsafe generations while preserving generation quality, diversity, and fluency, outperforming existing methods. These results demonstrate that our safety guidance during denoising provides an effective and scalable mechanism for enforcing safety in text diffusion models.

</details>


### [524] [Feature Repulsion and Spectral Lock-in: An Empirical Study of Two-Layer Network Grokking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08119)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文验证了Tian (2025)提出的特征排斥定理在模块化加法任务中的可观察性问题。研究发现，B矩阵的符号规则（相似特征间为负）在两种激活函数下均成立，但其在参数更新中的谱特征强烈依赖于激活函数：σ=x²时出现明显的秩2谱结构和可检测的谱间隙，而σ=ReLU时保持秩1且无法检测。该现象与Tian定理5中聚焦记忆与扩散记忆的区分一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tian (2025)的理论证明了特征排斥机制的存在，但未说明该机制何时在经验上可观察，也未探究其在参数更新中是否留下可测量的谱特征。本文旨在填补这一理论与实验之间的空白。

Method: 在Tian的模块化加法实验设置（M=71, K=2048, MSE损失）上，分别使用σ=x²和σ=ReLU激活函数，检验B矩阵符号规则的鲁棒性，并分析参数更新ΔW的谱特征（滚动特征间隙σ₂/σ₃），比较grokking与非grokking条件下的差异。

Result: 符号规则在两种激活下均成立（σ=x²时符号匹配率从0.865升至0.985，σ=ReLU时饱和至1.000）。但谱特征强烈依赖激活函数：σ=x²时在15/15个grokking种子中于epoch 174检测到谱间隙，0/15非grokking对照中未检测到，秩2谱；σ=ReLU时检测器从未触发，谱保持秩1。

Conclusion: 特征排斥的符号结构仅依赖于特征点积矩阵，但其如何转化为权重更新则关键依赖于激活函数的导数σ'。这解释了为何相同理论机制在不同激活函数下产生截然不同的可观察现象，支持了Tian关于聚焦记忆与扩散记忆的理论区分。

Abstract: Tian (2025) proves a repulsion theorem (Theorem 6) for the matrix $ B = (\widetilde{F}^\top \widetilde{F} + ηI)^{-1} $ during the interactive feature-learning stage of grokking: similar features have negative off-diagonal entries $ B_{j\ell} $, producing an effective repulsive force that drives them apart. However, the theorem does not specify when this mechanism becomes empirically observable, nor whether it leaves a measurable spectral signature in the parameter updates. We test this directly on Tian's modular addition setup ($ M = 71 $, $ K = 2048 $, MSE loss) and observe a clear structure-mechanism dissociation. The predicted sign rule holds robustly on the top-200 most-similar feature pairs across activations (empirical sign-match rising from 0.865 to 0.985 on $ σ= x^2 $ across 5 seeds, and saturating at 1.000 on $ σ= \operatorname{ReLU} $). However, the spectral signature in the parameter updates is strongly activation-dependent. With $ σ= x^2 $, a simple slope detector on the rolling eigengap $ σ_2 / σ_3 $ of $ ΔW $ fires in 15/15 grokking seeds at epoch 174 (IQR [173,174]) and in 0/15 non-grokking controls, with 229$ \times $ late-stage magnitude separation; the spectrum is rank-2. In contrast, with $ σ= \operatorname{ReLU} $, the detector never fires and the spectrum remains effectively rank-1. This dissociation aligns with Tian's Theorem 5 distinction between focused (power-law) and spreading (ReLU) memorization: while the sign structure of $ B $ depends only on $ \widetilde{F}^\top \widetilde{F} $, how feature repulsion translates into weight updates critically depends on the activation derivative $ σ' $.

</details>


### [525] [Block-Wise Differentiable Sinkhorn Attention: Tail-Refinement Gradients with a Gap-Aware Dustbin Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08123)
*Dylan Forde*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对长上下文平衡熵最优传输（OT）注意力机制，在TPU上提出了一种基于停止基步+固定深度尾部精炼替代的精确反向传播方法。通过R=2的尾精炼策略，实现了块级O((T+R)LW)计算成本、O(Ld)输入存储和O(L)额外HBM使用。在Pfam蛋白质家族数据上，重建损失从3.17降至0.99，稀疏交叉熵从5.86降至5.69，证明了生产路径的可训练性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文场景下，平衡熵最优传输注意力在TPU上的高效精确反向传播面临挑战。现有方法存在计算成本高、内存占用大等问题，且缺乏理论保证的反向传播机制设计。

Method: 提出一种停止T步Sinkhorn求解后，展开短尾精炼逆向替代的方案。对于R=2生产情况，证明精确的单参考tile调度策略，利用向量余切和双对偶差异构造显式修正场。同时形式化dustbin_block路径为增强支撑集上的相同平衡替代，使调度可迁移到gap感知传输路径。

Result: 在合成掩码问题上，优化核与精确自动微分的误差在10^-5到10^-10量级。在TPU v6e-8上，Pfam筛选端到端完成，平衡R=2运行在3小时内维持约8.5样本/秒，达到第1437步。重建损失从3.17降至0.99，稀疏交叉熵从5.86降至5.69。

Conclusion: 证明了精确固定深度反向传播理论、定理匹配的gap感知桥接以及生产路径的可训练性。验证了该调度在计算效率、内存使用和实际训练效果上的有效性。

Abstract: We study long-context balanced entropic optimal transport (OT) attention on TPU hardware through a stopped-base, fixed-depth tail-refinement surrogate. After a stopped $T$-step Sinkhorn solve, we unroll a short refinement tail and differentiate that surrogate exactly. For the production $R=2$ case, the backward pass contains four staircase plan factors. We prove an exact one-reference-tile schedule: the $R=2$ score cotangent is a single reference plan tile times an explicit modifier field built from vector cotangents and dual differences. This yields block-wise cost $O((T+R)LW)$, $O(Ld)$ input storage, and $O(L)$ additional HBM usage for fixed head dimension $d$ and band width $W$. We also formalize the current \texttt{dustbin\_block} path as the same balanced surrogate on an augmented support, so the schedule lifts to the gap-aware transport path used in our TPU runs. We provide a local surrogate-bias bound, an a posteriori bias certificate, and a projective contraction certificate for strictly positive active blocks. On synthetic masked problems, the optimized kernel matches exact autodiff of the same centered surrogate to within $10^{-5}$--$10^{-10}$. On TPU v6e-8, a four-configuration Pfam screen completes end-to-end, and a promoted balanced $R=2$ run sustains roughly $8.5$ examples per second through a three-hour budget, reaching step $1437$. Held-out Pfam test shards improve reconstruction from $3.17$ to $0.99$ and sparse CE from $5.86$ to $5.69$ relative to step $0$. These results support exact fixed-depth backward theory, a theorem-matching gap-aware bridge, and trainability evidence for the production path.

</details>


### [526] [Towards Universal Gene Regulatory Network Inference: Unlocking Generalizable Regulatory Knowledge in Single-cell Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08128)
*Jiaxin Qi,Hang Li,Yan Cui,Yuhua Zheng,Jianqiang Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出单细胞基础模型（scFMs）在基因调控网络（GRN）推断中表现不佳，原因是标准预训练目标未能捕获潜在调控信号。为此，作者提出了GRN泛化基准测试，以及虚拟值扰动和梯度轨迹两种新方法，以从scFMs中提取隐式调控信息，生成可泛化的基因间特征，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单细胞基础模型在GRN推断中表现远不如预期，因为标准的基于重构的预训练目标无法显式捕获潜在的调控信号。作者希望弥合这一差距，释放基础模型中隐含的调控知识。

Method: 提出了两个新方法：1) Virtual Value Perturbation（虚拟值扰动）和2) Gradient Trajectory（梯度轨迹），用于从scFMs中蒸馏出隐式调控信息，转化为高度可泛化的基因间特征。同时设计了一个GRN泛化基准测试，评估对未见基因和数据集的调控预测能力。

Result: 实验表明，所提方法显著优于现有方法，建立了利用scFMs潜力进行通用GRN推断的新范式。

Conclusion: 通过蒸馏scFMs中的隐式调控知识，可以大幅提升GRN推断的泛化能力，为单细胞基础模型在调控网络推断中的应用开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Gene Regulatory Network (GRN) inference is essential for understanding complex cellular mechanisms, rendered tractable through single-cell transcriptomic data. With the emergence of single-cell Foundation Models (scFMs), enhanced transcriptomic encoding is widely expected to revolutionize GRN inference. However, we observe that their performance remains far from satisfactory. The primary reason is that the standard reconstruction-based pre-training objectives often fail to explicitly capture latent regulatory signals. To bridge this gap, we first introduce a GRN generalization benchmark designed to evaluate regulatory predictions on unseen genes and datasets, which relies on the zero-shot capabilities of scFMs and is inherently challenging for traditional methods. Furthermore, to unlock the regulatory knowledge within the foundation models, we propose two novel methods, Virtual Value Perturbation and Gradient Trajectory, to distill implicit regulatory information from scFMs into highly generalizable inter-gene features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods, establishing a new paradigm for leveraging the potential of scFMs in universal GRN inference.

</details>


### [527] [Towards Customized Multimodal Role-Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08129)
*Chao Tang,Jianzong Wu,Qingyu Shi,Ye Tian,Aixi Zhang,Hao Jiang,Jiangning Zhang,Yunhai Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出统一多模态角色扮演任务（CMRP），构建了RoleScape-20数据集，并设计了UniCharacter两阶段训练框架（统一SFT + 角色级GRPO），仅需10张图片和少量交互样例即可实现角色在文本和图像模态中的一致化定制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一多模态理解与生成模型缺乏对角色的人物个性、对话风格和视觉身份进行联合定制的能力，难以保证跨模态输出的一致性。

Method: 提出UniCharacter框架，包含两个阶段：1) Unified Supervised Finetuning (Unified-SFT) 进行统一监督微调；2) Character-specific group relative policy optimization (Character-GRPO) 进行角色级组相对策略优化。

Result: 在RoleScape-20数据集上，所提方法显著优于先前方法；消融实验验证了跨模态一致性设计和少样本定制策略的有效性；整个过程仅需约100 GPU小时。

Conclusion: CMRP任务结合统一建模为下一代角色化、沉浸式交互智能体提供了基础。

Abstract: Unified multimodal understanding and generation models enable richer human-AI interaction. Yet jointly customizing a character's persona, dialogue style, and visual identity while maintaining output consistency across modalities remains largely unexplored. To mitigate this gap, we introduce a new task, Customized Multimodal Role-Play (CMRP). We construct the RoleScape-20 dataset comprising 20 characters, including training and evaluation data that cover persona, stylistic descriptions, visual/expressive cues, and text-image interactions. Building on a unified model, we devise UniCharacter, a two-stage training framework containing Unified Supervised Finetuning (Unified-SFT) and character-specific group relative policy optimization (Character-GRPO). Given only 10 images plus corresponding interaction examples, the model acquires the target character and exhibits coherent persona, style, and visual identity in both generated text and images. This process takes about 100 GPU hours. Experiments on the RoleScape-20 dataset show that the proposed method substantially outperforms prior approaches. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of our cross-modal consistency design and few-shot customization strategy. We argue that CMRP, coupled with unified modeling, provides a basis for next-generation characterful and immersive interactive agents.

</details>


### [528] [Additive Atomic Forests for Symbolic Function and Antiderivative Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08130)
*Reda Belaiche*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种同时从数据中符号恢复函数及其原函数的框架，基于导数代数、两种互补原语（EML和SOL）以及加性原子森林，无需符号积分步骤即可同时编码函数及其导数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常需要符号积分步骤来恢复原函数，过程复杂且效率低。作者希望构建一个自扩展的函数-导数对库，使得函数和原函数能够同时被符号恢复，无需额外的积分操作。

Method: 1) 导数代数：利用乘积法则和链式法则，从一个种子集递归生成函数-导数对的"活库"；2) 两种原语：EML（对初等函数理论上完备）和SOL（使三角原子在深度1而非深度~8处可用）；3) 加性原子森林：原始树的有限和，通过连续优化或穷举搜索拟合数据，同时编码符号表达式F及其导数F'。

Result: 在17个分类基准测试中，稀疏原子组合在13个数据集上匹配或超过XGBoost，同时生成可解释的公式。

Conclusion: 该框架具有条件完备性、加性深度和解析同时恢复的结果。库不是固定的，而是从小的种子集自构建，并随新发现函数不断增长，库越大可表达的函数类越丰富。

Abstract: We present a framework for the simultaneous symbolic recovery of a function and its antiderivative from data. The framework rests on three ideas. First, a derivative algebra: the observation that the product rule $\frac{d}{dx}[f \cdot g] = f'g + fg'$ and the chain rule, applied to a seed set of elementary functions, generate a self-expanding system of function-derivative pairs -- a living library that grows each time a new function is discovered. Second, two complementary primitives -- EML$\,(e^u - \ln v)$, which is theoretically complete for all elementary functions, and SOL$\,(\sin u - \cos v)$, introduced here, which makes trigonometric atoms available at depth~1 instead of depth~$\sim$8 -- that seed the library with core atoms cheaply. Third, additive atomic forests: finite sums of primitive trees, optionally composed via multiplicative nodes, whose derivatives are fitted to data by continuous optimisation or by exhaustive search over the library. Because differentiation of each atom is determined by construction, the forest simultaneously encodes a symbolic expression $F$ and its derivative $F'$; no symbolic integration step is required.
  The library is not a fixed object: it self-constructs from a small seed set by recursive application of the product rule, chain rule, and the two primitives, and it can grow as newly discovered functions are folded back in. The larger the library, the richer the expressible class of candidate functions. We give conditional completeness, additive-depth, and analytic simultaneous-recovery results for the framework. Empirically, in our reported runs on 17 classification benchmarks, sparse atom combinations match or exceed XGBoost on 13 datasets while producing interpretable formulas.

</details>


### [529] [Interactive Inverse Reinforcement Learning of Interaction Scenarios via Bi-level Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08131)
*Yue Mao,Shicheng Liu,Siyuan Xu,Minghui Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了交互式逆强化学习（IIRL）框架，将问题建模为随机双层优化，并设计了双循环算法BISIRL，在理论上保证收敛，实验验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统逆强化学习（IRL）中学习器只能被动观察专家演示，无法应用于需要主动与专家交互的场景，因此需要研究交互式逆强化学习（IIRL）。

Method: 将IIRL形式化为随机双层优化问题：下层学习奖励函数以解释专家行为，上层学习与专家交互的策略。提出双循环算法BISIRL，内循环求解下层问题，外循环求解上层问题。

Result: 理论证明了BISIRL算法的收敛性，并通过大量实验验证了算法的有效性。

Conclusion: BISIRL成功解决了交互式场景下的逆强化学习问题，为学习器主动与专家交互并推断其奖励函数提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) learns a reward function and a corresponding policy that best fit the demonstration data of an expert. However, in the current IRL setting, the learner is isolated from the expert and can only passively observe the expert demonstrations. This limits the applicability of IRL to interactive settings, where the learner actively interacts with the expert and needs to infer the expert's reward function from the interactions. To bridge the gap, this paper studies interactive IRL (IIRL) where a learner aims to learn the reward function of an expert and a policy to interact with the expert during its interactions with the expert. We formulate IIRL as a stochastic bi-level optimization problem where the lower level learns a reward function to explain the behaviors of the expert, and the upper level learns a policy to interact with the expert. We develop a double-loop algorithm, Bi-level Interactive Scenarios Inverse Reinforcement Learning (BISIRL), which solves the lower-level problem in the inner loop and the upper-level problem in the outer loop. We formally guarantee that BISIRL converges and validate our algorithm through extensive experiments.

</details>


### [530] [DARE: Diffusion Language Model Activation Reuse for Efficient Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08134)
*Natalia Frumkin,Bokun Wang,Hung-Yueh Chiang,Chi-Chih Chang,Mohamed S. Abdelfattah,Diana Marculescu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DARE方法，通过重用token级别的注意力激活（KV和输出），在不显著降低生成质量的前提下，提升扩散大语言模型的推理效率，实现高达1.20x的每层延迟降低和87%的注意力激活重用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）虽有表达能力强、可并行生成等优势，但目前开源版本在效率和质量上仍落后于自回归模型。作者发现dLLMs中双向自注意力的token级冗余未被充分探索——注意力激活在token间高度相关，且查询表征的时间变化可预测其他激活的冗余性。

Method: 提出DARE方法，包含两个互补机制：DARE-KV（重用缓存的键值激活）和DARE-O（重用输出激活），通过识别和利用token间的注意力冗余来减少重复计算，同时保持生成质量。

Result: DARE实现每层延迟降低最多1.20倍，重用高达87%的注意力激活；在推理和代码生成基准上，DARE-KV和DARE-O的平均性能下降分别仅为2.0%和1.2%；与前缀缓存、Fast-dLLM等技术结合可获得叠加增益，无需重新训练。

Conclusion: token级重用是提升扩散大语言模型效率的有效策略，能在保持生成保真度的同时显著减少计算开销。

Abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to auto-regressive (AR) models, offering greater expressive capacity and potential for parallel generation and faster inference. However, open-source dLLMs remain immature, lagging behind AR models in both efficiency and quality.
  We identify an underexplored property of dLLMs: *token-wise redundancy* in bi-directional self-attention. Self-attention activations are highly correlated across tokens, and temporal changes in query representations can predict redundancy in corresponding key, value, and output activations.
  We introduce DARE, with two complementary mechanisms: DARE-KV, which reuses cached key-value (KV) activations, and DARE-O, which reuses output activations to reduce redundant computation while preserving quality.
  DARE achieves up to 1.20x per-layer latency reduction and reuses up to 87% of attention activations, with negligible degradation on reasoning and code-generation benchmarks. DARE-KV and DARE-O incur average performance drops of only 2.0% and 1.2%, respectively. Combined with techniques such as prefix caching and Fast-dLLM, DARE provides additive gains without retraining.
  These results establish token-wise reuse as an effective strategy for improving the efficiency of diffusion-based LLMs while preserving generation fidelity. Code: https://github.com/enyac-group/DARE

</details>


### [531] [Dendritic Neural Networks with Equilibrium Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08135)
*Yoshimasa Kubo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将树突神经网络与平衡传播（EP）相结合，在MNIST、KMNIST和FMNIST数据集上验证了该方法。结果表明，树突EP在简单任务上与标准EP性能相当，在更具挑战性的数据集和更深层模型中显著优于标准EP，甚至接近通过时间反向传播训练的树突网络性能。分析发现，树突EP具有更高的激活幅度和更分散的隐藏状态活动，表明树突结构改善了网络内部动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平衡传播（EP）作为反向传播（BP）的生物 plausible 替代方案，在深层和更具挑战性的学习场景中效果会下降；而树突神经网络在使用BP训练时表现更好。因此，将树突结构引入EP，探索能否通过架构设计提升生物 plausible 学习算法的效果。

Method: 将树突神经网络与改进的平衡传播框架相结合，提出树突EP模型。在MNIST、KMNIST和FMNIST数据集上，分别在浅层和深层架构中进行评估，并与标准EP及通过时间反向传播训练的树突网络进行对比。

Result: 树突EP在简单任务（MNIST）上与标准EP性能相当；在更挑战性数据集（KMNIST、FMNIST）和更深层模型中，树突EP显著优于标准EP，并接近通过时间反向传播训练的树突网络性能。

Conclusion: 树突结构可以增强生物 plausible 学习算法的有效性，特别是在标准EP效果不佳的场景中。架构设计对于改进生物启发式训练方法具有重要意义。

Abstract: Equilibrium propagation (EP) is a biologically plausible alternative to backpropagation (BP), but its effectiveness can degrade in deeper and more challenging learning settings. In parallel, dendritic neural networks have demonstrated improved performance and generalization when trained with BP, suggesting that structured, biologically inspired architectures may enhance learning. In this work, we investigate the integration of dendritic neural networks with equilibrium propagation using an advanced EP framework. We evaluate the proposed dendritic EP model on MNIST, Kuzushiji-MNIST (KMNIST), and Fashion-MNIST (FMNIST), considering both shallow and deeper architectures. Our results show that dendritic EP achieves performance comparable to standard EP on simple tasks, while providing consistent improvements on more challenging datasets and deeper models. In particular, dendritic EP significantly outperforms standard EP on KMNIST and FMNIST, and approaches the performance of dendritic networks trained with backpropagation through time.To further understand these improvements, we analyze the evolution of hidden states during the free phase. We observe that dendritic EP exhibits higher activation magnitudes and more distributed hidden-state activity compared to standard EP, indicating that dendritic structure alters the internal network dynamics. These findings suggest that incorporating dendritic structure can enhance the effectiveness of biologically plausible learning algorithms, especially in regimes where standard EP struggles. Our work highlights the importance of architectural design for improving biologically inspired training methods.

</details>


### [532] [LLM Wardens: Mitigating Adversarial Persuasion with Third-Party Conversational Oversight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08321)
*Lennart Wachowiak,Scott D. Blain,David Williams-King,Samuele Marro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现对抗性LLM能在65.4%的情况下操纵用户决策，而引入"监控模型"（warden）可将成功率降至30.4%（降低过半），且在模拟基准测试（COAX-Bench）中，warden将操纵成功率从34.7%降至12.3%，即使弱于对手的warden也能提供有效保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM说服能力不断增强，如何保护用户免受其操纵成为一个关键问题。本文旨在量化LLM的操纵风险，并探索一种轻量级防护机制。

Method: 通过两个层次的实验：(1)用户研究（N=120），涉及四个决策场景，由对抗LLM在隐藏目标下说服用户；(2)构建COAX-Bench模拟基准（14个场景，16,212次交互），引入"warden"模型实时监控交互并向用户发出非约束性警告。

Result: 用户研究中，warden将操纵成功率从65.4%降至30.4%（降低过半），仅对真实交互造成8.6个百分点的误报。模拟实验中，warden将操纵成功率从34.7%降至12.3%，且弱于对手的warden模型仍能提供有意义的保护。

Conclusion: 提出了一种可行的、可扩展的LLM操纵防护方案——warden模型，其有效性不依赖于与对手能力相匹配，为未来更强模型的监督提供了"可扩展监督"的可行路径。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly capable of persuasion, which raises the question of how to protect users against manipulation. In a preregistered user study (N=120) across four decision-making scenarios, we find that an adversarial LLM with a hidden goal succeeds in steering users' decisions 65.4% of the time. We then introduce a "warden" model: a secondary LLM that monitors the human-AI interaction trace in real time and issues non-binding, private advisories to the user when it detects manipulation. Adding a warden more than halves the adversary's success rate to 30.4%, with a much smaller (8.6 percentage points) reduction for genuine interactions. To probe the mechanism behind these results, we release COAX-Bench, a simulation benchmark spanning 14 decision-making scenarios, including hiring, voting, and file access. Across 16,212 simulated multi-agent interactions, capable adversarial LLMs achieve their hidden goals in 34.7% of cases, which warden models reduce to 12.3%. Notably, even warden models substantially weaker than the adversary they oversee provide meaningful protection, suggesting a path for scalable oversight of more capable models.

</details>


### [533] [Weight Pruning Amplifies Bias: A Multi-Method Study of Compressed LLMs for Edge AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08137)
*Plawan Kumar Rath,Rahul Maliakkal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 剪枝在资源受限的IoT和边缘设备上被广泛用于部署大语言模型，但研究发现：激活感知的剪枝方法（Wanda）虽然几乎完美保持困惑度（50%稀疏度下仅增加3.5%），却导致最高的偏见放大（70%稀疏度下刻板印象依赖分数增加83.7%，47-59%原本无偏的样本产生新的刻板印象行为）。随机剪枝完全破坏语言能力（困惑度超过10^4甚至10^8），但仅产生随机水平的偏见。此外，非结构化剪枝在真实边缘硬件上不提供存储节省和推理延迟降低，动摇了其在IoT部署中的主要动机。180个密集vs剪枝比较中，141个（78.3%）显著（p<0.05），平均|h|=0.305。与量化研究（最多21%响应翻转）相比，剪枝的转换率高达47-59%，表明剪枝对对齐的风险比量化更大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对剪枝技术的偏见影响缺乏系统性理解，尤其是剪枝在保持困惑度表现的同时是否会对模型公平性产生负面影响尚不清楚。作者旨在揭示剪枝方法、稀疏度与模型偏见之间的复杂关系，以及评估困惑度作为安全指标的可靠性。

Method: 对三种指令微调模型（Gemma-2-9b-it、Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3、Phi-3.5-mini-instruct），使用三种剪枝方法（Random、Magnitude、Wanda）在四个稀疏度水平（10-70%）下，基于12,148个BBQ偏见基准样本和5个随机种子进行系统实验，共产生2,368,860条推理记录。通过困惑度、刻板印象依赖分数等指标评估剪枝效果与偏见变化。

Result: Wanda剪枝在50%稀疏度下困惑度仅增加3.5%，但70%稀疏度下刻板印象依赖分数增加83.7%，47-59%原本无偏的样本出现新的刻板印象行为。随机剪枝导致困惑度极度恶化（超过10^4甚至10^8），但仅产生随机水平的偏见。180个比较中78.3%显著（p<0.05），平均|h|=0.305。非结构化剪枝在真实边缘硬件上无存储节省和延迟收益。

Conclusion: 基于困惑度的评估提供了行为等价性的虚假保证；剪枝对模型对齐造成的风险在类别上大于量化技术；IoT部署流水线在部署剪枝模型前需要包含偏见感知的验证流程。

Abstract: Weight pruning is widely advocated for deploying Large Language Models on resource-constrained IoT and edge devices, yet its impact on model fairness remains poorly understood. We conduct a controlled empirical study of three instruction-tuned models (Gemma-2-9b-it, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, Phi-3.5-mini-instruct) across three pruning methods (Random, Magnitude, Wanda) at four sparsity levels (10-70%) on 12,148 BBQ bias benchmark items with 5 random seeds, totaling 2,368,860 inference records. Our results reveal a Smart Pruning Paradox: activation-aware pruning (Wanda) preserves perplexity nearly perfectly (just 3.5% increase at 50% sparsity for Mistral-7B), yet produces the highest bias amplification, with Stereotype Reliance Score increasing 83.7% and 47-59% of previously unbiased items developing new stereotypical behaviors at 70% sparsity. Random pruning destroys language capability entirely (perplexity exceeding $10^4$ and reaching $10^8$) but produces only random-chance bias. We further show that unstructured pruning provides zero storage savings and zero inference latency reduction on real edge hardware, undermining the primary motivation for its use in IoT deployment. Of 180 dense-vs-pruned comparisons, 141 (78.3%) are significant ($p < 0.05$) with mean $|h| = 0.305$. Published quantization studies report up to 21% of responses flipping between biased and unbiased states; our pruning results show transition rates nearly three times higher (47-59%), suggesting pruning poses a categorically greater risk to alignment than quantization. These findings demonstrate that perplexity-based evaluation provides false assurance of behavioral equivalence, and that IoT deployment pipelines require bias-aware validation before deploying pruned models at the edge.

</details>


### [534] [DataArc-SynData-Toolkit: A Unified Closed-Loop Framework for Multi-Path, Multimodal, and Multilingual Data Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08138)
*Zhichao Shi,Cehao Yang,Hao Zhou,Xiaojun Wu,Huajie Li,Xuhui Jiang,Chengjin Xu,Yuanzhuo Wang,Jian Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了DataArc-SynData-Toolkit，一个开源的合成数据工具框架，通过配置驱动的可视化流水线、统一的质量可控合成范式和高度模块化架构，解决了现有工具工作流复杂、标准碎片化和跨模态扩展性差的问题，在多个应用场景中实现了生成效率与数据质量的最佳平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合成数据工具存在工作流复杂、数据标准碎片化、跨模态可扩展性有限等问题，严重阻碍了其在大语言模型领域的广泛应用，尤其是在专业领域和低资源语言场景下。

Method: 开发了DataArc-SynData-Toolkit开源框架，包含三个核心设计：(1)配置驱动的端到端流水线，配备可视化界面和简化CLI；(2)统一的质量可控合成范式，标准化多源数据生成；(3)高度模块化架构，支持无缝的多模态、多语言和多任务适配。

Result: 在多个应用场景中验证，该工具在生成效率和数据质量之间达到了最优平衡。

Conclusion: DataArc-SynData-Toolkit通过端到端和可视化交互式流水线，显著降低了合成数据生成及后续模型训练的技术门槛，加速了其在实际应用中的部署。

Abstract: Synthetic data has emerged as a crucial solution to the data scarcity bottleneck in large language models (LLMs), particularly for specialized domains and low-resource languages. However, the broader adoption of existing synthetic data tools is severely hindered by convoluted workflows, fragmented data standards, and limited scalability across modalities. To address these limitations, we develop DataArc-SynData-Toolkit, an open-source framework featuring: (1) a configuration-driven, end-to-end pipeline equipped with an intuitive visual interface and simplified CLI for exceptional usability; (2) a unified, quality-controllable synthesis paradigm that standardizes multi-source data generation to ensure high reusability; and (3) a highly modular architecture designed for seamless multimodal, multilingual, and multi-task adaptation. We apply the toolkit in multiple application scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that our toolkit achieves an optimal balance between generation efficiency and data quality. By offering an end-to-end and visually interactive pipeline, DataArc-SynData-Toolkit significantly lowers the technical barrier to synthetic data generation and subsequent model training, accelerating its practical deployment in real-world applications.

</details>


### [535] [Reasoning emerges from constrained inference manifolds in large language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08142)
*Yanbiao Ma,Fei Luo,Linfeng Zhang,Chuangxin Zhao,Mingxuan Wang,Yinan Wu,Zhe Qian,Yang Lu,Long Chen,Zhao Cao,Xiaoshuai Hao,Ji-Rong Wen,Jungong Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过分析大语言模型推理过程中内部表征的演化，发现推理动力学自发组织成低维流形。研究指出，有效的推理需要满足三个条件：充分的表征表达能力、自发的流形压缩以及压缩子空间内非退化信息体积的保持。基于此，作者提出了一个仅基于内部动力学的无标签诊断方法，为推理评估提供了基准测试之外的补充框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型推理评估主要依赖带标签的基准测试，这将任务性能与内部推理质量混为一谈。作者希望绕过基准测试，直接从内部表征的动力学演化过程来研究推理的本质。

Method: 通过分析大语言模型推理过程中内部表征的动态演化，观察高维表示空间中的低维流形自组织现象，并识别有效推理所需的三个结构性条件（表征充分性、流形压缩、信息体积保持）。

Result: 发现推理动力学普遍会自组织成低维流形，但这种几何压缩本身不足以保证稳定推理；有效推理需要满足三个条件；偏离该条件会出现病态推理动力学；并提出了一个无标签的统一诊断方法。

Conclusion: 大语言模型中的推理从根本上受到几何和信息约束的制约，这为基准测试中心化的评估方式提供了补充性框架。

Abstract: Reasoning in large language models is predominantly evaluated through labeled benchmarks, conflating task performance with the quality of internal inference. Here we study reasoning as an intrinsic dynamical process by examining the evolution of internal representations during inference. We find that inference-time dynamics consistently self-organize into low-dimensional manifolds embedded within high-dimensional representation spaces. we find that such geometric compression, although pervasive, is not sufficient for stable or reliable reasoning. Instead, effective reasoning dynamics emerge within a constrained structural regime characterized by three conditions: adequate representational expressivity, spontaneous manifold compression, and preservation of non-degenerate information volume within the compressed subspace. Models outside this regime exhibit characteristic pathological inference dynamics. Based on these insights, we introduce a unified, label-free diagnostic computed solely from internal dynamics. These findings suggest that reasoning in LLMs is fundamentally governed by geometric and informational constraints, offering a complementary framework to benchmark-centric assessment.

</details>


### [536] [HoReN: Normalized Hopfield Retrieval for Large-Scale Sequential Model Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08143)
*Yuan Fang,Yi Xie,Xuming Ran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HoReN是一种基于码本的参数保留编辑器，通过离散键值码本、单位超球面投影和阻尼Hopfield吸引子动力学增强路由，实现大规模序列编辑下稳定高效的知识更新，在50K次编辑后性能仍保持在0.9以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型编码的事实知识在部署后会过时或错误，而重新训练成本过高，因此需要在终身学习环境中进行模型编辑。现有方法要么通过定位-编辑方式直接修改权重但累积编辑破坏原有知识，要么通过外部内存保留权重但面临路由挑战和大规模性能下降问题。

Method: HoReN基于三个核心思想：1) 用离散键值码本包装单个MLP层，每个条目同时作为知识记忆键和现代Hopfield存储模式；2) 将键和查询投影到单位超球面，通过角度相似性检索，消除编辑提示与其改写之间的幅度不匹配；3) 通过阻尼Hopfield吸引子动力学精炼查询，使改写放松到正确存储模式的吸引盆地，而不相关查询不受干扰。

Result: HoReN在ZsRE、WikiBigEdit和UnKE等多样化基准测试上取得一致提升。在ZsRE上扩展到50K顺序编辑，整体性能稳定保持在0.9以上，而此前编辑方法在达到10K前就已崩溃或严重退化。

Conclusion: HoReN通过码本和Hopfield动力学实现了大规模终身模型编辑的有效路由，在规模化和稳定性上显著优于现有方法，为知识更新提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Large language models encode vast factual knowledge that inevitably becomes outdated or incorrect after deployment, yet retraining is costly prohibitive, motivating model editing in lifelong settings that updates targeted behavior without harming the rest of the model. One line of work installs new facts by directly modifying base weights through locate-then-edit procedures, but accumulated edits progressively disrupt originally preserved knowledge, even with constraint-based projections. A complementary line leaves base weights intact and routes edits through external memory, but it faces routing challenges and its performance degrades at scale. We propose HoReN, a codebook-based parameter-preserving editor with enhanced routing built on three ideas. First, HoReN wraps a single MLP layer with a discrete key-value codebook, where each entry is interpreted simultaneously as a knowledge-memory key and a modern Hopfield stored pattern. Second, both keys and queries are projected onto the unit hypersphere so retrieval is governed by angular similarity, removing magnitude-driven mismatches between an edit prompt and its rephrasings. Third, the query is refined through damped Hopfield attractor dynamics, so paraphrases relax into the correct stored pattern's basin of attraction while unrelated queries remain undisturbed. HoReN achieves well-edited performance with consistent gains across diverse benchmarks spanning standard ZsRE, structured WikiBigEdit, and unstructured UnKE evaluations. Moreover, HoReN scales to 50K sequential edits on ZsRE with stable overall performance above 0.9, while prior editors collapse or degrade severely before reaching 10K. Our code is available at https://github.com/ha11ucin8/HoReN.

</details>


### [537] [Communicating Sound Through Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08750)
*Emanuele Rossi,Emanuele Rodolà*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出词汇声学编码（LAC）框架，利用预训练LLM作为发送者和接收者，通过自然语言文本作为声音的传输表示，实现声音的量化、传输和重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言广泛用于描述和控制音频系统，但很少作为承载音频本身的表示。作者希望用自然语言直接传输声音，而不依赖专用音频编码。

Method: 发送者将输入波形分析为可解释的非学习声学描述符，用特征特定的间隔词汇量化每个描述符，并通过英语文本表达；接收者解析文本还原为词汇-声学约束，通过闭环优化重建波形。

Result: 在短声音和符号音乐传输实验上，纯文本在保持可测量声学结构的同时，保持可解释、可编辑，并天然适用于LLM通信。

Conclusion: LAC是有损量化器，在词汇大小、码率和保真度之间进行权衡，证明自然语言可以作为有效的声音传输表示。

Abstract: Natural language is widely used to describe, prompt, and control audio systems, but rarely serves as the representation carrying audio itself. We introduce lexical acoustic coding (LAC), a framework in which pre-trained LLM sender and receiver agents transmit sound through natural language. Under fixed system prompts, the agents write their own analysis and synthesis code, communicating only through a lexical sentence, shared vocabulary, and optional symbolic music structure. The sender analyzes an input waveform into interpretable, non-learned acoustic descriptors, quantizes each with a feature-specific interval vocabulary, and verbalizes the lexical code as English. The receiver parses the sentence back into lexical-acoustic constraints and renders a waveform through closed-loop refinement. The transmitted text serves as both a rich caption and as the transport representation itself. We frame LAC as a finite-rate lossy quantizer, exposing trade-offs between vocabulary size, rate, and fidelity. Experiments on short sounds and symbolic music transfer show that plain text preserves measurable acoustic structure while remaining interpretable, editable, and native to LLM-mediated communication.

</details>


### [538] [NoiseRater: Meta-Learned Noise Valuation for Diffusion Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08144)
*Fang Wu,Haokai Zhao,Da Xing,Hanqun Cao,Tinson Xu,Yanchao Li,Xiangru Tang,Zehong Wang,Aaron Tu,Kuan Pang,Hanchen Wang,Hongbin Lin,Zeqi Zhou,Yinxi Li,Peng Xia,Li Erran Li,Molei Tao,Jure Leskovec,Aditya Joshi,Yejin Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NoiseRater，一个通过元学习框架对扩散模型训练中的噪声样本进行实例级价值评估的方法，能够自适应地对噪声加权或筛选，从而提升训练效率和生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型训练将注入的噪声视为同等重要，作者挑战这一假设，认为不同噪声样本对模型训练贡献不同，因此需要一种机制来区分噪声的"信息价值"。

Method: 提出一个参数化噪声评价器（noise rater），根据数据和时间步对每个噪声样本赋予重要性分数，通过双层优化训练该评价器，并设计了从软加权到硬选择的解耦两阶段流水线。

Result: 在FFHQ和ImageNet上的实验表明，不同噪声样本的贡献确实不同，优先选择信息量更大的噪声可以同时提升训练效率和生成质量。

Conclusion: 噪声价值评估是一个此前未被充分探索但有效的维度，可以补充现有的扩散模型训练优化方法。

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of generative tasks, yet their training paradigm largely treats injected noise as uniformly informative. In this work, we challenge this assumption and introduce NoiseRater, a meta-learning framework for instance-level noise valuation in diffusion model training. We propose a parametric noise rater that assigns importance scores to individual noise realizations conditioned on data and timestep, enabling adaptive reweighting of the training objective. The rater is trained via bilevel optimization to improve downstream validation performance after inner-loop diffusion updates. To enable efficient deployment, we further design a decoupled two-stage pipeline that transitions from soft weighting during meta-training to hard noise selection during standard training. Extensive experiments on FFHQ and ImageNet demonstrate that not all noise samples contribute equally, and that prioritizing informative noise improves both training efficiency and generation quality. Our results establish noise valuation as a complementary and previously underexplored axis for improving diffusion model training. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NoiseRater-DEB116.

</details>


### [539] [Feature Rivalry in Sparse Autoencoder Representations: A Mechanistic Study of Uncertainty-Driven Feature Competition in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08149)
*Harshavardhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现大型语言模型中存在稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征之间的负相关现象（特征竞争），并且这种竞争可以作为模型不确定性的机制性指标，特别是在高熵问题中更显著，还能通过激活干预影响输出，最终基于竞争分数预测答案正确性（AUROC=0.689）.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAE虽然能将语言模型表示分解为可解释特征，但这些特征在不确定性条件下的交互机制尚不清楚，作者希望探究负相关的SAE特征对是否可以作为模型不确定性的机制性信号.

Method: 在Gemma-2-2B模型上使用Gemma Scope SAEs，通过在PopQA数据集上按回答熵值划分问题进行实验，使用统计检验比较高低熵问题的特征竞争强度，并通过激活干预（沿竞争方向steering）验证因果性，最后基于余弦相似度构建竞争分数预测答案正确性.

Result: 高熵问题在第0层（p=5.3x10^-26）和第12层（p=5.8x10^-5）产生显著更强的特征竞争；沿竞争方向steering比随机方向更有效地改变模型输出；竞争分数预测正确性AUROC=0.689，低于softmax置信度AUROC=0.808.

Conclusion: 特征竞争是模型不确定性的可定位、可因果干预、可预测的机械性信号，为理解LLM内部不确定性表征提供了新视角，但当前预测能力尚不及softmax置信度.

Abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) decompose large language model representations into interpretable features, but how these features interact under uncertainty remains poorly understood. We introduce Feature Rivalry -- negatively correlated SAE feature pairs -- and study whether rivalry serves as a mechanistic signature of model uncertainty in Gemma-2-2B using Gemma Scope SAEs. Through a controlled within-domain experiment on PopQA split by response entropy, we find that high-entropy questions produce significantly stronger feature rivalry at layers 0 and 12 relative to low-entropy questions (p=5.3x10^-26 and p=5.8x10^-5 respectively), localizing uncertainty to specific processing stages in the residual stream. We then test whether rivalry is causally upstream of model outputs via activation steering along rivalry axes -- finding that steering along the rivalry direction (vec_A - vec_B) causes more output changes than random directions at low steering multipliers across 15 of 20 rival feature pairs. Finally, a per-prompt rivalry score derived from pairwise cosine similarities of active SAE feature decoder vectors predicts answer correctness (AUROC=0.689), approaching but not matching softmax confidence (AUROC=0.808).

</details>


### [540] [A PyTorch Library of Turing-Complete Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08150)
*Jonathan Bates*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个PyTorch包，能够将图灵机描述编译为无需训练的神经网络模型，实现了从符号计算到神经网络的精确模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建符号系统（图灵机）与神经网络之间的桥梁，提供可运行的参考实现，并为未来研究构造解在梯度优化下的稳定性奠定基础。

Method: 基于两个理论结果实现两种架构：(1) 包含自注意力、交叉注意力和前馈层的Transformer；(2) 将栈编码在Cantor集上的循环网络。通过ReLU网络实现布尔电路（与、或、非、异或门及其组合），利用硬注意力实现磁带上的位置查找。

Result: 成功构建了能够精确模拟指定图灵机的神经网络模型，无需任何训练即可执行图灵机的一步操作。

Conclusion: 该包作为符号-神经桥接的具体可运行参考，为后续研究提供基础，代码已开源。

Abstract: We present a PyTorch package that compiles neural networks and their weights from Turing machine descriptions, producing models that exactly simulate the specified machine without any training. Given a transition function and a set of terminal states, the package constructs a model whose forward pass corresponds to one step of the Turing machine. Two architectures are implemented, each realizing a different theoretical result: (1) a transformer with self-attention, cross-attention, and feedforward layers based on Wei, Chen, and Ma (2021), and (2) a recurrent network based on Siegelmann and Sontag (1995) that encodes the stack in a Cantor set. We develop the constructions from first principles, showing how ReLU networks implement Boolean circuits (AND, OR, NOT, XOR gates and their composition into DNF formulas and binary adders) and how hard attention implements positional lookup on the tape. The package serves as a concrete, runnable reference for the symbolic-neural bridge, and as a foundation for future work on the stability of constructed solutions under gradient-based optimization. Code is available at https://github.com/jonrbates/turing.

</details>


### [541] [Temporal-Decay Shapley: A Time-Aware Data Valuation Framework for Time-Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08153)
*Chuwen Pang,Bing Mi,Kongyang Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出三种渐进增强的时序Shapley数据估值方法（TDS、改进TDS、MS-TDS），通过时间衰减机制和多尺度融合策略，解决传统数据估值方法忽略时间序列数据时效性问题，在噪声检测和高价值数据识别任务中优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数据估值方法假设样本独立同分布，忽略了时间序列数据中样本价值随时间变化的特性，因此需要一种能捕捉时间动态性的数据估值方法。

Method: 提出三种方法：1) TDS：使用指数衰减权重将时间信息融入Shapley值计算；2) 改进TDS：采用幂指数衰减以更好适应非线性时间漂移；3) MS-TDS：构建多尺度融合机制，通过并行多尺度估值和样本级自适应融合，平衡短期热点样本与长期基础样本的价值。

Result: 在噪声检测和高价值数据识别任务中，所提方法整体优于传统方法，在强时间依赖性场景下优势更为明显，有效提升了数据估值的准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 提出的时序Shapley方法能有效刻画时间序列数据中样本价值的动态变化，为时间序列数据的样本选择、噪声检测和模型优化提供了更可靠的估值工具。

Abstract: With the rapid development of machine learning applications on time-series data, accurately assessing the value of training samples has become essential for data selection, noise detection, and model optimization. However, traditional data valuation methods usually assume that samples are independent and identically distributed, and thus ignore the time-varying nature of sample value in time-series data. This paper proposes an improved temporal Shapley data valuation method that enables accurate sample valuation for time-series data through a temporal decay mechanism and a multi-scale fusion strategy. Specifically, we propose three progressively enhanced temporal Shapley methods. Temporal-Decay Shapley (TDS) incorporates temporal information into Shapley value computation through exponential decay weights; the improved TDS adopts power exponential decay to better adapt to nonlinear temporal drift; and Multi-Scale Temporal-Decay Shapley (MS-TDS) constructs a multi-scale fusion mechanism that balances the value of short-term hotspot samples and long-term foundational samples through parallel multi-scale valuation and sample-level adaptive fusion. Experimental results show that the proposed methods generally outperform traditional methods in noise detection and high-value data identification tasks, with more evident advantages under most strongly temporal settings, thereby effectively improving the accuracy and robustness of data valuation.

</details>


### [542] [Quantitative Sobolev Approximation Bounds for Neural Operators with Empirical Validation on Burgers Equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08170)
*Nicole Hao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文建立了神经算子在Sobolev空间中的逼近理论框架，证明其能以$O(\varepsilon^{-d/s})$参数实现$H^t$-范数一致逼近，并通过一维粘性Burgers方程数值实验验证了$H^1$误差随参数规模呈幂律衰减（指数$\alpha\approx1.4$），揭示了Sobolev空间逼近理论对神经算子缩放行为的预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子在无限维函数空间学习方面表现优异，但其在Sobolev范数（同时控制函数值与导数）下的逼近性质缺乏量化分析，而该范数对PDE适定性、稳定性与泛化至关重要。

Method: (1) 理论层面：建立泛函分析框架，证明连续非线性算子$\mathcal{G}: H^{s}\to H^{t}$（$s>d/2$，输入限制在紧子集）可被神经算子在$H^t$-范数下一致逼近，参数量$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/s})$，误差界$\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{t}} \lesssim C N^{-s/d}$；(2) 实验层面：以一维粘性Burgers方程解算子为目标，训练FNO并使用$H^1$损失函数，系统扫描不同模型规模。

Result: 测试$H^1$误差低至$\mathcal{O}(10^{-7})$，相对误差约$10^{-3}$；Sobolev误差与参数量的log-log图呈现幂律关系$\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{1}} \approx C N^{-\alpha}$，经验指数$\alpha\approx1.4$；大FNO在长时程训练中出现优化不稳定性。

Conclusion: Sobolev空间中的逼近理论能够有效预测神经算子的实际缩放行为，为神经算子在偏微分方程求解中的可靠应用提供了理论支撑与定量指导。

Abstract: Neural operators have emerged as a powerful tool for learning mappings between infinite-dimensional function spaces. However, their approximation properties in Sobolev norms remain poorly quantified, even though these norms control both function values and derivatives and are the natural metrics for PDE well-posedness, stability, and generalization. We develop a functional-analytic framework for operator learning in Sobolev spaces and connect it to the numerical behavior of Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) on a prototypical PDE. First, for a continuous nonlinear operator $\mathcal{G}: H^{s}(D)\to H^{t}(D')$ with $s > d/2$ and inputs restricted to a compact subset of $H^{s}(D)$, we prove that $\mathcal{G}$ can be uniformly approximated in $H^{t}$-norm by a neural operator with $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/s})$ trainable parameters. This yields an explicit complexity--error relation of the form $\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{t}} \lesssim C N^{-s/d}$. We then study the one-dimensional viscous Burgers solution operator $\mathcal{G}: u_{0}\mapsto u(\cdot,1)$ on a bounded $H^{1}$-ball and train FNOs with an $H^{1}$-loss. Across a sweep of model sizes, we obtain test $H^{1}$-errors down to $\mathcal{O}(10^{-7})$ and relative errors of order $10^{-3}$, with predictions accurately matching both solutions and spatial derivatives on held-out data. A log-log plot of Sobolev error versus parameter count exhibits an approximate power law $\|\mathcal{G}-\mathcal{G}_θ\|_{H^{1}} \approx C N^{-α}$ with empirical exponent $α\approx 1.4$, and long-horizon training reveals optimization instabilities in large FNOs, providing quantitative evidence that Sobolev-space approximation theory meaningfully predicts neural-operator scaling behavior.

</details>


### [543] [Communication Dynamics Neural Networks: FFT-Diagonalized Layers for Improved Hessian Conditioning at Reduced Parameter Count](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08171)
*Lurong Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将物理通信动力学(CD)框架中的循环谱方法应用于神经网络设计，提出CDLinear层——一种块循环线性层，参数仅为同等维度密集层的1/B。理论证明了其Hessian矩阵可被傅里叶变换对角化、条件数可达1等性质，并在MNIST任务上以3.8倍参数压缩比达到接近全连接层的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将CD框架中用于原子能预测和场致超导的循环谱方法推广到神经网络设计，利用其可解析对角化的数学结构构建更高效的线性层。

Method: 设计CDLinear层：块循环线性层，块大小B=2l+1，参数量为密集层的1/B。通过离散傅里叶变换对角化Hessian矩阵，并利用输入白化使条件数精确为1，同时从物理实验校准的噪声率alpha_CD=0.0118指导dropout率。

Result: CDLinear MLP在MNIST上以2,380参数达97.50%精度（密集层8,970参数达98.15%），实现3.8倍参数压缩；条件数1.9e4，比密集层的5.9e6降低310倍，与理论吻合。

Conclusion: CD框架可有效迁移到神经网络设计，在显著减少参数的同时保持良好精度，且具有更优的条件数和理论可解释性。

Abstract: Background and motivation. The Communication Dynamics (CD) framework, introduced in two earlier papers for atomic-energy prediction and field-induced superconductivity, treats each physical channel as a (2l+1)-vertex polygon whose discrete Fourier transform yields its energy spectrum. This paper applies the same circulant-spectral machinery to neural-network design.
  Layer construction. CDLinear is a block-circulant linear layer with block size B = 2l+1 and 1/B the parameter count of a dense layer of equal input/output dimensions. Three properties follow from the construction. (i) The Hessian of mean-squared loss with respect to the weights is diagonalized by the discrete Fourier transform, with eigenvalues |F[Xj](k)|^2 read directly from the input statistics (Theorem 1). (ii) Under input pre-whitening, the population Hessian condition number satisfies kappa = 1 exactly, with the empirical condition number bounded by 1+O(sqrt(B/N)) on N samples (Theorem 2). (iii) The Shannon noise rate alpha_CD = 0.0118 calibrated in the parent CD papers from the Na D-doublet specifies a transferable, non-arbitrary dropout rate.
  Empirical evaluation. A CDLinear MLP at B = 4 achieves 97.50% +/- 0.23% test accuracy with 2,380 parameters versus 98.15% +/- 0.47% for a parameter-matched dense MLP at 8,970 parameters, a 3.8x parameter reduction at 0.65% accuracy cost, within one standard deviation of the seed-to-seed spread. The CD-MLP mean Hessian condition number kappa = 1.9x10^4 is 310x smaller than the dense baseline kappa = 5.9x10^6, in quantitative agreement with Theorem 2.

</details>


### [544] [CERSA: Cumulative Energy-Retaining Subspace Adaptation for Memory-Efficient Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08174)
*Jingze Ge,Xue Geng,Yun Liu,Wanqi Dong,Wang Zhe Mark,Min Wu,Ngai-Man Cheung,Bharadwaj Veeravalli,Xulei Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CERSA方法，利用SVD保留主成分子空间（覆盖90%-95%谱能量），通过微调低秩表示在显著降低内存消耗的同时，超越现有PEFT方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA）的低秩更新无法充分捕捉全参数微调中权重变化的秩特征，导致性能差距；同时仍需存储完整冻结权重，在资源受限场景下效率不足。

Method: 基于SVD保留主成分子空间（覆盖90%-95%谱能量），仅在此子空间上微调低秩表示，大幅减少内存占用。

Result: 在图像识别、文本生成图像、自然语言理解等多个领域和不同规模模型上，CERSA一致超越SOTA PEFT方法，且内存需求显著更低。

Conclusion: CERSA通过保留关键谱能量子空间，在极低内存开销下实现更优性能，为资源受限场景下的高效微调提供了新范式。

Abstract: To mitigate the memory constraints associated with fine-tuning large pre-trained models, existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, such as LoRA, rely on low-rank updates. However, such updates fail to fully capture the rank characteristics of the weight modifications observed in full-parameter fine-tuning, resulting in a performance gap. Furthermore, LoRA and other existing PEFT methods still require substantial memory to store the full set of frozen weights, limiting their efficiency in resource-constrained settings. To addres these limitations, we introduce Cumulative Energy-Retaining Subspace Adaptation (CERSA), a novel fine-tuning paradigm that leverages singular value decomposition (SVD) to retain only the principal components responsible for 90% to 95% of the spectral energy. By fine-tuning low-rank representations derived from this principal subspace, CERSA significantly reduces memory consumption. We conduct extensive evaluations of CERSA across models of varying scales and domains, including image recognition, text-to-image generation, and natural language understanding. Empirical results demonstrate that CERSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art PEFT methods while achieving substantially lower memory requirements. The code will be publicly released.

</details>


### [545] [Physics-Modeled Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08176)
*Raul Felipe-Sosa,Angel Martin del Rey,Maria Flores Ceballos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DynPMNN，一种将隐藏层定义为常微分方程解的连续时间深度学习架构，基于RKBS理论框架，并通过FitzHugh-Nagumo模型实现，在California Housing数据集上以更少参数取得与NODE和CfC相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统前馈网络使用静态激活函数，缺乏生物可解释性和物理模型集成能力。作者希望通过引入连续时间动力系统替代静态激活，建立更符合生物学启发且能整合物理模型的深度学习架构。

Method: 1) 将每个隐藏层定义为ODE的解（连续时间动态系统）；2) 基于RKBS理论框架进行严格数学论证；3) 采用FitzHugh-Nagumo神经元模型作为具体实现；4) 通过欧拉型数值ODE求解器嵌入计算图；5) 联合训练网络权重和动态参数。

Result: 在California Housing数据集上，DynPMNNs使用更少的可训练参数，取得了与Neural ODEs和Closed-form Continuous-Time Networks (CfCs) 相竞争的性能。

Conclusion: DynPMNNs在动力系统与深度学习之间建立了原则性的桥梁，在表达能力、稳定性和基于物理的建模方面具有进一步研究的潜力。

Abstract: We introduce \emph{Dynamical Physics-Modeled Neural Networks} (DynPMNNs), a continuous-time deep learning architecture in which each hidden layer is defined as the solution of an ordinary differential equation. Unlike classical feed-forward networks, this approach replaces static activation functions with time-evolving dynamical systems, providing a biologically inspired interpretation of hidden-layer behavior and enabling the integration of physically meaningful models. The framework is rigorously grounded in Reproducing Kernel Banach Spaces (RKBSs), allowing DynPMNNs to be characterized as finite-dimensional solutions of an abstract training problem and revealing structural connections with standard neural networks.
  We present a concrete implementation based on the FitzHugh--Nagumo model for neuronal activation, where numerical ODE solvers are embedded into the computational graph via Euler-type schemes. Both network weights and dynamical parameters are trained jointly. Through experiments on the California Housing dataset, we compare DynPMNNs with Neural ODEs (NODEs) and Closed-form Continuous-Time Networks (CfCs). Despite using fewer trainable parameters, DynPMNNs achieve competitive performance.
  These results position DynPMNNs as a principled bridge between dynamical systems and deep learning, with promising directions for further research in expressivity, stability, and physics-based modeling.

</details>


### [546] [Echo-LoRA: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning via Cross-Layer Representation Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08177)
*Yihang Peng,Peng Jin,Jie Gong,Xingyuan Chen,Lingjiao Xu,Ning Su,Yan Ran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Echo-LoRA通过跨层表示注入（将深层隐藏状态聚合后注入浅层LoRA/DoRA模块）提升参数高效微调性能，训练后额外路径可丢弃，不增加推理开销，在常识推理任务上平均提升3-5.7个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA类方法仅在每层权重空间内修改更新规则，未能有效利用深层网络形成的中间表示，导致表示能力受限。

Method: 1) 训练时从深层source层收集边界隐藏状态；2) 聚合成样本级echo表示；3) 通过轻量投影和门控网络注入浅层LoRA/DoRA模块；4) 使用回答-only掩码、掩码蒸馏和随机路由保持稳定性。

Result: 在LLaMA-7B/2-7B/3-8B上平均超越LoRA baselines 5.7个百分点（报告基线）/3.0个百分点（复现基线）；结合DoRA增益2.7个百分点。

Conclusion: Echo-LoRA在不增加推理参数和计算量的前提下，通过跨层表示注入有效提升了PEFT性能，且可即插即用地兼容LoRA/DoRA。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has become a practical route for adapting large language models to downstream tasks, with LoRA-style methods being particularly attractive because they are inexpensive to train and easy to deploy. Most LoRA variants, however, revise the update rule within the weight space of each layer and leave the intermediate representations formed by deeper layers largely unused. We propose Echo-LoRA, a cross-layer representation injection method for parameter-efficient fine-tuning. During training, Echo-LoRA collects boundary hidden states from deeper source layers, aggregates them into a sample-level echo representation, and uses lightweight projection and gating networks to inject the resulting signal into shallow LoRA or DoRA modules. Answer-only masking, masked distillation, and stochastic routing are used to keep this auxiliary path stable and to reduce the gap between training and inference. On eight commonsense reasoning benchmarks, Echo-LoRA exceeds the reported LoRA baselines by 5.7 percentage points on average across LLaMA-7B, LLaMA2-7B, and LLaMA3-8B. Under reproduced LoRA baselines in our unified implementation, the average gain is 3.0 points; when combined with DoRA, the gain is 2.7 points. The Echo path is discarded after training, so the deployed model keeps the original low-rank LoRA/DoRA form and adds neither inference-time parameters nor inference computation.

</details>


### [547] [Generalized Category Discovery in Federated Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08178)
*Zhongzheng Yuan,Lianshuai Guo,Xunkai Li,Wenyu Wang,Meixia Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对联邦图学习中的新类别发现难题，提出GCD-FGL框架，通过客户端拓扑可靠语义对齐与发现、服务器端层次原型对齐，解决邻域吸收效应和全局语义不一致问题，在五个数据集上平均HRScore提升4.86。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦图学习方法基于封闭世界假设，无法处理动态环境中持续涌现的新类别。本文旨在填补这一空白，实现联邦图场景下的广义类别发现（既保留已知类别知识，又协同发现新类别）。

Method: 提出GCD-FGL框架，包含两部分：(1) 客户端侧：拓扑可靠语义对齐与发现（Topology-Reliable Semantic Alignment and Discovery），缓解邻域吸收效应；(2) 服务器侧：层次原型对齐策略（Hierarchical Prototype Alignment），解决全局语义不一致问题。

Result: 在五个真实图数据集上，GCD-FGL consistently优于所有基线方法，平均HRScore绝对提升+4.86。

Conclusion: GCD-FGL有效解决了联邦图学习中新类别发现的邻域吸收效应和全局语义不一致两大挑战，为动态联邦图场景下的广义类别发现提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Federated Graph Learning (FGL) enables collaborative learning over distributed graph data, yet existing approaches largely rely on a closed-world assumption, limiting their applicability in dynamic environments where novel categories continuously emerge. To bridge this gap, we target the practical scenario of Federated Graph Generalized Category Discovery (FGGCD), aiming to collaboratively discover novel categories across decentralized graph clients while retaining knowledge of known categories. We observe that FGGCD introduces two fundamental challenges: (1) the Neighborhood Absorption Effect, where structural fragmentation leads to biased neighborhood aggregation, causing novel nodes to be misclassified as known categories; and (2) Global Semantic Inconsistency, where the aforementioned local biases propagate to the server and are amplified by heterogeneous subgraph distributions, hindering cross-client knowledge integration. To address these issues, we propose GCD-FGL, an FGL framework for GCD that integrates a client-side Topology-Reliable Semantic Alignment and Discovery process to mitigate the neighborhood absorption effect, and a server-side Hierarchical Prototype Alignment strategy to resolve global semantic inconsistency. Extensive experiments on five real-world graph datasets demonstrate that GCD-FGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving an average absolute gain of +4.86 in HRScore.

</details>


### [548] [PC3D: Zero-Shot Cooperation Across Variable Rosters via Personalized Context Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10377)
*Ahmet Onur Akman,Rafał Kucharski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PC3D是一种通过集中式教师蒸馏个性化协调上下文到分布式策略的方法，使智能体能在动态变化的团队规模中仅凭局部历史实现有效协作，在多个MARL基准上超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协作式多智能体强化学习通常假设固定执行团队，但实际部署中活跃智能体数量会动态变化。缺乏能让智能体从局部交互历史中恢复团队上下文并自适应调整行为的方法。

Method: 提出PC3D框架：训练阶段，集合结构的集中式教师将当前活跃团队压缩为协调令牌，并个性化成智能体特定上下文，再蒸馏到分布式策略中；执行阶段，每个智能体从局部历史预测自身上下文，自适应地用于决策。

Result: 在三个协作MARL基准测试中，PC3D在可见和未见团队规模下均取得优于基线方法的回报，消融实验证实了上下文蒸馏和自适应上下文使用的各自贡献。

Conclusion: 通过个性化协调上下文的蒸馏，分布式智能体可以在无需通信或在线重训练的情况下，从局部历史中推断团队上下文并适应动态变化的团队规模，实现有效的零样本协作。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning often assumes a fixed execution team, yet many decentralized systems must operate with varying numbers of active agents during deployment. We study this setting under episodic roster variation: each episode is executed by a set of homogeneous agents, with the team size varying across episodes. Agents act only from local histories, without execution-time communication, privileged coordinators, or online retraining. Therefore, effective cooperation requires each agent to recover relevant context about the active team and adapt its behavior accordingly. To this end, we propose PC3D (Personalized Central Coordination Context Distillation), a method for training decentralized policies to recover and use personalized coordination context from local interaction histories. During training, a set-structured centralized teacher compresses the active team into coordination tokens and personalizes them into agent-specific contexts, which are distilled into decentralized policies. At execution, each agent predicts its own context from local history and adaptively uses it to condition decision-making. Across three cooperative MARL benchmarks, PC3D achieves higher returns than the evaluated baselines with both seen and unseen roster sizes, and ablations attribute these gains to both context distillation and adaptive context use.

</details>


### [549] [Quantile Geometry Regularization for Distributional Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08182)
*Zhaofan Zhang,Minghao Yang,Rufeng Chen,Sihong Xie,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RQIQN，通过Wasserstein分布鲁棒性优化来改进分位数强化学习中的分布退化问题，在风险敏感导航和Atari游戏中表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于分位数的分布强化学习方法在自举目标分位数时可能产生扭曲或退化的分布估计，即分位数分布可能坍缩，导致估计不准确。

Method: 将IQN损失重解为一组局部经验分位数估计问题，针对每个局部槽使用Wasserstein分布鲁棒分位数估计公式，得到闭合形式的分数依赖校正项，该校正具有中位数反对称性和单调性，既能保持风险中性分位数平均，又能扩大上下分位数间距。

Result: 在风险敏感导航和Atari游戏中，RQIQN优于其他现有的基于分位数的分布强化学习算法。

Conclusion: RQIQN作为一种轻量级的Wasserstein分布鲁棒增强方法，通过分位数几何正则化有效解决了分布退化问题，且无需改变底层值目标或重构样本集。

Abstract: Quantile-based distributional reinforcement learning methods learn return distributions through sampled quantile regression, but their bootstrapped target quantiles may induce distorted or degenerate distribution estimates. We propose Robust Quantile-based Implicit Quantile Networks (RQIQN), a lightweight Wasserstein distributionally robust enhancement boosted from a quantile estimation perspective. We first reinterpret a snapshot of IQN loss as a collection of local empirical quantile estimation problems over sampled current fractions. We then robustify each local slot with a Wasserstein distributionally robust quantile estimation formulation, yielding a closed-form, fraction-dependent correction to the Bellman target. This correction directly addresses distributional degeneration: its median antisymmetry preserves the risk-neutral quantile average, while its monotonicity enlarges upper-lower quantile gaps and counteracts collapsed distributional spread. RQIQN thus regularizes quantile geometry without changing the underlying value objective or requiring additional sample set reconstruction. Finally, we empirically show that the proposed RQIQN outperforms other existing quantile-based distributional reinforcement learning algorithms in risk-sensitive navigation and Atari games.

</details>


### [550] [Synergistic Simplex: Cooperative Runtime Assurance for Safety-Critical Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08190)
*Ayoosh Bansal,Mikael Yeghiazaryan,Artyom Khachatryan,Tianyi Zhu,Hunmin Kim,Naira Hovakimyan,Lui Sha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出Synergistic Simplex (SS)架构，通过允许安全监控器使用机器学习输出进行双向集成，在保持形式化安全保障的同时提升了自动驾驶系统中运行时保证架构的性能，并给出了安全性条件的形式化推导和实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主系统（如自动驾驶车辆）中的机器学习组件存在长尾故障，不适合安全关键任务。现有RTA架构（如Control Simplex和Perception Simplex）通过配对ML组件与可验证的安全监控器来缓解此问题，但安全监控器的有限性能成为主要瓶颈。

Method: 提出Synergistic Simplex (SS)架构，实现ML组件与安全监控器之间的双向集成，允许安全监控器利用ML输出（这在传统RTA系统中通常被禁止），并形式化推导了保证安全性的集成条件。

Result: 通过形式化推导给出了安全性得以保持的条件，并在自动驾驶车辆障碍物检测任务上进行了设计、分析与评估，验证了性能提升效果。

Conclusion: SS架构通过安全的双向集成有效解决了传统RTA架构中安全监控器性能瓶颈问题，在保持形式化安全保障的同时提升了系统整体性能，为安全关键自主系统中ML组件的使用提供了更好的解决方案。

Abstract: Autonomous systems increasingly rely on machine-learning (ML) components for safety-critical tasks such as perception and control in autonomous vehicles (AVs). While ML enables essential capabilities, it inevitably exhibits long-tail faults that make it unsuitable for safety-critical tasks. Runtime assurance (RTA) mitigates this issue by pairing ML components with verifiable safety monitors, e.g., Control Simplex and Perception Simplex architectures. However, the limited performance of safety monitors remains a major bottleneck.
  The Synergistic Simplex (SS) architecture improves system performance by enabling bidirectional integration between ML components and safety monitors while preserving formal safety guarantees. The key innovation here is allowing safety monitors to use ML outputs, which is typically prohibited in RTA systems. We formally derive conditions under which this integration preserves safety and demonstrate the performance benefits. We present the design, analysis, and evaluation of SS for AV obstacle detection.

</details>


### [551] [Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10917)
*Usman A. Khan,Joseph W. Durham*

Main category: cs.LG
