TL;DR: 本文提出将匿名多智能体路径规划（MAPF）转化为多边际最优传输（MMOT）问题，利用马尔可夫结构将指数级复杂度的MMOT简化为多项式规模的线性规划（LP），并通过Schrödinger桥实现大规模问题的概率化求解与Sinkhorn迭代算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 匿名MAPF问题中，机器人无需区分身份，只需到达目标位置，但传统方法计算复杂度过高。作者希望利用最优传输理论，将其转化为可高效求解的数学规划问题。

Method: 1) 将MAPF转化为带马尔可夫结构的MMOT，得到多项式规模的LP；2) 证明LP的可行性、全幺模性，从而获得不重叠的整数解；3) 引入Schrödinger桥概率框架，通过熵正则化得到Sinkhorn型迭代解；4) 用概率解（影子传输）作为模板，求解简化后的LP以获得近优整数解。

Result: 理论上证明了LP的可行性与全幺模性；实验表明该方法在保持最优性的同时大幅降低了计算复杂度，具有良好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: 匿名MAPF可以通过最优传输理论高效求解，Schrödinger桥框架为大规模问题提供了实用性解法，近优整数解在复杂度与最优性之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: We consider anonymous multi-agent path finding (MAPF) where a set of robots is tasked to travel to a set of targets on a finite, connected graph. We show that MAPF can be cast as a special class of multi-marginal optimal transport (MMOT) problems with an underlying Markovian structure, under which the exponentially large MMOT collapses to a linear program (LP) polynomial in size. Focusing on the anonymous setting, we establish conditions under which the corresponding LP is feasible, totally unimodular, and consequently, yields min-cost, integral $(\{0,1\})$ transports that do not overlap in both space and time. To adapt the approach to large-scale problems, we cast the MAPF-MMOT in a probabilistic framework via Schrödinger bridges. Under standard assumptions, we show that the Schrödinger bridge formulation reduces to an entropic regularization of the corresponding MMOT that admits an iterative Sinkhorn-type solution. The Schrödinger bridge, being a probabilistic framework, provides a shadow (fractional) transport that we use as a template to solve a reduced LP and demonstrate that it results in near-optimal, integral transports at a significant reduction in complexity. Extensive experiments highlight the optimality and scalability of the proposed approaches.

</details>


### [552] [ExecuTorch -- A Unified PyTorch Solution to Run AI Models On-Device](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08195)
*Mergen Nachin,Digant Desai,Sicheng Stephen Jia,Chen Lai,Mengwei Liu,Jacob Szwejbka,Raziel Alvarez,RJ Ascani,Dave Bort,Manuel Candales,Andrew Caples,Yanan Cao,Zhengxu Chen,Soumith Chintala,Gregory Comer,Tanvir Islam,Songhao Jia,Tarun Karuturi,Jack Khuu,Abhinay Kukkadapu,Tugsbayasgalan Manlaibaatar,Andrew Or,Kimish Patel,Siddartha Pothapragada,Lucy Qiu,Supriya Rao,Orion Reblitz-Richardson,Max Ren,Scott Roy,Anthony Shoumikhin,Scott Wolchok,Guang Yang,Angela Yi,Martin Yuan,Hansong Zhang,Jack Zhang,Jerry Zhang,Shunting Zhang,C. Cagatay Bilgin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ExecuTorch 是一个统一的 PyTorch 原生边缘 AI 部署框架，支持从微控制器到 SoC 等多种异构硬件，无需离开 PyTorch 生态系统即可完成模型部署与优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备上 AI 的低延迟和离线运行需求迫切，但现有部署方式碎片化严重，模型转换或重实现复杂，且常脱离 PyTorch 生态，导致研究与生产之间存在鸿沟。

Method: 提出 ExecuTorch 框架，采用 PyTorch 原生设计，保持 PyTorch 语义，支持自定义、量化优化以及可插拔的执行后端，实现从微控制器到复杂 SoC 的统一部署。

Result: ExecuTorch 可在异构计算环境中无缝部署模型，覆盖可穿戴设备、智能手机到大型计算集群；使研究人员能在 PyTorch 内部验证部署行为，加速实验迭代。

Conclusion: ExecuTorch 有效弥合了 AI 研究到生产部署之间的差距，为边缘 AI 提供了一种统一、高效且保有 PyTorch 原生体验的解决方案。

Abstract: Local execution of AI on edge devices is important for low latency and offline operation. However, deploying models on diverse hardware remains fragmented, often requiring model conversion or complete reimplementation outside the PyTorch ecosystem where the model was originally authored. We introduce ExecuTorch, a unified PyTorch-native deployment framework for edge AI. ExecuTorch enables seamless deployment of machine learning models across heterogeneous compute environments. It scales from embedded microcontrollers to complex system-on-chips (SoCs) with dedicated accelerators, powering devices ranging from wearables and smartphones to large compute clusters. ExecuTorch preserves PyTorch semantics while allowing customization, support for optimizations like quantization, and pluggable execution "backends". These features together enable fast experimentation, allowing researchers to validate deployment behavior entirely within PyTorch, bridging the gap between research and production.

</details>


### [553] [ReplaySCM: A Benchmark for Executable Causal Mechanism Induction from Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08197)
*Serafim Batzoglou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 ReplaySCM，一个包含1,300个项目的因果机制归纳基准，要求系统从有限干预证据中推断可执行的结构化因果模型，并通过重放行为而非公式字符串进行评分，发现大语言模型在隐藏顺序或根结构时表现大幅下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果基准大多只评估局部答案或图结构，缺乏对从有限干预证据中归纳可执行因果机制能力的系统性评估。

Method: 设计1,300个基于布尔结构因果模型的因果机制归纳任务，系统需输出受限布尔 DSL 中的机制映射；通过重放行为评分，设置 Ordered、Block-order、Hidden-order、Hidden-roots 四种信息暴露条件及 Alternative-SCM 任务，并引入支持审计阶梯（Original、Extra Worlds、Counterexample Audit）。

Result: 前沿LLM能推断部分功能父结构，但隐藏顺序或根结构时重放准确率骤降；审计阶梯将局部前驱模式覆盖率从0.8949提升至0.9815再到1.0，但Ordered/Hidden-order差距在更强证据下仍存在。

Conclusion: ReplaySCM通过评估可执行重放泛化能力，补充了现有因果推理基准，揭示了当前模型在有限干预证据下因果机制归纳的局限性。

Abstract: Most causal benchmarks for language models score local answers or graph structure. We introduce ReplaySCM, a 1,300 item benchmark for executable causal mechanism induction from finite interventional evidence. Each item contains binary worlds generated by a latent fully observed acyclic Boolean structural causal model (SCM). A system must output a mechanism map in a restricted Boolean DSL; the submission is parsed, checked for legality and acyclicity, and replayed on training and held-out intervention worlds. Scoring uses replay behavior rather than formula strings, so syntactically different mechanisms receive credit when they behave correctly. ReplaySCM varies the structural information disclosed to the model through Ordered, Block-order, Hidden-order, and Hidden-roots settings, and includes Alternative-SCM tasks that supply a valid reference SCM and ask for a semantically distinct alternative that fits the training worlds, together with a separating intervention and witness. Frontier LLMs infer parts of the functional-parent structure, but held-out replay drops sharply when order or root structure is hidden. We also evaluate a matched support-audit ladder: Original, Extra Worlds, and Counterexample Audit (CEx), that raises mean local predecessor-pattern coverage from 0.8949 to 0.9815 to 1.0; under the audited searches, no discovered semantic alternative remains consistent with the training worlds. The Ordered/Hidden-order gap persists under this stronger evidence. ReplaySCM complements answer-level causal reasoning and graph-discovery benchmarks by evaluating executable replay generalization from finite interventional evidence, without claiming unique identification of the latent SCM.

</details>


### [554] [FairHealth: An Open-Source Python Library for Trustworthy Healthcare AI in Low-Resource Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08198)
*Farjana Yesmin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FairHealth是一个面向医疗保健的开源Python库，专注于低资源（如孟加拉国等发展中国家）场景，整合了联邦学习、公平性审计、可解释性、低资源多语言分诊、公平援助分配等六个模块，填补了现有医疗AI工具包在公平性、隐私保护、可解释性和全球南方数据集方面的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗AI工具包存在四大关键缺口：缺乏针对生物信号和临床表格数据的公平性审计工具；缺少兼容标准ML工作流的隐私保护联邦学习工具；缺乏适合低带宽临床决策支持的可解释性工具；以及没有覆盖全球南方（Global South）医疗数据集的工具包。

Method: FairHealth包含六个模块：(1) fairhealth.federated - 同态加密的联邦学习；(2) fairhealth.fairness - 交叉性公平性指标；(3) fairhealth.explain - 混合模糊-SHAP可解释性；(4) fairhealth.lowresource - 多语言登革热分诊；(5) fairhealth.equity - 公平灾害援助分配；(6) fairhealth.datasets - 公共数据集加载器。

Result: 构建于五项经过同行评审的研究贡献之上，所有数据集均可公开获取，无需机构数据使用协议。可通过pip install fairhealth安装，并开源在GitHub上。

Conclusion: FairHealth为低资源医疗场景提供了一个统一、模块化的可信机器学习框架，特别关注低收入国家（如孟加拉国）的实际需求，推动了全球南方医疗AI的可信度和可及性。

Abstract: We present FairHealth, an open-source Python library that provides a unified, modular framework for trustworthy machine learning in healthcare applications, with particular focus on low-resource and low-income country (LMIC) settings such as Bangladesh. FairHealth addresses four critical gaps in existing healthcare AI toolkits: (1) the absence of integrated fairness auditing for biosignals and clinical tabular data; (2) the lack of privacy-preserving federated learning tools compatible with standard ML workflows; (3) missing explainability tools tailored for low-bandwidth clinical decision support; and (4) no existing toolkit covering Global South healthcare datasets. Built from five peer-reviewed research contributions, FairHealth provides six modules covering federated learning with homomorphic encryption (fairhealth.federated), intersectional fairness metrics (fairhealth.fairness), hybrid fuzzy-SHAP explainability (fairhealth.explain), multilingual dengue triage (fairhealth.lowresource), equitable disaster aid allocation (fairhealth.equity), and public dataset loaders (fairhealth.datasets). All datasets used are publicly available without institutional data use agreements. FairHealth is installable via pip install fairhealth(PyPI: pypi.org/project/fairhealth/) and available at https://github.com/Farjana-Yesmin/fairhealth.

</details>


### [555] [Weakly Supervised Concept Learning for Object-centric Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08201)
*Sparsh Tiwari,Bettina Finzel,Gesina Schwalbe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的弱监督方案，结合基于槽的架构和变分自编码器，用于神经符号系统中的感知阶段符号 grounding，在仅需1%标签的情况下，在对象中心推理任务中发现复杂抽象规则，并在域泛化上超越基础模型基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经符号系统采用两阶段方法（深度感知+符号推理），虽避免了端到端可微方法的优化和可解释性问题，但感知阶段需要大量昂贵标签。本文旨在减少感知阶段对标注数据的依赖，同时保持符号 grounding 的质量。

Method: 1) 结合基于槽的架构（slot-based architecture）实现对象中心性；2) 使用变分自编码器（VAE）进行自监督学习；3) 在潜在维度上引入概念引导（concept guidance）实现人类可解释的 grounding；4) 将预测结果转换为符号背景知识，用于归纳逻辑编程（ILP）、决策树和贝叶斯网络等推理框架。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在仅需1%标签的情况下能发现对象中心推理的复杂抽象规则，对域迁移具有鲁棒性，且在1%监督水平下在域泛化上超越最先进的基础模型基线。

Conclusion: 该方法通过自监督和弱监督策略显著降低了神经符号系统中感知阶段的标注成本，同时保持了强大的推理能力和域泛化性能，为实际应用中的对象中心推理提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Neurosymbolic systems promise to combine deep neural network's (DNN) processing of raw sensor inputs with few-shot performance of symbolic artificial intelligence. Two-stage approaches explicitly decouple DNN based perception from subsequent rule based reasoning. This avoids optimization and interpretability issues of end to end differentiable approaches, but requires costly labels for the perception output. This paper introduces an efficient weak supervision scheme for the perception stage to ground its output symbols for logical induction in object-centric reasoning tasks. It combines a slot-based architecture for object-centricity with a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) for self-supervision, competing with concept guidance on latent dimensions for human interpretable grounding. The resulting predictions are translated into symbolic background knowledge for reasoning frameworks, such as Inductive Logic Programming (ILP), Decision Trees, and Bayesian Networks. Our extensive empirical evaluation on synthetic and real world datasets shows that our approach can discover complex, abstract rules for object centric reasoning whilst reducing supervision to as little as 1% of labels, and being robust even under substantial domain shift. Notably, at 1% supervision it even outperforms state of the art foundation model baselines in domain generalization

</details>


### [556] [Beyond Penalization: Diffusion-based Out-of-Distribution Detection and Selective Regularization in Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08202)
*Qingjun Wang,Hongtu Zhou,Hang Yu,Junqiao Zhao,Yanping Zhao,Chen Ye,Ziqiao Wang,Guang Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DOSER 提出了一种基于扩散模型的 OOD 检测与选择性正则化框架，利用单步去噪重构误差识别 OOD 动作，并区分有益与有害的 OOD 动作，实现了对离线强化学习中过估计问题的更优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线 RL 面临对分布外（OOD）动作价值过估计的关键挑战，现有方法统一惩罚未见样本，无法准确识别 OOD 动作且可能抑制有益探索，而现有区分方法依赖严格的数据分布假设，判别能力有限。

Method: 训练两个扩散模型分别建模行为策略与状态分布，利用单步去噪重构误差作为 OOD 指标；在策略优化时通过评估预测转移来区分有益与有害 OOD 动作，选择性抑制风险动作并鼓励高潜力探索。

Result: 在广泛的离线 RL 基准测试中，DOSER 一致优于现有方法，尤其在次优数据集上表现突出。理论证明了 γ-压缩性与唯一不动点，并给出了渐近性能保证。

Conclusion: DOSER 通过扩散模型实现精细化的 OOD 动作区分与选择性正则化，有效解决了离线 RL 中过估计问题，在理论与实验上均显示出优越性。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) faces a critical challenge of overestimating the value of out-of-distribution (OOD) actions. Existing methods mitigate this issue by penalizing unseen samples, yet they fail to accurately identify OOD actions and may suppress beneficial exploration beyond the behavioral support. Although several methods have been proposed to differentiate OOD samples with distinct properties, they typically rely on restrictive assumptions about the data distribution and remain limited in discrimination ability. To address this problem, we propose DOSER (Diffusion-based OOD Detection and Selective Regularization), a novel framework that goes beyond uniform penalization. DOSER trains two diffusion models to capture the behavior policy and state distribution, using single-step denoising reconstruction error as a reliable OOD indicator. During policy optimization, it further distinguishes between beneficial and detrimental OOD actions by evaluating predicted transitions, selectively suppressing risky actions while encouraging exploration of high-potential ones. Theoretically, we prove that DOSER is a $γ$-contraction and therefore admits a unique fixed point with bounded value estimates. We further provide an asymptotic performance guarantee relative to the optimal policy under model approximation and OOD detection errors. Across extensive offline RL benchmarks, DOSER consistently attains superior performance to prior methods, especially on suboptimal datasets.

</details>


### [557] [Learngene Search Across Multiple Datasets for Building Variable-Sized Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08209)
*Boyu Shi,Junbo Zhou,Chang Liu,Xu Yang,Qiufeng Wang,Xin Geng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LSAMD方法，通过多数据集搜索学习基因（learngenes）来初始化变体规模模型，在降低存储和训练成本的条件下达到与预训练-微调方法相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习方法仅依赖单数据集提取学习基因，限制了下游模型性能。为解决这一问题，提出跨多数据集搜索学习基因的方法。

Method: 将祖先模型扩展为可搜索的超网络，包含数据集特定块和数据集适配器（DADs）。训练时搜索每个数据集的最优架构路径，提取跨数据集最常被选中的基础块作为学习基因，用于初始化变体后代模型。

Result: 在多数据集上，LSAMD达到与预训练-微调方法相当的性能，同时显著降低存储和训练成本。

Conclusion: 跨多数据集搜索学习基因能有效提升变体模型初始化的质量，实现资源高效部署。

Abstract: Deep learning methods are widely used under diverse resource constraints, resulting in models of varying sizes, such as the Vision Transformer (ViT) series. Deploying these models typically requires costly pretraining and finetuning. The Learngene paradigm addresses this issue by extracting transferable components, called learngenes, from a pretrained ancestry model (Ans-Net) to initialize variable-sized descendant models (Des-Nets).Existing learngene extraction methods rely on a single dataset, limiting downstream performance. To address this limitation, we propose Learngene Search Across Multiple Datasets for Building Variable-Sized Models (LSAMD). LSAMD expands the Ans-Net into a searchable super Ans-Net with dataset-specific blocks and dataset adapters (DADs). During training, LSAMD searches for an optimal architecture path for each dataset. The base blocks most frequently selected across datasets are extracted as learngenes for initializing Des-Nets.Experiments on multiple datasets show that LSAMD achieves performance comparable to pretrain-finetune methods while significantly reducing storage and training costs.

</details>


### [558] [LLMs with in-context learning for Algorithmic Theoretical Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08212)
*Anamaria Hell,Leander Thiele*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了将大型语言模型（Claude）与计算机代数系统（Maple）结合，用于执行理论物理中的算法计算任务，特别是在修改引力理论中的宇宙学扰动分析方面。研究表明，配备示例的前沿LLM能够解决大多数测试问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理论物理中的算法计算虽然概念简单，但耗时长且容易出错。随着LLM的进步，研究是否可以利用配备CAS运行时的LLM来可靠地执行这些算法任务。

Method: 将Claude（LLM）与Maple（计算机代数系统）接口连接，应用于修改引力理论中的宇宙学扰动计算框架，并通过提供工作示例来引导模型。

Result: 前沿LLM配备工作示例后能够解决大多数测试问题，但同时也存在典型的失败模式。

Conclusion: LLM+CAS的组合在自动化理论物理算法计算方面具有潜力，当前能力已可用于多数问题，但仍需进一步改进以提高可靠性。

Abstract: There is an increasing number of algorithmic computations in theoretical physics. These, while conceptually simple, can nevertheless be time-consuming and contain subtleties that should not be overlooked. Given the recent improvement of Large Language Models (LLM), it is natural to investigate whether LLMs equipped with a computer algebra system (CAS) runtime and sufficiently informative context can reliably carry out these algorithmic tasks. In this work, we interface Claude with Maple, and apply this framework to cosmological perturbations in modified theories of gravity. We demonstrate the current capabilities of this approach, the typical failures, and how the same can be improved. We find that a frontier LLM supplied with worked examples is able to solve most test problems.

</details>


### [559] [Retrieval Mechanisms Surpass Long-Context Scaling in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08217)
*Rishi Ahuja,Kumar Prateek,Simranjit Singh,Vijay Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）中"更长历史上下文提升预测质量"的假设不成立，实验显示随着上下文窗口增长预测误差反而上升（逆缩放定律），而基于检索增强的RAFT方法以更少计算量取得更优效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验TSFMs中"输入更多历史数据可提升预测质量"这一从NLP借用的长上下文前提是否真正成立。

Method: 在ETTh1基准上对连续上下文架构（含PatchTST）进行实验，观察不同上下文长度下的预测误差；同时评估检索增强预测方法RAFT（固定720步窗口+选择性检索）。

Result: 发现逆缩放定律：上下文越长预测误差越大，3000步窗口性能下降超68%；RAFT以MSE 0.379超越长上下文配置和零样本基础模型（Chronos, Moirai）。

Conclusion: 时间序列基础模型应摒弃盲目堆叠历史长度的架构，转向选择性检索机制，因为注意机制难以忽略无关历史波动。

Abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) have borrowed the long context paradigm from natural language processing under the premise that feeding more history into the model improves forecast quality. But in stochastic domains, distant history is often just high-frequency noise, not signal. Hence, the proposed work tests whether this premise actually holds by running continuous context architectures (PatchTST included) through the ETTh1 benchmark. The obtained results contradict the premise: an inverse scaling law shows up clearly, with forecasting error rising as context gets longer. A 3,000-step window causes performance to drop by over 68%, evidence that attention mechanisms are poor at ignoring irrelevant historical volatility. Retrieval-Augmented Forecasting (RAFT) is evaluated as an alternative. RAFT achieves a mean squared error (MSE) of 0.379 with a fixed 720-step window and selective retrieval, outperforming both long-context configurations and zero-shot foundation models (Chronos, Moirai) despite requiring far less computation. In addition, the retrieval step injects only the most relevant historical segments as dynamic exogenous variables, which gives the model a context-informed inductive bias it cannot build on its own from raw sequences. Therefore, foundation models going forward need to shift architecturally toward selective retrieval.

</details>


### [560] [Deep Dreams Are Made of This: Visualizing Monosemantic Features in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08218)
*Adam Szokalski,Mateusz Modrzejewski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LVO方法，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）解耦潜在扩散模型的层表示，实现特征可视化，并在Stable Diffusion 1.5上展示了比基线更清晰的可视化结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将特征可视化优化技术从卷积神经网络扩展到潜在扩散模型，解决潜在空间中特征语义混杂的问题，实现机制可解释性。

Method: 使用SAE解耦多语义层表示为单语义特征，结合潜在空间优化、时间步活动分析、调度匹配噪声注入、先验初始化和正则化策略。

Result: 在Style50微调的Stable Diffusion 1.5上，SAE特征生成清晰可识别的概念可视化（如对角线构图、人体、玫瑰等），基线方法结果较差；像素空间正则化技术可迁移但需不同配置。

Conclusion: LVO能直接揭示特征激活的内容而非下游影响，与数据集示例和特征引导互补，为潜在扩散模型提供可解释性分析工具。

Abstract: This paper proposes latent visualization by optimization (LVO), a mechanistic interpretability technique that extends feature visualization by optimization - originally developed for convolutional neural networks - to latent diffusion models. LVO employs sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to disentangle polysemantic layer representations into monosemantic features. Key contributions include latent-space optimization, time-step activity analysis, schedule-matched noise injection, prior initialization through feature steering, and suitable regularization strategies. We demonstrate the method on Stable Diffusion 1.5 fine-tuned on the Style50 dataset, showing that SAE features produce clear visualizations of recognizable concepts - including diagonal compositions, human figures, roses, cables, and waterfall foam - that correlate with dataset examples, while the baseline without disentanglement produces less coherent results. We further show that regularization techniques from pixel-space feature visualization transfer to the latent domain, though they require different configurations for the raw-layer and SAE variants. Compared to dataset examples and steering, LVO provides complementary insights by directly revealing what activates a feature rather than its downstream effects.

</details>


### [561] [NoisyCoconut: Counterfactual Consensus via Latent Space Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08221)
*Michael Jerge,David Evans*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NoisyCoconut是一种无需重新训练、仅在推理时通过对潜在轨迹注入噪声生成多样推理路径，并通过路径一致性判断置信度，从而提升LLM可靠性的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在推理时缺乏可靠的置信度信号，微调方法成本高且需要训练数据，作者希望在不修改模型参数的前提下，通过推理时操作来提升模型可靠性并实现选择性弃权（abstention）。

Method: 在推理过程中，向模型的潜在空间轨迹注入可控噪声，生成多条不同的推理路径；然后比较这些路径之间的一致性（一致同意程度）作为置信度信号，当一致性低时让模型弃权。

Result: 在多个推理基准上，当噪声扰动路径达到全体一致同意时，错误率从40-70%降至15%以下；在数学推理任务中，通过选择性弃权，模型准确率可超过95%。

Conclusion: NoisyCoconut提供了一种实用且高效的途径，在不改动模型参数也不依赖训练数据的情况下，显著提升LLM输出的可靠性，并实现良好的覆盖率-准确率权衡。

Abstract: This paper presents NoisyCoconut, a novel inference-time method that enhances large language model (LLM) reliability by manipulating internal representations. Unlike fine-tuning methods that require extensive retraining, NoisyCoconut operates directly on model representations during inference and requires no retraining. Rather than training models to reason in latent space, we inject controlled noise into latent trajectories to generate diverse reasoning paths. Agreement among these paths provides a confidence signal, enabling models to abstain when uncertain. We demonstrate that this approach achieves effective coverage-accuracy tradeoffs across multiple reasoning benchmarks without requiring access to training data or modification of model parameters. This approach provides a practical pathway to improving the reliability of LLM outputs while maintaining compatibility with existing models. Our experiments show that unanimous agreement among noise-perturbed paths reduces error rates from 40-70% to below 15%, enabling models to exceed 95% accuracy on mathematical reasoning tasks through selective abstention.

</details>


### [562] [A Simulated Federated Analysis of MS-Induced Brain Lesions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08223)
*Evelyn Trautmann,Joël Federer-Gsponer,Markus C. Elze,José-Tomás Prieto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个仿真框架，用于模拟真实的多中心联邦研究项目（多发性硬化症数据分析），涵盖图像分割和临床数据分析两项任务，并利用联邦生存分析、联邦PCA等方法，构建高保真合成队列来模拟真实临床数据的复杂性和异质性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的联邦学习方法缺乏能够反映真实临床数据复杂性和异质性的测试环境，尤其在多发性硬化症（MS）这种病程异质性高的疾病研究中，需要一个逼真的仿真平台来开发和评估联邦学习方法。

Method: 构建一个包含图像分割和临床数据分析的双任务联邦仿真框架；使用高保真合成队列模拟MS相关的临床和人口统计特征；图像部分使用公开的真实数据集；复现真实联邦工作流的关键环节，包括分布式数据治理、站点特定预处理、跨隔离节点的模型训练以及分析结果的安全聚合。

Result: 成功构建了一个能够模拟真实联邦研究项目的仿真框架，为MS研究中的联邦学习方法开发、评估和基准测试提供了现实可行的测试平台。

Conclusion: 该仿真框架为多中心临床研究中的联邦学习提供了一种实用的评估工具，有助于在保护患者隐私的前提下推进MS相关研究。

Abstract: Federated techniques such as federated learning and federated analysis have emerged as a powerful paradigm for enabling multi-center research on sensitive clinical data while preserving patient privacy. In this study, we introduce a simulation framework that emulates a real-world federated research project focused on the analysis of multiple sclerosis (MS) patient data. The project comprises two components: an image segmentation task and a clinical data analysis task, where federated variants of survival analysis and Principal Component Analysis (PCA) are employed. To capture the complexity and heterogeneity of real clinical datasets, we construct a federation of high-fidelity synthetic cohorts designed to mirror MS-related clinical and demographic characteristics, while the imaging component leverages publicly available real-world datasets. Our simulation replicates key elements of authentic federated workflows, including distributed data governance, site-specific preprocessing, model training across isolated nodes, and the secure aggregation of analytical outputs. This framework provides a realistic testbed for developing, evaluating, and benchmarking federated learning methods in the context of MS research.

</details>


### [563] [Social Determinants of Health and Fentanyl Overdose Mortality Across US Counties: An XGBoost and SHAP Analysis Identifying Silent Risk Counties and Treatment Deserts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08230)
*Kabi Raj Tiruwa,Abhisan Ghimire,Anuj Kumar Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用XGBoost模型和SHAP归因分析，基于2022年美国975个县级数据，发现残疾率、高血压、吸烟率、缺乏车辆获取能力等因素是芬太尼过量致死的主要预测因子，并识别出143个"沉默风险县"和治疗荒漠县（死亡率高出52.6%），强调应优先在这些地区扩大药物治疗资源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 美国芬太尼过量致死人数持续上升，但现有研究未能充分理解县级社会与结构条件如何导致更高的过量致死率。本研究旨在利用可解释机器学习方法，识别社会健康决定因素（如残疾、治疗可及性、行为健康问题）与过量致死风险之间的关联，从而在死亡恶化前定位脆弱县。

Method: 整合CDC WONDER（2022年过量死亡数据）、CDC社会脆弱性指数、CDC PLACES健康行为数据及区域健康资源文件等四类政府数据源，覆盖975个美国县。采用XGBoost模型以标准化死亡比（SMR）预测过量死亡风险，使用五折交叉验证评估模型精度，并通过SHAP值揭示各因素的贡献方向。

Result: XGBoost表现优于所有对照模型（Spearman rho=0.67, R²=0.457, MAE=0.409, 高风险召回率=71.1%）。最高预测因子为残疾率、高血压、吸烟率和缺乏车辆获取。治疗荒漠县过量死亡率高出52.6%（SMR 1.786 vs 1.170, p<0.0001）。K-means识别出143个沉默风险县。过量死亡存在空间聚集性（Moran's I=0.505, p=0.001），含75个热点和136个冷点。WONDER中58.2%的数据被抑制，其中72%为农村县，65%为治疗荒漠。

Conclusion: 县级社会健康决定因素可有效预测过量致死风险，特别是残疾、治疗可及性和行为健康负担。应优先在治疗荒漠县扩大药物治疗（MOUD），并对沉默风险县进行早期干预，以防死亡率进一步恶化。

Abstract: Background: Fentanyl overdose deaths are still increasing across the U.S. We do not fully understand which county-level social and structural conditions lead to higher overdose death rates. Social determinants of health, including disability, treatment access, and behavioral health issues, may help identify vulnerable counties before deaths become severe. No earlier study has used explainable machine learning with SHAP attribution on 2022 CDC WONDER data to study treatment access gaps and silent risk counties.
  Methods: We combined data from four government sources for 975 U.S. counties, including CDC WONDER (2022) overdose mortality data, CDC Social Vulnerability Index (SVI), CDC PLACES health behavior data, and Area Health Resources Files. An XGBoost model was used to predict overdose mortality risk using Standardized Mortality Ratio (SMR). Five-fold cross-validation was used to test model accuracy, and SHAP values were used to show which factors increase or decrease risk.
  Results: XGBoost outperformed all tested models (Spearman rho=0.67, R2=0.457, MAE=0.409, high-risk recall=71.1%). Top predictors were disability rate, hypertension, smoking, and lack of vehicle access. Treatment desert counties had 52.6% higher overdose mortality (SMR 1.786 vs 1.170; p<0.0001). K-means identified 143 silent risk counties. Overdose deaths were spatially clustered (Moran's I=0.505, p=0.001) with 75 hotspots and 136 coldspots. Suppressed counties were 58.2% of WONDER counties, mostly rural (72%) and treatment deserts (65%).
  Conclusions: County-level SDOH factors predict overdose deaths, especially disability, treatment access, and behavioral health burden. MOUD expansion should prioritize treatment desert counties, and silent risk counties need early intervention before mortality worsens.

</details>


### [564] [TRAM: Training Approximate Multiplier Structures for Low-Power AI Accelerators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08231)
*Chang Meng,Hanyu Wang,Yuyang Ye,Mingfei Yu,Wayne Burleson,Giovanni De Micheli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TRAM框架，通过联合优化近似乘法器结构与AI模型参数，在保持精度损失较小的同时降低AI加速器功耗。在CNN和视觉Transformer上分别实现最高25.05%和27.09%的功耗降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI加速器功耗问题日益突出，近似计算有望降低功耗但现有方法将乘法器设计与模型训练分离，未能实现联合优化，限制了功耗降低的潜力。

Method: TRAM框架：联合优化近似乘法器（AxM）结构和AI模型参数，实现端到端协同设计。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上的CNN中实现最高25.05%的AxM功耗降低；在ImageNet上的视觉Transformer中实现最高27.09%的功耗降低。

Conclusion: 联合优化近似乘法器结构与模型参数的方法优于传统分离式设计，能更有效地降低AI加速器功耗，且适用于CNN和视觉Transformer等不同架构。

Abstract: Reducing power consumption in AI accelerators is increasingly important. Approximate computing can reduce power consumption while keeping the accuracy loss small. Since multipliers are power-hungry components in AI models, this paper focuses on synthesizing low-power approximate multipliers (AxMs). Unlike prior works that design AxMs separately from AI model training, we present TRAM, which jointly optimizes the AxM structure and AI model parameters to lower power with small accuracy loss. Experiments show that compared to state-of-the-art AxMs, TRAM achieves up to 25.05% AxM power reduction on CNNs with CIFAR-10, and reduces power by up to 27.09% on vision transformers with ImageNet.

</details>


### [565] [Hierarchical Multi-Fidelity Learning for Predicting Three-Dimensional Flame Wrinkling and Turbulent Burning Velocity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08232)
*Saghar Zolfaghari,Yu Xie,Junfeng Yang,Safa Jamali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出层级式多保真神经网络框架(MuFiNNs)，通过将稀疏高保真实验数据与结构化低保真物理趋势模型结合，在数据稀缺条件下成功预测湍流预混火焰的褶皱动力学与燃烧速度，为复杂反应流提供可扩展的物理驱动建模策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真表征湍流预混火焰受限于先进诊断技术的高成本和复杂性，尤其在高压强湍流条件下，耦合火焰形态与燃烧动力学的测量数据极为稀缺，亟需能够从稀疏实验中提取物理预测模型的方法。

Method: 构建层级式多保真神经网络(MuFiNNs)，通过层级化低保真构造与非线性多保真校正相结合，学习火焰的几何与反应耦合行为，并恢复简化模型无法捕捉的偏差。

Result: MuFiNNs在多种燃料、压力与湍流强度下准确重建火焰行为，实现对未见工况的内插与训练域外的稳健外推，在噪声、弱结构化或实验不可达区域中仍表现有效。

Conclusion: 层级式多保真学习为数据受限条件下可扩展、物理驱动的燃烧建模提供了有效策略，多保真科学机器学习可从稀疏实验中提取有意义的预测模型，尤其适用于高保真数据采集困难的不稳定性主导反应流。

Abstract: High-fidelity experimental characterization of turbulent premixed flames remains limited by the cost and complexity of advanced diagnostics, particularly under elevated pressures and intense turbulence where measurements of coupled flame morphology and burning dynamics are sparse. Here, we develop a hierarchical multi-fidelity neural network framework (MuFiNNs) to address this challenge by integrating sparse high-fidelity experimental data with structured low-fidelity representations encoding dominant physical trends. The framework combines hierarchical low-fidelity construction with nonlinear multi-fidelity correction to learn coupled geometric and reactive flame behavior while recovering discrepancies that simplified models alone cannot capture. The methodology is applied to expanding turbulent premixed flames to predict three-dimensional flame wrinkling dynamics and turbulent mass burning velocity across varying fuels, pressures, and turbulence intensities. Using experimentally informed low-fidelity trend models with sparse high-fidelity measurements, MuFiNNs accurately reconstruct observed flame behavior, enable interpolation across unseen operating conditions, and demonstrate robust extrapolation beyond the training domain. Importantly, the framework remains effective in noisy, weakly structured, or experimentally inaccessible regimes where conventional data-driven approaches often fail. These results show that hierarchical multi-fidelity learning provides a scalable and physically grounded strategy for predictive combustion modeling in data-limited regimes. More broadly, this work establishes multi-fidelity scientific machine learning as a practical framework for extracting physically meaningful predictive models from sparse experiments, particularly for instability-dominated and turbulence-sensitive reactive flows where high-fidelity data acquisition is demanding.

</details>


### [566] [When Does Value-Aware KV Eviction Help? A Fixed-Contract Diagnostic for Non-Monotone Cache Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08234)
*Ruijie Zhang,Haozhe Liang,Da Chang,Li Hu,Fanqi Kong,Huaxiao Yin,Yu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种固定预算的诊断方法，用于分析长上下文LLM推理中KV缓存压缩选择器的失败原因，并揭示了选择器在证据恢复、价值排序和耦合证据保留三个步骤中的失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文LLM解码时，读取大型KV缓存的存储和带宽成本成为瓶颈。KV压缩通过仅保留部分缓存来降低成本，但仅凭任务准确率无法解释选择器成功或失败的原因。

Method: 引入固定预算诊断方法，保持选择器设置不变，每次改变一个决策槽。对于价值排序，探针结合块的注意力质量与移除该块后估计的输出变化。

Result: 在LongBench上跨三个模型和两个预算，探针在正边际单元上的阳性率为72.6%，在非正边际单元上为32.4%。NeedleBench M-RT 32k和RULER 8k验证了分支检索下的封闭性，264单元符号评估分离了支持恢复和输出价值排序与边界附近的杠杆效应。

Conclusion: 得出的顺序是：恢复解码侧证据，对其输出价值进行排序，并在投影过程中保留耦合证据。

Abstract: Long-context LLM inference is bottlenecked by the memory and bandwidth cost of reading large KV caches during decoding. KV compression reduces this cost by keeping only part of the cache, but task accuracy alone does not identify why a selector succeeds or fails. A selector can fail at three steps: it may miss the evidence future decoding needs, give high scores to tokens that do not affect the output, or break related evidence when fitting scores into a small cache. We introduce a fixed-contract diagnostic that holds the selector's setup fixed and changes one decision slot at a time. For value ranking, the probe combines a block's attention mass with the estimated output change from removing it. On LongBench across three models and two budgets, the probe is positive on 72.6% of positive-margin cells and 32.4% of nonpositive-margin cells. NeedleBench M-RT at 32k and a RULER 8k check probe support closure under branched retrieval, and a 264-cell sign evaluation separates support recovery and output-value ranking from leverage effects near the boundary. The resulting order is to recover decode-side evidence, rank its output value, and preserve coupled evidence during projection.

</details>


### [567] [Distributional Spectral Diagnostics for Localizing Grokking Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08237)
*Ziyue Wang,Yufeng Ying,Takafumi Kanamori*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Hankel动态模式分解（DMD）的诊断方法，用于在Transformer训练中定位“grokking”现象（测试准确率突升）的发生时刻。该方法通过分析观测轨迹的残差、谱和有效秩，能在准确率上升前发出警报（AUROC≈0.93），并具有可量化的提前时间与误报率权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在grokking现象中，模型先过拟合训练数据，随后才出现泛化能力。作者希望开发一种方法，能在测试准确率实际上升之前，从训练轨迹中定位这一转变的发生时刻，从而实现早期预警。

Method: 将任务相关的可观测变量（如log-probability）汇总为经验分布，映射到Wasserstein/分位数坐标，然后应用Hankel动态模式分解（DMD）进行分析。通过重构残差、频谱和有效秩构成诊断输出。在held-out的模加法Transformer运行上进行验证，并进行了扰动实验和范数控制实验。

Result: 残差在run级别的grokking vs. 非grokking判别中AUROC≈0.93。在固定持续阈值操作规则下，真阳警报可以提前于onset出现。高残差窗口的短时扰动偏差约为低残差窗口的3倍。扰动灵敏度与残差排序一致，而非总参数范数排序。

Conclusion: 残差可作为窗口级别的监测和定位信号，而非通用的早期预警预测器或干预规则。范数仍是run级别的强指标，log-probability是当前协议下表现最佳的可观测变量。

Abstract: In grokking, a model first fits the training data while test accuracy remains low, and only later begins to generalize. We ask whether this transition can be localized from observed training trajectories before the test accuracy rises, and formulate grokking transition localization as a diagnostic problem with an explicit threshold/FPR/lead-time trade-off. Task-dependent observables are summarized as empirical distributions, mapped to Wasserstein/quantile coordinates, and analyzed by Hankel dynamic mode decomposition (DMD); the resulting reconstruction residual, together with spectrum and effective rank, forms the diagnostic output. On held-out modular-addition Transformer runs, the residual achieves AUROC \(\approx \) 0.93 for grokking-vs-non-grokking discrimination at the run level; under a fixed sustained-threshold operating rule, true-positive alarms can precede onset, with lead time reported jointly with false-alarm rate and uncertainty intervals. Perturbation experiments show that, in the tested \(wd=1\) pool, high-residual windows exhibit about \(3\times\) larger short-horizon perturbation deviation than low-residual windows. In a same-data norm-window control, perturbation sensitivity aligns with the residual ordering rather than total-parameter-norm ordering, suggesting that the residual is not merely a total-norm proxy at the window level in the studied \(wd=1\) dynamics. Norm signals remain strong run-level regime indicators, and log-probability performs best among the observables tested under the current protocol. We position the residual as a window-level monitoring and localization signal in the studied modular-arithmetic Transformer settings, not a universal early-warning predictor or an intervention rule.

</details>


### [568] [Path-Coupled Bellman Flows for Distributional Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08253)
*Boyang Xu,Qing Zou,Siqin Yang,Hao Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Path-Coupled Bellman Flows (PCBF)，一种基于流匹配的连续时间分布强化学习方法，通过源一致性贝尔曼耦合路径和参数化控制变量目标，解决了现有方法的边界不匹配和高方差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布强化学习方法存在局限：有限支撑或分位数方法依赖投影，基于流的方法存在流源处的边界不匹配问题，以及当前噪声与后继噪声独立时的高方差自举问题。

Method: 提出PCBF方法：(1) 构建源一致性贝尔曼耦合路径，使当前路径从t=0的先验分布出发，在t=1达到贝尔曼目标，并在中间时刻与后继流保持路径仿射关系；(2) 通过共享基噪声耦合当前流与后继流；(3) 引入λ参数化的控制变量目标，λ=0时为无偏样本贝尔曼目标，λ>0以可控偏差换取方差降低。

Result: 在解析可计算的MRP、OGBench和D4RL基准上的实验表明，PCBF在分布保真度和训练稳定性方面优于现有方法，并在离线强化学习中取得了有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: PCBF通过路径耦合和参数化控制变量，有效解决了DRL中的边界不匹配与高方差问题，是一种更稳定、保真度更高的分布强化学习方法。

Abstract: Distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) models the full return distribution, but existing finite-support or quantile-based methods rely on projections, while recent flow-based approaches can suffer from \emph{boundary mismatch} at the flow source or from \emph{high-variance} bootstrapping when current and successor noises are independent. We propose Path-Coupled Bellman Flows (PCBF), a continuous-time DRL method that learns return distributions with flow matching using \textbf{source-consistent Bellman-coupled paths}: the current path starts from the required base prior at $t{=}0$, reaches the Bellman target at $t{=}1$, and maintains a pathwise affine relation to the successor flow at intermediate times (without requiring time-$t$ marginals to satisfy a distributional Bellman fixed point for all $t$). PCBF couples current and successor return flows through shared base noise and uses a $λ$-parameterized control-variate target: $λ{=}0$ recovers an unbiased sample Bellman target, while $λ{>}0$ trades controlled bias for variance reduction. Experiments on analytically tractable MRPs, OGBench, and D4RL show improved distributional fidelity and training stability, and competitive offline RL performance.

</details>


### [569] [HyperTransport: Amortized Conditioning of T2I Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08254)
*Valentino Maiorca,Eleonora Gualdoni,Xavier Suau,Marco Cuturi,Luca Zappella,Pau Rodríguez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HyperTransport，一种超网络框架，通过将CLIP嵌入直接映射到干预参数（使用最优传输损失端到端训练），实现零样本概念激活控制，比逐概念优化快3600-7000倍，性能与最强基线相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活控制方法需要对每个概念进行独立优化，无法高效处理大规模、动态变化或运行时指定的概念集；提示（prompting）虽然灵活但脆弱，对措辞高度敏感。

Method: HyperTransport是一种超网络框架：使用预训练CLIP编码器将概念嵌入映射到激活干预参数，通过最优传输损失端到端训练。训练后，对新概念只需一次前向传播即可生成干预参数，无需逐概念优化。

Result: 在167个未见概念上，HyperTransport匹配甚至超越逐概念优化基线；速度提升3600-7000倍；在成对比较中，人类和VLM评委选择HyperTransport的概率约为提示方法的2倍。

Conclusion: HyperTransport首次实现了对开放概念集的摊销化激活控制，同时支持连续可解释强度控制和跨模态条件控制（参考图像直接引导文本生成），填补了现有方法的空白。

Abstract: As foundation models grow in capability, the ability to efficiently and reliably control their behavior becomes critical. Fine-tuning these models can be costly, and while prompting can be practical for controllability, it remains fragile due to models' high sensitivity to exact prompt wording and structure. This brittleness has driven interest in activation steering techniques that offer more stable and predictable control over model behavior. However, existing activation steering methods require per-concept optimization, which makes them ill-suited to deployment scenarios where the concept set is large, evolving, or only specified at request time: each new concept incurs at least minutes of optimization on the target model. We propose HyperTransport, a hypernetwork framework that amortizes this cost by mapping embeddings from a pretrained encoder (CLIP in our instantiation) directly to intervention parameters, trained end-to-end using an optimal transport loss. Once trained, HyperTransport produces each new intervention in a single hypernetwork forward pass, 3600-7000x faster than per-concept fitting. On concepts unseen during training, it matches the strongest per-concept baselines at inducing the target concept. By decoupling concept representation from intervention prediction, HyperTransport combines three capabilities that no existing approach offers as a set: amortized steering for open-ended concept sets, continuous interpretable strength control, and cross-modal conditioning where reference images can directly steer text-based generation. We validate HyperTransport on DMD2 and Nitro-1-PixArt across 167 held-out test concepts via CLIP-based metrics, a VLM-as-a-judge evaluation, and a user study. In pairwise comparisons, both human and VLM judges prefer HyperTransport over prompting ~2x as often.

</details>


### [570] [Can LLMs Predict Polymer Physics Just by Reading Synthesis and Processing Prose?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08255)
*Yuchu Liu,Rui Zhu,Jingwei Xiong,Haixu Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PolyLM，一个仅基于自然语言的、感知工艺与条件的框架，直接从全文文献中预测聚合物性能。通过微调90亿参数的Qwen3.5-9B模型，在包含18.5万篇论文和27.6万个聚合物样本的数据集上训练，在22种物性预测中达到中位R²=0.74，多项关键性能预测R²超过0.80，证明了自然语言可作为高性能、高可扩展性的材料性能预测接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚合物性能预测模型仅依赖化学结构表示（如SMILES或分子图），忽略了合成路线、加工历史、形态和测试条件等关键实验背景信息，导致性能预测不准确。作者希望开发一种能够直接从科学文献自然语言描述中学习并预测性能的方法。

Method: 构建大规模文献数据集（18.5万篇论文、27.6万个聚合物样本、22种物性）；采用LoRA低秩适配微调Qwen3.5-9B（90亿参数）大语言模型；引入任务级不确定性加权策略优化多任务学习。

Result: 在68,283个保留样本上评估，22种物性预测中位R²=0.74，关键热学、力学和物理化学性能预测R²超过0.80，达到新的SOTA水平。

Conclusion: 自然语言是一种强大且高度可扩展的接口，能够有效用于实际的材料性能预测，完全无需结构输入即可实现高精度预测。

Abstract: Can large language models predict physical and mechanical polymer properties simply by reading unstructured scientific prose? Polymer performance is rarely determined by chemical structure alone; identical nominal polymers can exhibit drastically different behaviors depending on their synthesis route, processing history, morphology, and testing conditions. Yet, state-of-the-art polymer property models typically rely on structure-only representations -- such as SMILES or molecular graphs -- which strip away this vital experimental context. In this work, we introduce \textbf{PolyLM}, a natural-language-only, process- and condition-aware framework that predicts materials performance directly from full-text literature. By circumventing structural inputs entirely, PolyLM preserves the nuanced, unstructured descriptions of synthesis and processing reported by domain scientists. To train this framework, we curated an unprecedented, literature-scale dataset encompassing 185,000 scientific papers and over 276,400 unique polymer samples across 22 physical, mechanical, and thermal properties. We fine-tuned a massive 9-billion-parameter language model (Qwen3.5-9B) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and task-level uncertainty weighting. Evaluated on 68,283 held-out observations, the model achieves remarkably high predictive accuracy, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks for complex properties. Across the 22 diverse targets, the model achieves a median $R^2$ of 0.74, with predictions for key thermal, mechanical, and physicochemical properties frequently surpassing an $R^2$ of 0.80. These results unequivocally demonstrate that natural language is a powerful, highly scalable interface for realistic materials performance prediction.

</details>


### [571] [Efficient Prompt Learning for Traffic Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08273)
*Qianru Zhang,Xinyi Gao,Alexander Zhou,Reynold Cheng,Siu-Ming Yiu,Hongzhi Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SimpleST，一种轻量级、模型无关的提示调优框架，通过高效提示增强时空图神经网络的泛化与自适应能力，在保持模型参数固定的情况下适应新分布，五个真实数据集上验证了其预测精度与计算效率的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时空图神经网络预测方法泛化能力差，难以应对时空动态导致的分布偏移问题。

Method: 提出SimpleST，一种轻量级且模型无关的提示调优框架，通过高效提示机制使预训练模型适应新分布，同时保持模型参数固定。

Result: 在五个真实世界城市时空数据集上，该方法在预测精度和计算效率方面均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SimpleST有效提升了时空GNN的分布外泛化能力，降低了自适应开销和复杂度，实现了预训练模型的高效利用。

Abstract: Accurate traffic prediction is essential for optimizing transportation systems, enhancing resource allocation, and improving overall urban administration. Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance and have been widely used in various spatio-temporal prediction scenarios. However, these prediction methods often exhibit low generalization ability, struggling with distribution shifts caused by spatio-temporal dynamics. To address this challenge, we propose an approach to enhance the generalization and adaptation of spatio-temporal GNNs through efficient prompting. Specifically, we introduce a lightweight and model-agnostic prompt tuning framework for spatio-temporal GNNs, named SimpleST. It facilitates adapting pre-trained spatio-temporal GNNs to novel distributions while keeping the model parameters fixed. This prompt mechanism reduces the overhead and complexity of adaptation, enabling efficient utilization of pre-trained models for out-of-distribution generalization. Extensive experiments conducted on five real-world urban spatio-temporal datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach in terms of prediction accuracy and computational efficiency.

</details>


### [572] [Trapping Attacker in Dilemma: Examining Internal Correlations and External Influences of Trigger for Defending GNN Backdoors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08278)
*Fan Yang,Binyan Xu,Di Tang,Kehuan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出新防御方法PRAETORIAN，通过分析触发子图内部相关性和外部节点影响力来检测GNN后门攻击，将攻击成功率降至0.55%仅牺牲0.62%干净准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN后门防御依赖具体子图模式或节点特征，易被自适应攻击者绕过，亟需一种针对后门攻击本质需求的防御方法。

Method: 基于观察：攻击者需注入大量触发节点或依赖少数高影响力节点。PRAETORIAN通过(i)分析潜在触发子图内部相关性检测异常大注入结构，(ii)量化外部节点影响力识别具有不成比例影响的触发器。

Result: 平均攻击成功率降至0.55%，干净准确率仅下降0.62%；SOTA防御在相同条件下ASR仍>20%、CA下降>3%；对自适应攻击仍有效，迫使攻击者面临效能与可检测性间的权衡。

Conclusion: PRAETORIAN通过捕捉后门攻击的内在需求而非表面特征，实现了更鲁棒且有效的防御，将攻击者约束在不利的权衡中。

Abstract: GNNs have become a standard tool for learning on relational data, yet they remain highly vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Prior defenses often depend on inspecting specific subgraph patterns or node features, and thus can be circumvented by adaptive attackers. We propose PRAETORIAN, a new defense that targets intrinsic requirements of effective GNN backdoors rather than surface-level cues. Our key observation is that flipping a victim node's prediction requires substantial influence on the victim: attackers tend to either inject many trigger nodes or rely on a small set of highly influential ones. Building on this observation, PRAETORIAN (i) analyzes internal correlations within potential trigger subgraphs to detect abnormally large injected structures, and (ii) quantifies external node influence to identify triggers with disproportionate impact. Across our evaluations, PRAETORIAN reduces the average attack success rate (ASR) to 0.55% with only a 0.62% drop in clean accuracy (CA), whereas state-of-the-art defenses still yield an average ASR of >20% and a CA drop of >3% under the same conditions. Moreover, PRAETORIAN remains effective against a range of adaptive attacks, forcing adversaries to either inject many trigger nodes to achieve high ASR (>80%), which incurs a >10% CA drop, or preserve CA at the cost of limiting ASR to 18.1%. Overall, PRAETORIAN constrains attackers to an unfavorable trade-off between efficacy and detectability.

</details>


### [573] [LaWM: Least Action World Models for Long-Horizon Physical Consistency from Visual Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08279)
*Qixin Xiao,Maani Ghaffari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出最小作用量世界模型（LaWM），通过在潜空间引入最小作用量原理来约束潜变量转移函数，从而在长时程视觉预测中保持物理一致性，优于现有视频生成和世界模型方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜世界模型使用无约束的神经网络进行未来状态预测，长时程 rollout 会产生累积误差、能量漂移和物理不一致的未来，缺乏对真实物理规律的约束。

Method: 提出潜变分积分器：将观测编码为广义坐标，学习潜离散拉格朗日量，构造离散作用量泛函，通过求解离散积分条件来推进预测，而非使用无约束的转移预测器。

Result: 在物理合成动力学和具身机器人交互基准上，LaWM 在物理不变性、背景一致性、运动平滑性以及外观和几何预测指标上均优于视频生成和世界模型基线。

Conclusion: 将最小作用量原理嵌入潜世界模型的转移规则中，提供了一种结构保持的先验，有效提升了长时程视觉预测的物理一致性和预测质量。

Abstract: Learning predictive world models from visual observations is a core problem in embodied AI, with applications to model-based reinforcement learning and robotic planning. Existing latent world models typically generate future states with unconstrained neural transition functions, while modern video generation systems often prioritize perceptual plausibility or introduce physical structure through auxiliary losses, external guidance, or separate dynamics modules. As a result, long-horizon rollouts can remain weakly grounded in the physical principles that govern real dynamics, leading to compounding error, energy drift, and physically inconsistent futures. We propose Least Action World Models (LaWM), a latent world-modeling framework that operationalizes the Principle of Least Action in learned visual latent space: future rollouts are governed by a learned Lagrangian action functional rather than produced only by an unconstrained transition predictor. Our main technical realization is a latent variational integrator: LaWM encodes observations into learned generalized coordinates, learns a latent discrete Lagrangian over consecutive latent states, constructs a discrete action functional, and advances prediction by solving the corresponding discrete integration condition. Thus, physical structure is not merely used to score, regularize, or constrain a completed trajectory; it defines the latent transition rule itself. Because the transition is induced by a discrete variational principle, LaWM provides a structure-preserving bias for long-horizon visual prediction. Across physics-clean synthetic dynamics and embodied robot interaction benchmarks, LaWM improves physical invariance, background consistency, motion smoothness, and appearance and geometric prediction metrics over video-generation and world-model baselines.

</details>


### [574] [Beyond the False Trade-off: Adaptive EWC for Stealthy and Generalizable T2I Backdoors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08280)
*Lu Bowen,Xinyu Tang,Yin Yin Low,Shu-Min Leong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC方法，通过余弦语义效用和自适应调度动态调整弹性权重巩固（EWC）正则化，解决了T2I后门攻击中攻击成功率与模型保真度之间的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于输出蒸馏的T2I后门攻击方法（如LwF）正则化效果有限；静态EWC虽更强但会造成ASR与保真度的人工权衡。需要一种既能保持高ASR又能维持模型保真度的自适应方法。

Method: 提出Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC，利用基于余弦的语义效用动态调整EWC正则化强度，并引入自适应调度策略，将固定惩罚转变为上下文敏感的约束。

Result: 实验表明该方法在ASR-保真度平衡上优于现有基线，并在OOD数据集上展现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 余弦感知自适应EWC有效解决了静态EWC的固有权衡问题，为T2I后门攻击中的模型保真度保持提供了更优解决方案。

Abstract: Preserving model fidelity is essential for stealthy text-to-image (T2I) backdoor attacks. Existing methods such as Learning without Forgetting (LwF) rely on output-based distillation, which provides limited regularization. We introduce Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) as a parameter-based alternative for preserving fidelity in backdoor learning. While stronger in principle, we show that standard static EWC with a fixed regularization weight lambda and mean-squared utility loss creates an artificial trade-off between attack success rate (ASR) and fidelity, particularly degrading performance on weak triggers. To address this, we propose Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC, which dynamically adjusts EWC regularization using a cosine-based semantic utility and adaptive scheduling. This approach transforms EWC from a fixed penalty into a context-sensitive constraint, maintaining high ASR while preserving model fidelity. Experiments demonstrate improved ASR-fidelity balance and enhanced robustness on out-of-domain (OOD) datasets compared to existing baselines.

</details>


### [575] [HTPO: Towards Exploration-Exploitation Balanced Policy Optimization via Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08283)
*Xincheng Yao,Ruoqi Li,Cheng Chen,Daoxin Zhang,Yi Wu,Yao Hu,Chongyang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HTPO算法，通过分层划分响应token为功能组（基于提示难度、答案正确性和token熵），为每组设计专门的优化目标，实现探索与利用的动态平衡，在AIME'24和AIME'25上分别比DAPO基线提升8.6%和6.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL算法对所有token一视同仁，无法为推理过程提供细粒度指导，缺乏动态平衡探索-利用的有效机制。

Method: 采用分治思想，从提示难度、答案正确性和token熵三个维度将响应token分层划分为特定功能组，并为每组设计专门的优化目标以促进探索或利用。

Result: 在AIME'24和AIME'25上分别比DAPO基线提升8.6%和6.7%；测试时计算扩展时性能优势持续扩大。

Conclusion: HTPO通过自适应token级控制方法实现了更平衡的探索-利用权衡，有效促进探索而不牺牲利用性能。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a pivotal technique for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, the de facto practice of mainstream RL algorithms is to treat all tokens of one response equally and assign the same optimization objective to each token, failing to provide granular guidance for the reasoning process. While in Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, different tokens usually play distinct roles. Therefore, the current RL algorithms lack an effective mechanism to dynamically balance the exploration-exploitation trade-off during learning. To this end, we propose Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control Policy Optimization (HTPO), a novel RL algorithm that takes the divide-and-conquer idea to hierarchically partition the response tokens into specific functional groups from three aspects (i.e., prompt difficulty, answer correctness, and token entropy). Within each group, according to the contributions to exploration or exploitation, we design specialized optimization objectives to facilitate the effective execution of each token's expected functionality. In this way, HTPO can achieve a more balanced exploration-exploitation trade-off. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks validate the superiority of our HTPO algorithm, which significantly outperforms the strong DAPO baseline (e.g., +8.6% and +6.7% on AIME'24 and AIME'25, respectively). When scaling test-time compute, the HTPO-trained model maintains a consistent performance advantage over the DAPO baseline, and the gap widens as the sampling budget increases, validating that our adaptive token-level control method fosters effective exploration without sacrificing exploitation performance. Code will be at https://github.com/xcyao00/HTPO.

</details>


### [576] [Exactness Matters for Physical Rule Enforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08285)
*Bum Jun Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究自回归科学预测器中物理约束的施加时机问题。发现当投影算子精确时（如周期流中的傅里叶投影），约束施加显著提升预测精度；但当投影不精确时（如非周期流中的近似边界清理），过强的约束反而因分布偏移导致预测误差增大。提出了"算子-数据对齐"原则，强调应先评估约束算子与目标流形的一致性，再决定约束强度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归科学预测模型通常通过"修复"每个预测状态来施加物理或结构约束，但强约束何时可靠、何时引入分布偏移尚不明确。本文旨在系统研究这一问题，明确约束算子与目标几何对齐程度对预测性能的影响。

Method: 提出"算子精确性"概念（修复映射在目标流形上为恒等映射且与目标几何对齐）。在周期不可压缩Navier-Stokes、非周期CFDBench流和层次预测支持任务上，对比原始预测、事后修复和环内修复三种策略，并通过受控失配、筛选清理、自适应门控和外部骨干检查等方法分析近似约束的影响。

Result: 周期精确场景：傅里叶投影显著提升精度，NS-128上Raw-FNO的100步MSE从(9.390±6.290)×10^{-5}降至事后(1.130±0.165)×10^{-6}和环内(5.370±0.113)×10^{-7}。非周期近似场景：强泊松清理降低发散但恶化滚动误差，目标畸变MSE比线性系统残差更能预测这种损害。最佳操作点可能是原始预测或近恒等映射。

Conclusion: 约束施加应基于"算子-数据对齐"进行基准测试，精确的预测调和是稳定基线，而混合自顶向下修复依赖于数据集。在施加约束前应先评估约束算子与目标流形的一致性程度。

Abstract: Autoregressive scientific forecasters often enforce physical or structural constraints by repairing each predicted state before feeding it back into the model. However, it remains unclear when stronger physical rule enforcement becomes reliable and when it becomes a source of distribution shift. We study this question through operator exactness, meaning whether the repair map is the identity on the target manifold and is aligned with the target geometry. We compare raw forecasting, post hoc repair, and in-loop repair across periodic incompressible Navier--Stokes, non-periodic CFDBench flows, and a hierarchical-forecasting support task. In the exact periodic regime, Fourier projection substantially improves rollout accuracy. On the NS-128 benchmark, a strong Raw-FNO has a final-step rollout MSE at horizon 100 of $(9.390 \pm 6.290)\times 10^{-5}$, and post hoc and in-loop projection reduce it to $(1.130 \pm 0.165)\times 10^{-6}$ and $(5.370 \pm 0.113)\times 10^{-7}$. However, once an exact projection is unavailable and only approximate boundary-preserving cleanup is available, the ordering changes. Across cavity, tube, dam, and cylinder flow, stronger Poisson-based cleanup can reduce divergence while worsening rollout error; target-distortion MSE predicts this harm far better than a linear-system residual. Controlled mismatch, screened cleanup, adaptive gating, and external-backbone checks show that the best approximate-regime operating point can be raw or near-identity. Hierarchical forecasting gives the same broader pattern. Exact forecast reconciliation is a stable baseline, whereas blended top-down repair, a validation-tuned interpolation toward historical-proportion top-down reconciliation, is dataset-dependent. Thus, constraint enforcement should be benchmarked by operator--data alignment before enforcement strength.

</details>


### [577] [Diagnosing Spectral Ceilings in Equivariant Neural Force Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08286)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种谱注入诊断方法，通过在等变力场骨干网络后附加轻量级SPN，测量其能保留的角频率。以阿司匹林分子为例，L=2的NequIP骨干在l=4处恢复边界信号，但在l=5处出现11.7倍的性能悬崖下降（p从0.913降至0.078），该现象在多个独立训练的骨干中一致，并通过有限度跨度定理校准诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有等变力场骨干网络虽在分子动力学模拟中表现优异，但对其所能保持的角频率范围缺乏系统诊断方法，尤其是网络在高阶角动量下的表达能力边界尚不明确。

Method: 提出谱注入诊断：向分子力场注入受控角频率扰动，在冻结的骨干网络后附加轻量级SPN，测量可恢复的频率成分。结合有限度跨度定理进行理论校准，并通过合成C5校准、容量/激活/跨架构控制实验排除参数数量的影响。

Result: 在阿司匹林分子上，L=2的NequIP骨干在l=4处可恢复边界信号（p=0.913），但在l=5处性能急剧下降（p=0.078），下降幅度达11.7倍。该边界现象在4个独立训练的骨干中一致，注入残差指标R²_inj(4)=0.374 vs R²_inj(5)=0.006，进一步验证了该边界。

Conclusion: 谱注入诊断能有效检测等变力场骨干网络的角频率保持边界，揭示了L=2的NequIP网络在l=5处存在表达能力悬崖，且该现象非参数数量不足导致，而是由网络架构的固有表达能力边界决定。

Abstract: We introduce a spectral-injection diagnostic for measuring which angular frequencies a trained equivariant force-field backbone preserves: inject a controlled angular-frequency perturbation into a molecular force field, attach a lightweight Spectral Prediction Network (SPN) to the frozen backbone, and read off which frequencies are recoverable. On aspirin, a quadratic SPN attached to an L = 2 NequIP backbone recovers the boundary signal at l = 4 but collapses at l = 5: a 11.7x cliff at the predicted drL boundary, with p dropping from 0.913 to 0.078. The same boundary-vs-above contrast persists across n = 4 independently trained backbones (raw-gain delta contrast, hierarchical cluster bootstrap) and is corroborated by a denominator-free injected-residual metric (R2_inj(4) = 0.374 versus R2_inj(5) = 0.006). A finite-degree span theorem calibrates the diagnostic: for a single marked direction, degree-d polynomials of degree-L spherical-harmonic features span exactly H less than or equal to dL with multiplicity-one saturation at the boundary (scoped to single-direction degree-bounded probes, not a function-class upper bound on multi-atom MPNNs). A synthetic C5 calibration plus capacity, activation, and cross-architecture controls rule out parameter count alone as the explanation.

</details>


### [578] [Multi-Armed Bandits With Best-Action Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08287)
*Francesco Bacchiocchi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi,Francesco Emanuele Stradi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在bandit-feedback模型下，带最优动作查询的MAB问题。发现随机相关奖励下，任何算法都有Ω(√(T-k))的下界；而在随机i.i.d.奖励下，可实现Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})的遗憾，并匹配了下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Russo等人[2024]在full-feedback模型中证明了k次最优动作查询可将遗憾从Õ(√T)降到Õ(min{T/k,√T})，但该结论能否推广到更现实的bandit-feedback模型是遗留的开放问题。

Method: 通过构造随机相关奖励环境证明下界Ω(√(T-k))；在随机i.i.d.环境下设计算法并证明遗憾上界Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})，同时给出匹配的对数因子下界。

Result: 1）随机相关奖励下，任何算法遗憾至少Ω(√(T-k))，即full-feedback的结论不成立；2）随机i.i.d.奖励下，可实现Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})遗憾，且与下界匹配。

Conclusion: 完整刻画了bandit-feedback模型中最优动作查询带来的收益边界，揭示了奖励结构对该收益的关键影响。

Abstract: We study \emph{multi-armed bandits} (MABs) augmented with \emph{best-action queries}, in which the learner may additionally query an oracle that reveals the best arm in the current round. This setting was recently characterized by Russo et al. [2024] in the \emph{full-feedback} model, where the learner observes the rewards of all arms after each round. They show that, in both \emph{stochastic} and \emph{adversarial} environments, $k$ best-action queries reduce the optimal $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{T})$ regret to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T}\})$. Whether this improvement extends to the more realistic \emph{bandit-feedback} model -- where the learner observes only the reward of the played arm -- was left as an open problem. We fully resolve this question. When rewards are stochastic but correlated among arms, we show that the full-feedback result does not carry over: any algorithm must incur regret at least $Ω(\sqrt{T-k})$. This lower bound directly extends to adversarial environments. On the positive side, we show that $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T-k}\})$ regret is still achievable when rewards are stochastic and i.i.d., and establish a matching lower bound, up to logarithmic factors. Together, these results provide a complete characterization of the benefits of \emph{best-action queries} in the \emph{bandit-feedback} model.

</details>


### [579] [UMEDA: Unified Multi-modal Efficient Data Fusion for Privacy-Preserving Graph Federated Learning via Spectral-Gated Attention and Diffusion-Based Operator Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08288)
*Shih-Yu Lai,Hirozumi Yamaguchi,Shang-Tse Chen,Yu-Lun Liu,Bing-Yu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出UMEDA图联邦学习框架，通过低秩滤波的线性注意力层对齐异构传感器，用扩散模型在谱域聚合客户端更新，并采用各向异性差分隐私机制平衡隐私与效用，在异构性和隐私约束下显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在设备无关定位场景中面临三个挑战：客户端传感器模态和分辨率异构、数据分布漂移、以及隐私噪声破坏定位所需的结构信号，需要一种能同时处理这些问题的框架。

Method: 1) 构建全局图，客户端作为节点共享连续积分算子，聚合转化为该算子的谱域信号处理；2) 每个客户端使用线性注意力层，其核谱经低秩滤波抑制模态特定残差，使不同传感器对齐到公共低秩子空间；3) 服务器用扩散模型在核谱系数上聚合更新，处理变构图大小和缺失模态；4) 各向异性差分隐私机制将噪声投影到信号子空间的零空间，保护主导特征方向。

Result: 在MM-Fi和RELI11D分布外基准测试上，UMEDA在准确性、收敛速度和通信效率方面均优于最先进的联邦基线，尤其在高度模态异质性和严格隐私预算下表现突出。

Conclusion: 将聚合重构为谱域信号处理是解决异构联邦学习的有效范式，各向异性隐私机制能在不牺牲定位精度的前提下提供严格隐私保障。

Abstract: Device-free localization trains models from heterogeneous wireless and visual sensors (e.g., Wi-Fi, LiDAR) distributed across edge devices. Federated learning offers a privacy-respecting framework, but is brittle when clients differ in sensor modality and resolution, when their data distributions drift, and when privacy noise destroys the structural signal needed for localization. We propose UMEDA, a graph federated learning framework in which clients form nodes of a global graph that share a continuous integral operator, and aggregation is reformulated as spectral signal processing on this operator. Each client encodes its local sensors with a linear-attention layer whose kernel spectrum is low-rank filtered, suppressing modality-specific residuals so clients with different sensors align in a common low-rank subspace. The server then aggregates client updates via a diffusion model over the kernel's spectral coefficients, treating updates as discretizations of a shared operator rather than topology-bound weights -- this absorbs varying graph sizes and missing modalities without node-wise correspondence. To balance privacy and utility, we add an anisotropic differential-privacy mechanism that projects noise preferentially into the null space of the signal subspace, preserving dominant eigendirections while ensuring formal $(ε, δ)$-DP under gradient clipping. On MM-Fi and the RELI11D out-of-distribution benchmark, UMEDA outperforms state-of-the-art federated baselines in accuracy, convergence, and communication efficiency, particularly under high modality heterogeneity and tight privacy budgets.

</details>


### [580] [What If We Let Forecasting Forget? A Sparse Bottleneck for Cross-Variable Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08289)
*Fan Zhang,Shiming Fan,Hua Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MS-FLOW提出稀疏瓶颈框架，通过选择性稀疏路由替代密集交互，在有限通信预算下建模变量间依赖，抑制虚假相关性，在12个真实基准上达到SOTA预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法虽增强跨通道交互提升了整体精度，但在依赖关系具有状态依赖性和噪声的真实数据中，密集交互会放大虚假相关并导致表示过平滑，产生不可靠预测。

Method: 提出MS-FLOW稀疏瓶颈框架，将变量间交互建模为容量受限的信息流，用选择性稀疏路由替代全连接通信，仅保留关键依赖路径，在严格通信预算下注入跨变量信号。

Result: 在12个真实世界基准数据集上取得SOTA预测精度，同时产生更少但更可靠的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 将多元时间序列预测从"更多交互"转向"更有效交互"，证明稀疏化、有选择性的跨变量通信比密集交互更可靠。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting is critical in many real-world systems, and thus modeling cross-channel dependencies is essential. Although existing methods improve overall accuracy by enhancing representations and cross-channel interactions, it remains challenging to reliably capture inter-variable dependencies under specific conditions. We observe that dependencies in real data are often state-dependent and noisy; in such cases, dense interactions can amplify spurious correlations and lead to representation over-smoothing, which may yield unreliable predictions in certain scenarios. Motivated by this, we propose MS-FLOW, a sparse-bottleneck framework that explicitly models inter-variable interaction as capacity-limited information flow. Specifically, MS-FLOW replaces fully connected communication with selective sparse routing, retaining only a few critical dependency paths and injecting cross-variable signals under a strict communication budget, thereby suppressing redundant connections and spurious-correlation propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MS-FLOW learns more reliable multivariate correlations, achieving state-of-the-art forecasting accuracy on 12 real-world benchmarks while producing fewer yet more reliable dependencies, shifting multivariate forecasting from "more interaction" to "more effective interaction".

</details>


### [581] [Toward Optimal Regret in Robust Pricing: Decoupling Corruption and Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08290)
*Kalana Kalupahana,Francesco Emanuele Stradi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对鲁棒动态定价问题，首次实现了对腐败量C和时间T的独立依赖的遗憾界，在已知C时达到O(C+log T)，未知时达到O(C+log² T)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒动态定价方法中，遗憾界对腐败量C和时间T的依赖是耦合的（如O(C log log T)），存在"解耦C与T依赖关系"的公开问题。

Method: 提出了鲁棒二分搜索（Robust Binary Search）的变体，通过设计对恶意腐败反馈具有鲁棒性的价格搜索机制，实现了遗憾界中C项和log T项的加法分离。

Result: 已知腐败量C时达到O(C+log T)遗憾界；未知腐败量时达到O(C+log² T)遗憾界。

Conclusion: 成功解耦了腐败量C与时间T的依赖关系，解决了Gupta等人[2025]提出的公开问题，为鲁棒动态定价提供了更优的理论保障。

Abstract: We design the first regret guarantees for robust dynamic pricing that decouple the dependence on the corruption $C$ and the time horizon $T$. In dynamic pricing, a seller with unlimited supply of a good interacts with a stream of buyers over \( T \) rounds, with the goal of maximizing revenue. At each round $t$, the seller posts a price $p_t$, and the buyer purchases the good only if their unknown valuation $v^\star$ exceeds this price. The seller observes only the binary feedback $\mathbb{I} \left\{ p_t \leq v^\star \right\}$, indicating whether a sale occurred. In the \emph{robust} pricing setting, a malicious adversary is allowed to corrupt this feedback in at most $C$ rounds. Even if the learner knows the corruption $C$, the best known regret bound is $\mathcal{O}(C\log\log T)$ by Gupta et al. [2025]. This leaves as an open problem to ``decouple'' the dependence on $C$ and $T$. In this work, we resolve this open problem. In particular, we develop a robust variant of binary search that achieves regret $\mathcal{O}(C+\log T)$ when the corruption $C$ is known and $\mathcal{O}(C+\log^2 T)$ when the corruption is unknown.

</details>


### [582] [Graph Computation Meets Circuit Algebra: A Task-Aligned Analysis of Graph Neural Networks for Electronic Design Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08291)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了EDA问题中图神经网络（GNN）的应用，提出成功的GNN-for-EDA方法必须使GNN的传播、聚合和监督机制与目标任务的固有代数结构对齐。文章针对静态时序分析、布局、布线拥塞、翻转率传播、IR压降和模拟对称性提取等具体任务，逐一分析其代数结构并匹配相应的GNN架构，同时指出了当前方法的局限性及未来关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管EDA问题本质上是图结构化的，但并非所有图问题都适用相同的GNN计算方式。现有方法缺乏系统性的任务对齐分析，导致架构与任务代数结构不匹配，限制了GNN在EDA中的性能。

Method: 采用"任务对齐"的方法论，逐一分析每个EDA任务（静态时序分析、布局、布线拥塞、翻转率传播、IR压降、模拟对称性提取）的底层代数结构（如max-plus/min-plus递推、超图线长/密度惩罚、供需场、概率递推、线性系统、离散约束预测），并匹配相应的GNN架构（异步DAG-GNN、可微布局器、消息传递GNN等）。

Result: 明确了各EDA任务与GNN架构的正确对齐关系：时序分析→异步DAG-GNN；布局→可微布局器而非纯消息传递GNN；布线拥塞→稀疏供需场；翻转率传播→概率递推；IR压降→电力传输网络上的线性系统；模拟对称性提取→离散约束预测。同时识别了四个关键失败模式：阶段泄漏、代理到签核的差距、校准问题和设计分布漂移。

Conclusion: GNN-for-EDA的成功关键在于任务对齐，而非盲目应用通用GNN。连续SE(3)-等变几何GNN与曼哈顿数字布局不匹配，LLM-for-RTL、HLS、RL/扩散拓扑生成不在本文范围内。未来工作应聚焦于解决四个关键失败模式。

Abstract: EDA problems are graph-structured, but not all graph-structured problems call for the same GNN computation. We argue that successful GNN-for-EDA methods are those whose propagation, aggregation, and supervision align with the native algebra of the target task. Concretely: static timing analysis is a max-plus/min-plus recurrence on a topologically ordered DAG, structurally aligned with asynchronous DAG-GNNs; placement is governed by hypergraph wirelength and density penalties and is exploited by differentiable placers rather than by message-passing GNNs alone; routing congestion is a sparse demand-supply field over a layout grid; switching-activity propagation is a probabilistic recurrence on a directed netlist; IR drop is a linear system on the power-delivery network; and analog symmetry extraction is a discrete constraint-prediction problem on schematic graphs. Through these task-by-task alignments we (i) review the GNN architectural toolkit relevant to circuits, (ii) formalize how circuit graphs differ from generic graphs (directed, heterogeneous, multi-scale, with sequential and clock structure), (iii) characterize where current methods succeed and where the algebra-architecture mismatch limits them, and (iv) identify failure modes--stage leakage, proxy-to-signoff gap, calibration, and design-distribution shift--that we believe are likely to dominate the next phase of work. We position the paper as a GNN-for-EDA, task-aligned analysis rather than a comprehensive AI-for-chip-design survey. Continuous SE(3)-equivariant geometric GNNs are usually mismatched to Manhattan digital layout, and LLM-for-RTL, HLS, and RL/diffusion-based topology generation are outside our scope.

</details>


### [583] [Hierarchical Mixture-of-Experts with Two-Stage Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08292)
*Gleb Molodtsov,Alexander Miasnikov,Aleksandr Beznosikov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Hi-MoE提出了一种分层混合专家框架，通过双层路由控制（组间负载均衡和组内专家特化）来解决稀疏MoE中负载均衡与专家特化之间的矛盾，在NLP和视觉任务上均取得一致改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏MoE模型的路由器存在根本性权衡：强负载均衡会抑制专家特化，而激进的多样性又常导致路由崩溃。作者希望在不牺牲负载均衡的前提下实现稳定的专家特化。

Method: 提出Hi-MoE分组MoE框架，将路由控制分解为两个耦合层次：(i) 组间均衡——确保不同专家组的流量公平；(ii) 组内特化——促进组内专家互补行为同时防止组内崩溃。

Result: 在NLP和视觉基准测试中一致优于现有稀疏路由和分组MoE基线；在58B token的大规模预训练中，Hi-MoE-7B相比OLMoE-7B实现5.6%的困惑度降低和40%的专家平衡度提升。

Conclusion: 层次化路由目标能够重塑路由器行为，促进稳定的专家特化并缓解路由崩溃，且该方法在模型规模和专家数量扩展时保持鲁棒性。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity by routing each token to a small subset of experts. However, their routers exhibit a fundamental trade-off: strong load balancing can suppress expert specialization, while aggressive diversity often causes routing collapse. We propose Hi-MoE, a grouped MoE framework that decomposes routing control into two coupled levels: (i) inter-group balancing that enforces fair traffic across expert groups, and (ii) intra-group specialization that promotes complementary expert behaviors while preventing within-group collapse. Our analysis provides a principled explanation of how our hierarchical objectives reshape the router, thereby promoting stable specialization and mitigating collapse. We observe consistent improvements over recent sparse-routing and grouped-MoE baselines across NLP and vision benchmarks, and confirm robustness via scaling studies (model size, expert count) and targeted ablations. In large-scale pre-training on 58B tokens, Hi-MoE-7B achieves a 5.6% perplexity reduction and a 40% improvement in expert balance over OLMoE-7B across diverse evaluation domains.

</details>


### [584] [In-Context Fixation: When Demonstrated Labels Override Semantics in Few-Shot Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08295)
*Ming Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现同质标签（即使是语义有效的）会使上下文学习准确率崩溃至≤12%，并揭示ICL本质上是受限的词汇检索过程，模型将演示中的标签词汇视为完备答案集，通过激活修补定位到第7层电路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑现有ICL理论的深层机制：随机标签对ICL影响不大（Min et al., 2022），但同质标签（homogeneous labels）是否造成更严重的破坏？以及背后的机制是什么？旨在区分"语义层面"与"词汇层面"的解释。

Method: 在6个模型（Pythia、Llama、Qwen，0.8B-8B）和4个任务上进行系统实验，采用同质标签、随机无意义词（{foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}）等设置；进行集合级固定效应分析、4-way分类实验、多token verbalizer分解；使用Pythia-1B的逐项配对激活修补（paired activation patching）定位因果电路，并在Llama-3.2-1B上用logit lens进行跨架构验证。

Result: 同质标签使准确率降至≤12%；无意义词集合实验显示模型将42-67%的概率分配给演示过的词汇集合，P(dog)低于0.2%；4-way分类中准确率为0%；激活修补定位到第7层电路（rank 2/560，99.8百分位，4-fold CV均值103%），恢复98.4%的效果差距；Llama上复现了"编码-覆盖"轨迹，top-5层恢复89%。

Conclusion: ICL输出本质上是受限的词汇检索（vocabulary retrieval），模型将演示标签位置的词汇绑定为穷举答案集，与潜在概念贝叶斯解释（Xie et al., 2022）不一致；同质性是这种固定效应的最大坍塌情况；揭示了两类可分离的成分：格式层（模板采纳）和内容层（极性覆盖）。

Abstract: While random demonstration labels barely hurt in-context learning (Min et al., 2022), we show that homogeneous labels--even semantically valid ones--collapse accuracy to <=12% across six models (Pythia, Llama, Qwen; 0.8B--8B) and four tasks. The trigger is label-slot content: the model treats tokens occupying the label position as an exhaustive answer vocabulary, with homogeneity as the maximally collapsed case. A novel set-level fixation finding confirms this: when demonstrations carry varied nonsense tokens from {foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}, the model places 42--67% of probability on the demonstrated set while P(dog) remains below 0.2%. This is inconsistent with latent-concept Bayesian accounts (Xie et al., 2022) and reveals that ICL output is constrained vocabulary retrieval--the model binds its output to the demonstrated token inventory regardless of semantic plausibility. The effect generalizes to 4-way classification (0% accuracy across three models, 1B--8B) and multi-token verbalizers ("very positive"), where we decompose fixation into format-level (template adoption) and content-level (polarity override) components that are experimentally dissociable. Mechanistically, per-item paired activation patching on Pythia-1B recovers 98.4% of the gap (95% CI [84%, 112%]), localizing fixation to a layer-7-centered circuit (rank 2/560, 99.8th percentile; 4-fold CV mean 103%). Cross-architecture logit lens on Llama-3.2-1B replicates the encode-then-override trajectory with causal confirmation (top-5 layers: 89% recovery).

</details>


### [585] [A Qualitative Test-Risk Mechanism for Scaling Behavior in Normalized Residual Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08297)
*Daning Cheng,Zeyu Liu,Jun Sun,Fen Xia,Boyang Zhang,Dongping Liu,Yunquan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了归一化残差网络中的深度扩展问题，提出统一理论框架，证明通过插入新残差块可以提升测试性能，并给出两种互补的测试风险保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习中的扩展行为（模型越大、数据越多，性能越好）是核心经验现象，但其理论基础尚不完整。本文旨在从理论层面解释残差网络深度扩展为何能提升测试性能。

Method: 将深度扩展问题分解为表示增益、优化增益和泛化迁移三个维度。首先在近零初始化的一阶下降条件下证明扩展后的假设类包含具有更小总体风险的辅助跳跃模型；其次，针对后归一化残差架构建立基于范数的Rademacher复杂度界；最后给出两种互补的测试风险保证路径。

Result: 证明了深度扩展可以严格降低测试风险，并提供了两种互补的保证机制：一条路径通过总体风险，当存在正总体间隔时更紧致；另一条路径直接在训练/测试层面工作，避免Hoeffding迁移，在退化场景下更鲁棒。

Conclusion: 深度扩展并非孤立有效，而是与宽度、数据共同作用：深度创造新的改进方向，宽度增强弱信号的有限样本可观测性，数据决定扩展的统计代价是否可控。这表明扩展本质上是联合的。

Abstract: The scaling behavior, in which test performance often improves as model size and data increase, is a central empirical phenomenon in modern deep learning, yet its theoretical basis remains incomplete. In this paper, we study depth expansion in normalized residual networks: starting from a trained model in an old hypothesis class, we insert a new residual block at an intermediate layer and ask when such an expansion can yield a provable improvement in test risk. We develop a unified framework that decomposes this question into representational gain, optimization gain, and generalization transfer. First, under a first-order descent condition near zero initialization, we prove that the expanded hypothesis class contains an auxiliary jumpboard model with strictly smaller population risk than the original model. Second, under norm control tailored to post-normalized residual architectures, we establish a norm-based Rademacher complexity bound for the expanded model class. These ingredients lead to two complementary test-risk guarantees: one route passes through population risk and is tighter when a positive population margin is available, while the other works directly at the train/test level, avoids Hoeffding transfer, and is more robust in degenerate regimes. Together, these results provide a theorem-driven mechanism under which residual depth expansion can improve test performance in normalized residual networks. More broadly, they suggest that scaling is inherently joint: depth creates new improving directions, width enhances the finite-sample observability of weak signals, and data determines whether the statistical cost of expansion can be controlled.

</details>


### [586] [What Cohort INRs Encode and Where to Freeze Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08298)
*Vasiliki Sideri-Lampretsa,Sophie Starck,Robbie Holland,Julian McGinnis,Daniel Rueckert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了协同训练隐式神经表示（INR）中早期层的可迁移性，发现冻结到权重稳定秩最高的层可匹配或超越标准微调；并首次使用稀疏自编码器（SAE）分解INR激活为稀疏字典原子，揭示了SIREN和FFMLP学习到本质不同的字典（SIREN局部化、FFMLP全局化），为理解INR的迁移学习提供了机制性解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 协同训练的INR重用早期层作为初始化已被证明可加速信号拟合，但哪些层学到可迁移表示以及这些表示编码了什么尚不清楚。本文旨在回答这两个问题。

Method: 1) 在测试时冻结共享编码器的不同深度，发现最优冻结深度与权重稳定秩最高的层一致；2) 首次引入稀疏自编码器（SAE）将INR激活分解为稀疏字典原子，分析SIREN和FFMLP的字典结构。

Result: SIREN和FFMLP达到相似的协同训练质量，但学习到本质不同的字典：SIREN的原子是局部化的，铺满坐标平面且不依赖协同内容；FFMLP的原子是全局的，描绘记忆中的协同信号轮廓。单个原子消融实验中，FFMLP的一个原子可导致PSNR下降高达10.6dB，而SIREN的消融影响仅局限在原子激活区域。

Conclusion: 首次从机制层面解释了协同训练INR中什么在迁移，并将INR激活转化为可检视的字典原子，为理解INR编码内容以及设计面向泛化而非记忆的架构开辟了道路。

Abstract: Reusing the early layers of cohort-trained INRs as initialization for new signals has been shown to accelerate and improve signal fitting, yet it remains unclear which layers of the shared encoder learn transferable representations and what those representations encode. We address both questions for two standard backbones, SIREN and Fourier-feature MLPs (FFMLP). First, sweeping the freeze depth across the shared encoder at test time, we find that the optimum coincides with the layer of highest weight stable rank. Moreover, freezing at this depth matches or improves on the standard fine-tuning recipe across all our experiments. Second, identifying which layer transfers does not characterize what that layer encodes. To address this we adopt sparse autoencoders (SAEs), the dominant tool in mechanistic interpretability, and present the first SAE decomposition of INR activations into sparse dictionary atoms. Interestingly, SIREN and FFMLP achieve comparable cohort-fitting quality, but learn qualitatively different dictionaries. Cohort SIREN's atoms are localized, tiling the coordinate plane such that each atom fires in a confined region independent of cohort content. Cohort FFMLP's atoms are image-spanning, tracing the contours of memorized cohort signals. Single-atom ablations confirm causal use of these dictionaries: a single FFMLP atom out of 4096 can drop PSNR by up to 10.6 dB across the image, while SIREN ablations remain confined to where the atom fires. Together, these results give the first mechanistic account of what transfers in cohort-trained INRs and turn their activations into inspectable dictionary atoms. These tools open a path towards characterizing what INRs encode and towards architectures designed for generalization rather than memorization.

</details>


### [587] [mHC-SSM: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for State Space Language Models with Stream-Specialized Adapters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08300)
*Abdulvahap Mutlu,Şengül Doğan,Türker Tuncer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了将受流形约束的多流残差混合方法(mHC)应用于状态空间模型(SSM)语言建模。实验表明，静态mHC和带适配器的mHC均能显著提升SSM模型在WikiText-2上的验证损失和困惑度，同时带来适度的吞吐量下降和显存增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
