Within the framework we give two closed-form results: a noise-variance threshold above which uniform averaging beats quality-weighted averaging, and a contractivity criterion for generator-critic refinement, consistent with a contractive-to-divergent transition we observe between 3B- and 14B-parameter models. We further introduce a cost-aware semantic-nearest-neighbor router whose single Lagrangian knob traverses the quality-cost frontier without retraining. Across six channel configurations spanning local and cloud models on 69 hard tasks, no fixed model-technique-budget choice dominates, motivating per-task allocation. On a 300-item hard split of MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval, our router occupies the full empirical Pareto frontier: at matched quality, its normalized cost is ${\approx}56$\% lower than the strongest fixed technique; at matched normalized cost, it improves quality by ${\approx}7$\% ($26$\% over single-shot decoding). These results argue for consolidating these reliability techniques into a single tunable layer informed by channel coding.

</details>


### [731] [FactoryNet: A Large-Scale Dataset toward Industrial Time-Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09081)
*Karim Othman,Jonas Petersen,Matei Ignuta-Ciuncanu,Riccardo Maggioni,Camilla Mazzoleni,Federico Martelli,Philipp Petersen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了FactoryNet，第一个面向工业时序数据的通用预训练语料库，包含5100万数据点、23k任务执行记录（涵盖真实与合成数据），通过S-E-F-C统一架构实现跨实体零样本迁移和高效异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业时间序列数据缺乏统一的预训练语料库，现有方法难以实现跨实体迁移和高效的异常检测。作者旨在构建一个多实体、多任务的标准化数据集，推动工业基础模型的发展。

Method: 提出了S-E-F-C（Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context）统一架构，将所有执行系统映射到公共表示框架；构建包含真实（13.3k）与合成（9.8k）数据的多实体语料库；涵盖27种标注异常类型及健康基线和反事实对。

Result: 跨实体迁移实验取得积极结果：在偏差感知指标下模型展现出公平的跨实体迁移能力；仅用24个对齐信号即可达到与高维基线相竞争的异常检测性能。

Conclusion: FactoryNet作为首个工业时序预训练语料库，验证了统一架构在跨实体迁移和参数高效异常检测方面的有效性，并以开放数据集形式推动工业基础模型研究。

Abstract: We introduce the first universal pretraining corpus for industrial time-series data: FactoryNet. 51M datapoints across 23k end-to-end task executions (13.3k real, 9.8k synthetic) on six embodiments, unified by a shared schema that enables robust zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer and highly parameter-efficient anomaly detection. We introduce a novel schema: Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context (S-E-F-C) underlying the whole pipeline that maps any actuated system into a common representational frame. The corpus spans 27 annotated anomaly types alongside healthy baselines and counterfactual pairs across robotic manipulation and machining domains. Cross-embodiment transfer experiments yield positive results: under bias-aware metrics our model demonstrates fair cross-embodiment transfer capabilities on the evaluated source-target pair, while 24 schema-aligned signals achieves competitive anomaly detection performance compared to high-dimensional baselines. We release FactoryNet as a growing, multi-embodiment dataset to drive progress toward industrial foundation models.

</details>


### [732] [Sparse Layers are Critical to Scaling Looped Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09165)
*Ryan Lee,Jacob Biloki,Edward J. Hu,Jonathan May*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了循环Transformer（Looped）与MoE结合的效果，发现Looped-MoE模型在扩展性上优于标准Transformer，且循环边界天然适合早期退出，实现计算与质量的更优权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 循环语言模型通过重复使用相同的Transformer层来降低存储成本，但它们相比标准Transformer在扩展性上表现不佳。作者希望找出提升循环模型扩展性的方法。

Method: 对比了标准和MoE Transformer在有/无循环条件下的表现，重点分析了路由机制在不同循环轮次中的分歧程度，以及早期退出点在循环边界处的收敛特性。

Result: 1) Looped-MoE模型扩展性优于标准基线，而密集循环模型则不然；2) 循环模型中，每个循环轮次会激活不同的专家，在不增加参数的情况下恢复表达能力；3) 循环边界作为早期退出点比标准模型更优，因为输出更早收敛。

Conclusion: Looped-MoE结合早期退出，不仅能在大规模上超越标准Transformer，还能在几乎不损失质量的情况下实现显著的内存和推理节省。

Abstract: Looped language models repeat a set of transformer layers through depth, reducing memory costs and providing natural early-exit points at loop boundaries. However, looped models do not scale as favorably as standard transformers with unique layers. We compare standard and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformers, with and without looping, and find two main results. First, we find Looped-MoE models scale better than the standard baseline while dense looped models do not. We trace this to routing divergence between loops: in Looped-MoE models, different experts are activated on each pass through the same shared layers, recovering expressivity without additional parameters. Our second finding is that looped models have better compute-quality trade-offs with early exits than standard models. Because each loop ends with the same layers that produce the final output, loop boundaries are superior exit points, as confirmed by earlier output convergence at these points. In sum, we provide a clear direction for scaling looped models: a Looped-MoE model with early exits can not only beat standard transformers at scale, but also enable significant memory and inference savings with minimal degradation in quality.

</details>


### [733] [A Tale of Two Problems: Multi-Task Bilevel Learning Meets Equality Constrained Multi-Objective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09094)
*Zhiyao Zhang,Myeung Suk Oh,Zhen Qin,Jiaxiang Li,Xin Zhang,Jia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将双层优化(BLO)扩展到多任务场景，在放宽下层强凸性假设为一般凸性(LLGC)的条件下，将多任务双层学习(MTBL)问题重新表述为等式约束多目标优化(ECMO)问题，并提出基于KKT帕累托平稳性的加权切比雪夫惩罚算法，在确定性和随机设置下均实现了O(ST^{-1/2})的有限时间收敛率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双层优化工作局限于单任务场景且依赖下层强凸性假设，无法适应日益复杂的现代机器学习问题，因此需要将BLO扩展到多任务设置并放宽下层凸性假设。

Method: 将多任务双层学习问题(MTBL)转化为等式约束多目标优化问题(ECMO)，建立KKT帕累托平稳性作为收敛准则，提出加权切比雪夫(WC)惩罚算法，并通过偏好向量探索帕累托前沿。

Result: 在确定性和随机设置下均实现了O(ST^{-1/2})的有限时间收敛率（S为目标数量，T为总迭代次数），且能系统地探索帕累托前沿。

Conclusion: ECMO问题的解可直接转化为原MTBL问题的解，建立了两个优化框架之间的桥梁，为多任务双层优化提供了理论基础和实用算法。

Abstract: In recent years, bilevel optimization (BLO) has attracted significant attention for its broad applications in machine learning. However, most existing works on BLO remain confined to the single-task setting and rely on the lower-level strong convexity assumption, which significantly restricts their applicability to modern machine learning problems of growing complexity. In this paper, we make the first attempt to extend BLO to the multi-task setting under a relaxed lower-level general convexity (LLGC) assumption. To this end, we reformulate the multi-task bilevel learning (MTBL) problem with LLGC into an equality constrained multi-objective optimization (ECMO) problem. However, ECMO itself is a new problem that has not yet been studied in the literature. To address this gap, we first establish a new Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT)-based Pareto stationarity as the convergence criterion for ECMO algorithm design. Based on this foundation, we propose a weighted Chebyshev (WC)-penalty algorithm that achieves a finite-time convergence rate of $O(ST^{-\frac{1}{2})$ to KKT-based Pareto stationarity in both deterministic and stochastic settings, where $S$ denotes the number of objectives, and $T$ is the total iterations. Moreover, by varying the preference vector over the $S$-dimensional simplex, our WC-penalty method systematically explores the Pareto front. Finally, solutions to the ECMO problem translate directly into solutions for the original MTBL problem, thereby closing the loop between these two foundational optimization frameworks.

</details>


### [734] [Bridging Spectral Operator Learning and U-Net Hierarchies: SpectraNet for Stable Autoregressive PDE Surrogates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09096)
*Enrique Hernández Noguera,Md Meftahul Ferdaus,Elias Ioup,Mahdi Abdelguerfi,Julian Simeonov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SpectraNet，一种结合频谱卷积与U-Net层次结构的自回归神经算子，通过残差目标参数化和半群一致性损失解决时间依赖PDE中频谱架构的指数误差增长问题，在Navier-Stokes等任务上以更低参数和计算量优于FNO等基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子处理时间依赖PDE时存在结构性矛盾：频谱架构（FNO等）因一步Lipschitz常数导致指数级 rollout 误差增长；层次化U-Net算子则牺牲分辨率不变性换取多尺度细节。需要一种能兼顾稳定性和多尺度表达的方法。

Method: 1) 在U-Net层次结构内组合截断频谱卷积；2) 提出残差目标频谱块（Residual-Target Spectral Block）；3) 采用半群一致性损失（Semigroup-Consistency Loss）训练；4) 残差目标参数化将L^T稳定性爆炸转化为线性T*delta漂移。

Result: 在Navier-Stokes nu=1e-5 64x64上达到测试相对L2=0.0822（2.04M参数），比FNO参数少2.33倍、误差低约20%；跨PDE比较中5/6任务优于FNO；128^2原生训练提升至0.0724（FNO退化为0.3080）；T=100自由rollout保持有界（FNO发散）；CPU单样本亚200ms，主导轻量级Pareto前沿。

Conclusion: SpectraNet通过架构创新解决了频谱神经算子在长时间rollout中的误差爆炸问题，在保持低参数和快速推理的同时实现了优越的PDE求解性能，尤其适合轻量级、实时性要求高的应用场景。

Abstract: Neural operators for time-dependent PDEs face a structural tension: spectral architectures (FNO and descendants) inherit exponential rollout-error growth from their one-step Lipschitz constant, while hierarchical U-Net operators trade resolution invariance for multi-scale detail. We introduce SpectraNet, an autoregressive neural operator that composes truncated spectral convolutions inside a U-Net hierarchy with a Residual-Target Spectral Block trained under a Semigroup-Consistency Loss. The residual-target parametrization replaces L^T stability blow-up with linear T*delta drift, and the spectral path's parameter count is Theta(L w^2 M^2), independent of grid N. Under a single unified protocol against 16 published neural-operator baselines on Navier-Stokes nu=1e-5 at 64x64, SpectraNet reaches test relative L2 = 0.0822 at 2.04M parameters -- 2.33x fewer than canonical FNO at ~20% lower error -- and wins five of six rows in a cross-PDE comparison against FNO (NS at nu in {1e-4, 1e-3}, PDEBench Shallow-Water 2D and Diffusion-Reaction, with the Active-Matter row going to FNO inside its seed spread). Trained from scratch at native 128^2 under the same protocol, SpectraNet improves to 0.0724 while FNO regresses to 0.3080. Free rollout stays bounded for T=100 where FNO diverges across all 200 test trajectories. On consumer CPU at B=1, SpectraNet runs sub-200ms while the full-attention Transformer that wins raw L2 pays ~60x latency; we do not claim to beat that Transformer on raw L2, only to dominate the lightweight (<=5M parameter, sub-200ms CPU) Pareto frontier. Source code: https://github.com/Enrikkk/spectranet

</details>


### [735] [Contextual Plackett-Luce: An Efficient Neural Model for Probabilistic Sequence Selection under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09112)
*Noam Mizrachi,Nadav Har-Tuv,Shai Shalev-Shwartz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出上下文Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，一种结合并行评分与轻量级自回归选择的序列选择概率模型，在多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择任务上优于强并行基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化预测中目标存在内在歧义性（每个输入对应多个有效输出，但监督信号仅提供单个样本），导致多模态目标分布与观测训练信号之间的不匹配。现有方法中，自回归模型能有效捕获不确定性但计算成本高，并行方法效率高却难以表达多模态依赖关系。

Method: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，扩展经典Plackett-Luce模型至上下文依赖场景，采用Ising型参数化（包含一元和成对交互项）。模型分两步：首先以完全并行方式构造概率选择模型的参数，然后进行轻量级自回归选择，每一步对上下文logits进行增量更新。

Result: 在多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择两个任务上，CPL相比强并行基线取得了更好的结构一致性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CPL通过解耦并行评分和顺序选择，在保持表达能力的同时实现了高效计算，有效解决了多模态目标分布与单样本监督之间的不匹配问题。

Abstract: Selecting a coherent sequence or subset of elements is a fundamental problem in structured prediction, arising in tasks such as detection, trajectory forecasting, and representative subset selection. In many such settings, the target is inherently ambiguous: each input admits multiple valid outputs, while supervision provides only a single sampled instance. This induces a mismatch between the underlying multi-modal target distribution and the observed training signal. We propose Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL), a structured probabilistic model for sequence selection that extends the classical Plackett-Luce model to a context-dependent setting following an Ising-style parameterization with unary and pairwise interaction terms. CPL can be viewed as a hybrid between fully autoregressive prediction and parallel sequence selection: autoregressive models effectively capture uncertainty but are computationally expensive on modern parallel hardware such as GPUs, while parallel methods are efficient but struggle to represent multi-modal dependencies. CPL combines the strengths of both by constructing the parameters of a probabilistic selection model in a fully parallel manner, followed by a lightweight autoregressive selection process in which each step applies incremental updates to contextual logits. This decoupling of parallel scoring and sequential selection enables efficient computation without sacrificing expressivity. We evaluate CPL on two structured selection tasks: multi-modal path prediction and representative subset selection. CPL achieves improved structural consistency and robustness under ambiguous supervision compared to strong parallel baselines.

</details>


### [736] [Cosine-Gated Adam-Decay: Drop-In Staleness-Aware Outer Optimization for Decoupled DiLoCo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09126)
*Vatsal Shah,Jiahao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CGAD（余弦门控Adam衰减），一种年龄感知的异步分布式优化器，通过指数衰减和余弦门控处理延迟的伪梯度，在理论上证明了更优的收敛界（依赖α而非τ_max²），并在Llama模型（25M到7B参数）上验证了其稳定性和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Nesterov异步优化器不考虑伪梯度的延迟年龄（staleness），导致在延迟较大时动量缓冲不稳定。现有方法（如Adam Decay）缺乏延迟截止机制，在大规模下波动剧烈。

Method: 提出CGAD，对每个到达的延迟伪梯度乘以σ(τ)=γ(τ)e^{-ατ}：指数项e^{-ατ}模拟信息衰减，余弦门控γ(τ)在超过阈值后平滑归零。τ=0时退化为普通Adam。扩展出PA-CGAD支持部分同步调度。

Result: 理论上证明了非渐近收敛界，其中延迟偏差项仅依赖α而非τ_max²（标准方法为τ_max²因子）。实验上，在25M、1B、7B参数Llama预训练中，CGAD在所有延迟范围内稳定训练。余弦截止起到规模保险作用：Adam Decay在7B规模下单次风险超过随机水平，而CGAD保持稳定。Nesterov方法最不稳定。

Conclusion: CGAD是一种简单、可即插即用的年龄感知异步优化器，通过余弦门控+指数衰减有效处理延迟伪梯度，理论更优、实验稳定、跨规模迁移性好。

Abstract: Asynchronous DiLoCo systems may receive pseudo-gradients computed several outer rounds earlier, yet the standard Nesterov outer optimizer does not explicitly condition its update on per-update age. This can make the outer momentum buffer brittle under large controlled delays. We propose Cosine Gated Adam Decay (CGAD), a simple, drop-in, age-aware outer optimizer that scales each incoming pseudo-gradient by $σ(τ) = γ(τ) e^{-ατ}$ before it enters Adam's first- and second-moment buffers; the exponential models information decay and the cosine gate $γ(τ)$ smoothly zeroes contributions past a chosen cutoff. CGAD reduces to plain Adam at $τ=0$, adds two hyperparameters whose defaults transfer across scales, and extends to partial-sync schedulers via a per-fragment age-aware variant (PA-CGAD). For an idealized gated-adaptive update on smooth non convex objectives, we prove a non-asymptotic convergence bound whose staleness-bias term depends on $α$ alone, rather than on the realized maximum delay $τ_{\max}$; standard analyses of asynchronous momentum-SGD instead carry a $τ_{\max}^2$ factor. Empirically, on Llama style language model pretraining at 25M, 1B, and 7B parameters, CGAD trains stably across the controlled delays we sweep. The cosine cutoff acts as scale insurance: the closest baseline, Adam Decay (CGAD without the cutoff), is competitive at 25M but its seed-to-seed $σ$ at $τ=8$ grows 27x from 25M to 7B, pushing its single-shot risk (mean + $σ$) above the chance-level loss while CGAD's stays well below. The published Nesterov recipe is the least stable method on the full sweep.

</details>


### [737] [Evaluating Federated Learning approaches for mammography under breast density heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09137)
*Gonzalo Iñaki Quintana,Franco Martin Di Maria,Laurence Vancamberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了乳腺密度异质性对联邦学习（FL）在乳腺X线图像分类中的影响。实验表明，FedAvg在强异质性场景下表现稳健，性能与集中式训练相当甚至更优，而局部模型和朴素聚合方法表现不佳。研究支持FL在实际临床乳腺X线工作流程中的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺密度是影响乳腺X线影像解读的关键因素，也是多中心数据异质性的主要来源。这种异质性给跨机构的协作机器学习（尤其是联邦学习）带来了挑战。本文旨在评估乳腺密度异质性对FL的影响，并测试常见FL算法在真实临床场景中的鲁棒性。

Method: 实验设计了两种场景：(1) 强异质性场景——2个客户（BI-RADS A-B vs C-D）和4个客户（每个客户单一BI-RADS密度）；(2) 基于人群的场景——模拟白人和亚洲人群的乳腺密度分布。比较了FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD三种FL方法，与集中式训练、本地训练及朴素聚合方法（集成、权重平均）进行对比。

Result: 在两种场景下，FL方法性能与集中式训练相当；本地模型和朴素聚合方法在强异质性下表现不佳。FedAvg的准确率与集中式训练持平甚至更优，且无需专门处理异质性的算法即可应对乳腺密度数据不平衡问题。

Conclusion: FL能够有效应对乳腺密度引起的异质性，支持其在真实乳腺X线工作流程中的可行性。FedAvg的鲁棒性表明FL可以广泛应用于临床场景，在保护数据隐私的同时实现协作模型开发。

Abstract: Breast density is a key factor that influences mammography interpretation and is a major source of heterogeneity in multicenter datasets. Such heterogeneity poses challenges for collaborative machine learning across institutions, particularly in Federated Learning. This study aims to evaluate the impact of breast density-induced heterogeneity on FL for mammography image classification and to assess the robustness of common FL algorithms in realistic clinical settings. We conducted experiments under two scenarios: (1) a strongly heterogeneous setting where each participating site contributed exclusively low- or high-density cases, based on the BI-RADS density score, and (2) a population-based setting simulating breast density distributions in White and Asian populations. For the strongly heterogeneous setting, we evaluated two configurations: one with 2 clients, where the cases were grouped as BI-RADS A-B and C-D, and one with 4 clients, where each site contained cases of a single BI-RADS density. We compared three FL methods (FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD) against centralized training, local-only training, and naive aggregation approaches, including ensembling and weight averaging. Across both scenarios, FL achieved performance comparable to centralized training, while local models and naive aggregation approaches underperformed in the presence of strong heterogeneity. Notably, FedAvg achieved accuracy on par with or exceeding centralized training, demonstrating resilience to breast density-induced data imbalance without requiring specialized heterogeneity mitigation algorithms. These findings show that FL can address breast density-related heterogeneity, supporting its feasibility for real-world mammography workflows. The demonstrated robustness of FedAvg underscores the potential for broad clinical deployment of FL, enabling collaborative model development while maintaining data privacy.

</details>


### [738] [FedVSSAM: Mitigating Flatness Incompatibility in Sharpness-Aware Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09144)
*Bingnan Xiao,Yuan Gao,Bingcong Li,Wei Ni,Xin Wang,Tony Q. S. Quek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedVSSAM方法，通过方差抑制的调整方向来解决联邦学习中的局部平坦性与全局平坦性不兼容问题，并证明其非凸收敛性，实验显示优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAM方法在联邦学习中，由于数据异构性，设备端搜索的局部平坦区域与全局目标偏好的平坦区域不兼容（flatness incompatibility），导致仅改善局部平坦性对全局模型提升有限。

Method: 提出FedVSSAM，构建方差抑制的调整方向，并将其一致地用于局部平坦性搜索、局部下降和全局更新，使扰动和更新方向锚定到更稳定的全局方向。

Result: 建立了非凸收敛保证，证明了调整方向与全局梯度之间的均方偏差被有效控制；实验表明FedVSSAM缓解了平坦性不兼容问题，在不同联邦学习设置下优于基线方法。

Conclusion: FedVSSAM通过稳定全局方向锚定有效解决了数据异构下的平坦性不兼容问题，提升了联邦学习模型的泛化能力。

Abstract: Sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) is an effective method for improving the generalization of federated learning (FL) by steering local training toward flat minima. Under data heterogeneity, however, device-side SAM searches for locally flat basins that are incompatible with the flat region preferred by the global objective. We identify this structural failure mode as flatness incompatibility, which explains why improving local flatness alone may provide limited training and generalization improvement for the global model. We reveal that flatness incompatibility arises from data heterogeneity and the friendly adversary phenomenon, and is further amplified by local updates and partial device participation. To mitigate this issue, we propose Federated Learning with variance-suppressed sharpness-aware minimization (FedVSSAM), which constructs a variance-suppressed adjusted direction and uses it consistently in local flatness search, local descent, and global update. FedVSSAM anchors both perturbation and update directions to a more stable global direction, instead of correcting only an isolated local perturbation. We establish non-convex convergence guarantees of FedVSSAM and prove that the mean-square deviation between the adjusted direction and the global gradient is effectively controlled. Experiments demonstrate that FedVSSAM mitigates flatness incompatibility and outperforms the baselines across diverse FL settings.

</details>


### [739] [AlphaExploitem: Going Beyond the Nash Equilibrium in Poker by Learning to Exploit Suboptimal Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09150)
*Vlad Murgoci,Matthijs Spaan,Yaniv Oren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AlphaExploitem，一种在非完美信息博弈（扑克）中超越纳什均衡、利用对手弱点的层次化Transformer强化学习智能体，能在不损失对最优对手性能的前提下有效利用弱对手。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扑克作为非完美信息博弈的标杆问题，现有智能体往往追求纳什均衡策略，但无法最大化利用对手的次优行为带来的额外收益。作者希望设计一种能主动识别并利用对手弱点来提高效用的智能体。

Method: 在AlphaHoldem基础上扩展，采用层次化Transformer编码器对历史牌局进行推理，并通过引入多样化可被利用的对手池来修改训练流程，使智能体学会识别并利用对手的次优策略。

Result: 在两个标准非完美信息博弈基准上，AlphaExploitem能成功利用分布内和分布外对手的弱点，同时在与纳什均衡对手对抗时性能不下降。

Conclusion: 层次化Transformer结合多样化对手训练可以有效实现扑克中的剥削性策略，且不牺牲对最优对手的鲁棒性，为非完美信息博弈中的智能体设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Poker is an imperfect information game that has served as a long-standing benchmark for decision-making under uncertainty. To maximize utility beyond the Nash equilibrium, an agent can deviate from Nash-equilibrium policies to exploit suboptimal play. We introduce AlphaExploitem, which extends the competitive RL poker agent AlphaHoldem by using a hierarchical transformer encoder that enables reasoning over previously played hands and modifying the training procedure with the inclusion of a diverse pool of exploitable opponents to facilitate learning to exploit. We train and evaluate AlphaExploitem on two standard benchmarks for imperfect-information games. Empirically, AlphaExploitem successfully exploits weak play by both in- and out-of-distribution opponents, without losing performance against NE opponents.

</details>


### [740] [Your Simulation Runs but Solves the Wrong Physics: PDE-Grounded Intent Verification for LLM-Generated Multiphysics Simulation Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09360)
*Zhenghan Song,Yulong Liu,Cheng Wan,Chenjun Li,Lingfu Liu,Yunyi Li,Congcong Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出意图保真度评分 (IFS) 来评估LLM生成的科学模拟代码，解决"可执行但物理错误"的问题，并在MOOSE框架上验证了该方法，在220例多物理基准测试中显著提升IFS，揭示了可执行性与意图保真度是可分离的两种失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于执行的LLM代码评估在科学模拟中不充分：生成的代码可以运行、划分网格并收敛，但其编码的控制方程可能与用户意图不符。这种"意图-生成差距"需要被量化和纠正。

Method: 提出意图保真度评分 (IFS)，通过重构编码的PDE并与预期合约进行结构化比较（涵盖控制项、边界条件、初始条件、系数和时间格式）；基于IFS构建PDE引导的精细化循环，利用确定性违规报告迭代修正生成代码。

Result: 在MooseBench的220例多物理基准上，方法持续提升平均IFS；对直接生成IFS<0.7的困难子集，精细化带来+0.22到+0.41的绝对IFS提升；部署审计中，纯执行修复使39-40%的案例可运行但仍求解错误物理；在UFL/FEniCS等四种DSL上的实验表明该模式可扩展。

Conclusion: 可执行的科学模拟代码应依据其意图编码的数学结构进行验证，而非仅凭执行成功接受；可执行性与意图保真度是可分离的失败模式。

Abstract: Execution-based evaluation of LLM-generated code implicitly treats successful execution as a proxy for correctness. In scientific simulation, this proxy is insufficient: a generated input file can run, mesh, and converge while encoding governing equations that differ from the user's intent. We call this mismatch between intended physics and generated code the comprehension-generation gap. We instantiate this in MOOSE, where Kernel and BC objects map compositionally to weak-form residual terms, enabling deterministic reconstruction of the encoded PDE and comparison against an intended contract. We formalize this comparison as the Intent Fidelity Score (IFS), a structural metric covering governing terms, BCs, ICs, coefficients, and time scheme. Building on IFS, we develop a PDE-grounded refinement loop that uses deterministic violation reports to correct generated code iteratively. We evaluate on MooseBench, a 220-case multiphysics benchmark with PDE-level ground truth released with this work. On this benchmark, our method consistently improves mean IFS over direct generation, with gains concentrated on hard cases. On the subset where direct generation falls below IFS 0.7, refinement adds +0.22 to +0.41 absolute IFS. In the deployment audit, execution-only repair improves execution success while leaving 39-40% of all 220 cases runnable but still solving the wrong physics across the three main deployment-audit models, exposing executability and intent fidelity as separable failure modes. Static proof-of-concept experiments on four PDE-oriented DSLs (UFL/FEniCS, FreeFEM, FiPy, and Devito) suggest that the reconstruction-and-comparison pattern extends beyond MOOSE. These findings reinforce that executable simulation code should be verified against the mathematical structure it is intended to encode, not accepted on execution alone.

</details>


### [741] [Predicting Large Model Test Losses with a Noisy Quadratic System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09154)
*Chuning Li,Chris J. Maddison*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个能处理动态批大小的预训练损失预测模型，在超1000倍计算预算外推上优于Chinchilla模型，并可用于在资源约束下优化模型大小、批大小和权重更新次数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有损失预测模型（如Chinchilla）不能处理变化的批大小，且启发式缩放法则日益复杂，需要更优的替代方案。

Method: 建立了一个以模型大小(N)、批大小(B)和权重更新次数(K)为输入的损失预测模型，能够处理动态变化的批大小。

Result: 在外推计算预算（高达1000倍）时优于Chinchilla的损失模型，且模型选择的配置接近真实最优。

Conclusion: 损失预测模型可作为日益复杂的启发式缩放法则的更好替代方案，能够在显式和复合资源约束下找到最优配置。

Abstract: We introduce a predictive model that estimates the pre-training loss of large models from model size (N), batch size (B) and number of weight updates (K). This is the first loss prediction model that can handle changing batch size. The model outperforms Chinchilla's loss model, a model of the test loss using the batch size and number of tokens, in terms of projecting the loss at extrapolated compute budgets (up to 1000 folds). A natural use of the model is to find optimal N, B, K configurations under explicit and compound resource constraints like time, memory and compute. In our experiments, the model-selected configurations are close to ground-truth optimal. Our work advocates for loss prediction as a better alternative to heuristic-based laws, which are growing in complexity. The implementation is available on https://github.com/chuningxdy/Noisy-Quadratic-System.

</details>


### [742] [Revisiting Mixture Policies in Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09157)
*Jiamin He,Samuel Neumann,Jincheng Mei,Adam White,Martha White*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了混合策略在连续动作强化学习中的实用性，提出了边际化重参数化（MRP）估计器来解决混合策略的高方差问题，实验表明MRP混合策略在多个基准测试中表现优于标准方法，有时甚至超过高斯策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合策略理论上比单峰策略更灵活，但在实际SOTA算法中很少使用，核心问题是缺乏低方差的重新参数化技巧。本文旨在探究混合策略的实际价值并解决其训练困难。

Method: 提出边际化重参数化（MRP）估计器，理论上证明其方差低于标准的似然比（LR）方法，从而有效训练混合策略。

Result: 在Gym MuJoCo、DeepMind Control Suite和MetaWorld上，MRP混合策略显著优于LR混合策略，性能与高斯策略持平甚至更优，并在某些任务中展现了明显的实证优势。

Conclusion: MRP混合策略从理论上的好奇心变成了实用的工具，提供了对混合策略权衡的更清晰理解。

Abstract: Mixture policies theoretically offer greater flexibility than unimodal policies in continuous action reinforcement learning, but the practical benefits of this complexity remain elusive. Mixture policies are notably absent from most state-of-the-art algorithms, raising a fundamental question: Is the added representational overhead useful? We show that increased flexibility can theoretically enhance solution quality and entropy robustness. Yet standard algorithms like SAC do not leverage these advantages. A core issue is the lack of a low-variance reparameterization trick for mixtures, a luxury Gaussian policies enjoy. We propose a marginalized reparameterization (MRP) estimator to address this, proving it offers lower variance than the standard likelihood-ratio (LR) approach. Our experiments across Gym MuJoCo, DeepMind Control Suite, and MetaWorld show that MRP mixture policies significantly outperform their LR ones, and reach parity (sometimes better) with Gaussian counterparts. In addition, we do find several cases where MRP mixture policies exhibit clear empirical advantages. In this paper, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved, elevating MRP mixture policies from theoretical curiosity to a practical tool.

</details>


### [743] [Objective-Specific Privileged Bases via Full-Prefix Matryoshka Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09160)
*Arghamitra Talukder,Philippe Chlenski,Itsik Pe'er*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究Matryoshka表示学习(MRL)如何产生与任务对齐的特权基，并证明在线性设置中MRL能恢复有序主方向，实验表明其坐标幅度反映信息量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习表示通常对旋转变换具有不变性，导致各维度不可识别且可互换，缺乏可解释性。作者研究MRL如何引入任务对齐的特权基来解决这一问题。

Method: 在理论上，证明全前缀MRL在线性设置下恢复有序主方向，并可用共享统计量高效计算。实验上，验证MRL产生与任务信号一致的一致逐维结构。

Result: 证明MRL可恢复有序主方向；实验表明其坐标幅度反映信息量，具有一致的任务对齐逐维结构。

Conclusion: MRL能诱导出任务对齐的特权基，打破表示维度的不可识别性，坐标幅度可作为信息量指标。

Abstract: Learned representations are often invariant to rotational transformations, leaving individual dimensions non-identifiable and interchangeable. We study how Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) induces a task-aligned privileged basis distinct from variance-based or regularizer-induced orderings. In the linear setting, we prove that full-prefix MRL recovers the ordered principal directions, and can be computed efficiently using shared statistics. Empirically, we demonstrate that MRL yields consistent per-dimension structure aligned with task signal, where coordinate magnitude reflects informativeness.

</details>


### [744] [Let the Target Select for Itself: Data Selection via Target-Aligned Paths](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09404)
*Huitao Yang,Hengzhi He,Guang Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于验证集诱导流的零阶数据选择方法，通过短时容量受限的热身训练产生参考路径，以归一化端点损失下降作为评分标准，避免了参考路径偏差问题，在多种实验设置中实现了与动态归因方法相当的竞争力，同时显著降低了热身和存储成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于候选池诱导轨迹的归因方法在异构候选池中会产生"参考路径偏差"，即参考轨迹与目标子集的动态不一致，导致数据选择效果下降。

Method: 提出使用验证集诱导流（validation-induced flow）作为替代参考路径，通过对目标验证代理进行短时、容量受限的热身训练生成路径，沿此路径使用归一化端点损失下降（normalized endpoint loss drop）对候选样本评分，形成零阶选择规则，无需计算候选梯度或Hessian近似。

Result: 在逻辑回归、视觉和指令调优实验中，该方法与强动态归因基线表现相当，同时大幅降低了热身和存储成本。此外，由于参考轨迹与候选池解耦，同一热身模型可复用于多个不同候选池。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了参考路径偏差问题，提供了一种更高效、可复用的数据选择方案，在降低计算开销的同时保持了选择效果。

Abstract: Targeted data selection aims to identify training samples from a large candidate pool that improve performance on a specific downstream task. Many recent methods estimate candidate utility by aggregating local attribution scores along a trajectory induced by the candidate pool. When the pool is heterogeneous, however, this reference trajectory may be misaligned with the dynamics of a target-aligned selected subset, creating what we call reference path bias. We propose an alternative reference path: a validation-induced flow obtained from a short, capacity-limited warmup on the available target validation proxy. Along this path, candidates are scored by a normalized endpoint loss drop, yielding a simple zero-order selection rule that requires no candidate gradients or Hessian approximations. Across controlled logistic, vision, and instruction-tuning experiments, this score is competitive with strong dynamic attribution baselines while substantially reducing warmup and storage cost. Moreover, since the reference trajectory is decoupled from any specific candidate pool, the same compact warmup can be reused across additional pools without recomputing the trajectory.

</details>


### [745] [A Unified Pair-GRPO Family: From Implicit to Explicit Preference Constraints for Stable and General RL Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06375)
*Hao Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Pair-GRPO系列方法（Soft-Pair-GRPO和Hard-Pair-GRPO），通过将GRPO的群组归一化标量奖励替换为二元成对偏好奖励，并引入局部概率约束和约束KL拟合优化，解决了RLHF中策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、可解释性差和高梯度方差等问题。理论证明了两变体的单调策略改进、确定性梯度方向、梯度方差降低和动态步长收敛，实验表明其在LLM对齐和连续控制任务中优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLHF方法（基于成对偏好学习）存在策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、可解释性差和梯度方差高等系统性缺陷。作者希望通过构建统一的偏好RL优化理论框架来解决这些问题。

Method: 提出Pair-GRPO系列：Soft-Pair-GRPO将GRPO的群组归一化标量奖励替换为二元成对偏好奖励，保留裁剪代理和KL正则化结构，并通过泰勒展开证明其梯度等价于GRPO的正标量倍数；Hard-Pair-GRPO引入局部概率约束和约束KL拟合优化，进一步抑制梯度噪声和全局策略漂移。

Result: 在HH-RLHF、UltraFeedback和HalfCheetah-v4上，Pair-GRPO系列在对齐质量、人类偏好胜率、训练稳定性和泛化能力上持续优于SOTA基线。消融实验验证了各核心组件的关键贡献。

Conclusion: Pair-GRPO系列通过理论驱动的成对偏好建模，有效解决了RLHF的稳定性与可解释性问题，且具备从LLM对齐到通用强化学习的良好泛化能力。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) alignment via reinforcement learning from human preferences (RLHF) suffers from unstable policy updates, ambiguous gradient directions, poor interpretability, and high gradient variance in mainstream pairwise preference learning paradigms. To systematically address these limitations, we establish a unified theoretical framework for preference-based RL optimization centered on the Pair-GRPO family, comprising two tightly coupled variants: Soft-Pair-GRPO and Hard-Pair-GRPO. Soft-Pair-GRPO is a minimal modification of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that replaces group-normalized scalar rewards with binary pairwise preference rewards, retaining GRPO's clipped surrogate and KL-regularized structure. We prove a critical gradient equivalence theorem: under first-order Taylor expansion around the current policy, Soft-Pair-GRPO's gradient is a positive scalar multiple of standard GRPO's gradient, explaining its empirical stability despite discarding continuous reward magnitudes. Building on this foundation, we propose Hard-Pair-GRPO, an advanced variant introducing explicit local probability constraints and constrained KL-fitting optimization to further suppress gradient noise and global policy drift. We provide comprehensive theoretical guarantees for both variants--including monotonic policy improvement, deterministic gradient direction, gradient-variance reduction, and dynamic step-size convergence. Extensive experiments on standard LLM alignment benchmarks (HH-RLHF,UltraFeedback) and the MuJoCo continuous control task HalfCheetah-v4 demonstrate that our Pair-GRPO family consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in alignment quality, human preference win rate, training stability, and generalization to general reinforcement learning. Ablation studies validate the critical contributions of each core component.

</details>


### [746] [Prediction Bottlenecks Don't Discover Causal Structure (But Here's What They Actually Do)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09169)
*Ankit Hemant Lade,Sai Krishna Jasti,Indar Kumar,Aman Chadha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文检验了“Mamba状态空间模型仅通过下一步预测就能恢复Granger因果结构”这一声明。通过构建可复用的假说检验基准，在五个阶段验证后发现：该声明不成立——线性瓶颈模型表现相当或更好，Lasso在合成基准上超越它，经典因果方法在真实数据上领先，声称的干预优势约60%来自样本量混淆，剩余效应在标准干预下消失，且能在经典双变量Granger因果中复现。最终保留的是一个较窄的特征刻画结果，基准测试本身才是核心贡献。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证“Mamba状态空间模型仅通过下一步预测就能恢复Granger因果结构”这一声称的可靠性，并建立一个可复用的因果结构发现假说检验基准。

Method: 构建标准化假说检验基准，包含三类合成数据生成器、三种干预语义、三个真实数据集和大小匹配的对照臂，通过五个阶段（线性瓶颈对比、Lasso对比、经典因果方法对比、干预优势分解消解、跨方法复现检验）系统检验原声称。

Result: 原声称不成立：线性瓶颈模型表现相当或更好；Lasso在合成基准上表现更优；经典PCMCI和Granger方法在真实数据上领先；干预优势约60%来自样本量混淆，剩余效应在标准干预下消失；残差效应可在经典双变量Granger中复现。

Conclusion: 原声称过于宽泛，保留的仅是一个较窄的特征刻画结果；本文提供的基准测试框架才是持久的贡献，每个检验阶段都是该基准的控制臂。

Abstract: A Mamba state-space model trained only for next-step prediction appears to recover Granger-causal structure through a simple readout $S = |W_{out} W_{in}|$, with early experiments suggesting the phenomenon generalized across architectures and benefited from interventional data at $p < 10^{-5}$. We package the protocol used to test that claim -- standardized synthetic generators (VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe-style), three intervention semantics ($do(X=c)$, soft-noise, random-forcing), edge-provenance cards on three real datasets, and size-matched control arms -- as a reusable falsification benchmark, and walk the claim through it in five stages. The method-level claim does not survive: (i) a plain linear bottleneck does as well or better; (ii) tuned Lasso beats the bottleneck on synthetic CauseMe-style benchmarks, and on Lorenz-96 (the only real benchmark with unambiguous ground truth) classical PCMCI and Granger lead a tight cluster in which the bottleneck trails; (iii) the headline intervention advantage is roughly 60% a sample-size confound, and the residual disappears under standard $do(X=c)$ interventions, surviving only under a non-standard random-forcing scheme; (iv) even that residual reproduces, with a larger effect, in classical bivariate Granger -- the effect is method-agnostic. What survives is a narrow characterization result; the benchmark is the lasting artifact, and each stage above is one of its control arms.

</details>


### [747] [Learning Multi-Indicator Weights for Data Selection: A Joint Task-Model Adaptation Framework with Efficient Proxies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09665)
*Jingze Song,Zihao Chen,Wenqing Chen,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种通过上下文学习信号自适应选择指令数据权重的框架，能在仅用30%训练数据的情况下达到全量微调的性能，并揭示了推理任务中语义多样性与逻辑复杂度之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法大多使用静态的、任务无关和模型无关的加权方案，忽略了特定下游任务的需求差异和模型已有的能力差异，导致数据选择不够精准高效。

Method: 提出一个学习多指标权重的框架，利用小型验证集上的上下文学习(ICL)信号作为高效性能代理，在不进行全量微调的情况下找到最优权重配置，实现数据选择自适应适配下游任务和具体模型。

Result: 在GSM8K上仅用30%训练样本即达到或超越全量微调性能，在Mistral、Qwen、Llama等多个模型族上均验证有效。此外，分析发现推理任务中存在语义多样性与逻辑复杂度之间的权衡。

Conclusion: 联合任务-模型自适应的数据选择策略优于静态方法，能够大幅降低训练成本同时保持性能，且揭示了推理任务数据选择中需平衡语义多样性与逻辑复杂度。

Abstract: Data selection is a key component of efficient instruction tuning for large language models, as recent work has shown that data quality often matters more than data quantity. Accordingly, prior studies have introduced various multi-dimensional heuristics to evaluate and filter instruction data. However, most existing methods rely on static task-agnostic and model-agnostic weighting schemes, which overlook the varying requirements of specific downstream tasks and the differing pre-existing capabilities of models. In this paper, we propose a framework for learning multi-indicator weights that jointly adapts data selection to both the downstream task and the specific model. Our method identifies optimal weight configurations without full-scale fine-tuning by utilizing in-context learning (ICL) signals on compact tiny-validation sets. These signals serve as efficient performance proxies that ensure high-fidelity evaluation at minimal computational cost. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and model families, including Mistral, Qwen, and Llama, show that the approach achieves performance comparable to or exceeding full-dataset tuning while using only 30\% of the training samples on GSM8K. Furthermore, our analysis reveals a trade-off between semantic diversity and logical complexity in reasoning tasks, highlighting the necessity of joint task-model adaptation.

</details>


### [748] [WavesFM: Hierarchical Representation Learning for Longitudinal Wearable Sensor Waveforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09173)
*Peng Cao,Zhijian Yang,Tennison Liu,Jonathan Wang,Jiang Wu,Magdalena Proszewska,Arvind Pillai,Mingwu Gao,Amir Farjadian,Lawrence Cai,Emily Blanchard,Daniel McDuff,Pramod Rudrapatna,Matthew Thompson,Anupam Pathak,Mark Malhotra,Shwetak Patel,Dina Katabi,Paolo Di Achille,Ming-Zher Poh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WavesFM 是一个两阶段自监督学习框架，通过先学习局部波形嵌入再建模多日时间序列，解决了可穿戴传感器长序列生理信号的分析难题，在58项任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SSL方法要么从短波形学习形态特征但丢失纵向动态，要么从粗粒度特征建模行为模式但丢失原始波形中的细微预测信号，无法同时捕捉局部信号语义和长期生理动态。

Method: 提出两阶段SSL框架：第一阶段预训练段级编码器从短波形提取局部嵌入；第二阶段训练时序编码器建模跨多天的嵌入序列，分层处理高分辨率长序列数据。

Result: 第一阶段使用6.8M小时（324k人）数据，第二阶段使用5.3M小时（10k人）数据，在58项任务（涵盖人口统计、生活方式、健康状况、药物）上表现优于现有方法。

Conclusion: WavesFM通过分层自监督学习有效桥接了局部波形特征与长期生理动态之间的鸿沟，为可穿戴生理信号分析提供了通用基础模型方案。

Abstract: Wearable sensors enable the continuous acquisition of high-resolution physiological waveforms, such as photoplethysmography and accelerometry, under free-living conditions. However, inferring health-related phenotypes from these signals presents significant challenges due to high sampling frequencies, multimodal dependencies, and extreme sequence lengths (e.g., weeks of recordings), compounded by a scarcity of ground-truth labels. To address these challenges, existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methodologies typically follow two paradigms: (1) learning rich morphological representations from short waveform segments while collapsing longitudinal dynamics through simple aggregation, or (2) modeling behavioral patterns from coarse, hand-crafted features (e.g. heart rate, step counts) spanning longer horizons but foregoing subtle, predictive signatures in raw waveforms. To bridge this gap, we propose WavesFM, a foundation model utilizing a two-stage SSL framework for longitudinal physiological data. Specifically, we decompose the learning problem into two stages: first, a segment-level encoder is pretrained to extract local embeddings from short waveforms; subsequently, a temporal encoder is trained to model the sequence of these embeddings across a multi-day horizon. This hierarchical approach overcomes the computational complexity of high-resolution, long-sequence data, allowing the overall model to capture both local signal semantics and the complex circadian and inter-day variations governing physiological dynamics. Pretrained on over 6.8M hours (N=324k individuals) of recordings for the first stage and 5.3M hours (N=10k) for the second stage, WavesFM demonstrates superior performance across 58 diverse tasks spanning demographics, lifestyle, health conditions, and medications.

</details>


### [749] [Nectar: Neural Estimation of Cached-Token Attention via Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09778)
*João Monteiro,Michal Klein,Pierre Ablin,Marco Cuturi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Nectar提出用紧凑神经网络替代标准Softmax注意力中的KV缓存遍历，通过每层每注意力头部署一对网络（目标网络+分数网络）来预测注意力输出，将O(n)复杂度降为与序列长度无关的前向传播，实验表明在1.7B-8B模型和五个长上下文数据集上近似误差可控，且生成语义与完整缓存一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Softmax注意力在固定长上下文推理时，每个新查询token需遍历所有缓存的键值对，导致O(n)复杂度。作者希望设计一种与上下文长度无关的替代方案，降低推理计算开销。

Method: 每层每KV注意力头训练两个小型神经网络：目标网络预测注意力输出，分数网络预测对数归一化因子。推理时用该前向传播替代O(n)的标准注意力计算，参数量远小于KV缓存大小。

Result: 在1.7B至8B规模的模型和五个长上下文数据集上测试，近似误差与next-token准确率差距一致；非均匀分配容量可缩小差距；生成文本的语义内容与全缓存版本匹配。

Conclusion: Nectar有效压缩了长上下文注意力计算为固定成本的前向传播，在保持生成质量的同时大幅降低推理复杂度，且容量分配可进一步优化性能。

Abstract: Evaluating softmax attention over a fixed long context requires reading every cached key-value pair for each new query token. For a given context (a book, a manual, a legal corpus) the attention output is a deterministic function of the query. We propose Nectar, which fits a compact neural network to this function for queries drawn from a task-relevant distribution. Nectar fits two networks per layer and KV-head: a target network that predicts the attention output and a score network that predicts the log-normalizer. The pair plugs into the standard masked self-attention at inference time, replacing the $O(n)$ attention over the cache with a forward pass whose cost does not depend on $n$. Each module carries on the order of $|θ|$ parameters per layer and KV-head, typically much smaller than the $2nd$ KV-cache footprint at the same granularity. We report experiments on models from 1.7B to 8B parameters across five long-context datasets. The approximation error tracks the next-token accuracy gap to full attention, and allocating capacity non-uniformly across layers reduces that gap in our ablation. Beyond this analysis of metrics, we check that the text generations (following a question prompt) of a model equipped with a Nectar module match in semantic content those obtained by giving the same model access to the full cache.

</details>


### [750] [Navigating LLM Valley: From AdamW to Memory-Efficient and Matrix-Based Optimizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09176)
*Aditya Ranganath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从系统和优化双重视角，系统综述了大语言模型优化器的设计。涵盖了从经典一阶优化器到自适应、内存高效、二阶方法、符号式、低秩及矩阵类优化器（如Muon）的完整演进，并讨论了评测方法。文章指出LLM优化器研究正进入新阶段：从单一算法加速转向严格、可感知规模的综合对比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的训练需要兼顾统计效果、计算效率和内存消耗的优化算法。虽然Adam仍是主流，但近期研究几乎重新审视了优化栈的每个组件，亟需一个系统性的梳理来理解当前进展和未来方向。

Method: 采用系统和优化双重视角，将现有优化器文献分为七个类别：经典一阶优化器、自适应优化器、内存高效变体、二阶和曲率感知方法、符号式及发现式优化器、低秩和投影方法、矩阵类优化器（如Muon）。同时综述了评测方法学，包括超参数公平性、规模依赖性、墙钟效率、token效率、内存开销和下游评估。

Result: 梳理出完整的优化器演化图谱，指出了当前研究的碎片化和评测标准不统一的问题，并提出了优化器研究应进入"严格、可感知规模的综合对比"新阶段的论点。

Conclusion: LLM优化器研究正在从追求单一算法的加速效果，转向更严谨、可感知规模的多维度综合评估，包括收敛性、稳定性、内存和实现复杂度。这标志着该领域进入了一个更成熟的研究范式。

Abstract: Training large language models requires optimization algorithms that are not only statistically effective, but also computationally and memory efficient at extreme scale. Although Adam remains the dominant optimizer for large-scale language-model pretraining and fine-tuning, recent work has revisited nearly every component of the optimization stack: adaptive moment estimation, decoupled weight decay, memory footprint, curvature approximation, sign-based updates, large-batch stability, low-rank gradient structure, and matrix-wise orthogonalized updates. This survey reviews optimizer design for large language models through a systems-and-optimization lens. We organize the literature into classical first-order optimizers, adaptive optimizers, memory-efficient variants, second-order and curvature-aware methods, sign-based and discovered optimizers, low-rank and projection-based methods, and matrix-based optimizers such as Muon. We also discuss benchmarking methodology, including hyperparameter fairness, scale dependence, wall-clock efficiency, token efficiency, memory overhead, and downstream evaluation. We argue that optimizer research for LLMs is entering a new phase: moving from single-algorithm speedup claims toward rigorous, scale-aware comparisons that jointly evaluate convergence, stability, memory, and implementation complexity.

</details>


### [751] [Learning When to Stop: Selective Imitation Learning Under Arbitrary Dynamics Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09183)
*Surbhi Goel,Jonathan Pei,James Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出选择性模仿学习框架SeqRejectron，允许学习者在无法可靠行动时选择停止，在训练与测试环境动态变化下提供无horizon依赖的样本复杂度保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统行为克隆假设训练与测试环境动态一致，但在实际部署中环境动态常发生偏移，导致模型在无信息状态下盲目行动，性能严重下降。因此需要一种选择性机制，让学习者在不可靠时主动停止。

Method: 提出SeqRejectron算法：利用少量验证器策略构造停止规则，规模与horizon或策略类无关；对确定性策略采用稀疏成本下的无horizon样本复杂度分析，对随机策略采用累积Hellinger停止时间。

Result: 确定性策略下达到$\tilde{O}(\log|Π|/ε^2)$无horizon样本复杂度；随机策略下获得类似无horizon保证；框架扩展至专家模型误设定及训练/测试使用不同专家策略的情形，性能随误设定程度优雅退化。

Conclusion: 选择性模仿学习是解决环境动态偏移下行为克隆失效问题的有效范式，SeqRejectron在理论上提供了强力的停止策略保证，且对专家误设定具有鲁棒性。

Abstract: Behavior cloning provides strong imitation learning guarantees when training and test environments share the same dynamics. However, in many deployment settings the test environment's transitions differ from training, and classical offline IL offers no recourse: the learner must commit to an action at every state, even when its demonstrations are uninformative and could lead to arbitrary degradation of performance. This motivates the study of selective imitation, where the learner may choose to stop when it cannot act reliably. We introduce a model for selective imitation under arbitrary dynamics shift: given labeled expert demonstrations from a training environment and unlabeled state trajectories from the same expert in a test environment, the learner outputs a selective policy that is complete (rarely stops in training) and sound (incurs low regret before stopping in test). Our algorithm, SeqRejectron, constructs a stopping rule using a small set of validator policies whose size is independent of the horizon or policy class. For deterministic policies, this yields horizon-free $\tilde{O}(\log|Π|/ε^2)$ sample complexity, assuming sparse costs. For stochastic policies, we obtain analogous horizon-free guarantees using a cumulative Hellinger stopping time. We extend the framework to misspecified experts and different expert policies across train and test and obtain results that gracefully degrade with the amount of misspecification.

</details>


### [752] [DARE: Difficulty-Adaptive Reinforcement Learning with Co-Evolved Difficulty Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09188)
*Yang Zhou,Can Jin,Zihan Dong,Zhepeng Wang,Yanting Yang,Shiyu Zhao,Lei Li,Runxue Bao,Yaochen Xie,Dimitris N. Metaxas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Dare框架，通过自归一化重要性采样协同演化难度估计与策略、对称Beta采样保持难度覆盖多样性、以及按难度分层自适应分配计算资源，解决了强化学习训练大语言模型时难度感知数据选择的三个局限（难度估计不准、性能提升有限、推理效率低），在多个模型和领域上提升了训练效率、最终效果和推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习虽能提升大语言模型的推理能力，但成本高、样本效率低，因为许多rollout提供的学习信号弱。现有难度感知数据选择方法存在三个局限性：1) 策略漂移下难度估计不准确；2) 仅靠数据选择带来的最终性能增益有限；3) 推理效率几乎没有改善。因此需要一种更高效且有效的方法。

Method: Dare框架包含三个核心组件：1) 通过自归一化重要性采样（Self-normalized Importance Sampling）让难度估计与策略协同演化，解决策略漂移问题；2) 采用对称Beta采样分布来保持多样化的难度覆盖；3) 对不同难度层级采用定制化训练策略，并自适应分配计算资源，使模型在简单任务上生成简洁回答，在困难任务上提高正确率。

Result: 在多个模型和领域上的大量实验表明，Dare持续优于现有方法，在训练效率、最终有效性和推理效率方面均有提升——在简单任务上生成更简洁的回答，同时在困难任务上提高了正确性。

Conclusion: 高效且有效的强化学习不能仅靠按难度过滤数据，策略需要学会解决困难任务的同时为简单任务生成简洁回答。Dare框架通过统一解决难度估计、难度覆盖和自适应计算分配这三个问题，实现了这一目标。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning improves the reasoning ability of large language models but remains costly and sample-inefficient, as many rollouts provide weak learning signals. Difficulty-aware data selection methods attempt to address this by prioritizing moderately difficult prompts, yet our analysis reveals three limitations: difficulty estimates become inaccurate under policy drift, data selection alone yields limited final-performance gains, and inference efficiency remains largely unchanged. These findings suggest that efficient and effective RL requires more than filtering by difficulty: the policy should learn to solve hard tasks while producing concise responses for easy ones. To this end, we propose **Dare**, a unified framework that co-evolves difficulty estimation with the policy via self-normalized importance sampling, maintains diverse difficulty coverage through a symmetric Beta sampling distribution, and applies tailored training strategies across difficulty tiers with adaptive compute allocation. Extensive experiments across multiple models and domains demonstrate that **Dare** consistently outperforms existing methods in training efficiency, final effectiveness, and inference efficiency, producing more concise responses on easy tasks while improving correctness on hard ones. Code is available at https://github.com/EtaYang10th/DARE.

</details>


### [753] [Key-Value Means](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09877)
*Daniel Goldstein,Eugene Cheah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Key-Value Means (KVM)，一种新的块循环注意力机制，支持固定大小或增长状态。将固定大小KVM注意力层融入强Transformer基线，得到O(N)块循环RNN；可增长的KVM缓存在长上下文测试中表现竞争力，具有次二次预填时间和次线性状态增长。KVM可用标准操作实现，无需自定义内核，支持分块并行训练和预填，统一了传统Transformer和线性RNN的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在统一传统Transformer（可扩展上下文记忆、分块并行训练）和线性RNN（线性复杂度）的优点，解决Transformer长上下文计算成本高的问题，同时弥补线性RNN在长上下文利用上的不足。

Method: 提出Key-Value Means (KVM)块循环注意力机制，支持固定大小（产生O(N)块循环RNN）和可增长缓存两种模式。使用标准操作实现，无需自定义内核，支持分块并行训练和预填，可在预填时间复杂度O(N)到O(N^2)之间连续选择，也可与LRNN层混合使用。

Result: 固定大小KVM产生强O(N)块循环RNN；可增长KVM缓存模型在长上下文测试中表现竞争力，预填时间为次二次，状态增长为次线性。

Conclusion: KVM统一了Transformer和线性RNN的优势，提供了灵活的复杂度-质量权衡，可在每层使用节省KV缓存内存，支持混合架构补充LRNN，代码和模型已开源。

Abstract: We present Key-Value Means ("KVM"), a novel block-recurrence for attention that can accommodate either fixed-size or growing state. Equipping a strong transformer baseline with fixed-size KVM attention layers yields a strong $O(N)$ chunked RNN, while adding only an insignificant number of new parameters. We train a transformer with a growable KVM cache and show it performs competitively on long-context tests with only subquadratic prefill time and sublinear state growth. KVM is implementable with standard operations and without custom kernels, and supports chunk-wise parallelizable training and prefill. It provides many of the benefits of both traditional transformers (expandable context memory, chunk-wise parallelizable training and prefill) and linear RNNs in a single unified package. It can be used on every layer, saving KV-cache memory, and allowing a continuous range of choices of prefill time complexity between $O(N)$ and $O(N^2)$. It can also be implemented in a hybrid solution in tandem with LRNN layers in place of traditional attention, to supplement the LRNN with improved sublinear memory growth context length usage and long context decoding. We release our code at https://github.com/recursal/KVM-paper and trained models at https://huggingface.co/collections/recursal/key-value-means under the Apache 2.0 license.

</details>


### [754] [Practical Scaling Laws: Converting Compute into Performance in a Data-Constrained World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09189)
*Christopher M. Bryant,Hao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对Chinchilla缩放定律在数据稀缺、多轮训练等场景的局限性，提出一个封闭式扩展形式，引入欠容量、欠训练和过拟合三项分解，在多种架构和领域验证了更优的预测性能，并支持成本感知的数据分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Chinchilla缩放定律$L = E + A/N^α + B/D^β$在数据丰富、单轮预训练之外存在三个结构性局限：数据稀缺时发散而非饱和到无信息基线；容量超出数据时无法表示过拟合；混淆了总样本数与独有样本数。需要一个统一更广场景的缩放定律形式。

Method: 提出封闭式扩展$L(N, D, T) = E + (L_0 - E)\,h/(1+h)$，其中$h = a/N^α + b/T^β + c\,N^γ/D^δ$。该形式将损失分解为欠容量、欠训练和过拟合三项，在数据丰富单轮极限下退化回Chinchilla形式。

Result: 在MLP、ResNet、傅里叶神经算子、Transformer四种架构，覆盖视觉、科学ML和语言三个领域进行多轮实验验证；在五个已发表LLM缩放律网格上重新拟合。外推到更高算力和更大独有数据时，在所有评估的LLM网格和大部分自建实验上实现了最优RMSE。

Conclusion: 校准后的形式支持成本感知的分配策略：当数据免费时恢复Chinchilla最优分配，当数据成本高昂时转向更小的语料库和更多的训练轮次。

Abstract: The scaling laws guiding modern model training were calibrated for a single regime: data-rich, single-epoch pretraining. The dominant such scaling law form, Chinchilla's $L = E + A/N^α+ B/D^β$, has three structural limitations outside that regime: it diverges as unique data shrinks instead of saturating at the uninformed baseline; it cannot represent overfitting when capacity exceeds the data; and it conflates total examples seen with unique examples available. We propose a closed-form extension, $L(N, D, T) = E + (L_0 - E)\,h/(1+h)$ with $h = a/N^α+ b/T^β+ c\,N^γ/D^δ$, that decomposes loss into undercapacity, undertraining, and overfitting terms. It saturates between the irreducible loss $E$ and an uninformed baseline $L_0$ fixed by the loss type, and reduces to Chinchilla in the data-rich, single-epoch limit. We validate it on four multi-epoch experiments spanning four architecture families (MLPs, ResNets, Fourier neural operators, and transformers) across vision, scientific ML, and language domains, and refit it to five published LLM scaling-law grids. Extrapolating to higher compute and larger unique data than seen at fit time, our form achieves state-of-the-art RMSE on every published LLM grid we evaluate and on most cells of our constructed experiments. Once calibrated, the form admits a cost-aware allocation that recovers Chinchilla's optimum when data is free and shifts toward smaller corpora and more epochs as data grows expensive.

</details>


### [755] [On Characterizing Learnability for Adversarial Noisy Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09200)
*Steve Hanneke,Kun Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究对抗性噪声赌博机问题，通过凸化广义极大极小体积来刻画函数类$\mathcal{F}$的可学习性，分别针对 oblivious 和 adaptive 对手给出了可学习性的刻画条件，并提出了分布覆盖数这一新复杂度度量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在对抗性噪声赌博机问题中，给定已知函数类$\mathcal{F}$，如何刻画其可学习性（即存在算法实现次线性遗憾）是一个基础且重要的问题。作者希望建立一套完整的可学习性判别准则。

Method: 引入凸化的广义极大极小体积作为核心量，通过分析其与简单 hitting sets 的存在性之间的关系来刻画可学习性。对于不可数臂空间，进一步提出分布覆盖数（distribution covering number）这一新复杂度度量，并利用乘法权重算法实现高效学习。

Result: 对于 oblivious 对手，用凸化广义极大极小体积完整刻画了可学习性；对于 adaptive 对手，在臂空间可数时得到相同刻画；对于不可数臂空间，给出了基于分布覆盖数的猜想性刻画。

Conclusion: 凸化广义极大极小体积是刻画对抗性噪声赌博机可学习性的核心量，但不可数臂空间下的完全刻画仍是一个开放问题，作者提出了多个相关公开问题。

Abstract: We study adversarial noisy bandits given a known function class $\mathcal{F}$. In each round, the adversary selects a function $f \in \mathcal{F}$, the learner chooses an arm, and then observes a noisy reward determined by the chosen arm and the function $f$. The goal is to minimize the cumulative regret $R(T)$, defined as the difference between the learner's performance and that of the best fixed arm in hindsight over $T$ rounds. We say that a function class $\mathcal{F}$ is learnable if there exists an algorithm achieving sublinear regret. Our main results concern characterizing learnability. The main quantity appearing in our characterization is a convexified variant of the generalized maximin volume introduced by Hanneke and Wang (2025). For oblivious adversaries, we characterize learnability in terms of this convexified generalized maximin volume. For adaptive adversaries, we show that the same quantity characterizes learnability when the arm space is countable. Our analysis builds on a connection between convexified generalized maximin volume and the existence of simple hitting sets. We further conjecture that the same quantity also characterizes learnability when the arm space is uncountable, via its relation to a new complexity measure, which we call the distribution covering number. This notion can be viewed as a strengthened form of the hitting set that still admits efficient learning via the multiplicative weights algorithm. We also pose a number of relevant open questions regarding this problem.

</details>


### [756] [G-Zero: Self-Play for Open-Ended Generation from Zero Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09959)
*Chengsong Huang,Haolin Liu,Tong Zheng,Runpeng Dai,Langlin Huang,Jinyuan Li,Zongxia Li,Zhepei Wei,Yu Meng,Jiaxin Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出G-Zero框架，通过Hint-δ内在奖励实现无验证器的自进化，让两个模型（Proposer和Generator）协同进化，绕过外部评判者的能力瓶颈，适用于不可验证的开放领域任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化LLM在可验证领域表现良好，但在开放任务中依赖代理LLM作为评判者，导致能力瓶颈和奖励操纵问题。作者希望消除对外部验证器的依赖，实现真正的自主进化。

Method: 核心创新是Hint-δ内在奖励——衡量Generator在无提示和有自生成提示条件下响应之间的预测漂移。Proposer通过GRPO训练，持续定位Generator的盲点并生成挑战性查询和信息性提示；Generator通过DPO优化，内化提示带来的改进。两者协同进化，监督信号完全来自内部分布动态。

Result: 理论上证明了理想化标准DPO版本的G-Zero具有最佳迭代次优性保证，前提是Proposer提供足够的探索覆盖且数据过滤保持伪标签噪声较低。

Conclusion: G-Zero通过内部分布动态提取监督信号，绕过了外部评判者的能力天花板，为连续LLM自进化提供了一种可扩展、稳健的路径，特别适用于不可验证领域。

Abstract: Self-evolving LLMs excel in verifiable domains but struggle in open-ended tasks, where reliance on proxy LLM judges introduces capability bottlenecks and reward hacking. To overcome this, we introduce G-Zero, a verifier-free, co-evolutionary framework for autonomous self-improvement. Our core innovation is Hint-$δ$, an intrinsic reward that quantifies the predictive shift between a Generator model's unassisted response and its response conditioned on a self-generated hint. Using this signal, a Proposer model is trained via GRPO to continuously target the Generator's blind spots by synthesizing challenging queries and informative hints. The Generator is concurrently optimized via DPO to internalize these hint-guided improvements. Theoretically, we prove a best-iterate suboptimality guarantee for an idealized standard-DPO version of G-Zero, provided that the Proposer induces sufficient exploration coverage and the data filteration keeps pseudo-label score noise low. By deriving supervision entirely from internal distributional dynamics, G-Zero bypasses the capability ceilings of external judges, providing a scalable, robust pathway for continuous LLM self-evolution across unverifiable domains.

</details>


### [757] [LBI: Parallel Scan Backpropagation via Latent Bounded Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09204)
*Shaun Christopher Lee,Sangeetha Abdu Jyothi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LBI方法，通过将区域间通信限制在低维隐式接口上，使基于扫描的反向传播变得可行，将并行训练中的雅可比矩阵组合成本从O(d³)降至O(r³)，在多种架构上保持模型质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反向传播在深度上本质上是顺序的，造成O(K)深的依赖链，成为并行训练的瓶颈。虽然并行扫描公式理论上可将深度降至O(log K)，但因全秩d×d雅可比矩阵的O(d³)组合成本过高而难以实用。

Method: LBI通过将区域间通信限制在低维隐式接口m_k∈Rʳ（r≪d）上，将伴随递归简化为r×r雅可比矩阵的后缀扫描，组合成本从O(d³)降至O(r³)，同时在有界接口模型下保持精确梯度。

Result: 在Mamba-2、Mamba-3、Transformer和混合架构上，47-61M参数规模下，r=16的接口维度即可将训练质量保持在密集基线的0.16-0.35交叉熵范围内。跨设备反向通信缩减为对K个固定大小矩阵的单次扫描（约56KB）。

Conclusion: LBI为区域并行训练提供了算法基础，有效降低了并行反向传播的计算代价，同时保持了模型质量。

Abstract: Backpropagation is inherently sequential across depth, creating an $O(K)$-deep dependency chain that bottlenecks parallel training. While parallel-scan formulations theoretically reduce this depth to $O(\log K)$, they are computationally prohibitive for modern architectures due to the $O(d^3)$ cost of composing full-rank $d\times d$ Jacobians over the entire hidden state. We introduce Latent Bounded Interfaces (LBI), an algorithmic formulation that makes scan-based backpropagation tractable by restricting inter-region communication to a low-dimensional latent interface, $ m_k \in \mathbb{R}^{r}$, where $r \ll d$. This reduces the adjoint recursion to a suffix scan over $r \times r$ Jacobians, cutting per-combine cost from $O(d^3)$ to $O(r^3)$ while preserving exact gradients under the bounded-interface model. We demonstrate that LBI maintains model quality across four architectures (Mamba-2, Mamba-3, Transformer, and a Mamba--Transformer hybrid) at 47--61M block parameters. Interfaces of dimension $r=16$ suffice to preserve training quality within 0.16--0.35 cross entropy of dense baselines. The resulting framework provides an algorithmic foundation for region-parallel training, reducing cross-device backward communication to a single scan over $K$ fixed-size matrices, of approximately 56 KB for our experimental configurations.

</details>


### [758] [The Truth Lies Somewhere in the Middle (of the Generated Tokens)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09969)
*Sophie L. Wang,Phillip Isola,Brian Cheung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现在自回归生成中，对隐状态进行平均池化比使用单个token能获得更语义化的表示，这一现象在语言、视觉和蛋白质领域均成立，且生成token的表示优于提示token。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索如何更好地从自回归生成模型中提取能够反映模型内部状态的表示，解决因果掩码下单一token表示能力不足的问题。

Method: 通过平均池化聚合生成token的隐状态，使用核对齐方法将其与语言、视觉和蛋白质领域的参考空间进行比较，量化表示质量。

Result: 平均池化比任何单个token产生更语义化的表示；信息分布在整个生成token上而非集中于某个位置；生成token的表示优于提示token；跨生成步骤的对齐揭示了可解释的模型行为动态。

Conclusion: 平均池化是一种简单有效的表示聚合方法，反映了自回归模型中信息分布式编码的特性，对理解模型内部状态具有重要启示。

Abstract: How should hidden states generated autoregressively be collapsed into a representation that reflects a language model's internal state? Despite tokens being generated under causal masking, we find that mean pooling across their hidden states yields more semantic representations than any individual token alone. We quantify this through kernel alignment to reference spaces in language, vision, and protein domains. The improvement through mean pooling is consistent with information being distributed across generated tokens rather than localized to a single position. Furthermore, representations derived from generated tokens outperform those from prompt tokens, and alignment across generation reveals interpretable dynamics in model behavior.

</details>


### [759] [TSNN: A Non-parametric and Interpretable Framework for Traffic Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09208)
*Bowen Liu,Haijian Lai,Chan-Tong Lam,Junhao Dong,Benjamin Ng,Wei Ke,Sio-Kei Im*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TSNN是一种用于交通时间序列预测的非参数化、可解释框架，通过记忆库匹配机制解耦时间序列，无需可训练参数即可实现与深度学习模型相当的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究证明简单结构在时序分析中也能取得出色表现，且非参数化方法在3D点云分类中展现了可解释性潜力，因此作者希望将类似思路引入交通时间序列预测，构建一个既高效又可解释的预测框架。

Method: TSNN由多层结构组成，每层通过将输入时间序列与记忆库中的条目进行匹配来实现解耦；记忆库通过类似匹配过程从训练集中构建；模型利用交通数据的周期性增强预测准确性，且不含任何可训练参数。

Result: 在四个真实交通流数据集上，TSNN取得了与典型深度学习模型相当的预测性能；通过可视化解耦过程验证了各组件的有效性。

Conclusion: TSNN证明了非参数化、可解释的框架在交通时间序列预测中具有竞争力，通过可视化展示了模型的解释能力以及记忆库中每个时间步的贡献。

Abstract: Although many complex models were proposed to analyze time series data, some studies have demonstrated remarkable performance with simpler structures. A recent study proposed a non-parametric framework for 3D point cloud classification, which has the potential to be adapted for time series forecasting and enable interpretability. Inspired by the previous works, we present TSNN, a non-parametric and interpretable framework for traffic time series forecasting. TSNN consists of multiple layers that decouple the time series by matching the entries in a memory bank, where the memory bank is constructed using a similar matching process within the training set. It leverages the periodicity in traffic data to enhance forecasting accuracy while maintaining a simple model architecture. The proposed model operates without trainable parameters, preserving its inherent interpretability. In the experiments, TSNN achieves competitive performance compared to the typical deep learning models in four real-world traffic flow datasets. We also visualize the decoupling process to show the effectiveness of the components. Finally, we demonstrate the interpretability of the model and illustrate the contribution of each time step within the memory bank.

</details>


### [760] [Rethinking Ratio-Based Trust Regions for Policy Optimization in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09212)
*Chulabhaya Wijesundara,Andrea Baisero,Zhongheng Li,Gregory Castañón,Alan Carlin,Christopher Amato*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对多智能体强化学习中CTDE框架下ratio-based信任域方法的缺陷，提出了一种名为MARS的对称几何屏障目标函数，在47个任务上匹配或超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CTDE方法(MAPPO/MASPO)中，队友非平稳性导致联合优势估计方差增大，进而引发局部比率更新方差放大，产生两种特定失败模式：MAPPO的加性裁剪会移除异常样本梯度并削弱策略漂移恢复能力；MASPO的软二次惩罚可能导致概率坍缩。

Method: 提出Multi-Agent Ratio Symmetry (MARS)，用乘性对称几何屏障替代加性ratio-based信任域机制，在保持修正梯度的同时对比率趋零赋予无界代价。

Result: 在涵盖8个多智能体环境的47个任务（含新JAX基准PaxMen和AeroJAX）上，MARS匹配或超越MAPPO和MASPO的聚合环境级性能。

Conclusion: 消融实验证实MARS的性能提升源于对称屏障的几何特性，而非简单的灵活信任域边界。

Abstract: Centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) is a standard framework for cooperative multi-agent policy-gradient reinforcement learning, allowing agents to learn from joint information while acting from local observations. Ratio-based trust-region methods such as Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) and Multi-Agent Simple Policy Optimization (MASPO) update decentralized actors using per-agent probability ratios weighted by joint advantage estimates. Teammate non-stationarity increases the variance of these advantages, which in turn increases the variance in the local ratio updates. This exposes two method-specific failure modes: MAPPO's additive clipping removes gradients for outlier samples and weakens recovery from policy drift, while MASPO's soft quadratic penalty can allow probability collapse. We introduce Multi-Agent Ratio Symmetry (MARS), a novel policy optimization objective that replaces these additive ratio-based trust-region mechanisms with a multiplicatively symmetric geometric barrier. MARS preserves corrective gradients while assigning unbounded cost as probability ratios approach zero. Across 47 tasks spanning eight multi-agent environments, including novel JAX benchmarks PaxMen and AeroJAX, MARS matches or exceeds MAPPO and MASPO in aggregate environment-level performance. Ablations show that these gains arise from the geometry of the symmetric barrier rather than from flexible trust-region boundaries alone.

</details>


### [761] [Task-Aware Calibration: Provably Optimal Decoding in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10202)
*Tim Tomov,Dominik Fuchsgruber,Rajeev Verma,Stephan Günnemann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出任务校准（Task Calibration）范式，通过将LLM的自由文本分布校准到任务相关的语义潜在空间（如类别标签、整数或集合），并应用最小贝叶斯风险解码，从而提升生成质量和决策可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM解码依赖模型预测分布，但与真实分布的对齐偏差会导致次优决策。直接校准自由文本分布是病态的，因为组合空间过于庞大。

Method: 1. 提出任务校准（Task Calibration），在任务诱导的潜在语义空间（如离散类别、整数、集合）校准模型预测分布。2. 利用决策理论结果证明任务校准分布上的最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）解码是最优策略。3. 引入任务校准误差（TCE）作为量化校准质量的指标。

Result: 任务校准在不同任务和基线上持续提升生成质量。TCE能有效量化因校准不良导致的额外损失。

Conclusion: 任务校准使得LLM在各种任务和应用中做出更可靠的决策，为自由文本生成场景下的校准问题提供了可行且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: LLM decoding often relies on the model's predictive distribution to generate an output. Consequently, misalignment with respect to the true generating distribution leads to suboptimal decisions in practice. While a natural solution is to calibrate the model's output distribution, for LLMs, this is ill-posed at the combinatorially vast level of free-form language. We address this by building on the insight that in many tasks, these free-form outputs can be interpreted in a semantically meaningful latent structure, for example, discrete class labels, integers, or sets. We introduce task calibration as a paradigm to calibrate the model's predictive distribution in the task-induced latent space. We apply a decision-theoretic result to show that Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding on the task-calibrated latent distribution is the optimal decoding strategy on latent model beliefs. Empirically, it consistently improves generation quality across different tasks and baselines. We also introduce Task Calibration Error (TCE), an application-aware calibration metric that quantifies the excess loss due to miscalibration. Our work demonstrates that task calibration enables more reliable model decisions across various tasks and applications.

</details>


### [762] [The Pokémon Theorem and other Fairness Impossibility Results](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09221)
*Daniel Matsui Smola,Alex Smola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了多个公平性不可能结果共享一个RKHS几何结构：公平性标准是条件均值嵌入的线性约束，而不等的基础概率使得总期望定律过度约束这些条件。由此推导出四个结论，包括KMR二分法、Pokémon定理、公平特征学习的不可能性，以及近似松弛下的信号-误差边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者发现现有的公平性不可能结果（如Kleinberg等人的工作）在形式上看似不同的标量不兼容陈述，但实际上共享一个共同的几何结构。本文的动机是揭示这种统一结构，从而更深刻地理解公平性约束之间的内在冲突。

Method: 利用再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的条件均值嵌入（CME）将公平性标准建模为线性约束，通过总期望定律分析这些约束在不等基础概率下的过度决定性。在此基础上，推导出四个理论结果，并在标准公平性基准上进行实验验证。

Result: (1) KMR二分法仅需组条件无偏性而非完全校准；(2) Pokémon定理指出有限线性均值公平性标准下存在MMD度量的残余违反，衰减率由Kolmogorov m-width决定；(3) 公平特征学习中，在不等基础概率下，公平性与类条件分离会导致类别坍缩；(4) 近似松弛可得到信号-误差边界，实现公平性与性能的权衡。

Conclusion: 多个看似不同的公平性不可能结果本质上源于同一个RKHS几何结构，该结构揭示了公平性约束的线性本质和基础概率差异导致的根本限制。这为理解和设计公平性权衡提供了统一的理论框架。

Abstract: Fairness impossibility results often look like distinct scalar incompatibility statements. We show that several share one RKHS geometry: fairness criteria are linear constraints on conditional mean embeddings, and unequal base rates make the law of total expectation overdetermine those constraints.
  This view yields four results. The Kleinberg--Mullainathan--Raghavan dichotomy needs only group-conditional unbiasedness, not full calibration. The \emph{Pokémon theorem} shows that a distinct group pair satisfying any finite collection of linear mean-fairness criteria leaves a residual violation witnessed by the MMD, decaying at the Kolmogorov $m$-width rate under spectral regularity. The same tools prove an impossibility for fair feature learning: parity and class-conditional separation in representation space force class collapse under unequal base rates. The approximate relaxations yield signal and error frontiers, allowing a trade-off between real-world estimators and fairness goals. Experiments on standard fairness benchmarks are consistent with our bounds.

</details>


### [763] [PowerStep: Memory-Efficient Adaptive Optimization via $\ell_p$-Norm Steepest Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10335)
*Yao Lu,Dengdong Fan,Shixun Zhang,Yonghong Tian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PowerStep是一种内存高效的优化器，通过非线性变换实现坐标级自适应性，无需存储二阶矩统计量，在Transformer模型上达到与Adam相同的收敛速度，同时将优化器内存减半，结合int8量化可减少约8倍内存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Adam等自适应优化器需要维护梯度一阶和二阶矩的运行时估计，导致显著的内存开销。作者希望设计一种更内存高效的优化器，同时保持坐标级自适应性。

Method: 基于ℓ_p范数几何下的最速下降法启发，直接将非线性变换应用于动量缓冲区以获得坐标级自适应性；理论证明了PowerStep在非凸随机优化下能达到最优O(1/√T)收敛率。

Result: 在124M到235B参数的Transformer模型上，PowerStep匹配了Adam的收敛速度，同时优化器内存减半；结合int8量化时保持数值稳定，比全精度Adam减少约8倍优化器内存。

Conclusion: PowerStep为大规模训练提供了一种有理论依据、可扩展且资源高效的替代方案。

Abstract: Adaptive optimizers, most notably Adam, have become the default standard for training large-scale neural networks such as Transformers. These methods maintain running estimates of gradient first and second moments, incurring substantial memory overhead. We introduce PowerStep, a memory-efficient optimizer that achieves coordinate-wise adaptivity without storing second-moment statistics. Motivated by steepest descent under an $\ell_p$-norm geometry, we show that applying a nonlinear transform directly to a momentum buffer yields coordinate-wise adaptivity. We prove that PowerStep converges at the optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ rate for non-convex stochastic optimization. Extensive experiments on Transformer models ranging from 124M to 235B parameters demonstrate that PowerStep matches Adam's convergence speed while halving optimizer memory. Furthermore, when combined with aggressive \texttt{int8} quantization, PowerStep remains numerically stable and reduces optimizer memory by $\sim\!8\times$ compared to full-precision Adam. PowerStep thus provides a principled, scalable and resource-efficient alternative for large-scale training. Code is available at https://github.com/yaolubrain/PowerStep.

</details>


### [764] [SMIXAE: Towards Unsupervised Manifold Discovery in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09224)
*Collin Francel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SMIXAE架构，以解决稀疏自编码器（SAEs）无法直接建模多维特征的问题，并在Gemma 2模型上验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAEs无法直接建模多维特征，只能将多维特征分解为独立方向，需要在训练后手动分组，阻碍了特征表示的发现和解释。

Method: 提出稀疏混合自编码器（SMIXAE）架构，用于直接学习多维流形结构。

Result: 在Gemma 2 2B和9B模型上，SMIXAE能够直接学习已发现的多维流形结构，并找到新的结构。

Conclusion: SMIXAE初步解决了SAEs的多维特征建模问题，但仍存在局限性，未来有待进一步改进。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have been used widely to decompose and interpret neural network activations, especially those of transformer language models. One key issue with SAEs is their inability to directly model multidimensional features. Instead, SAEs may tile such features by a set of independent directions that must be grouped together after the SAE training phase, impeding discoverability and interpretation of learned feature representations. We begin to address this issue by introducing the Sparse MIXture of Autoencoders (SMIXAE) architecture. Empirically, we provide evidence that SMIXAE models have success both in directly learning previously identified manifold structures, as well as finding novel structures, within the open source Gemma 2 2B and 9B models. Finally, we discuss several limitations and point towards areas for future work.

</details>


### [765] [ProactBench: Beyond What The User Asked For](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09228)
*Sepehr Harfi,Ahmad Salimi,Dongming Shen,Alex Smola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了ProactBench基准，用于评估LLM在对话中主动识别和回应用户隐含需求的能力，而非仅回应显式请求。该基准将主动性分为三种类型（Emergent、Critical、Recovery），通过信息不对称的多智能体框架防止作弊，包含198个对话和624个触发点。实验发现Recovery能力最难且与现有标准基准弱相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM基准只测量模型对显式请求的响应质量，忽略了对话中识别并回应用户隐含需求的能力（即"对话主动性"）。作者希望填补这一评估空白。

Method: 将对话主动性分解为三种类型：Emergent（从单一线索推断）、Critical（综合多个线索推断）、Recovery（任务完成后主动提供前瞻性价值）。设计三智能体框架（Planner、User Agent、Assistant Model）通过信息不对称防止作弊。语料包含198个对话、624个触发点，覆盖24种沟通风格，经独立LLM评审。

Result: 在16个前沿和开源模型上评估发现，Recovery类型最为困难，且与现有六个标准基准的得分相关性弱，表明其提供了新的评估信号。

Conclusion: ProactBench有效测量了LLM的对话主动性，特别是Recovery能力作为新的评估维度具有独特价值，现有基准无法充分预测。

Abstract: Most LLM benchmarks score how well a model responds to explicit requests. They leave unmeasured a different conversational ability: noticing and acting on needs the user has implied but not said. We call this \emph{conversational proactivity}. ProactBench decomposes it into three phase-tied types: \textsc{Emergent}, inference from a single disclosed anchor; \textsc{Critical}, synthesis across multiple anchors; and \textsc{Recovery}, grounded forward-looking value after task completion.
  We operationalise the benchmark with three agents: a Planner, a User Agent, and an Assistant Model. Their information asymmetries defend against style-confounded scoring, rubric leakage, external-context contamination, and information dumps. The released corpus contains 198 curated dialogues with 624 trigger points across 24 communication styles drawn from a psychometric inventory and audited by an independent LLM judge. Across 16 frontier and open-weight models, \textsc{Recovery} is both difficult and weakly predicted by six standard benchmarks, making it a useful new evaluation signal.

</details>


### [766] [SlimSpec: Low-Rank Draft LM-Head for Accelerated Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10453)
*Anton Plaksin,Sergei Krutikov,Sergei Skvortsov,Alexander Samarin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SlimSpec方法，通过低秩参数化压缩草稿模型的LM-head内部表示，在保持全词汇支持的同时实现4-5倍加速，端到端速度提升比现有方法高8-9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 投机解码中草稿模型的LM-head因投影到大规模词汇表成为主要计算瓶颈，现有词汇截断方法虽缓解此问题但引入了额外复杂性（如词汇筛选、复杂推理逻辑或训练修改）。

Method: 对草稿模型的LM-head进行低秩参数化（low-rank parameterization），压缩内部表示而非输出，保持全词汇支持；与EAGLE-3草稿架构结合。

Result: 在延迟和吞吐量两种推理场景下，SlimSpec相比标准LM-head实现4-5倍加速，保持有竞争力的接受长度，端到端加速比现有方法高8-9%。

Conclusion: SlimSpec对训练和推理管线的改动最小，结合显著的加速提升，成为多种草稿LM-head架构的强力替代方案。

Abstract: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive generation in Large Language Models (LLMs) through a two-step procedure, where a lightweight draft model proposes tokens which the target model then verifies in a single forward pass. Although the drafter network is small in modern architectures, its LM-head still performs projection to a large vocabulary, becoming one of the major computational bottlenecks. In prior work this issue has been predominantly addressed via static or dynamic vocabulary truncation. Yet mitigating the bottleneck, these methods bring in extra complexity, such as special vocabulary curation, sophisticated inference-time logic or modifications of the training setup. In this paper, we propose SlimSpec, a low-rank parameterization of the drafter's LM-head that compresses the inner representation rather than the output, preserving full vocabulary support. We evaluate our method with EAGLE-3 drafter across three target models and diverse benchmarks in both latency- and throughput-bound inference regimes. SlimSpec achieves $4\text{-}5\times$ acceleration over the standard LM-head architecture while maintaining a competitive acceptance length, surpassing existing methods by up to $8\text{-}9\%$ of the end-to-end speedup. Our method requires minimal adjustments of training and inference pipelines. Combined with the aforementioned speedup improvements, it makes SlimSpec a strong alternative across wide variety of draft LM-head architectures.

</details>


### [767] [On Variance Reduction in Learning Mean Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09235)
*Juanwu Lu,Ziran Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了MeanFlow训练不稳定的根本原因：条件速度场在损失函数中被错误地赋予了双重统计角色，导致梯度方差无界。作者推导出最优系数的闭式解，发现多个并发工作中的改进方法实质上是该最优解的不同实现。在二维基准和潜Diffusion Transformer上验证了系数对偏差-方差权衡的影响，最优系数使样本质量提升高达54%，并发现FID与MSE之间存在定量层面的景观不匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MeanFlow训练存在不稳定问题（损失不下降、梯度方差无界），现有蒸馏-free的一步生成模型方法缺乏对此病理的理论理解。

Method: 1. 理论分析：将条件速度场在损失中的双重角色（无偏回归目标 vs. Monte Carlo控制变量）分离，推导最优系数的闭式解。2. 实验验证：在二维基准和潜Diffusion Transformer上系统扫描系数，对比多个并发工作的实际实现。

Result: 最优系数在二维基准上提升样本质量达54%，在DiT上实现每个匹配步的单调FID改善。同时发现FID-MSE景观不匹配：梯度方差在中间系数值最小，但最小化FID的系数偏向直接使用条件速度场。

Conclusion: 理论解释了MeanFlow训练不稳定的根源，提供了统一的最优系数框架，并揭示了优化目标（MSE）与评估指标（FID）之间的不一致性，为一步生成模型训练提供了重要指导。

Abstract: One-step generative modeling has emerged as a leading approach to amortize the inference cost of diffusion and flow-matching models. Among distillation-free methods, MeanFlow training is notoriously unstable, with non-decreasing loss and unbounded gradient variance. In this work, we establish a theory that attributes this pathology to a misuse of the conditional velocity field: it plays two distinct statistical roles in the loss, both as an unbiased regression target and as a Monte Carlo control variate inside a Jacobi-vector product, with the original loss assigning the wrong coefficient to the latter. We derive the optimal coefficient in closed form, and show that a family of fixes in concurrent works corresponds to different practical realizations of the same optimum. A controlled sweep of this coefficient on two-dimensional benchmarks and on a latent Diffusion Transformer recovers the predicted bias-variance ordering. The optimal coefficient yields up to a %54 improvement in sample quality on two-dimensional benchmarks and a monotone FID trend at every matched-step DiT checkpoint. Crucially, the same DiT measurement also reveals a quantitative FID-MSE landscape mismatch: although gradient variance is minimized at an interior coefficient value, the coefficient that minimizes FID prefers the direct use of conditional velocity.

</details>


### [768] [Intrinsic Muon: Spectral Optimization on Riemannian Matrix Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09238)
*Yibang Li,Bihari Lal Pandey,Ravi Sah,Andi Han,Cyrus Mostajeran,Pratik Jawanpuria,Bamdev Mishra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出iMuon，一种统一的优化框架，将Muon优化器推广到流形参数（如低秩分解、正交约束、SPD矩阵等），通过黎曼度量提升单位不变范数到切空间的内在范数，实现闭式更新，并在固定秩、SPD、Stiefel和Grassmann流形上建立收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
