Motivation: 现有的Muon及相关范数约束矩阵优化器在处理流形值参数（如低秩分解、正交约束、SPD矩阵）时存在两个问题：（i）破坏商对称性；（ii）切空间约束与空间范数边界耦合，导致在多种流形上无法得到闭式解。

Method: 关键发现：每个黎曼度量都能将单位不变欧几里得范数提升为切空间上的内在范数，且该内在范数约束的LMO是保对称的。基于此提出iMuon框架，在固定秩、SPD、Stiefel和Grassmann流形上为任意单位不变范数（包括谱范数、Frobenius范数和核范数）提供闭式更新。

Result: 建立了确定性和随机iMuon的收敛保证，其速率常数仅依赖于流形维数。在固定秩流形上，常数仅依赖于秩，与因子条件数无关，消除了先前工作所需的运行时因子重新缩放。在LLM的LoRA微调、图像分类和子空间学习上验证了有效性。

Conclusion: iMuon成功将Muon优化器推广到多种流形参数场景，解决了对称性破坏和耦合约束问题，理论收敛保证更优，实验效果显著。

Abstract: Muon and related norm-constrained matrix optimizers have become central to large-scale learning problems. They are formulated as a linear maximization oracle (LMO) over an ambient matrix-norm ball in unconstrained Euclidean space. However, these do not generalize cleanly to manifold-valued parameters such as low-rank factorizations, orthogonality constraints, or symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices. Naively restricting the Muon LMO to the tangent space (i) breaks quotient symmetries and (ii) couples the tangent-space constraint with an ambient norm bound, thereby obstructing closed-form solutions on various manifolds of interest. We resolve both issues with a single observation: every Riemannian metric canonically lifts a unitarily invariant Euclidean norm to an intrinsic norm on each tangent space, and the resulting intrinsic norm constrained LMO is symmetry preserving. Building on this, we introduce intrinsic Muon (iMuon), a unified framework that yields closed-form updates on the fixed-rank, SPD, Stiefel, and Grassmann manifolds for any unitarily invariant norm, including the spectral, Frobenius, and nuclear norms. We establish convergence guarantees for both deterministic and stochastic iMuon with rate constants that depend only on the manifold dimension. Notably, on the fixed-rank manifold this constant depends only on the rank, making the rate independent of factor conditioning and removing the runtime factor-rescaling required by prior work. Experiments on LoRA finetuning of LLMs, image classification, and subspace learning illustrate the efficacy of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [769] [MulTaBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Tabular Learning with Text and Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10616)
*Alan Arazi,Eilam Shapira,Shoham Grunblat,Mor Ventura,Elad Hoffer,Gioia Blayer,David Holzmüller,Lennart Purucker,Gaël Varoquaux,Frank Hutter,Roi Reichart*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MulTaBench基准，包含40个多模态表格学习数据集，证明任务感知的嵌入微调能提升多模态表格学习性能，而现有基准中模态仅共现，掩盖了微调收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格基础模型不支持非结构化模态（文本、图像），依赖冻结的预训练嵌入；现有多模态表格基准中模态仅共现，导致跨数据集方差大，掩盖了任务特定微调的收益。

Method: 构建MulTaBench基准，包含40个数据集（20个图像-表格任务、20个文本-表格任务），确保模态间提供互补预测信号；通过任务感知表示微调来对齐目标任务。

Result: 任务感知表示微调在文本和图像模态、多种表格学习器、不同编码器尺度和嵌入维度上均能带来一致的性能提升。

Conclusion: MulTaBench是迄今最大的图像-表格基准，覆盖医疗、电商等关键领域，为联合建模和任务感知表示的研究铺平道路，推动多模态表格基础模型的发展。

Abstract: Tabular Foundation Models have recently established the state of the art in supervised tabular learning, by leveraging pretraining to learn generalizable representations of numerical and categorical structured data. However, they lack native support for unstructured modalities such as text and image, and rely on frozen, pretrained embeddings to process them. On established Multimodal Tabular Learning benchmarks, we show that tuning the embeddings to the task improves performance. Existing benchmarks, however, often focus on the mere co-occurrence of modalities; this leads to high variance across datasets and masks the benefits of task-specific tuning. To address this gap, we introduce MulTaBench, a benchmark of 40 datasets, split equally between image-tabular and text-tabular tasks. We focus on predictive tasks where the modalities provide complementary predictive signal, and where generic embeddings lose critical information, necessitating Target-Aware Representations that are aligned with the task. Our experimental results demonstrate that the gains from target-aware representation tuning generalize across both text and image modalities, several tabular learners, encoder scales, and embedding dimensions. MulTaBench constitutes the largest image-tabular benchmarking effort to date, spanning high-impact domains such as healthcare and e-commerce. It is designed to enable the research of novel architectures which incorporate joint modeling and target-aware representations, paving the way for the development of novel Multimodal Tabular Foundation Models.

</details>


### [770] [Sub-JEPA: Subspace Gaussian Regularization for Stable End-to-End World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09241)
*Kai Zhao,Dongliang Nie,Yuchen Lin,Zhehan Luo,Yixiao Gu,Deng-Ping Fan,Dan Zeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Sub-JEPA方法，通过在多个随机子空间而非原始嵌入空间中施加高斯约束，解决了JEPA框架中的偏差-方差权衡问题，在连续控制任务上显著优于现有方法LeWM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有JEPA训练存在偏差-方差权衡：缺乏结构约束会导致表示方差过大、模型坍缩；而LeWM在原始高维空间中施加各向同性高斯先验引入了过强偏差，因为潜在表示本质位于低维流形上。

Method: 提出ame（Sub-JEPA），在多个随机子空间中施加高斯约束，而非在原始嵌入空间中进行全局约束。这种设计放松了全局约束，同时保留了抗坍缩效果，从而在训练稳定性和表示灵活性之间实现更好的平衡。

Result: 在四个连续控制环境中进行的广泛实验表明，该方法以非常明显的优势持续优于LeWM。

Conclusion: 该方法简单而有效，可作为未来基于JEPA的世界模型研究的强基线。代码已开源。

Abstract: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) provide a simpleframework for learning world models by predicting future latent representations.However, JEPA training is subject to a bias-variance tradeoff.Without sufficient structural constraints, excessive representationalvariance causes the model to collapse to trivial solutions.The recent LeWorldModel (LeWM) shows that this issue can be alleviated bysimply constraining latent embeddings with an isotropic Gaussian prior.However, latent representations inherently lie on low-dimensional manifoldswithin a high-dimensional ambient space, and enforcing an isotropic Gaussianprior directly in this ambient space introduces an overly strong bias.In this work, we propose ame, which seeks a favorable operatingpoint on the bias-variance frontier by applying Gaussian constraints inmultiple random subspaces rather than in the originalembedding space.This design relaxes the global constraint while preserving itsanti-collapse effect, leading to a better balance between trainingstability and representation flexibility.Extensive experiments across fourcontinuous-control environments demonstrate that consistentlyoutperforms LeWM with very clear margins.Our method is simple yet effective, and serves as a strong baseline for future JEPA-based world model research.fdefinedeeemodeThe code is available at https://github.com/intcomp/Sub-JEPA.

</details>


### [771] [Step Rejection Fine-Tuning: A Practical Distillation Recipe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10674)
*Igor Slinko,Ilia Zavidnyi,Egor Bogomolov,Yaroslav Zharov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT)，通过利用被RFT丢弃的未解决轨迹中的正确步骤来训练LLM，在SWE-bench Verified上将修复率提升至32.2%，比RFT多提升1.3个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准RFT会丢弃所有未通过测试的轨迹，但困难任务中这类轨迹占比很大且包含部分正确的步骤，存在资源浪费。

Method: 使用critic LLM评估轨迹中每一步的正确性，训练时仅对错误步骤掩码损失，但保留其在上下文窗口中，让模型学会从错误中恢复而非复现错误。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified上，RFT提升2.4%，SRFT提升3.7%，最终修复率达32.2%。

Conclusion: 通过细粒度步骤级筛选而非轨迹级丢弃，能更有效地利用未解决问题中的部分正确信息，提升模型性能。

Abstract: Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT) is a standard method for training LLM agents, where unsuccessful trajectories are discarded from the training set. In the context of SWE-bench tasks, this corresponds to filtering out runs where the submitted patch does not pass the tests. However, this approach discards unresolved trajectories, even though they form a large portion of all trajectories for hard tasks and even then may be partially correct. In this work, we propose Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT) - a practical way to leverage these unresolved trajectories. For this, we employ a critic LLM to assess the correctness of each step in a trajectory. Consequently, during training, we mask the loss for erroneous steps while retaining them in the context window. This way we ensure the model learns to recover from errors without reproducing them. Evaluation on SWE-bench Verified shows that while RFT improves the resolution rate by 2.4% by excluding unresolved trajectories, SRFT improves it by 3.7% by filtering them instead of discarding completely, reaching the total resolution rate of 32.2%.

</details>


### [772] [Improving Generalization by Permutation Routing Across Model Copies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09256)
*Shuhei Kashiwamura,Timothee Leleu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于M-cover变换的机器学习方法，通过结构化消息路由（而非参数平均）将模型复制M份，每份使用来自不同副本的参数计算局部损失，并借助混合核Q定义的拓扑重新分配学习信号，适用于感知机、委员会机和多层感知机，能通过结构化消息共享提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复制型SGD或弹性SGD通过参数平均或显式吸引力耦合模型副本，但可能导致副本坍缩或参数空间耦合过紧，缺乏更灵活的结构化信息共享机制。

Method: 将模型复制M份，通过结构化混合核Q采样的排列，将不同副本的参数路由到每个局部损失的计算中，使得学习信号沿路由路径在副本间重新分配，而非直接耦合参数。

Result: 该方法适用于感知机、委员会机以及可微神经网络，能通过结构化消息共享改善泛化，避免副本坍缩问题。

Conclusion: M-cover变换提供了一种通用的结构化消息共享框架，通过路由拓扑而非参数空间耦合来提升学习性能，为集成学习与分布式学习提供了新视角。

Abstract: We introduce a use of the \(M\)-cover (or \(M\)-layer) transform for machine learning. The method replicates a model \(M\) times, but instead of coupling the copies through parameter averaging or an explicit attractive force, as in replicated SGD or Elastic SGD, it rewires the contexts in which local learning messages are computed. Each local loss is evaluated on a routed model whose parameters are drawn from different copies according to permutations sampled from a structured mixing kernel \(Q\). Training then uses the original local update rule, while the resulting learning messages are redistributed across the copies through these routed computational paths. Thus \(Q\) defines a topology for message transport and controls the long-loop structure of the lifted factor graph. We formulate this construction for perceptrons, committee machines, and multilayer perceptrons, showing that the same principle applies from discrete models to differentiable neural networks. The resulting framework provides a mechanism for improving generalization through structured message sharing rather than replica collapse or parameter-space coupling.

</details>


### [773] [Rebellious Student: Reversing Teacher Signals for Reasoning Exploration with Self-Distilled RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10781)
*Jeonghye Kim,Jiwon Jeon,Dongsheng Li,Yuqing Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RLRT方法，在强化学习训练中逆向利用自蒸馏信号：当学生模型在教师模型不会选择的路径上成功时，强化这些token，从而在GRPO基础上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法在成功轨迹上会压制学生自身的推理能力，需要一种机制来区分并鼓励学生自主成功的探索。

Method: RLRT (RLVR with Reversed Teacher)：在GRPO框架中，当学生成功走出一条教师不会预测的路径时，对这些token进行增强强化。信息不对称被用作设计原则。

Result: 在Qwen3的base、instruction-tuned和thinking-tuned检查点上，RLRT显著优于自蒸馏和基于探索的基线方法。

Conclusion: 信息不对称可作为RLVR中一个全新且原则性的设计维度，RLRT验证了"逆向利用自蒸馏信号"的有效性。

Abstract: Self-distillation has emerged as a powerful framework for post-training LLMs, where a teacher conditioned on extra information guides a student without it, both from the same model. While this guidance is useful when the student has failed, on successful rollouts, the same mechanism instead overwrites the student's choices and suppresses it's own reasoning. Therefore, we propose reading the original self-distillation signal in reverse: when the student succeeds along a path the teacher would not have predicted, these tokens reflect its self-driven reasoning. Building on this, we propose RLRT (RLVR with Reversed Teacher), which augments GRPO by reinforcing these tokens on correct rollouts. We interpret this as a new form of exploration in RLVR: not uniform diversity, but valuable exploration grounded in the student's own success. Across base, instruction-tuned, and thinking-tuned Qwen3 checkpoints, RLRT substantially outperforms self-distillation and exploration-based baselines, establishing information asymmetry as a new, principled design axis for RLVR.

</details>


### [774] [Memorize Theorems, Not Instances: Probing SFT Generalization through Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09270)
*Ruiying Peng,Mengyu Yang,Jing Lei,Xiaohui Li,Xueyu Wu,Xinlei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Theorem-SFT，通过将监督微调的目标从记忆表面相关性转向显式定理应用，解决了推理泛化下降的问题。在多个基准测试上取得显著提升，并发现仅微调MLP层即可达到全层性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SFT虽然广泛用于任务适配，但会导致推理泛化能力系统性下降。作者论证根本原因不在于记忆机制本身，而在于记忆了错误的目标——表面相关性而非底层推理规则。

Method: 提出Theorem-SFT，重新定向监督信号，教导模型如何调用规则（定理应用），而非让答案看起来像什么。通过显式定理应用的教学方式，避免模型学习问题-答案对中的虚假表面相关性。

Result: 在MATH上提升8.8%（LLaMA3.2-3B-Instruct），在GeoQA上提升20.27%（Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct），且无需特定模态的重新训练。仅微调MLP层即可匹配全层微调的性能。

Conclusion: 推理泛化失败并非源于记忆机制本身，而是源于记忆了错误的归纳目标。这重新框定了关于"记忆vs泛化"的争论方向。

Abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is widely used for task-specific adaptation, yet recent work shows it systematically undermines reasoning generalization. We argue the root cause is not memorization itself, but its target: vanilla SFT drives models to exploit and memorize spurious surface correlations in problem-solution pairs, leaving them brittle to superficial input variations. To address this, we propose Theorem-SFT, which reorients supervision toward explicit theorem application by teaching models how rules are invoked rather than what answers look like. Theorem-SFT yields consistent gains across benchmarks and model families: +8.8% on MATH (LLaMA3.2-3B-Instruct) and +20.27% on GeoQA (Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) without modality-specific re-training. Fine-tuning MLP layers alone matches full-layers performance, implicating feed-forward components as the primary locus of reasoning rules. Our findings reframe the debate: Generalization failures stem not from memorization as a mechanism, but from memorizing the wrong inductive targets.

</details>


### [775] [Instance-Adaptive Online Multicalibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09273)
*Zhiming Huang,Jamie Morgenstern,Aaron Roth,Claire Jie Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在线多标定（online multicalibration）超越最坏情况的问题，提出一种高效算法，通过在预测值上自适应地细化二元网格，动态地在良性序列和最坏序列之间插值，其误差由细化树的叶节点数量控制。算法在最坏情况下达到$\widetilde O(T^{2/3})$的已知最优速率，同时在边际随机设定下自动适应到$\widetilde O(\sqrt T)$，在分段平稳均值（$J$段）下达到$\widetilde O(\sqrt{JT})$。更一般地，速率取决于相对于群族的可预测均值过程的阈值复杂度度量，且该依赖在log因子下是紧的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线多标定研究主要关注最坏情况下的保证，但实际数据往往具有可预测的结构（如平稳性、分段平稳性等），需要一种能够自动适应数据难度、同时不牺牲最坏情况保证的算法。

Method: 提出一种单一的高效算法，在预测值上自适应地细化二元网格（dyadic grid），通过动态调整细化树的结构来平衡不同复杂度序列的需求。算法的误差上界由细化树的叶节点数量控制。

Result: - 恢复已知的$\widetilde O(T^{2/3})$最坏情况最优速率
- 边际随机设定下自动获得$\widetilde O(\sqrt T)$速率
- 分段平稳均值（$J$段）下获得$\widetilde O(\sqrt{JT})$速率
- 更一般地，速率由阈值复杂度度量决定，且该依赖在log因子下是紧的

Conclusion: 本文首次实现在线多标定中从最坏情况到良性序列的动态自适应，证明了所提出的阈值复杂度度量是控制速率的本质量，为实际应用中更高效的多标定算法提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We study online multicalibration beyond the worst-case. We give a single, efficient algorithm which dynamically interpolates between benign and worst-case sequences by adaptively refining a dyadic grid of prediction values. Its error is controlled by the number of leaves in the refinement tree. Our analysis recovers the known $\widetilde O(T^{2/3})$ worst-case-optimal rate for online multicalibration, while simultaneously automatically adapting to easier instances: in the marginal stochastic setting it obtains a rate of $\widetilde O(\sqrt T)$, and for piecewise-stationary means with $J$ segments its rate is $\widetilde O(\sqrt{JT})$. More generally, the rate depends on a threshold-complexity measure of the predictable mean process relative to the group family. We show that this dependence is tight up to logarithmic factors.

</details>


### [776] [DiffATS: Diffusion in Aligned Tensor Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09275)
*Jinhua Lyu,Tianmin Yu,Brian Kim,Lizhuo Zhou,Chanwook Park,Naichen Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiffATS，一种基于对齐张量基元的扩散生成框架。通过正交Procrustes对齐解决Tucker分解的旋转歧义，构建紧致、数据自适应的张量格拉斯曼基元，无需预训练深度压缩自编码器即可实现3.9倍到210倍的数据压缩，在图像、视频和PDE求解上取得强生成性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率时空场的直接扩散建模计算成本极高，现有参数高效方法依赖预训练压缩自编码器。同时，Tucker分解的因子矩阵存在旋转非唯一性（规范歧义），给生成建模带来困难。

Method: 1) 基于Tucker分解构建数据依赖张量基元；2) 提出正交Procrustes (OP)对齐方法，选取数据中的medoid锚点矩阵，对齐因子矩阵消除歧义；3) 构建矩阵格拉斯曼基元和张量格拉斯曼基元；4) 理论证明基元映射是低秩张量与其基元空间之间的同胚；5) 提出DiffATS框架，在 aligned tensor primitives 上训练扩散模型。

Result: 在图像、视频和PDE求解任务上实现强条件/无条件生成性能，压缩比为3.9倍到210倍，无需预训练深度压缩自编码器。

Conclusion: DiffATS通过对齐张量基元解决了因子旋转歧义问题，证明了张量基元空间与低秩张量空间之间的拓扑保真性，为高效高维时空场的扩散生成提供了不依赖深度压缩网络的可行方案。

Abstract: Direct diffusion modeling of high-resolution spatiotemporal fields is computationally challenging. Parameter-efficient primitives address this by representing high-dimensional data with a compact set of parameters. In this paper, we construct data-dependent tensor primitives without pretrained compression autoencoders. Our construction starts from Tucker decomposition, which captures low-rank multilinear structure through a core tensor and mode-wise factors. However, Tucker factors are non-unique: the same tensor can be represented by different rotated factors, which complicates generative modeling. We address this issue with orthogonal Procrustes (OP) alignment. Specifically, we select medoid anchor matrices from the data and align the factor matrices to resolve the gauge ambiguity. This yields matrix Grassmannian primitives and tensor Grassmannian primitives that are compact, data-adaptive, and directly decodable by explicit multilinear reconstruction. Theoretically, we prove that the proposed primitive maps are homeomorphisms between low-rank tensors and their corresponding primitive spaces, certifying that the representations are non-degenerate and topologically faithful. Building on these primitives, we propose *Diffusion in Aligned Tensor Space* (DiffATS), a generative framework that trains diffusion models directly on aligned tensor primitives. Across images, videos, and PDE solutions, DiffATS achieves strong unconditional and conditional generation performance while compressing original data by $3.9\times$ to $210\times$, without relying on any pretrained deep compression autoencoders.

</details>


### [777] [SLIM: Sparse Latent Steering for Interpretable and Property-Directed LLM-Based Molecular Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10831)
*Mingxu Zhang,Yuhan Li,Lujundong Li,Dazhong Shen,Hui Xiong,Ying Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SLIM是一个即插即用的框架，通过稀疏自编码器将分子编辑器的隐藏状态分解为属性对齐的稀疏特征，在不修改模型参数的情况下提高编辑成功率，在MolEditRL基准上最高提升42.4个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型作为分子编辑器时，与属性相关的信息隐式纠缠在密集的隐藏状态中，缺乏对属性控制的显式手段，导致大量编辑无法改善甚至损害目标属性。

Method: 提出SLIM框架，使用带有可学习重要性门控的稀疏自编码器，将编辑器的隐藏状态分解为稀疏的、与属性对齐的特征，通过在稀疏特征空间中进行引导来实现精确的属性控制。

Result: 在MolEditRL基准上，涵盖四种模型架构和八种分子属性，相较基线方法一致提升，最高改进42.4个百分点。

Conclusion: SLIM是一种即插即用的方法，无需修改模型参数即可提升分子编辑的成功率，并支持对编辑行为进行可解释分析。

Abstract: Large language models possess strong chemical reasoning capabilities, making them effective molecular editors. However, property-relevant information is implicitly entangled across their dense hidden states, providing no explicit handle for property control: a substantial fraction of edits fail to improve or even degrade target properties. To address these issues, we propose SLIM (Sparse Latent Interpretable Molecular editing), a plug-and-play framework that decomposes the editor's hidden states into sparse, property-aligned features via a Sparse Autoencoder with learnable importance gates. Steering in this sparse feature space precisely activates property-relevant dimensions, improving editing success rate without modifying model parameters. The same sparse basis further supports interpretable analysis of editing behavior. Experiments on the MolEditRL benchmark across four model architectures and eight molecular properties show consistent gains over baselines, with improvements of up to 42.4 points.

</details>


### [778] [First Worst-Case Regret Bounds for Combinatorial Thompson Sampling in Sleeping Semi-Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09277)
*Zhiming Huang,Bingshan Hu,Jianping Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次为半赌臂设定下的组合汤普森采样（CTS）提供了最坏情况下的遗憾界分析，并提出了CL-SG变体，通过共享高斯种子实现更优的理论保证和实际性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组合汤普森采样（CTS）在带有睡眠臂的半赌臂设定中缺乏最坏情况下的遗憾界保证、缺乏对抗性可用性变化的理论分析，且高斯先验变体（CTS-G）在实证中表现不佳。

Method: 提出CL-SG（共享种子高斯）变体，每轮采样一个共享高斯种子来协调臂间探索，并给出最坏情况下的遗憾界分析（上界和下界）。

Result: CTS-G首次获得$\tilde{O}(m\sqrt{NT})$的遗憾上界和$\tildeΩ(m\sqrt{NT})$的下界；CL-SG实现更优的$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{mNT})$遗憾界及匹配下界，在真实数据集上持续优于CTS-G和CTS-B等基线。

Conclusion: 解决了CTS长期存在的理论难题，提出的CL-SG既具备理论保障又具有实际优越性，推动了组合半赌臂问题的理论与实践。

Abstract: We revisit combinatorial Thompson sampling (CTS) for semi-bandits with sleeping arms, where arm availability varies over time and actions must satisfy combinatorial constraints, as in wireless mesh routing with fluctuating link availability. Despite its practical relevance, CTS has been hindered by several long-standing problems: (i) the absence of worst-case regret guarantees in the semi-bandit setting even without sleeping arms, (ii) the lack of theory under adversarially varying availability, and (iii) the consistently weak empirical performance of CTS with Gaussian priors (CTS-G). This paper resolves these long-standing issues by providing the first worst-case regret analysis of CTS-G, proving an upper bound of $\tilde{O}(m\sqrt{NT})$ and a matching lower bound of $\tildeΩ(m\sqrt{NT})$. To bridge the gap between theory and practice, we further propose CL-SG, a simple CTS-G variant that samples a single shared Gaussian seed each round to coordinate exploration across arms. We show that CL-SG achieves an improved regret bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{mNT})$, together with a matching lower bound $Ω(\sqrt{mNT})$. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that CL-SG consistently outperforms strong baselines including CTS-G and CTS-B, and we open-source our implementation for reproducibility.

</details>


### [779] [TileQ: Efficient Low-Rank Quantization of Mixture-of-Experts with 2D Tiling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09281)
*Hongyaoxing Gu,Xinzhe Chen,Lijuan Hu,Fangfang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TileQ，一种免微调的后训练量化方法，通过在MoE专家权重上应用二维分块结构化低秩量化，并在推理时融合多个低秩专家计算为单次操作，实现10倍额外内存压缩和约5%推理延迟，同时保持SOTA精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE模型虽性能优异，但专家参数量巨大，现有低秩量化方法仍存在不可忽视的内存开销和推理延迟问题，亟需更高效的压缩方案。

Method: 提出TileQ，采用2D分块结构化低秩量化（共享输入和输出维度的低秩因子），免微调PTQ；并设计高效推理技术，将多个低秩专家计算融合为单次操作以提升硬件利用率。

Result: 额外内存使用降低高达10倍，推理延迟降至约5%，同时保持最先进的模型精度。

Conclusion: TileQ有效解决了MoE模型低秩量化中内存和延迟的瓶颈，实现了精度-效率的更好权衡。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models achieve remarkable performance by sparsely activating specialized experts, yet their massive parameters in experts pose significant challenges for deployment. While low-rank quantization offers a promising route to compress MoE models, existing methods still incur nonnegligible memory overhead and inference latency. To address these limitations, we propose \textsc{TileQ}, a fine-tuning-free post-training quantization (PTQ) method that employs 2D-tiling structured low-rank quantization to share low-rank factors across both input and output dimensions of MoE experts. Furthermore, we introduce an efficient inference technique for \textsc{TileQ} that fuses multiple low-rank expert computations into a single-pass operation, significantly improving hardware utilization. Experiments show that \textsc{TileQ} cuts down additional memory usage up to 10$\times$ and reduces inference latency to $\sim$5\% while preserving state-of-the-art accuracy.

</details>


### [780] [Semi-Supervised Neural Super-Resolution for Mesh-Based Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09284)
*Jiyeon Kim,Youngjoon Hong,Won-Yong Shin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SuperMeshNet提出了一种结合消息传递神经网络（MPNN）的半监督超分辨率框架，通过互补学习策略，仅需少量高分辨率配对数据和大量无配对低分辨率数据，即可在网格模拟中高效重建高保真解，相比全监督方法减少了90%的高分辨率数据需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于网格的PDE模拟尽管精度高，但细网格计算成本高昂。超分辨率技术虽可从低分辨率解重建高分辨率解，但训练神经网络通常需要大量昂贵的高分辨率标注数据，这成为实际应用的瓶颈。

Method: 提出SuperMeshNet，核心包括：(1) 互补学习（Complementary Learning），一种半监督方法，同时利用少量成对LR-HR数据和大量无配对LR数据；(2) 两个联合训练的、互补的MPNN模型；(3) 引入归纳偏置（inductive biases）进一步提升超分辨率性能。

Result: 实验表明，SuperMeshNet仅需10%的高分辨率数据（即减少90%），就能达到甚至低于全监督基准（不含归纳偏置）的均方根误差（RMSE）。

Conclusion: SuperMeshNet通过半监督互补学习和MPNN结构，显著降低了网格模拟超分辨率任务对高分辨率标注数据的依赖，为数据高效的物理模拟提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Mesh-based simulations provide high-fidelity solutions to partial differential equations (PDEs), but achieving such accuracy typically requires fine meshes, leading to substantial computational overhead. Super-resolution techniques aim to mitigate this cost by reconstructing high-resolution (HR), high-fidelity solutions from low-cost, low-resolution (LR) counterparts. However, training neural networks for super-resolution often demands large amounts of expensive HR supervision data. To address this challenge, we propose SuperMeshNet, an HR data-efficient super-resolution framework for mesh-based simulations aided by message passing neural networks (MPNNs). At its core, SuperMeshNet introduces complementary learning, a semi-supervised approach that effectively leverages both 1) a small amount of paired LR-HR data and 2) abundant unpaired LR data via two jointly trained, complementary MPNN-based models. Additionally, our model is enriched by inductive biases, which are empirically shown to further improve super-resolution performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SuperMeshNet requires 90% less HR data to achieve even lower root mean square error (RMSE) than that of the fully supervised benchmark without the inductive biases. The source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/jykim-git/SuperMeshNet.git.

</details>


### [781] [Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10923)
*Junhao Shen,Teng Zhang,Xiaoyan Zhao,Hong Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SLIM框架，将外部技能集作为动态优化变量，通过留一法评估边际贡献，对技能进行保留、退休或扩展操作，实现智能体强化学习中技能生命周期动态管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法假设外部技能要么持续保留要么内化到策略中，最终导致零技能推理。这种假设过于严格——由于参数容量有限且技能边际贡献不均，最优技能集是非单调的、任务和阶段依赖的。

Method: SLIM通过留一法验证评估每个活跃技能的边际外部贡献，然后应用三种生命周期操作：保留高价值技能、退休贡献可忽略的技能、在持续失败时扩展技能库。

Result: 在ALFWorld和SearchQA上，SLIM平均超越最佳基线7.1个百分点。

Conclusion: 策略学习与外部技能保留并非互斥：部分技能被吸收进策略，部分持续提供外部价值。SLIM提供了更通用的技能型智能体强化学习范式。

Abstract: Large language model agents increasingly rely on external skills to solve complex tasks, where skills act as modular units that extend their capabilities beyond what parametric memory alone supports. Existing methods assume external skills either accumulate as persistent guidance or internalized into the policy, eventually leading to zero-skill inference. We argue this assumption is overly restrictive, since with limited parametric capacity and uneven marginal contribution across skills, the optimal active skill set is non-monotonic, task- and stage-dependent. In this work, we propose SLIM, a framework of dynamic Skill LIfecycle Management for agentic reinforcement learning (RL), which treats the active external skill set as a dynamic optimization variable jointly updated with policy learning. Specifically, SLIM estimates each active skill's marginal external contribution through leave-one-skill-out validation, then applies three lifecycle operations: retaining high-value skills, retiring skills whose contribution becomes negligible after sufficient exposure, and expanding the skill bank when persistent failures reveal missing capability coverage. Experiments show that SLIM outperforms the best baselines by an average of 7.1% points across ALFWorld and SearchQA. Results further indicate that policy learning and external skill retention are not mutually exclusive: some skills are absorbed into the policy, while others continue to provide external value, supporting SLIM as a more general paradigm for skill-based agentic RL.

</details>


### [782] [MC$^2$: Monte Carlo Correction for Fast Elliptic PDE Solving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09288)
*Ethan Hsu,Hong Meng Yam,Ivan Ge*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MC²是一个混合WoS-神经网络PDE求解器，通过单次前向传播学习校正低预算蒙特卡洛解的误差，结合PDEZoo基准测试，实现比纯WoS快1000倍的求解速度，同时保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛PDE求解器（如WoS）无偏但计算缓慢，而学习型求解器快速但存在偏差且对分布漂移敏感。现有研究缺乏统一的、可复现的有限计算PDE求解评估框架。

Method: 提出MC²混合框架：先以低预算WoS生成结构化的有噪估计，再用单次前向传播的神经网络学习并校正其误差，恢复高保真解。同时发布PDEZoo基准，包含200万个解析解的椭圆型PDE及多预算蒙特卡洛轨迹。

Result: MC²匹配了使用超过1000倍蒙特卡洛计算量的解的精度，在所有评估的经典方法、去噪方法和神经算子基线中表现最优。在PDEZoo上验证了有限样本蒙特卡洛误差是可结构化的、可学习的且可通过单次前向传播校正。

Conclusion: MC²和PDEZoo共同证明了有限计算量下的蒙特卡洛误差具有可学习结构，可通过神经网络单次校正，实现比纯WoS快约1000倍的PDE求解，并为该领域提供了大规模标准化评估基础设施。

Abstract: Partial differential equation (PDE) solvers underpin scientific computing, but real-world deployment is bounded by compute. Classical Monte Carlo solvers such as Walk-on-Spheres (WoS) are unbiased and geometry-agnostic but are slow. Learned solvers are fast but biased and brittle under distribution shift. We present \textbf{MC$^2$}, a hybrid WoS-Neural Network (WoS-NN) PDE solver that treats a low-budget Monte Carlo solution as a structured estimator of the true field and learns a single-pass neural correction to recover a high-fidelity solution. MC$^2$ matches the accuracy of solutions using over $1000\times$ more Monte Carlo compute, outperforming all evaluated classical, denoising, and neural-operator baselines. To enable reproducible study of finite-compute PDE solving, we additionally release \textbf{PDEZoo}, the largest standardized elliptic PDE benchmark to date: 2M PDEs spanning five elliptic families and unlimited geometric compositions, with analytic ground truth and multi-budget Monte Carlo trajectories. Together \textbf{MC$^2$} and \textbf{PDEZoo} (1) empirically establish that finite-sample Monte Carlo error is structured, learnable, and correctable in a single forward pass, (2) show that we can solve PDEs $\sim$\textbf{1000x} faster than with just WoS, and (3) provide the evaluation infrastructure the field has so far lacked.

</details>


### [783] [DECO: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with Dense-Comparable Performance on End-Side Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10933)
*Chenyang Song,Weilin Zhao,Xu Han,Chaojun Xiao,Yingfa Chen,Zhiyuan Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DECO是一种稀疏MoE架构，通过可微ReLU路由、NormSiLU激活函数和简化专家设计，在激活仅20%专家的情况下匹配密集Transformer性能，并实现3倍硬件加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE模型虽然计算效率高，但总参数量巨大导致存储和内存访问瓶颈，难以实现高性能、低计算成本和低存储开销的端侧部署。

Method: 1) 使用可微且灵活的ReLU路由+可学习的专家级缩放；2) 提出NormSiLU激活函数，在SiLU前归一化输入，提高路由激活比稳定性和内在稀疏性；3) 发现非门控MLP专家+ReLU路由可简化MoE架构。

Result: 仅激活20%的专家即可匹配密集Transformer性能，优于现有MoE基线；专用加速核在真实硬件上实现3倍推理加速。

Conclusion: DECO通过创新的路由机制和激活函数设计，在相同参数预算下实现了MoE与密集Transformer的性能匹配，同时显著降低了部署开销。

Abstract: While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales model capacity without proportionally increasing computation, its massive total parameter footprint creates significant storage and memory-access bottlenecks, which hinder efficient end-side deployment that simultaneously requires high performance, low computational cost, and small storage overhead. To achieve these properties, we present DECO, a sparse MoE architecture designed to match the performance of dense Transformers under identical total parameter budgets and training tokens. DECO utilizes the differentiable and flexible ReLU-based routing enhanced by learnable expert-wise scaling, which adaptively balances the contributions of routed and shared experts. Furthermore, we introduce NormSiLU, an activation function that normalizes inputs prior to SiLU operators, producing a more stable trend of routed-expert activation ratio and a higher intrinsic sparsity level. We also identify an empirical advantage in using non-gated MLP experts with ReLU-based routing, indicating the possibility of MoE architecture simplification. Experiments demonstrate that DECO, activating only 20% of experts, matches dense performance and outperforms established MoE baselines. Our specialized acceleration kernel delivers a 3.00$\times$ speedup on real hardware compared with dense inference. Codes and checkpoints will be released.

</details>


### [784] [From Regression to Inference: Meta-Learning Predictors for Neural Architecture Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09290)
*Liping Deng,MingQing Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于卷积神经过程（ConvNP）的元学习框架进行性能预测，将NAS中的性能估计建模为条件函数推断问题，在少量样本下达到SOTA架构选择效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NAS预测器基于监督回归训练，在小样本下容易过拟合，泛化能力差。

Method: 提出ConvNP元学习框架，通过上下文-目标分割的合成任务训练，显式优化小样本下的泛化能力，并设计简单有效的元特征。

Result: 在NAS-Bench-101和NAS-Bench-201上，top-K排序质量持续提升，在有限样本下达到SOTA架构选择性能。

Conclusion: 将性能预测建模为条件函数推断问题并采用元学习训练，能有效提升NAS在小样本下的泛化能力和架构选择质量。

Abstract: Prediction-based approaches are widely used in neural architecture search (NAS), where a predictor estimates the performance of candidate architectures to guide selection. However, existing predictors are typically trained via supervised regression on limited samples, leading to overfitting and poor generalization to unseen architectures. In this work, we propose a fundamentally different formulation that models performance prediction as a conditional function inference problem using a Convolutional Neural Process (ConvNP) with meta-learning capabilities. Instead of fitting a fixed mapping to limited samples, our approach meta-learns to infer performance from partial observations by training with context-target splits across a group of synthesized tasks, explicitly optimizing for generalization under data scarcity and aligning the training procedure with the deployment setting in NAS. We further design simple yet effective meta-features for cell-based architectures and evaluate our method on NAS-Bench-101 and NAS-Bench-201. Extensive experiments show that our approach consistently improves top-K ranking quality and achieves the state-of-the-art architecture selection using limited samples.

</details>


### [785] [dFlowGRPO: Rate-Aware Policy Optimization for Discrete Flow Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09291)
*Zhengyan Wan,Yidong Ouyang,Panwen Hu,Qiang Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出dFlowGRPO，一个面向离散流模型的统一强化学习框架，在图像生成和多模态理解任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散流模型是一类灵活的数据生成模型，但将其与强化学习结合的研究主要集中在扩散大语言模型这样的特例上，缺乏面向更一般离散流模型的统一强化学习框架。

Method: 推导了离散流模型的完整轨迹概率，将去噪过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程，使dFlowGRPO能够同时利用条件转移率和后验模型信息进行强化学习。

Result: 在多模态离散流模型FUDOKI上应用dFlowGRPO，在文本到图像生成任务上优于dLLMs的GRPO方法，性能与连续流的FlowGRPO相当，并在理解任务上展现出强能力。

Conclusion: dFlowGRPO成功将强化学习推广到更一般的离散流模型，为离散数据的生成和推理能力提升提供了统一有效的框架。

Abstract: Discrete flow models (DFMs) are a class of flexible generative models for generating discrete data, and diffusion large language models (dLLMs) can be viewed as a special case with a specific choice of mixture path and a masked source distribution. While several recent works have explored reinforcement learning into dLLMs, its application to more general discrete flow models remains underexplored. In this work, we present discrete Flow-GRPO (dFlowGRPO), a unified reinforcement learning framework for discrete flow models that supports a broad family of probability paths and non-masked source distributions. We derive the full trajectory probability for DFMs and formulate denoising as a Markov decision process, enabling dFlowGRPO to incorporate information from both the associated conditional transition rates and the posterior model during reinforcement learning. We apply dFlowGRPO to FUDOKI, a recent multimodal discrete flow model, and evaluate it on both image generation and multimodal understanding tasks. Empirical results show that dFlowGRPO outperforms existing GRPO-type methods for dLLMs on text-to-image generation tasks and achieves performance competitive with continuous flow-based models trained using FlowGRPO, while also demonstrating strong capabilities on understanding tasks.

</details>


### [786] [Towards Effective Theory of LLMs: A Representation Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09294)
*Muhammed Ustaomeroglu,Guannan Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出表征有效理论(RET)，通过自监督学习从LLM隐状态轨迹中提取宏观变量，用于解释、预测和干预模型计算过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的内部计算过程极其微观复杂，缺乏高层、动态有意义的宏观描述来辅助可解释性分析。

Method: 采用BYOL/JEPA风格的自监督学习目标，从隐藏状态轨迹中学习粗粒化的宏观变量，保留高层结构信息。

Result: 宏观变量具有时间一致性，能揭示推理的"心智状态"轨迹，捕捉高层语义结构，支持早期预测谄媚行为，并提供因果干预手段来引导生成。

Conclusion: LLM计算存在有用的有效描述——通过RET可获得高层、动态有意义的宏观变量，支持对模型的理解、预测和干预。

Abstract: We propose Representational Effective Theory (RET), a framework for describing large language model computation in terms of learned macrostates rather than microscopic details. RET learns these macrostates from hidden-state trajectories using a BYOL/JEPA-style self-supervised objective, coarse-graining activations into macrovariables that preserve higher-level structure relevant for prediction and interpretation. We evaluate whether these macrovariables are practically relevant for interpretability: RET yields temporally consistent states that reveal "mental-state" trajectories of reasoning, capture high-level semantic structure, support early prediction of behavioral outcomes such as sycophancy, and provide causal handles for steering generations toward interpretable computational phases. Together, these results suggest that LLM computation admits useful effective descriptions via RET: high-level, dynamically meaningful variables that support interpretation, prediction, and intervention.

</details>


### [787] [Neural Cluster First, Route Second: One-Shot Capacitated Vehicle Routing via Differentiable Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09301)
*Samuel J. K. Chin,Maximilian Schiffer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Neural CFRS，一种非自回归、一次性求解的神经聚类-先聚类后路径（CFRS）框架，用于容量约束车辆路径问题（CVRP）。它通过可微的最优传输层强制执行全局车队容量约束，具有E(2)空间对称性、路径间置换和路径内遍历对称性的形式化理论保证，并支持零样本扩展至N=1000的大规模实例（<4%差距），同时在标准基准上达到2.73%的最优性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前神经组合优化（NCO）方法采用自回归方式构造CVRP解，存在顺序解码瓶颈、空间对称性敏感和分布外鲁棒性差的问题。而经典的CFRS范式在理论上具有渐近最优性，但被NCO领域忽视。作者认为CFRS的结构与深度学习的核心优势（基于全局上下文的相似性和分配，而非长序列构造）更为契合。

Method: 提出Neural CFRS框架，包含：(1) 非自回归单次前馈网络，用于聚类；(2) 可微熵正则化最优传输层，端到端强制执行容量约束，生成连续传输计划；(3) 利用该传输计划稀疏化精确的容量分配求解器。框架通过预训练的空间词汇表实现极端参数效率和零样本扩展。

Result: 在常容量设置下，Neural CFRS对分布外N=1000实例的差距<4%；即使使用超轻量单层架构，仍保持约5%的差距。在标准基准上，对规模100的问题达到2.73%的竞争性最优性差距。

Conclusion: Neural CFRS通过非自回归CFRS范式，在理论上消除了E(2)空间对称性、路径间置换和路径内遍历对称性，在实用上实现了极端参数效率和零样本扩展，为神经组合优化提供了新的研究方向。

Abstract: The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) underpins modern last-mile logistics. Current Neural Combinatorial Optimization (NCO) methods construct CVRP solutions autoregressively, inheriting sequential decoding bottlenecks, sensitivity to spatial symmetries, and brittle out-of-distribution behavior. We revisit the classical Cluster-First-Route-Second (CFRS) paradigm -- long known to be asymptotically optimal but largely overlooked by NCO -- and argue that it is structurally aligned with the core strengths of deep learning: similarity and assignment over global context, rather than the construction of long sequential tours. We introduce Neural CFRS, the first purely non-autoregressive one-shot neural CFRS framework for the CVRP. It enforces global fleet-capacity constraints end-to-end via a differentiable entropic Optimal Transport layer, producing a continuous transport plan to sparsify an exact capacitated assignment solver. We provide formal theoretical guarantees that our architecture intrinsically abstracts away $E(2)$ spatial, inter-route permutation, and intra-route traversal symmetries. By equipping the framework with a pre-trained spatial vocabulary, we unlock extreme parameter efficiency and zero-shot scaling. Designed primarily for real-world spatial distributions under a constant capacity setting, Neural CFRS scales robustly to out-of-distribution $N=1000$ instances with a < 4% gap -- retaining an approximate 5% gap at this scale even as an ultra-lightweight, single-layer architecture. Furthermore, when deployed out-of-the-box on standard benchmarks, we achieve a highly competitive 2.73% optimality gap on size-100 problems.

</details>


### [788] [Discrete Langevin-Inspired Posterior Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09302)
*Chaitanya Amballa,Sattwik Basu,Jorge Vančo Sampedro,Romit Roy Choudhury*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ΔLPS，一种基于离散 Langevin 启发的后验采样器，利用梯度信息在不离开离散状态空间的情况下识别有前途的离散移动，实现所有 token 维度的高效并行更新，适用于多种离散扩散先验和逆问题，在图像恢复和空间映射任务上优于现有离散后验采样器，与强连续扩散求解器具有竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续扩散模型在逆问题中已被广泛使用，但离散扩散模型的后验采样方法相对未被充分探索。现有离散后验采样器通常依赖连续松弛、Gibbs风格更新或针对特定噪声过程的专门机制，限制了可扩展性和通用性。

Method: 提出ΔLPS（Discrete Langevin-Inspired Posterior Sampler），利用梯度信息在不离开离散状态空间的情况下识别有前途的离散移动方法，支持所有 token 维度的高效并行更新，与离散扩散先验的训练范式无关（包括掩码扩散和均匀状态扩散）。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR、FFHQ的图像恢复任务以及空间映射任务上（涵盖线性、非线性和盲逆问题），ΔLPS优于现有离散扩散后验采样器，并与强连续扩散逆求解器具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 完全离散的、基于梯度信息的后验采样器为在离散表示上解决逆问题提供了一条可扩展且通用的路径。

Abstract: We study posterior sampling for inverse problems in discrete state spaces using discrete diffusion models as generative priors. While continuous diffusion models have become widely used for inverse problems, their discrete counterparts remain comparatively underexplored. Existing discrete posterior samplers often rely on continuous relaxations of discrete variables, Gibbs-style updates, or mechanisms specialized to particular corruption processes, which can limit scalability or generality. We propose $Δ$LPS, a Discrete Langevin-Inspired Posterior Sampler that uses gradient information to identify promising discrete moves without leaving the discrete state space. The resulting approach enables efficient parallel updates across all token dimensions and is agnostic to the training paradigm of the discrete diffusion prior, including masked and uniform-state diffusion. We evaluate our method on image restoration tasks across MNIST, CIFAR, and FFHQ, as well as spatial mapping, covering linear, nonlinear, and blind inverse problems. Across these settings, we improve over recent discrete diffusion posterior samplers and are competitive with strong continuous diffusion-based inverse solvers. Our results suggest that fully discrete, gradient-informed posterior samplers offer a scalable and general path toward solving inverse problems over discrete representations.

</details>


### [789] [Path-Dependent Denoising: A Non-Conservative Field Perspective on Order Collapse in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09303)
*Jeonseong Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 扩散语言模型（DLMs）在逆向去噪过程中存在顺序敏感性问题，本文通过提出“顺序诱导伪联合分布”和“局部去噪循环”的概念，形式化分析了当局部条件分布满足兼容性时，DLM解码才能实现真正的顺序无关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DLMs在快速解码时仍对去噪顺序高度敏感，常退化为类似自回归的生成轨迹，需要理解并解决这种顺序依赖的根源。

Method: 提出顺序诱导伪联合分布和局部去噪循环（交换两个未解析位置的伪联合分布的对数比率），从条件分布兼容性角度分析顺序依赖性，并将路径依赖分解为局部循环之和，区分了三种误差来源。

Result: 建立了条件兼容性、顺序无关性与局部循环之间的关系：兼容条件分布下循环为零，全局顺序偏差可分解为局部循环之和。

Conclusion: 提供了可用于推理阶段的诊断工具，用以测试DLM解码是否真正实现了顺序无关性。

Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) offer a structural alternative to autoregressive generation: denoising can update tokens in arbitrary orders or in parallel rather than along a fixed left-to-right chain. In practice, fast DLM decoding remains strongly order-sensitive and often drifts toward autoregressive-like trajectories. We trace this tension to compatibility. At each reverse-time step, a DLM provides local denoising conditionals over the unresolved tokens. Arbitrary-order denoising becomes well defined when these local conditionals compose into order-invariant pseudo-joints.
  We formalize this view by defining order-induced pseudo-joints and a local denoising circulation: the log-ratio between the two pseudo-joints obtained by swapping a pair of unresolved positions. This circulation is zero under compatible conditionals, and global order gaps decompose into sums of local circulations along adjacent swaps. We further separate incompatibility-driven path dependence from conditional-dependence error in parallel updates and from order-specific estimation error. The resulting framework provides inference-only diagnostics for testing when DLM decoding is genuinely order-free.

</details>


### [790] [Hierarchical Attention-based Graph Neural Network with Relevance-driven Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09308)
*Seungwoo Kum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HA-HeteroGNN框架，通过两级注意力机制实现异构GNN的可解释归因，并利用注意力生成的相关性分数作为剪枝标准，在减少27%边的同时提升分类准确率2.4-6.1%，训练时间减少43.9%，推理延迟约58-60ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GNN在关系推理中表现优异，但面临两个持续存在的挑战：异构节点类型缺乏可解释的归因，以及在大型嘈杂图上消息传递的计算开销过大。

Method: 提出分层注意力异构GNN框架，包含两级注意力机制分别处理传感器级和上下文级计算；利用注意力机制构建GNN Explainer，无需反向传播即可生成节点相关性分数；将相关性分数作为剪枝准则，移除无信息节点。

Result: 边减少27%，分类准确率提升2.4-6.1%，跨策略解释稳定性达97.5%，训练时间减少43.9%，实时推理延迟约58-60ms/样本。

Conclusion: 挑战了剪枝必然牺牲准确率换取效率的传统假设，证明了可解释性与效率可以兼得。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) excel at relational reasoning but face two persistent challenges: the lack of interpretable attribution for heterogeneous node types, and the computational overhead of message passing over large, noisy graphs. We propose the Hierarchical Attention-based Heterogeneous GNN (HA-HeteroGNN), a framework that addresses both issues through a unied explainability-to-pruning pipeline. A two-tier attention mechanism separates sensor-level and context-level computation across 16 node types and 18 edge types, producing per-node relevance scores via an attention-based GNN Explainer without requiring gradient backpropagation. These relevance scores then serve as a principled pruning criterion: removing nodes identied as consistently uninformative yields a 27% reduction in graph edges while simultaneously improving classication accuracy by 2.46.1% across all model variants, challenging the conventional assumption that pruning necessarily trades accuracy for eciency. Experiments on a 50,000-record synthetic dataset spanning 11 report categories demonstrate 97.5% cross-strategy explanation stability and domain consistent sensor attribution, with training-time reductions of up to 43.9% and real-time inference latency of approximately 5860 ms per sample.

</details>


### [791] [Teaching Molecular Dynamics to a Non-Autoregressive Ionic Transport Predictor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09311)
*Jiyeon Kim,Byungju Lee,Won-Yong Shin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于辅助模态学习的非自回归框架，在训练时利用原子轨迹作为辅助模态来学习动力学信息，但在推理时不需要轨迹数据。该方法相比自回归模型提速200倍以上，同时比现有非自回归模型预测误差更低，且能同时利用有/无轨迹两种类型的数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么依赖昂贵的MD模拟或慢速的自回归模型（误差累积），要么非自回归模型无法利用动力学信息导致精度低；且现有方法通常只能利用有轨迹或无轨迹的数据集之一，无法兼顾。

Method: 提出辅助模态学习框架，训练时将原子轨迹作为辅助模态输入模型学习动力学特征，推理时则移除轨迹输入（仅需静态结构），实现非自回归的快速预测，同时受益于两类数据集。

Result: 在含轨迹数据集上，相比自回归模型实现200倍以上加速；在两类数据集上，预测误差均显著低于现有非自回归基线模型。

Conclusion: 该框架有效结合了自回归模型对动力学的学习能力和非自回归模型的推理效率，为离子传输性质预测提供了一种高精度且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Unlike most static material properties widely studied in the machine learning literature, ionic transport properties are inherently dynamic, making their fast and accurate prediction from static atomic structures challenging. The current standard approach, molecular dynamics (MD) simulations, suffers from prohibitively high computational cost. Recent autoregressive learning-based MD acceleration methods requiring sequential inference remain slow and prone to error accumulation; in contrast, existing non-autoregressive material property prediction models are less accurate because they fail to exploit dynamics. Moreover, existing methods typically benefit from datasets either with or without atomic trajectories, but not both. To overcome these limitations, we propose a non-autoregressive learning framework based on auxiliary modality learning, which treats atomic trajectories as an auxiliary modality during training but does not require them at inference. This enables the predictor to learn dynamics without sequential inference while benefiting from both types of datasets. As a result, our framework achieves over 200 times speedup compared to autoregressive models on the dataset with atomic trajectories while substantially reducing prediction error relative to non-autoregressive benchmarks across both types of datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/jykim-git/MD.

</details>


### [792] [The Trap of Trajectory: Towards Understanding and Mitigating Spurious Correlations in Agentic Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09330)
*Luoxi Tang,Rupali Rajendra Vaje,Yuqiao Meng,Sakshi Sunil Narkar,Weicheng Ma,Zeyu Ding,Dazheng Zhang,Zhaohan Xi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了智能体记忆中的虚假相关性漏洞，并提出了CAMEL校准方法来减少对虚假模式的依赖，同时保持或提升在干净输入上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能体记忆虽然能扩展LLM的上下文能力，但会引入虚假相关性漏洞——检索到的记忆携带错误相关性证据，导致下游决策推理错误。这一风险尚未被充分探索。

Method: 1) 通过因果结构识别虚假模式类型，在轨迹级记忆上构建基准测试；2) 提出CAMEL——一种即插即用的校准方法，在不同记忆架构的写入和检索阶段均可工作。

Result: 记忆在干净输入上提升推理能力，但会放大对虚假模式的依赖；CAMEL一致减少了三种类型的虚假模式依赖，同时保持或提升了干净输入的性能，且对自适应攻击具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CAMEL为更可靠的智能体记忆部署提供了一种原则性且轻量级的解决方案。

Abstract: Agentic memory enables LLMs to persist information beyond a single context window and reuse it in later decisions, but it also introduces a new vulnerability: spurious correlations, where retrieved memory carries miscorrelated evidence and propagates erroneous reasoning into downstream decisions. Despite the widespread use of agentic memory, this risk remains largely underexplored. We address it from two aspects. First, we benchmark several canonical types of spurious patterns identified through causal structure and record them across trajectory-level memory. Diagnosing agentic memory systems on this benchmark reveals that memory improves reasoning on clean inputs but amplifies reliance on spurious patterns when they are present. Second, we propose CAMEL, a plug-and-play calibration method that operates across diverse memory architectures at both write and retrieval time. CAMEL consistently reduces reliance on spurious patterns across all three types while preserving or improving performance on clean inputs and staying robust under adaptive attacks targeting the calibration. Overall, CAMEL offers a principled and lightweight solution toward more reliable agentic memory deployment.

</details>


### [793] [Dimension-Free Saddle-Point Escape in Muon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09331)
*Yanlin Long,Yufei Gu,Zeke Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文理论上证明了Muon优化器通过非线性谱整形机制在高维非凸优化中实现了维度无关的鞍点逃逸，突破了AdamW等逐元素自适应优化器面临的维度诅咒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代大语言模型训练在高维景观中遭遇病态平坦的鞍点瓶颈，现有AdamW等优化器受困于O(D)维度诅咒，亟需理解Muon优化器为何能有效应对这一挑战。

Method: 扩展广义矩阵微扰理论，建立非平衡优化轨迹的理论框架；利用预解泛函演算和宏观柯西围道积分，避免各向同性噪声假设和Tracy-Widom边缘奇点；分析结构非相干性对正交漂移的屏蔽作用。

Result: 数学证明了Muon通过非线性谱整形机制优雅地绕过了维度诅咒；在足够的谱间隙下，实现了确定性O(1)离散弹道式弹射；给出了代数形式的无维度逃逸界。

Conclusion: Muon优化器在非凸优化动力学中具有维度无关的鞍点逃逸能力，为理解其在大模型训练中的优越性能提供了严格的理论基础。

Abstract: Modern Large Language Model (LLM) training is fundamentally bottlenecked by pathologically flat saddle points in extreme high-dimensional landscapes. Motivated by this challenge, we analyze the saddle-point escape dynamics of the emerging Muon optimizer, demonstrating its resilience against the $\mathcal{O}(D)$ dimensional curse that severely traps element-wise adaptive optimizers like AdamW. By extending generalized matrix perturbation theory, we develop a theoretical framework to capture Muon's non-equilibrium optimization trajectories. This theoretical machinery mathematically proves that Muon elegantly bypasses the dimensional curse via a non-linear spectral shaping mechanism. By leveraging resolvent functional calculus and macroscopic Cauchy contour integration, we avoid isotropic noise assumptions and Tracy-Widom edge singularities. We establish that structural incoherence securely shields the trajectory from orthogonal drift, enabling a dimension-free saddle-point escape, and triggering a deterministic $\mathcal{O}(1)$ discrete ballistic ejection under sufficient spectral gap. Consequently, we provide an algebraically dimension-free escape bound for Muon, formalizing the underlying mechanics of its non-convex optimization dynamics.

</details>


### [794] [Functional Graphs for Predicting and Explaining Goal Failure in Sparse Goal-Conditioned RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09335)
*Shalley Dash*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过确定性函数图分析稀疏目标条件强化学习中的策略失败，提出局部目标支持度(LGS)作为低成本诊断指标，并建立后验图分类法来区分不同失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏目标条件强化学习中，聚合成功率可能掩盖策略的失败模式，需要更细粒度的诊断方法来理解策略在目标层面的失败原因。

Method: 利用贪婪评估诱导的确定性函数图（吸引子与盆地）分析策略的局部到全局结构；定义局部目标支持度(LGS)统计邻居状态到目标的单步转移比例；构建后验图分类法（目标主导、竞争者主导、部分/竞争、碎片化）描述失败模式。

Result: 在8x8 TD设置中，LGS <= 0.5 阈值识别低成功目标的精确率0.921、召回率0.929、F1 0.925；LGS为零可完全阻止非目标起点进入目标；该诊断在多种更新规则、课程学习和大网格中表现一致。

Conclusion: 局部单步策略结构可作为有效的后训练诊断工具，但局部支持不足以保证全局成功（因竞争吸引子或碎片化盆地结构导致失败），需结合图分类法进行综合诊断。

Abstract: Sparse goal-conditioned reinforcement learning can produce policies whose failures are hidden by aggregate success rates. We analyze trained goal-conditioned value policies through the deterministic functional graphs induced by greedy evaluation: for each goal, every state maps to a single successor, decomposing behavior into attractors and basins. This reveals a local-to-global structure in learned policies. We define local goal support (LGS), a one-step statistic measuring the fraction of valid neighboring states whose greedy successor is the goal. In deterministic sparse GridWorlds, zero LGS exactly precludes goal entry from non-goal starts. Empirically, weak LGS is a strong diagnostic of goal-level failure across update rules, curricula, larger grids, and bottleneck geometries: the fixed rule LGS <= 0.5 identifies low-success goals with precision 0.921, recall 0.929, and F1 0.925 in the main 8x8 TD setting, with similar performance across variants. However, local support is not sufficient for global success: some supported goals still fail because distant states are captured by competing attractors or fragmented basin structure. We therefore introduce a compact post-hoc taxonomy of policy-induced graphs -- goal-dominant, competitor-dominated, partial/contested, and fragmented -- to characterize residual failure modes beyond local support. These results show that sparse GCRL failures can be understood as structured policy-induced dynamics, and that local one-step policy structure provides a cheap post-training diagnostic for goal-level failure.

</details>


### [795] [Adversary-Robust Learning from Fully Asynchronous Directional Derivative Estimates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09337)
*Anik Kumar Paul,Nibedita Roy,Nagesh Talagani,Swetha Ganesh,Gugan Thoppe,Alexandre Reiffers-Masson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FAR-SIGN 是一种用于参数服务器架构中对抗鲁棒学习的全异步优化算法，通过符号更新和双时间尺度机制实现鲁棒性，支持一阶和零阶实现，在非凸光滑目标上达到近乎最优的收敛速率，并在 MNIST 上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒聚合方法在异步分布式学习中存在偏差大、依赖私有参考数据集等问题，亟需一种无需私有数据、支持全异步且具有理论保证的鲁棒学习算法。

Method: 提出 FAR-SIGN 算法，核心包括：(1) 基于符号的定向投影更新实现鲁棒性；(2) 双时间尺度机制缓解符号更新带来的偏差；(3) 支持一阶和零阶两种实现；(4) 完全异步执行，无需服务器端私有参考数据集。

Result: 理论上证明算法几乎必然收敛到非凸光滑目标的驻点集，一阶设置下达到近乎最优的 O(n^{-1/4+ε}) 速率，零阶设置下达到 O(n^{-1/6+ε}) 速率。MNIST 实验表明 FAR-SIGN 在准确率和运行时间上均优于基于鲁棒聚合的方法。

Conclusion: FAR-SIGN 为异步分布式鲁棒学习提供了一种高效且理论完备的解决方案，兼具强鲁棒性、理论保证和实际性能优势。

Abstract: We propose FAR-SIGN (Fully Asynchronous Robust optimization via SIGNed directional projections) for adversary-resilient learning in parameter-server--worker systems. FAR-SIGN achieves robustness through sign-based updates along carefully designed directions and mitigates the resulting bias via a two-timescale mechanism. It admits both first-order and zeroth-order implementations and enables fully asynchronous execution without requiring a private reference dataset at the server. We establish almost-sure convergence of FAR-SIGN to the set of stationary points for smooth, nonconvex objectives. Moreover, we prove the near-optimal rate of $O(n^{-1/4+ε})$ in the first-order setting and the standard $O(n^{-1/6+ε})$ in the zeroth-order setting, where $n$ is the iteration count and $ε>0$ can be chosen arbitrarily small. Experiments on MNIST show that FAR-SIGN outperforms robust aggregation-based methods in both accuracy and wall-clock time.

</details>


### [796] [Selection Plateau and a Sparsity-Dependent Hierarchy of Pruning Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09345)
*Guangqi Li,Yongxin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现神经网络剪枝中的"选择高原"现象：所有秩单调的权重评分器在固定稀疏度下收敛到相同精度。提出SICS假说：存在依赖稀疏度的最小特征复杂度κ(S)控制高原逃逸——低稀疏度(κ=0)、临界稀疏度(κ=1)、极端稀疏度(κ=2)所需复杂度递增。实验验证了平滑非单调特征在S=0.7时逃逸+6.6%，而仅在S=0.8时高频抖动原始特征有效(+2.6%)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释为何不同剪枝方法在相同稀疏度下性能趋同，揭示选择高原现象的成因机制，并为未来剪枝算法设计提供理论指导。

Method: 提出SICS假说，定义稀疏度依赖的最小特征复杂度κ(S)；在ViT-Small/CIFAR-10上测试9种特征类、4种稀疏度，对比秩单调与非单调评分器的逃逸效果。

Result: 平滑非单调特征在S=0.7时逃逸+6.6%；仅高频抖动原始特征在S=0.8时逃逸+2.6%；伪非单调评分器低于梯度基线；高斯凸包仅+0.006 vs 混沌派生+0.046，说明秩对齐必要但不充分。

Conclusion: SICS统一解释了多种剪枝方法的性能聚类现象，建议未来剪枝算法应根据目标稀疏度调整特征复杂度。

Abstract: We identify a Selection Plateau phenomenon in one-shot neural network pruning: all rank-monotone weight scorers converge to identical accuracy at fixed sparsity, independent of functional form. We propose the Sparsity-Information-Complexity Spectrum (SICS) hypothesis: a sparsity-dependent minimum feature complexity kappa(S) governs plateau escape, with kappa=0 sufficient at low sparsity (S<0.65), kappa=1 dominant at critical sparsity (S~0.7), and kappa=2 necessary at extreme sparsity (S>0.75). On ViT-Small/CIFAR-10, testing nine feature classes across four sparsities, smooth non-monotone features provide +6.6% escape at S=0.7, while only raw features with high-frequency wiggle escape at S=0.8 (+2.6%). A fake non-monotone scorer underperforms the gradient baseline, indicating the requirement is magnitude-independent non-monotonicity. A handcrafted Gaussian bump achieves only +0.006 escape vs. chaos-derived +0.046, indicating rank-alignment is necessary but insufficient. SICS provides a unifying explanation for the performance clustering of diverse pruning methods and suggests that future selection algorithms should adapt feature complexity to target sparsity.

</details>


### [797] [FLAME: Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts for Continual Multimodal Multi-Task Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09355)
*Xing Han,Shravan Chaudhari,Tanvi Ranade,Rama Chellappa,Suchi Saria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于稀疏MoE的多模态框架，支持多任务预训练与持续学习，通过模态特定路由器和低秩记忆压缩实现灵活扩展与抗遗忘，在医疗多模态基准上取得竞争性表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中多模态模型需同时满足两个互补场景：多任务预训练（任务可共现并进行表征共享）和持续适应（部署后出现新任务及新模态组合）。单独任一模式都不足：预训练任务集不完整，而放弃联合训练会损失迁移收益与效率。

Method: 提出可扩展MoE框架：1）多任务预训练中使用模态特定路由器处理各模态token；2）持续学习阶段通过将累积专家知识压缩到低秩记忆子空间（仅扩展轻量路由器），在固定容量MoE中实现顺序适应。

Result: 在多个医疗多模态基准上验证有效性，实现了有竞争力的多任务预训练性能，同时缓解灾难性遗忘并提升参数效率。

Conclusion: 稀疏MoE框架能有效统一多任务预训练与持续学习，为多模态模型灵活部署提供可行方案。

Abstract: Real-world model deployment across multiple domains requires multimodal models to operate under two complementary regimes: (1) multi-task pretraining, tasks are co-available at design time where related tasks could borrow representational strength from one another, (2) continual adaptation, in which new tasks emerge after deployment with previously unseen modality combinations. However, neither regime alone suffices: the pretraining task set is never exhaustive, while bypassing joint training forfeits the transfer gains and efficiency among co-trainable tasks. Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is a natural fit for this dual requirement: sparse activation enables modular capacity expansion as new tasks arrive, while routing decouples modality-level computation from task-level composition. In this work, we propose a scalable MoE framework for multitask pretraining and continual learning across flexible modality combinations. The framework is designed to support training on multimodal tasks with diverse modality configurations by leveraging modality-specific routers that process tokens from each modality across tasks. Furthermore, it enables continual learning over sequential multimodal tasks within a fixed-capacity MoE by compressing accumulated expert knowledge into low-rank memory subspaces, while expanding only the lightweight routers. We validate the effectiveness of our method on multiple healthcare multimodal benchmarks. It demonstrates competitive multitask pretraining performance while alleviating catastrophic forgetting and improving parameter efficiency.

</details>


### [798] [Function-Space ADMM for Decentralized Federated Learning: A Control Theoretic Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09356)
*Akihito Taya,Yuuki Nishiyama,Kaoru Sezaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedF-ADMM，一种在函数空间中利用ADMM优化方向并通过知识蒸馏投影到参数空间的去中心化联邦学习方法，有效解决了非IID数据分布下的性能退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的去中心化联邦学习方法主要在参数空间优化，但在非IID数据分布下性能严重退化，因为神经网络训练本质上是非凸的，标准凸优化的收敛保证不适用。

Method: 提出FedF-ADMM，利用损失泛函在函数空间中的凸性推导ADMM更新方向，再通过知识蒸馏将函数空间更新投影到参数空间；引入稳定系数增强非IID场景下的鲁棒性，并从控制理论角度将其解释为比例-积分（PI）项。

Result: 在极端非IID场景（如每设备仅有一个标签的数据）下，FedF-ADMM比现有去中心化FL方法收敛更快、更稳定，同时实现了更高的准确率和更好的设备间一致性。

Conclusion: FedF-ADMM通过在函数空间进行优化并投影回参数空间，有效克服了非凸参数空间优化的局限性，为去中心化联邦学习在高度非IID场景下提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: Decentralized federated learning (FL) is a promising approach for training machine learning models on sensor networks, Internet of Things (IoT) devices, and other edge systems where no central server exists. While federated learning offers advantages such as preserving data privacy, it often suffers from non-independent and identically distributed (IID) data distributions across devices, which cause significant performance degradation. This issue is particularly severe when directly optimizing model parameters, because neural network training is inherently non-convex and standard convergence guarantees for convex optimization do not apply. Unlike existing decentralized FL methods that primarily operate in parameter space, we propose federated function-space alternating direction method of multipliers (FedF-ADMM). FedF-ADMM exploits the convexity of loss functionals within function space to derive alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM)-based update directions, which are subsequently projected onto the parameter space via knowledge distillation. We further introduce a stabilization coefficient to enhance robustness under severe non-IID settings and analyze its behavior from a control-theoretic perspective by interpreting it as a proportional-integral (PI) term. Experiments under challenging non-IID scenarios, including settings where each device has data from only a single label, demonstrate that FedF-ADMM achieves faster and more stable convergence than existing decentralized FL methods, while attaining higher accuracy and better consensus among devices.

</details>


### [799] [Skill-R1: Agent Skill Evolution via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09359)
*Yash Vishe,Rohan Surana,Xunyi Jiang,Zihan Huang,Xintong Li,Nikki Lijing Kuang,Tong Yu,Ryan A. Rossi,Jingbo Shang,Julian McAuley,Junda Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Skill-R1提出了一种基于强化学习的技能优化框架，通过训练轻量级技能生成器来迭代优化大语言模型的技能，无需更新任务模型本身，实现了低成本、模型无关的适应性改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能优化依赖提示工程或对齐任务LLM，成本高、模型特定且无法用于闭源模型。技能优化本质上是一个双层信用分配的递归问题，而现有方法缺乏对这种迭代优化过程的系统性处理。

Method: 提出Skill-R1框架，训练轻量级技能生成器（而非任务LLM），使其根据任务上下文、先前 rollout 和验证结果生成技能，指导冻结的任务LLM。引入双层组相对策略优化（Bi-level GRPO）目标，包含代内优势（比较同一技能下的rollout）和代间优势（评估跨代技能改进）。

Result: 在多个可验证奖励的基准上，Skill-R1一致优于无技能基线和标准GRPO，在复杂多步任务上改进尤为显著。

Conclusion: Skill-R1通过双层信用分配的强化学习实现了技能的方向性演化，为黑盒大语言模型提供了一种低成本、模型无关且有效的迭代优化方法。

Abstract: Agentic large language models often rely on skills, reusable natural language procedures that guide planning, action, and tool use. In practice, skills are typically improved through prompt engineering or by aligning the task LLM itself, which is costly, model-specific, and often infeasible for closed-source models. Skill optimization is not a one-step problem but a recurrent process with two coupled levels of credit assignment: a useful skill must improve rollout quality under current conditioning, while a useful revision must turn observed outcomes into a better skill for the next round. We propose Skill-R1, a reinforcement learning framework for instance-level recurrent skill optimization from verifiable rewards. Rather than updating the task LLM, Skill-R1 trains a lightweight skill generator that conditions on the task context, prior rollouts, and their verified outcomes to produce skills that steer a frozen task LLM. This preserves black-box compatibility with both open- and closed-source models while making adaptation substantially cheaper than model-level updates. Skill-R1 proceeds over multiple generations: at each step, the current skill induces rollouts whose verified outcomes are fed back to produce the next revision. To optimize this recurrent process, we introduce a bi-level group-relative policy optimization objective combining intra-generation and inter-generation advantages. The intra-generation term compares rollouts under shared skill conditioning, while the inter-generation term rewards revisions that improve behavior across successive generations. Together, these provide a principled objective for directional skill evolution rather than one-shot self-refinement. Empirically, Skill-R1 achieves consistent gains over no-skill baselines and standard GRPO across benchmarks with verifiable rewards, with particularly strong improvements on complex, multi-step tasks.

</details>


### [800] [Near-Optimal Last-Iterate Convergence for Zero-Sum Games with Bandit Feedback and Opponent Actions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09363)
*Soumita Hait,Ping Li,Haipeng Luo,Mengxiao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究博弈学习中的最后迭代收敛问题，证明在玩家能观察到对手动作的设定下，可以实现t^(-1/2)的高概率最后迭代收敛速度，优于仅有bandit反馈时的t^(-1/4)下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究表明在两人零和博弈的bandit反馈设定中，最后迭代收敛速度存在理论下界（t^(-1/3)期望或t^(-1/4)高概率），但在偏好学习等实际场景中，玩家不仅能观察到自身损失还能观察到对手动作，这种额外信息能否实现更快的最后迭代收敛是一个自然且重要的问题。

Method: 提出一种高效算法，通过求解估计的对数障碍正则化博弈来不频繁地更新策略。针对多臂老虎机分析框架无法直接推广到博弈场景的根本障碍，发展了一种全新的分析方法来克服这些困难。

Result: 证明在对手动作可观测的设定下，可以实现t^(-1/2)的高概率最后迭代收敛速度，优于bandit反馈设定的t^(-1/4)下界。实验表明该算法优于朴素基线和未利用对手动作反馈的先前方法。

Conclusion: 对手动作的可观测性能够显著提升博弈学习中的最后迭代收敛速度，这项结果也改进了作为特例的对偶老虎机问题的结论。

Abstract: Last-iterate convergence of learning dynamics in games has attracted significant recent attention. In two-player zero-sum games with bandit feedback, where only the loss of the selected action pair is observed, Fiegel et al. (2025) show a separation between average-iterate and last-iterate convergence in duality gap: while the optimal t^(-1/2) rate after t rounds is achievable for the former via standard no-regret algorithms, the latter cannot converge faster than t^(-1/3) in expectation or t^(-1/4) with high probability. However, in many practical settings, such as preference learning, the players observe not only their loss but also the opponent's action. This raises a natural question: can such additional information enable faster last-iterate convergence?
  We answer this question affirmatively, showing that t^(-1/2) last-iterate convergence is achievable with high probability in this setting, via an efficient algorithm that updates its strategy infrequently by solving an estimated log-barrier-regularized game. We identify fundamental obstacles preventing standard analysis for multi-armed bandits, the single-player case, from generalizing to games, and develop a novel analysis to overcome them. Experiments confirm that our algorithm indeed converges faster than naive baselines and prior methods that do not exploit opponent-action feedback. Finally, we note that our results also improve those for dueling bandits, a special case with skew-symmetric game matrices.

</details>


### [801] [Multi-scale Predictive Representations for Goal-conditioned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09364)
*Valliappan Chidambaram Adaikkappan,David Meger,Sai Rajeswar,Pietro Mazzaglia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Ms.PR框架，通过多尺度预测监督解决离线目标条件强化学习中表征发散问题，在稀疏奖励、轨迹拼接和极端噪声等挑战性场景下实现鲁棒的表征学习和SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线GCRL在稀疏奖励场景下，学习对齐状态和目标latents的表征时常出现表征发散（encoder漂移至低维、与目标无关的子空间），导致策略学习不稳定。作者认为智能体需要对环境有多尺度理解（从局部物理动力学到长程目标导向结构）才能解决此问题。

Method: 提出Ms.PR（Multi-scale Predictive Representation）框架，利用多尺度预测监督在潜在空间中强制实现目标导向的对齐，使表征同时捕捉局部动力学和长程目标导向结构。

Result: Ms.PR在视觉和状态基任务上均取得更优的表征质量和强性能。在轨迹拼接、极端噪声等现实挑战性数据场景下表现出卓越的鲁棒性，保持SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 多尺度预测监督是解决离线GCRL中表征发散问题的有效途径，能同时提升表征质量和策略学习稳定性，且对数据质量有极强鲁棒性。

Abstract: This paper investigates robust representation learning in offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL). Particularly in sparse reward scenarios, learning representations that align state and goal latents is a challenge that frequently culminates in representation divergence where the encoder drifts toward a low-dimensional, goal-agnostic subspace that destabilizes policy learning. We address this issue by showing that an agent must acquire a fundamental understanding of its environment across multiple scales, from local physical dynamics to long-horizon goal-directed structure. Building on this insight, we propose Ms.PR, a framework that leverages multi-scale predictive supervision to enforce goal-directed alignment within the latent space. We demonstrate that Ms.PR leads to improved representation quality and strong performance on both vision and state-based tasks. Furthermore, we show that our approach is exceptionally resilient under realistic, challenging data regimes, maintaining state-of-the-art performance across a wide variety of tasks, trajectory stitching scenarios, and extreme noise conditions.

</details>


### [802] [Learning-Augmented Scalable Linear Assignment Problem Optimization via Neural Dual Warm-Starts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09382)
*Ilay Yavlovich,Jad Agbaria,Muhamed Mhamed,Jose Yallouz,Nir Weinberger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种学习增强的框架，通过预测对偶变量来热启动经典线性分配问题求解器（如LAPJV），在保持最优性和最坏情况保证的同时实现加速，并设计了RowDualNet轻量架构避免O(N²)内存瓶颈，实验达到2倍以上加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典LAP求解器（匈牙利算法、LAPJV）时间复杂度为O(N³)，在大规模实例上成为瓶颈；而现有学习方法要么牺牲最优性，要么因内存限制难以扩展。目的是在保持最优解保证的前提下加速求解过程。

Method: 提出学习增强框架：1) 用神经网络（RowDualNet）预测对偶变量，热启动经典求解器；2) 设计降级回退机制，当学习建议不可靠时避免渐近性能退化；3) RowDualNet采用行独立架构，避免O(N²)内存瓶颈，支持N=16,384规模；4) 基于LP对偶性（Min-Trick）的构造性可行性保证机制，省去迭代投影。

Result: 该方法将LAPJV的搜索努力降低，在合成分布上实现超过2倍加速，在真实MOT跟踪数据集上加速超过1.25倍，在LPT运输数据集上加速超过1.5倍，且严格保持最优性，实现零样本泛化到真实任务。

Conclusion: 提出的学习增强框架能有效加速经典LAP求解器，同时保持最优性和最坏情况保证，RowDualNet架构解决了大规模应用的内存瓶颈，具有良好泛化能力。

Abstract: The Linear Assignment Problem (LAP) is a fundamental combinatorial optimization task with applications ranging from computer vision to logistics. Classical exact solvers such as the Hungarian and Jonker-Volgenant (LAPJV) algorithms guarantee optimality, but their cubic time complexity $\mathcal{O}(N^{3})$ becomes a bottleneck for large-scale instances. Recent learning-based approaches aim to replace these solvers with neural models, often sacrificing exactness or failing to scale due to memory constraints. We propose a learning-augmented framework that accelerates exact assignment solvers while maintaining optimality and worst-case guarantees. Our method predicts dual variables to warm-start a classical solver, with a fallback that prevents asymptotic runtime degradation when the learned advice is unreliable. We introduce RowDualNet, a lightweight row-independent architecture that avoids the $\mathcal{O}(N^{2})$ memory bottleneck of graph-based models, enabling neural warm-starting at large scale ($N=16{,}384$). Feasibility is ensured via a constructive mechanism based on LP duality (namely, the Min-Trick), eliminating costly iterative projection. Empirically, our approach reduces the search effort of LAPJV and achieves over $2{\times}$ speedups on challenging synthetic distributions, in addition to improving over $1.25{\times}$ and $1.5{\times}$ on real-world tracking (MOT) and transportation (LPT) datasets, respectively, while strictly maintaining full optimality, effectively yielding a robust zero-shot generalization to real-world tasks.

</details>


### [803] [D2ACE: Multi-Label Batch Selection Guided by Dual Dynamics and Adaptive Correlation Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09400)
*Bin Liu,Haoyu Peng,Zhijia Wei,Jiajing Zhang,Grigorios Tsoumakas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出D2ACE方法，通过双动态机制（分阶段伯努利混合采样+动态标签加权）和自适应相关性增强来改进深度多标签分类中的批次选择，实验表明优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有批次选择方法依赖单一指标评估实例重要性、使用静态标签权重，且显式利用标签相关性的方法受无关标签影响大、对局部标签分布不敏感。

Method: 分阶段伯努利混合采样平衡不确定性与噪声鲁棒硬度；动态标签权重根据当前指标统计重新校准标签优先级；局部上下文感知的相关性增强聚焦实例自适应依赖的相关标签。

Result: 在表格和图像基准上，D2ACE在各种深度MLC模型中优于现有批次选择方法，实现更强的预测性能和更高效的相关性建模。

Conclusion: D2ACE通过捕捉指标和标签级别的训练动态以及自适应相关性增强，有效解决了多标签分类中批次选择的现有问题。

Abstract: Batch selection is crucial for improving both training efficiency and predictive performance in deep multi-label classification (MLC). Existing batch selection methods typically rely on a single metric to assess instance importance and use static label weights to distinguish label significance, neglecting the dynamic evolution of metric utility and label significance during training. In addition, the method that explicitly exploits label correlations is largely affected by abundant irrelevant labels and insensitive to local label distributions. To address these issues, we propose D2ACE, a novel multi-label batch selection method guided by Dual Dynamics and Adaptive Correlation Enhancement. D2ACE explicitly captures metric and label-level training dynamics by combining stage-wise Bernoulli mixture sampling, which balances uncertainty and noise-resistant hardness, with dynamic label weighting to recalibrate label priorities at each epoch based on current metric statistics. Furthermore, D2ACE introduces a local context-aware correlation enhancement to focus on relevant labels with instance-adaptive dependencies. Extensive experiments on tabular and image benchmarks demonstrate that D2ACE outperforms existing batch selection approaches across various deep MLC models, achieving stronger predictive performance and more efficient correlation modeling.

</details>


### [804] [Sparsity Moves Computation: How FFN Architecture Reshapes Attention in Small Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09403)
*Gabriel Smithline,Chris Mascioli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现Transformer中FFN块的架构选择（如稀疏MoE）能将计算从FFN转移到注意力层，且这一重新分布主要由架构稀疏性驱动而非路由学习到的专门化。同时，GLU门控机制会扭曲任务相关的傅里叶结构，使其分散到分布式子空间中，降低神经元级可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Transformer FFN块内部架构选择（如稀疏MoE、GLU等）是否不仅影响自身，还会对模型中其他部分（如注意力层）的计算产生非局部影响。

Method: 在单层Transformer上训练数字加法（带进位）、模运算和直方图计数任务，比较密集FFN、GLU、MoE、MoE-GLU四种架构，通过消融实验、随机路由控制、窄FFN控制、参数匹配等分析计算分布变化。

Result: 稀疏MoE路由可将计算从FFN转移到注意力层，尤其在进位加法任务上效果显著；这种重新分布主要由稀疏性驱动（随机路由几乎匹配学习路由）；GLU的门控机制将傅里叶结构分散到分布式子空间，降低神经元级可解释性但保留结构化计算。

Conclusion: 局部FFN架构选择会对Transformer整体计算产生非局部影响，架构稀疏性比路由学习到的专门化更重要，GLU在保持计算能力的同时牺牲了神经元级可解释性。

Abstract: Architectural choices inside the Transformer feedforward network (FFN) block do not merely affect the block itself; they reshape the computations learned by the rest of the model. We study this effect in one-layer Transformers trained on digit addition with carry, modular arithmetic, and histogram counting. Comparing dense FFNs, gated linear units (GLUs), mixture-of-experts (MoE), and MoE-GLUs, we find that sparse MoE routing can shift computation from FFN to attention, with the strongest ablation-visible effect on carry-based addition. We decompose this redistribution into reduced per-token FFN capacity and sparse partitioning across experts. Critically, frozen random routing nearly matches learned routing, suggesting that redistribution is driven largely by architectural sparsity rather than router-learned specialization. As a secondary finding, GLU-style multiplicative gating rotates task-relevant Fourier structure out of the per-neuron basis and into distributed subspaces, making neuron-level interpretability less informative while preserving structured computation. We validate these conclusions with random-routing, narrow-FFN, and top-2 MoE controls, plus parameter-matching, activation-function, and width-scaling analyses. Together, these results show that local FFN design choices can have nonlocal consequences for Transformer computation.

</details>


### [805] [GravityGraphSAGE: Link Prediction in Directed Attributed Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09408)
*Riccardo Porcedda,Francesca Chiaromonte,Fabrizio Lillo,Andrea Vandin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Gravity-GraphSAGE（GG-SAGE）的图深度学习模型，通过引入重力启发的解码器改进GraphSAGE，专门用于有向图中的链接预测任务。实验表明，该模型在多个基准数据集上优于现有技术，且具有良好的可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有链接预测研究大多集中于无向图，且未充分利用节点属性信息。因此，作者希望填补有向图链接预测中缺乏有效图深度学习方法的空白。

Method: 提出GG-SAGE模型，基于GraphSAGE骨干网络，采用重力启发式解码器，将图神经网络与重力概念结合，实现有向图中的节点嵌入学习与链接预测。

Result: 在Cora、Citeseer、PubMed及16个真实网络数据集上测试，GG-SAGE在性能上全面超越现有最优的图深度学习链接预测方法。

Conclusion: GG-SAGE是首个将GraphSAGE用于有向链接预测的工作，且模型质量与图结构特征相关，具有较好的可扩展性，适用于复杂度递增的数据。

Abstract: Link prediction (inferring missing or future connections between nodes in a graph) is a fundamental problem in network science with widespread applications in, e.g., biological systems, recommender systems, finance and cybersecurity. The ability to accurately predict links has significant real-world applications, such as detecting fraudulent financial transactions or identifying drug-target interactions in biomedicine. Despite a rich literature, link prediction is still challenging, especially for graphs enriched with information on edges (direction) and nodes (attributes). In fact, research on link prediction, especially the one based on Graph Deep Learning (GDL), has mostly focused on undirected graphs, without fully leveraging node attributes. Here, we fill this gap by proposing Gravity-GraphSAGE (GG-SAGE), a modified version of GraphSAGE, a GDL model for node embeddings, composed of a gravity-inspired decoder. This implementation is the first example in the literature of a GraphSAGE backbone adopted for directed link prediction. Using the benchmark datasets Cora, Citeseer, PubMed and 16 real-world graphs from the online Netzschleuder repository, we show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art GDL link prediction techniques. Using further experimental evidence, we relate the quality of the output of our model with various characteristics of the graph, suggesting that our framework scales well when applied to data of increasing complexity.

</details>


### [806] [A Controlled Diagnostic Study of Hardware-Induced Distortions in Hardware-Aware Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09416)
*Yunxuan Fang,Xinhe Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出诊断框架，通过三种关键诊断指标（梯度期望一致性、有界梯度方差、非退化灵敏度）分析六类硬件非理想性，明确哪些偏差可通过硬件感知训练（HAT）补偿，哪些需要电路/架构层面解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有硬件感知训练（HAT）被广泛用于提升神经网络在非理想AI加速器（如模拟存算一体系统）上的鲁棒性，但并非所有硬件引起的偏差都能通过训练得到同等补偿，缺乏系统性的诊断方法来判断哪些非理想性可被训练缓解。

Method: 将硬件非理想性建模为前向算子的结构化扰动，分析六类代表性扰动（读取噪声、变异性、漂移、固定故障、IR压降、ADC离散化），提出三种关键诊断指标：梯度期望一致性、有界梯度方差、非退化灵敏度。

Result: 结果表明，可补偿与不可补偿的扰动之间存在明确分界线，有些扰动可通过HAT训练缓解，有些则持续破坏优化过程。

Conclusion: 为硬件-软件协同设计提供了实用指导，明确了哪些非理想性可在训练层面解决，哪些需要电路、架构或校准层面的缓解措施。

Abstract: Hardware-aware training (HAT) is widely used to improve the robustness of neural networks on non-ideal AI accelerators, such as analog in-memory computing (IMC) systems. However, not all hardware-induced distortions are equally compensable by training. This paper presents a diagnostic framework that models hardware non-idealities as structured perturbations of the forward operator and evaluates their compatibility with gradient-based optimization. We analyze six representative perturbation classes--read noise, variability, drift, stuck-at faults, IR-drop, and ADC discretization--and identify three key diagnostics: gradient expectation consistency, bounded gradient variance, and non-degenerate sensitivity. Our results show a clear separation between perturbations that can be compensated by HAT and those that consistently break optimization. This provides practical guidance for hardware-software co-design, clarifying which non-idealities can be addressed at the training level and which require circuit-, architecture-, or calibration-level mitigation. This study should be interpreted as a controlled empirical analysis under vanilla forward-perturbation HAT, rather than as a universal theory of hardware-aware training.

</details>
