In this work, we introduce \textsc{HiTaB}, a novel verification framework that exploits second-order smoothness through both the Hessian, $\nabla^2 f$, and its Lipschitz constant, $L_{\nabla^2 f}$. We further develop a unified hierarchy of zeroth-, first-, and second-order bounds, together with precise conditions under which higher-order approximations yield provable improvements. Our main technical contribution is a compositional procedure for efficiently bounding $L_{\nabla^2 f}$ in deep neural networks via layerwise propagation of curvature bounds. We extend the framework to both $\ell_2$- and $\ell_\infty$-constrained input sets and show how it can be integrated into branch-and-bound verification pipelines. To our knowledge, this is the first practical reachability analysis framework for smooth neural networks that systematically exploits Lipschitz continuity of curvature, leading to tighter and more informative safety certificates.

</details>


### [957] [Composing diffusion priors with explicit physical context via generative Gibbs sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10642)
*Weizhou Wang,Jonathan Weare,Aaron R. Dinner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GG-PA，一种无需重新训练即可将预训练扩散模型先验与显式物理上下文（如势能函数）结合的框架，通过增广状态空间上的吉布斯采样实现科学采样，在多种物理系统中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练扩散模型能提供强大的学习先验，但在科学采样中，目标分布往往依赖于物理上下文（如势能函数），而单一生成模型无法完全表征这些物理约束。现有方法需要重新训练或微调，成本高昂。因此需要一种无需重新训练即可组合学习先验与显式物理上下文的方法。

Method: 提出GG-PA框架，将学习到的部分先验与显式物理上下文组合为增广状态空间上的联合目标分布，推导出该联合分布的吉布斯采样器。理论上证明其在扩散时间趋近于零时渐近精确，在二次相互作用设置下有限扩散时间仍保持精确。引入跨扩散时间的副本交换机制加速混合。

Result: 在双阱系统、φ⁴格点模型和原子肽系统上的实验表明，GG-PA能使用部分先验（无需重新训练）恢复上下文导致的分布偏移以及相互作用系统中的涌现集体行为。

Conclusion: GG-PA是一种实用的方法，能够有效结合预训练生成先验与显式物理上下文进行科学采样。

Abstract: Pretrained diffusion models provide powerful learned priors, but in scientific sampling the target distribution often depends on physical context that is not fully represented by one generative model. We introduce Generative Gibbs for Physics-Aware Sampling (GG-PA), a training-free framework that formulates the composition of learned partial priors and explicit physical context as inference over a joint target distribution in an augmented state space. We derive a Gibbs sampler for this joint target, show that it is asymptotically exact as the diffusion time approaches zero, and prove that in settings with quadratic interactions it remains exact at finite diffusion times. We further introduce replica exchange over diffusion time to accelerate mixing. Experiments on a double-well system, a $φ^4$ lattice model, and atomistic peptide systems show that GG-PA recovers context-induced distribution shifts and emergent collective behavior in interacting systems using partial priors without retraining. These results demonstrate GG-PA as a practical approach for combining pretrained generative priors with explicit physical context.

</details>


### [958] [A Random-Matrix Criterion for Initializing Gated Recurrent Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10650)
*Tommaso Fioratti,Riccardo Marcaccioli,Francesco Casola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了循环神经网络中权重初始化的重要性，特别是针对"储备池计算"架构。作者推导了一个简单准则来估计关键初始化参数$g_c$，该准则能在混沌预测任务中很好地预测门控RNN储备池的最佳性能点，并可作为未来初始化方案的设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 权重初始化对深度学习至关重要，而在储备池计算中更为关键，因为固定储备池权重的初始化直接决定了动力学的丰富性、稳定性和记忆能力。作者希望找到一种简单准则来估计最优初始化点。

Method: 作者针对广泛类别的循环架构推导了一个简单准则来估计临界权重方差$g_c$，该准则基于无限宽极限下有序相与混沌相之间的相变临界点。

Result: 该准则能够紧密追踪门控RNN储备池在混沌预测任务上达到最佳性能时的增益值，验证了理论预测与实际性能峰值的一致性。

Conclusion: 提出的准则可以作为未来初始化方案的设计原则，帮助研究者更有效地初始化循环神经网络权重。

Abstract: Proper weight initialization prior to training has historically been one of the key factors that helped kick off the deep learning revolution. Initialization is even more crucial in "reservoir computing", where the weights of a readout layer are learned linearly while the reservoir weights are fixed and largely determine the richness, stability and memory of the resulting dynamics. In the infinite-width limit it has been shown that meaningful initializations are those sitting at an effective critical point of the randomly initialized model. The phase transition is controlled by the weight variance $g^2$ and separates an ordered phase from a chaotic one where information progressively degrades. Here we derive a simple criterion to estimate the critical $g_c$ for a broad class of recurrent architectures and we show that it closely tracks the gain at which a gated-RNN reservoir achieves peak performance on a chaotic forecasting task. Finally, we argue that our criterion can serve as a design principle for future initialization schemes.

</details>


### [959] [A Recursive Decomposition Framework for Causal Structure Learning in the Presence of Latent Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10651)
*Zheng Li,Feng Xie,Shenglan Nie,Xichen Guo,Ruxin Wang,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 DiCoLa 框架，将分治策略推广到存在隐变量的因果发现场景，通过递归分解与重构实现高效计算，并证明了框架的可靠性与完备性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于约束的因果发现方法在高维场景下因条件独立性检验而计算开销巨大，且多数分治框架假定因果充分性（无隐变量），无法处理含隐变量的实际场景。

Method: 提出 DiCoLa 递归分解框架：将全局学习任务递归分解为若干子问题，分别求解后通过精心设计的重构步骤整合子结果以恢复全局因果结构。

Result: 理论层面证明了框架的可靠性与完备性；实验上，在合成数据上显著提升了多种因果发现算法的计算效率，在真实数据集上验证了实际有效性。

Conclusion: 分治策略可以在理论上推广到存在隐变量的因果发现场景，DiCoLa 框架兼顾了计算效率与理论保证。

Abstract: Constraint-based causal discovery is widely used for learning causal structures, but heavy reliance on conditional independence (CI) testing makes it computationally expensive in high-dimensional settings. To mitigate this limitation, many divide-and-conquer frameworks have been proposed, but most assume causal sufficiency, i.e., no latent variables. In this paper, we show that divide-and-conquer strategies can be theoretically generalized beyond causal sufficiency to settings with latent variables. Specifically, we propose a recursive decomposition framework, termed DiCoLa, that enables divide-and-conquer causal discovery in the presence of latent variables. It recursively decomposes the global learning task into smaller subproblems and integrates their solutions through a principled reconstruction step to recover the global structure. We theoretically establish the soundness and completeness of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments on synthetic data demonstrate that our approach significantly improves computational efficiency across a range of causal discovery algorithms, while experiments on a real-world dataset further illustrate its practical effectiveness.

</details>


### [960] [Active Learning for Gaussian Process Regression Under Self-Induced Boltzmann Weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10654)
*Jixiang Qing,Henry Moss,Matthias Sachs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对自诱导玻尔兹曼分布下主动学习问题的高斯过程采集函数AB-SID-iVAR，无需估计配分函数，在理论和实验上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在势能面建模等计算化学问题中，目标函数自身诱导出玻尔兹曼分布，但该分布未知且配分函数难以计算，现有主动学习方法无法有效处理这种自加权分布下的学习问题。

Method: 提出AB-SID-iVAR，一种基于高斯过程的采集函数，以闭式形式近似难以处理的贝叶斯目标分布，避免配分函数估计；同时提出TS-SID-iVAR作为高方差蒙特卡洛变体。

Result: 理论上证明了终端预测误差以高概率趋于零，并给出了更紧的平均情况保证；在合成基准、真实势能面建模和药物发现任务中均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: AB-SID-iVAR有效解决了自诱导分布下的主动学习难题，兼具理论保障和实际优越性能，适用于离散和连续输入域。

Abstract: We consider the active learning problem where the goal is to learn an unknown function with low prediction error under an unknown Boltzmann distribution induced by the function itself. This self-induced weighting arises naturally in problems such as potential energy surface (PES) modeling in computational chemistry,
  yet poses unique challenges as the target distribution is unknown and its partition function is intractable. We propose \texttt{AB-SID-iVAR}, a Gaussian Process-based acquisition function that approximates the intractable Bayesian target distribution in closed form while avoiding partition function estimation, and is applicable to both discrete and continuous input domains. We also analyze a Thompson sampling alternative (\texttt{TS-SID-iVAR}) as a higher variance Monte Carlo variant. Despite the unknown target, under mild conditions, we establish that the terminal prediction error vanishes with high probability, and provide a tighter average-case guarantee. We demonstrate consistent improvements over existing approaches in this setting on synthetic benchmarks and real-world PES modeling and drug discovery tasks.

</details>


### [961] [BCJR-QAT: A Differentiable Relaxation of Trellis-Coded Weight Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10655)
*Venugopalan Iyengar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BCJR-QAT方法，用BCJR前向后向和积算法替代Viterbi argmax，实现网格编码量化（Trellis-coded quantization）的可微训练，在2-bit量化上超越QTIP-PTQ，并在Llama-3.2-1B上取得-0.084 PPL的改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前2-bit后训练量化（PTQ）的最优方法是QTIP（网格编码量化），但要进一步突破PTQ天花板需要量化感知训练（QAT）。然而，QAT在网格编码上受到非可微的Viterbi argmax的阻碍，无法进行梯度反向传播。

Method: 提出BCJR-QAT，用BCJR前向后向和积算法替代Viterbi argmax，引入温度参数T，产生软码字（等于网格路径上的Boltzmann期望），实现完全可微。贡献包括：(i) 融合Triton内核使BCJR在单消费级GPU上可行（6.57倍加速）；(ii) 定量漂移预算理论解释BCJR-QAT何时能逃离QTIP-PTQ的Voronoi盆地；(iii) 在Llama-3.2-1B 2-bit上使用端到端前向KL蒸馏的实证结果。

Result: 在Llama-3.2-1B的2-bit量化下，采用合适的调度（跳过高温阶段避免过冲），单层BCJR-QAT在WikiText-2上比QTIP-PTQ降低0.084 PPL，且多层叠加效果呈超可加性。

Conclusion: BCJR-QAT通过可微松弛成功将QAT引入网格编码量化，在2-bit低精度量化上取得了优于PTQ的结果，为低比特大模型量化提供了新的训练范式。

Abstract: Trellis-coded quantization sets the current 2-bit post-training frontier for LLMs (QTIP), but pushing below the PTQ ceiling requires quantization-aware training, and QAT on a trellis is obstructed by the non-differentiable Viterbi argmax. We introduce BCJR-QAT, a relaxation that replaces the argmax with the BCJR forward-backward sum-product algorithm at temperature $T$, producing a soft codeword equal to the Boltzmann expectation over trellis paths, exactly differentiable, recovering the hard QTIP code as $T \to 0$, and mathematically identical to the transfer-matrix computation for a 1D Ising-like spin chain. We contribute (i) a fused Triton kernel making BCJR tractable on a single consumer GPU ($6.57\times$ speedup, fp32 parity); (ii) a quantitative drift-budget theory of when BCJR-QAT can escape the QTIP-PTQ Voronoi basin, verified across four experiments; and (iii) a positive empirical result on Llama-3.2-1B at 2 bpw under end-to-end forward-KL distillation: with the right schedule (skip the high-$T$ phase to avoid an overshoot we diagnose), single-layer BCJR-QAT beats QTIP-PTQ by $\mathbf{-0.084}$ PPL on WikiText-2, and multi-layer compounding is super-additive.

</details>


### [962] [Why Zeroth-Order Adaptation May Forget Less: A Randomized Shaping Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10658)
*Yao Shu,Jian Mu,Zhongxiang Dai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文解释了零阶方法在持续学习中为何比一阶方法遗忘更少，提出局部随机梯度塑形分析，并设计了RISE算法将零阶塑形思想迁移到精确一阶梯度上以实现更好的稳定-可塑性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释零阶（ZO）方法在持续学习中比一阶（FO）方法遗忘更少这一反直觉现象——传统观点认为ZO只是带噪声的FO估计，无法解释其优势。

Method: 提出局部随机梯度塑形分析框架：有限差分暴露原始形状，范数匹配比较器控制期望平方适应范数；推导了ZO保留曲率的精确恒等式，证明ZO保留各向同性保留地板并收缩各向异性成分；进一步设计RISE算法，将校准的ZO塑形应用于块内精确FO梯度。

Result: ZO与FO之间的二次遗忘差距：当FO方向具有高于平均的保留曲率时，ZO按查询依赖的比例改善平均遗忘；块级分析分离了平均步损伤与中心化随机暴露，揭示了块对角曲率、跨块耦合和局部塑形诊断的作用。

Conclusion: 随机塑形可减少FO所支付的保留暴露代价，精确梯度消除有限差分ZO的平滑偏差，块级采样在一次梯度计算后提供多个局部塑形方向。

Abstract: Continual learning requires new-task adaptation without damaging previously acquired capabilities. Recent forward-pass and zeroth-order (ZO) results show that low-query adaptation may retain better than first-order (FO) descent, but the usual view of ZO as noisy FO estimation does not explain why. We give a local randomized gradient-shaping analysis: finite differences expose a raw shape that is mean-aligned with FO, while the norm-matched comparator fixes the expected squared adaptation norm. Under this controlled comparison, forgetting depends on how the adaptation shape exposes retention curvature. For norm-matched ZO, the expected shaped retention curvature obeys an exact identity that preserves the isotropic retention floor while contracting only the anisotropic component. Projecting this identity onto the incoming gradient yields the observable FO--ZO quadratic forgetting gap: ZO improves mean forgetting precisely when the FO direction has above-average retention curvature, by a query-dependent fraction of that curvature excess. A practical finite-query accounting separates the mean mechanism from one-batch sampling and smoothing perturbations. As an algorithmic transfer, RISE applies the calibrated ZO shape to exact FO gradients inside parameter blocks. Its target is a stability--plasticity tradeoff: randomized shaping may reduce the retention exposure paid by FO, exact gradients remove finite-smoothing bias from finite-difference ZO, and blockwise sampling supplies many local shaping directions after one gradient computation. The blockwise analysis separates mean-step damage from centered random exposure, showing how block-diagonal curvature, cross-block coupling, and local shaping diagnostics specify where this exact-gradient transfer is most likely to be visible.

</details>


### [963] [A Spectral Framework for Closed-Form Relative Density Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10668)
*Francis Bach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种闭式谱框架，用于线性参数化概率模型（包括未归一化和条件模型）中的相对对数密度估计，通过将KL散度表示为加权卡方散度的积分，并基于一阶和二阶特征矩导出显式谱公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统KL散度估计依赖优化方法（如逻辑回归），计算复杂且缺乏闭式解。本文旨在提供一种无需迭代优化的闭式谱方法，简化相对对数密度估计并保证收敛性。

Method: 将KL散度分解为加权卡方散度的积分，转化为最小二乘问题；利用一阶和二阶特征矩导出显式谱公式；扩展到一般f-散度；支持核化或神经网络特征学习。

Result: 在合成数据上，与基于优化的变分方法（逻辑回归、softmax回归）相比，所提闭式估计器表现竞争力，并证明了收敛性保证。

Conclusion: 该框架为线性参数化模型中的散度估计和对数密度势估计提供了高效、可扩展的闭式替代方案，适用于未归一化和条件模型。

Abstract: We propose a closed-form spectral framework for relative log-density estimation in linearly parameterized probabilistic models, including unnormalized and conditional models. This is achieved by representing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence as an integral of weighted chi-squared divergences, converting KL estimation into a family of least-squares problems. We derive an explicit spectral formula based only on first- and second-order feature moments, yielding closed-form estimators of both divergences and log-density potentials for fixed features. The framework extends to a broad class of f-divergences and can be combined with kernelization or feature learning with neural networks. We prove convergence guarantees for the resulting estimators and empirically compare them on synthetic data with optimization-based variational formulations, including logistic and softmax regression for normalized conditional models.

</details>


### [964] [Natural Policy Gradient as Doubly Smoothed Policy Iteration: A Bellman-Operator Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10671)
*Phalguni Nanda,Zaiwei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明自然策略梯度（NPG）可精确表示为策略迭代的平滑与平均形式，提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，统一了策略迭代、对偶平均策略迭代和NPG等方法，并证明了无需额外正则化或自适应步长的全局几何收敛性，迭代复杂度为O((1-γ)^{-1}log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示自然策略梯度算法与策略迭代之间的深层理论联系，建立统一的Bellman算子框架，从而为NPG等策略梯度方法提供严谨的收敛性分析，并降低对额外正则化或自适应步长的依赖。

Method: 提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，该框架通过对历史Q函数进行加权平均并施加正则化贪心步骤来生成策略；利用平滑Bellman算子的单调性和压缩性证明全局几何收敛；框架统一了策略迭代、对偶平均策略迭代和自然策略梯度等算法。

Result: 自然策略梯度和策略对偶平均方法达到ε-最优策略所需迭代复杂度为O((1-γ)^{-1}log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))；未正则化贪心情况（对偶平均策略迭代）证明有限步收敛；框架可扩展至线性函数逼近的折扣MDP和随机最短路径问题。

Conclusion: 自然策略梯度可被理解为策略迭代的一种平滑平均形式，所提出的DSPI框架为理解和分析此类算法提供了统一的理论基础，且收敛保证不依赖于MDP的修改或自适应步长。

Abstract: In this work, we show that natural policy gradient, a core algorithm in reinforcement learning, admits an exact formulation as a smoothed and averaged form of policy iteration. Specifically, we introduce doubly smoothed policy iteration (DSPI), a Bellman-operator framework in which each policy is obtained by applying a regularized greedy step to a weighted average of past $Q$-functions. DSPI includes policy iteration, dual-averaged policy iteration, natural policy gradient, and more general policy dual averaging methods as special cases. Using only monotonicity and contraction of smoothed Bellman operators, we prove distribution-free global geometric convergence of DSPI. Consequently, standard natural policy gradient and policy dual averaging achieve an iteration complexity of $\mathcal{O}((1-γ)^{-1}\log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))$ for computing an $ε$-optimal policy, without modifying the MDP, adding regularization beyond the mirror map inherent in the update, or using adaptive, trajectory-dependent stepsizes. For the unregularized greedy case, corresponding to dual-averaged policy iteration, we also prove finite termination. The same Bellman-operator framework further extends to discounted MDPs with linear function approximation and stochastic shortest path problems.

</details>


### [965] [Compander-Aligned Query Geometry for Quantized Zeroth-Order Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10673)
*Yao Shu,Zilin Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对低比特零阶优化中量化查询的几何失真问题，提出CAQ-ZO方法，通过将查询对齐到压缩器的均匀网格上（在φ变换空间中构造Rademacher模板），消除量化引起的残差通道，在NF4量化的Qwen/Llama微调中提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低比特前向评估是实现内存高效零阶适应的有前景路径，但量化后的ZO查询存在"网格跨度失配"问题：固定权重空间半径在不同量化胞元中会塌缩、跨越或错配，导致残差无法仅由码本预测。

Method: 将非均匀标量量化分解为φ⁻¹∘U∘φ，在φ(x)空间中构造单网格步长的Rademacher模板z±Δr，端点经φ⁻¹映射回原空间，并在z空间中更新参数，从而保证查询端点始终落在量化网格点上。

Result: 理论证明了网格跨度失配的存在，分解了端点舍入估计器的残差，给出平稳性界：普通离网查询保留Δ²/μ²残差通道，而CAQ-ZO使查询时残差精确为零。合成实验隔离验证了该通道，NF4 Qwen/Llama微调中CAQ-ZO提升训练后的NF4基线。

Conclusion: CAQ-ZO通过查询几何对齐有效消除了量化引起的端点舍入残差，在不改变量化器或评估预算的前提下提升了低比特零阶优化的性能。

Abstract: Low-bit forward evaluation is an attractive route to memory-efficient zeroth-order (ZO) adaptation: the optimizer needs only scalar losses, and the model can be queried near deployment precision. The obstacle is that a quantized ZO query is not a continuous finite difference followed by harmless storage rounding. The query chooses endpoints, the low-precision engine rounds them, and the loss difference is measured along the rounded chord. For nonuniform companding quantizers, this makes the codebook insufficient to predict ZO behavior: a fixed weight-space radius can collapse in dense cells, over-span sparse cells, or assign a rounded chord to an unrounded update direction. We identify the missing object as query geometry and model scalar nonuniform quantization as $Q = φ^{-1} \circ U \circ φ$. CAQ-ZO (Compander-Aligned Queries for Zeroth-Order Optimization) forms one-grid-step Rademacher stencils $z \pm Δr$ in $z = φ(x)$, maps endpoints back through $φ^{-1}$, and updates in $z$. Our theory proves the grid-span mismatch, decomposes endpoint-rounding estimator residuals, and gives stationarity bounds in which generic off-grid queries retain a $Δ^2/μ^2$ residual channel while CAQ-ZO makes the query-time residual exactly zero. Synthetic experiments isolate this channel, and matched NF4 Qwen/Llama fine-tuning shows that CAQ-ZO improves the trained NF4 baseline under the same quantizer and evaluation budget.

</details>


### [966] [Exact Unlearning from Proxies Induces Closeness Guarantees on Approximate Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10680)
*Virgile Dine,Teddy Furon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将机器遗忘直接与数据分布结构相联系的新范式，通过精确推断分布来提取遗忘信号，并在理论上证明了与理想重训练模型的KL散度界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法多局限于参数更新层面，缺乏对数据分布结构的深入理解，导致遗忘效果不佳。本文旨在建立遗忘与数据分布之间的直接联系。

Method: 通过精确推断数据分布来提取遗忘信号，在可验证的接纳准则下，推导出与理想重训练模型的KL散度理论界。

Result: 在三种遗忘场景下，该方法得到的分类器最接近理想重训练模型，优于现有竞争方法。

Conclusion: 将机器遗忘与数据分布结构直接关联的范式是有效的，理论界保证了方法的可靠性，实验结果验证了其优越性。

Abstract: This paper proposes a paradigm shift linking machine unlearning directly to the structure of the data distributions rather than a mere update of the neural network parameters. We show that inferring these distributions with precision enables distilling the exact unlearning signal induced by the modeling. Theoretical bounds on the Kullback-Leibler divergence from the ideal retrained model to our unlearned model, under verifiable admissibility criterion, reveal the soundness of our framework. This method is experimentally validated over three forgetting scenarios as reaching the closest classifier to the ideal retrained model when compared to competitors.

</details>


### [967] [Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10684)
*Xiao Tian,Jue Fan,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Zixuan Wang,Nancy F. Chen,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NASH框架，通过将目标效用函数分解为Shapley可信息分量并非线性聚合，显著提升了基于Shapley/semivalue的数据选择效果，且额外运行成本极低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明Data Shapley等数据选择方法有时效果不佳甚至不如随机选择，因此需要探究Shapley在哪些场景下有效，以及如何策略性地利用这些场景实现一致高效的数据选择。

Method: 提出NASH（Non-linear Aggregation of SHapley-informative components）框架：(1) 将目标效用函数（如验证准确率）分解为更简单的Shapley可信息分量函数；(2) 通过非线性聚合这些分量来优化数据选择目标。

Result: NASH显著提升了Shapley/semivalue-based数据选择的有效性，且仅需极少的额外运行成本。

Conclusion: 通过分解与非线性聚合策略，可以有效解决Shapley-based数据选择在实践中的不稳定性问题，实现高质量的数据子集选择。

Abstract: Data selection studies the problem of identifying high-quality subsets of training data. While some existing works have considered selecting the subset of data with top-$m$ Data Shapley or other semivalues as they account for the interaction among every subset of data, other works argue that Data Shapley can sometimes perform ineffectively in practice and select subsets that are no better than random. This raises the questions: (I) Are there certain "Shapley-informative" settings where Data Shapley consistently works well? (II) Can we strategically utilize these settings to select high-quality subsets consistently and efficiently? In this paper, we propose a novel data selection framework, NASH (Non-linear Aggregation of SHapley-informative components), which (I) decomposes the target utility function (e.g., validation accuracy) into simpler, Shapley-informative component functions, and selects data by optimizing an objective that (II) aggregates these components non-linearly. We demonstrate that NASH substantially boosts the effectiveness of Shapley/semivalue-based data selection with minimal additional runtime cost.

</details>


### [968] [The finite expression method for turbulent dynamics with high-order moment recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10687)
*Xingjian Xu,Di Qi,Chunmei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个两阶段数据驱动框架，结合符号回归（FEX）与生成模型，用于识别湍流动力系统的确定性动力学并预测高阶统计矩，实验证明能准确恢复交互项并预测五阶矩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 湍流动力系统具有非线性相互作用和随机效应，其高阶统计矩难以从数据中精确捕捉，现有方法在识别动力学和预测统计量方面存在不足。

Method: 第一阶段采用有限表达式方法（FEX）发现确定性动力学的闭式表达式；第二阶段引入生成模型学习残差随机分量，作为对第一阶段模型误差的精细修正。

Result: 在随机三体模型的多机制数值实验中，框架成功恢复了交互项和强迫项表达式，并准确预测了高达五阶的统计矩。

Conclusion: 该工作展示了将可解释的符号发现与数据驱动随机建模相结合在复杂湍流系统中的潜力。

Abstract: Turbulent dynamical systems are characterized by nonlinear interactions and stochastic effects that generate coupled statistical quantities, such as non-zero higher-order moments, which are difficult to capture from data with accuracy. We propose a two-stage data-driven modeling framework that combines symbolic regression with generative models to jointly identify the governing dynamics and predict their key statistical quantities. In Stage I of the framework, the Finite Expression Method (FEX) is adopted to discover closed-form expressions of the deterministic dynamics, recovering nonlinear interaction terms and external forcing without predefined libraries. In Stage II, generative models are introduced to learn the residual stochastic components as a refined correction to the model error from the Stage I approximation, enabling accurate characterization of higher-order statistics. Theoretical analysis establishes the consistency of the symbolic estimator and quantifies the estimation error in terms of data size and numerical discretization. The model performance is verified through detailed numerical experiments on the stochastic triad models across multiple regimes, demonstrating that the framework successfully recovers interaction terms and forcing expressions, and accurately predicts statistical moments up to order five. These results highlight the potential of integrating interpretable symbolic discovery with data-driven stochastic modeling for complex turbulent systems.

</details>


### [969] [DANCE: Detect and Classify Events in EEG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10688)
*Jarod Lévy,Hubert Banville,Jérémy Rapin,Jean-Remi King,Thomas Moreau,Stéphane d'Ascoli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DANCE，一种将神经解码转化为集合预测问题的深度学习框架，能够从原始未对齐信号中直接检测和分类事件，在10个不同类型的数据集上优于现有方法，并在癫痫监测任务中达到新SOTA，在BCI任务中匹配需要事件起始信息的模型精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统EEG解码依赖于已知的事件起始点对齐窗口，这在受控实验中可行，但在连续的真实世界监测中无法获得事件起始信息。作者希望开发一种无需事件起始对齐的端到端异步神经解码模型。

Method: DANCE将神经解码建模为集合预测问题，使用深度学习框架直接从原始未对齐信号中联合检测和分类事件，无需事件起始点的先验信息。

Result: 在10个不同类型事件（毫秒到分钟级）的数据集上，DANCE优于现有方法；在癫痫监测任务中达到新SOTA；在BCI任务中匹配需事件起始信息的模型精度。

Conclusion: 该单一架构在多种认知、临床和BCI任务上表现优异，标志着向端到端异步神经解码模型迈出了重要一步。

Abstract: Event identification in continuous neural recordings is a critical task in neuroscience. Decoding in EEG is dominated by classifying windows aligned to known event onsets. However, while available in controlled experiments, such onsets are absent in continuous real-world monitoring. Here, we introduce DANCE, a deep learning pipeline that frames neural decoding as a set-prediction problem and jointly detects and classifies events directly from raw, unaligned signals. Evaluated separately on ten datasets curated from the literature with a wide variety of event types (ranging from milliseconds to minutes in duration), our model outperforms existing methods on a broad range of cognitive, clinical and BCI tasks. This single architecture establishes a new state of the art in the competitive task of seizure monitoring and matches the accuracy of onset-informed models for BCI tasks. Overall, our method marks a step towards end-to-end asynchronous neural decoding models

</details>


### [970] [RelFlexformer: Efficient Attention 3D-Transformers for Integrable Relative Positional Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10706)
*Byeongchan Kim,Arijit Sehanobish,Avinava Dubey,Min-hwan Oh,Krzysztof Choromanski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RelFlexformers，一种基于非均匀傅里叶变换(NU-FFT)的高效3D Transformer架构，通过通用3D相对位置编码实现O(L log L)复杂度，适用于点云等非结构化3D场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高效的相对位置编码注意力机制多局限于结构化场景（如均匀网格），缺乏支持非结构化3D空间（如点云）中任意分布位置的高效通用方法。

Method: 利用非均匀傅里叶变换(NU-FFT)理论，将任意可积调制函数f的3D相对位置编码集成到注意力计算中，实现O(L log L)时间复杂度的高效注意力机制。

Result: 在大量3D数据集上的实证评估验证了NU-FFT驱动的注意力调制技术带来的质量提升。

Conclusion: RelFlexformers将现有的结构化高效RPE注意力方法推广到非结构化异构3D场景，为点云等任务提供了高效且高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: We present a new class of efficient attention mechanisms applying universal 3D Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) methods given by arbitrary integrable modulation functions $f$. They lead to the new class of 3D-Transformer models, called \textit{RelFlexformers}, flexibly integrating those RPEs, and characterized by the $O(L \log L)$ time complexity of the attention computation for the $L$-length input sequences. RelFlexformers builds on the theory of the Non-Uniform Fourier Transform (NU-FFT), naturally generalizing several existing efficient RPE-attention methods from structured settings with tokens homogeneously embedded in unweighted grids into general non-structured heterogeneous scenarios, where tokens' positions are arbitrarily distributed in the corresponding 3D spaces. As such, RelFlexformers can be applied in particular to model point clouds. Our extensive empirical evaluation on a large portfolio of 3D datasets confirms quality improvements provided by the NU-FFT-driven attention modulation techniques in the RelFlexformers.

</details>


### [971] [What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10716)
*Muheng Li,Jian Qian,Wenlong Mou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA)和Prefix-TEA两类估计器，解决训练时预算(m)远小于部署时预算(N)的不匹配问题，通过外推奖励分布上尾统计量，使得仅用少量rollout即可近似最优-of-N策略梯度，在指令跟随任务上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在部署时常用best-of-N策略（采样N个响应，选奖励最高的），但后训练阶段的目标（优化单个响应的平均奖励）与部署目标（优化奖励分布的上尾）不匹配。近期工作虽提出测试时感知目标，但都假设训练与部署使用相同的per-prompt rollout预算，这在实际中不现实（后训练需覆盖大量prompt，而部署可分配更多算力）。本文旨在解决这种预算不匹配问题。

Method: 在奖励尾部结构假设下，证明best-of-N目标策略梯度可以从小规模rollout组通过外推上尾统计量来近似。由此提出一族Tail-Extrapolated估计器：(1) TEA (Tail-Extrapolated Advantage)，一种直接估计器；(2) Prefix-TEA，基于矩抵消的固定阶去偏估计器。

Result: 在指令跟随任务上的实验表明，TEA和Prefix-TEA在不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集上，在各种训练和测试时预算设置下，均能显著提升best-of-N性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效弥合了训练与部署间预算差距，为实际场景下的大语言模型后训练提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed with test-time strategies: sample $N$ responses, score them with a reward model or verifier, and return the best. This deployment rule exposes a mismatch in post-training: standard objectives optimize the mean reward of a single response, whereas best-of-$N$ performance is governed by the upper tail of the reward distribution. Recent test-time-aware objectives partly address this mismatch, but typically assume that training can use the same per-prompt rollout budget as deployment, which is impractical when post-training must cover many prompts while deployment can allocate much larger per-prompt test-time compute. We study this budget-mismatch regime, where only $m\ll N$ per-prompt rollouts are available during training but the target objective is best-of-$N$ deployment. Under structural assumptions on the reward tails, we show that the policy gradient of the best-of-$N$ objective can be approximated from a much smaller rollout group by extrapolating upper-tail statistics. This yields a family of Tail-Extrapolated estimators for best-of-$N$-oriented post-training: a simple direct estimator, Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA), and a fixed-order debiased Prefix-TEA estimator based on moment cancellation. Experiments on instruction-following tasks show that TEA and Prefix-TEA improve best-of-$N$ performance across different language models, reward models and datasets under various training and test-time budget settings.

</details>


### [972] [On Improving Graph Neural Networks for QSAR by Pre-training on Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10722)
*Sam Money-Kyrle,Markus Dablander,Thierry Hanser,Stephane Werner,Charlotte M. Deane,Garrett M. Morris*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通过预训练图神经网络（GNN）预测扩展连接指纹（ECFP）来提升QSAR任务性能，在多数基准上表现优异，但在复杂数据集和分布外场景下表现有限，并系统分析了子结构数据泄露的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子GNN在药物发现QSAR研究中日益普及，但其是否优于经典分子特征化方法存在争议。作者旨在提出一种改进GNN性能的通用策略，并系统评估其有效性。

Method: 通过预训练GNN来预测ECFP指纹，然后在下游QSAR任务上进行微调；使用统计检验和挑战性分布外（OOD）数据拆分进行验证；分析了子结构级数据泄露对下游性能的影响。

Result: 在6个Biogen基准中的5个上，ECFP预训练GNN在所有基线方法中取得显著提升；但在更异构的数据集和复杂终点（如结合亲和力预测）上，预训练GNN在OOD设置下表现欠佳；存在预训练效果较弱的场景。

Conclusion: ECFP预训练能够提升GNN在多种实际相关QSAR任务上的OOD性能，但并非普适有效，尤其对复杂异构数据需谨慎使用。

Abstract: Molecular Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are increasingly common in drug discovery, particularly for Quantitative Structure-Activity Relationship (QSAR) studies; yet, their superiority compared to classical molecular featurisation approaches is disputed. We report a general strategy for improving GNNs for QSAR by pre-training to predict Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints (ECFP). We validate our approach with statistical tests and challenging out-of-distribution (OOD) splits. Across five out of six Biogen benchmarks, we observed a statistically significant improvement in standard performance metrics over all evaluated baselines when using ECFP pre-trained GNNs. However, for more heterogeneous datasets and more complex endpoints, such as binding affinity prediction, pre-trained GNNs underperformed in OOD settings. Importantly, we investigated the impact of substructure-level data leakage during pre-training on downstream performance. While we identified scenarios where pre-training on ECFPs was less effective, our findings show that ECFP-based pre-training can enhance downstream OOD performance on a diverse set of practically relevant QSAR tasks.

</details>


### [973] [Kernel-Gradient Drifting Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10727)
*Maria Esteban-Casadevall,Jorge Carrasco-Pollo,Max Welling,Jan-Willem van de Meent,Erik J. Bekkers,Floor Eijkelboom*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出核梯度漂移（kernel-gradient drifting），一种单步生成框架，用核本身诱导的方向替代固定欧几里得位移方向，在欧几里得、黎曼流形和离散数据上均实现无需蒸馏的最优单步生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有漂移模型（drifting models）依赖固定欧几里得位移方向，其理论主要限于高斯核；需要在更一般的数据类型（如流形、离散数据）上实现快速、高质量的单步生成。

Method: 将漂移重新表述为核梯度形式，使得漂移方向由核函数本身诱导；理论揭示其本质为核平滑后的数据分布与模型分布之间的分数差，并建立平滑KL散度下降的动力学解释；通过黎曼流形上的切向量和概率单纯形上的Fisher-Rao几何，将框架推广到非欧几何和离散数据。

Result: 在球面地理数据、启动子DNA和分子生成任务上，核梯度漂移无需蒸馏即可达到最先进的单步生成性能。

Conclusion: 核梯度漂移提供了一个统一的理论框架，将漂移模型从欧几里得高斯核扩展到一般核、黎曼流形和离散数据，实现了无需蒸馏的高质量单步生成。

Abstract: We propose kernel-gradient drifting, a one-step generative modeling framework that replaces the fixed Euclidean displacement direction in drifting models with directions induced by the kernel itself. Standard drifting is attractive because it enables fast, high-quality generation without distilling a large pretrained diffusion model, but its theory is currently understood mainly for Gaussian kernels, where the drift coincides with smoothed score matching and is identifiable. Our gradient-based reformulation exposes this score-based structure for general kernels: the resulting drift is the score difference between kernel-smoothed data and model distributions, yielding identifiability for characteristic kernels and a smoothed-KL descent interpretation of the drifting dynamics. Since kernel gradients are intrinsic tangent vectors, the same construction extends naturally to Riemannian manifolds and to discrete data via the Fisher-Rao geometry of the probability simplex. Across spherical geospatial data, promoter DNA and molecule generation, kernel-gradient drifting enables state-of-the-art one-step generation beyond the Euclidean setting without distillation.

</details>


### [974] [XQCfD: Accelerating Fast Actor-Critic Algorithms with Prior Data and Prior Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10734)
*Daniel Palenicek,Florian Vogt,Joe Watson,Ingmar Posner,Danica Kragic,Jan Peters*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出XQCfD算法，通过静态网络架构和预训练策略，有效利用演示数据提升强化学习样本效率，在稀疏奖励的复杂操作任务中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界的强化学习在线探索成本高昂，现有算法未能有效利用预训练策略来提升样本效率。

Method: 扩展XQC actor-critic，结合增强回放缓冲区、预训练策略和静态策略架构，避免快速遗忘初始强策略。

Result: 在Adroit、Robomimic和MimicGen基准的稀疏奖励复杂操作任务中达到SOTA性能，且更新数据比低，无需集成网络。

Conclusion: 静态网络架构因其更高熵预测，能够比标准网络架构更好地实现分布外策略改进，从而高效利用演示数据。

Abstract: For reinforcement learning in the real world online exploration is expensive A common practice in robotic reinforcement learning is to incorporate additional data to improve sample efficiency Expert demonstration data is often crucial for solving hard exploration tasks with sparse rewards While prior data is used to augment experience and pretrain models we show that the design of existing algorithms fails to achieve the sample efficiency that is possible in this setting due to a failure to use pretrained policies effectively We propose XQCfD which extends the sample-efficient XQC actor-critic to learn from demonstrations using augmented replay buffers pretrained policies and stationary policy architectures designed to avoid rapidly unlearning the strong initial policy like prior works We show our stationary network architecture enables policy improvement out-of-distribution better than standard network architectures due to its higher entropy predictions XQCfD achieves state of the art performance across a range of complex manipulation tasks with sparse rewards from the popular Adroit Robomimic and MimicGen benchmarks -- notably with a low update-to-data ratio and no ensemble networks

</details>


### [975] [AdaPaD: Adaptive Parallel Deflation for PEFT with Self-Correcting Rank Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10741)
*Barbara Su,Fangshuo Liao,Anastasios Kyrillidis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaPaD提出了一种自适应并行去偏方法，同时训练所有秩-1组件，具有自校正、提前学习和动态秩发现能力，在GLUE和SQuAD任务上达到或超越现有LoRA变体，同时平均减少30.7%的适配器参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA方法存在两大问题：一是逐序提取秩-1组件会导致前序误差永久冻结；二是联合优化低秩分解的理论保证仅描述整体更新而非单个秩-1方向。AdaPaD旨在解决这些缺陷。

Method: AdaPaD包含三个核心组件：1) 并行去偏训练——所有秩-1组件同时更新，每个工作器基于所有前驱组件的最新估计构建去偏目标；2) 提前学习——激活前的私有预训练；3) 按模块动态秩发现——基于重要性的增长策略，在共享预算耗尽前动态分配秩。

Result: 在GLUE基准上使用DeBERTaV3-base与自适应秩LoRA基线相当；在Qwen3-0.6B的SQuAD/SQuAD v2上与固定秩LoRA竞争力相当，同时适配器平均缩小30.7%。理论上证明了预热期后每个组件的误差呈指数衰减。

Conclusion: AdaPaD通过自校正机制使去偏误差随轮次收敛到零而非永久残留，并将秩分布从输入超参数变为输出结果，有效提升了LoRA微调的性能-效率权衡。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models with LoRA requires choosing a rank r before training starts. Existing approaches either extract rank-1 components sequentially, freezing each component's error permanently into every subsequent residual, or optimize the full low-rank factorization jointly with guarantees that describe only the joint update, not individual rank-1 directions. We present AdaPaD (Adaptive Parallel Deflation), which trains all rank-1 components simultaneously: each worker refines its component against a deflation target built from the latest estimates of all predecessors, and as those estimates improve, the targets improve too. We call this property self-correction: deflation errors converge to zero over rounds rather than persisting as fixed residuals. On top of this backbone, AdaPaD adds advance learning (private pre-training before activation) and per-module dynamic rank discovery (importance-based growth until a shared budget is exhausted), making the rank distribution an output rather than an input. We prove that every component's error decays exponentially after a warm-up period, with a generalization bound that splits into a vanishing algorithmic term and an irreducible statistical floor. Empirically, AdaPaD is competitive with adaptive-rank LoRA baselines on GLUE with DeBERTaV3-base at matched parameter budgets, and competitive with fixed-rank LoRA on Qwen3-0.6B SQuAD/SQuAD v2 while deploying an adapter that is on average 30.7% smaller.

</details>


### [976] [Provable Sparse Inversion and Token Relabel Enhanced One-shot Federated Learning with ViTs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10748)
*Li Shen,Xiaolei Hao,Qinglun Li,Xiaochun Cao,Zhifeng Hao,Xun Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FedMITR框架，通过稀疏模型反转和令牌重标注解决单轮联邦学习在极端非IID场景下的语义对齐问题，在单轮通信中实现更优的全局模型训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据自由方法在极端非IID设置下生成的低质量数据存在严重的语义错位问题，阻碍了单轮联邦学习的效果。

Method: 1) 稀疏模型反转：选择性反转语义前景，停止无信息背景的反转；2) 令牌重标注：高信息密度块用伪标签，低信息密度块用集成模型重标注进行鲁棒蒸馏。

Result: 实验表明FedMITR在各种设置下显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 理论分析证明稀疏模型反转消除梯度不稳定性，令牌重标注降低梯度方差，共同保证更紧的泛化界。

Abstract: One-Shot Federated Learning, where a central server learns a global model in a single communication round, has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, under extremely non-IID settings, existing data-free methods often generate low-quality data that suffers from severe semantic misalignment with ground-truth labels. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel Federated Model Inversion and Token Relabel (FedMITR) framework, which trains the global model by fully exploiting all patches of synthetic images. Specifically, FedMITR employs sparse model inversion during data generation, selectively inverting semantic foregrounds while halting the inversion of uninformative backgrounds. To address semantically meaningless tokens that hinder ViT predictions, we implement a differentiated strategy: patches with high information density utilize generated pseudo-labels, while patches with low information density are relabeled via ensemble models for robust distillation. Theoretically, our analysis based on algorithmic stability reveals that Sparse Model Inversion eliminates gradient instability arising from background noise, while Token Relabel effectively reduces gradient variance, collectively guaranteeing a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, extensive experimental results demonstrate that FedMITR substantially outperforms existing baselines under various settings.

</details>


### [977] [DynaMiCS: Fine-tuning LLMs with Performance Constraints using Dynamic Mixtures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10770)
*Eleonora Gualdoni,Sonia Laguna,Louis Bethune,Joao Monteiro,Pierre Ablin,Marco Cuturi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DynaMiCS，一种将多领域微调转化为约束优化问题的动态混合优化器，通过短时领域探测估计跨领域影响矩阵，计算最优混合权重，在提升目标领域性能的同时约束领域损失不超基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据混合策略依赖固定启发式或自适应规则，无法显式约束通用知识、指令遵循、安全评估等受限领域的能力保持，需要一种能显式处理约束的优化方法。

Method: 将多领域微调建模为约束优化问题；每次更新时进行短时领域特定探测，估计局部跨领域效应的斜率矩阵；基于该矩阵在概率单纯形上优化混合权重，在提升目标领域性能的同时约束领域损失低于参考水平。

Result: 在多种多领域微调场景下，DynaMiCS相比固定混合基线实现了更强的目标领域提升和更高的约束满足率，且计算成本更低，无需参考模型、逐样本评分或手动调参。

Conclusion: DynaMiCS是一种高效、无需人工干预的多领域微调动态混合方法，能显式平衡目标领域提升与受限领域保持。

Abstract: Multi-domain fine-tuning of large language models requires improving performance on target domains while preserving performance on constrained domains, such as general knowledge, instruction following, or safety evaluations. Existing data mixing strategies rely on fixed heuristics or adaptive rules that cannot explicitly enforce preservation of such capabilities. We propose DynaMiCS, a dynamic mixture optimizer that casts multi-domain fine-tuning as a constrained optimization problem. At each update, DynaMiCS performs short domain-specific probing runs to estimate a slope matrix of local cross-domain effects, capturing how training on each fine-tuning dataset affects each evaluation domain. These estimates are then used to compute mixture weights through optimization over the probability simplex, with the objective of improving target-domain performance while keeping constrained-domain losses below reference levels. Across multi-domain fine-tuning scenarios with varying numbers of target and constrained domains, DynaMiCS achieves stronger target-domain improvements and higher constraint satisfaction than fixed-mixture baselines, at lower computational cost and without reference models, per-example scoring, or manually tuned mixture weights.

</details>


### [978] [Locking Pretrained Weights via Deep Low-Rank Residual Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10777)
*Keitaro Sakamoto,Pierre Ablin,Federico Danieli,Marco Cuturi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DLR-Lock方法，通过用深度低秩残差网络（DLR-Net）替换预训练MLP，利用自动微分的推理-训练不对称性作为防御手段，防止模型被未经授权地微调或修改，同时保持原始模型能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放权重语言模型的权重共享带来了安全和滥用风险（如未经授权的修改和恶意用途），而现有简单防御方法容易被自适应攻击者逆向或绕过，需要一种更鲁棒的防御机制。

Method: 提出DLR-Lock方法：将模型中的每个预训练MLP替换为参数数量相当的深度低秩残差网络（DLR-Net），利用自动微分在推理和前向传播时开销小、但在反向传播时激活内存随深度线性增长的特性，造成训练/微调时巨大的内存和计算开销，从而阻止未经授权的微调。

Result: 验证了DLR-Lock能够有效抵御具有完全防御知识的自适应攻击者，同时保持了原始模型的能力。在大语言模型上的实验证实了这些效果。

Conclusion: 利用推理-训练不对称性是一种新颖且有效的防御方向，DLR-Lock在不降低模型原始性能的前提下，显著增加了攻击者微调模型的代价，为开放权重模型的保护提供了新思路。

Abstract: The quality of open-weight language models has dramatically improved in recent years. Sharing weights greatly facilitates model adoption by enabling their use across diverse hardware and software platforms. They also allow for more open research and testing, to the extent that users can use them as checkpoints, fine-tune them according to their needs, and potentially redistribute them. In some cases, however, concerns on modifying these weights towards unauthorized uses may outweigh the pros of giving users such a freedom. Defending against such adaptation is non-trivial: since an adaptive attacker can observe all weights and architectures by definition, they can reverse simple structural defenses, and use optimization to defeat the simplest locking mechanisms. In this work, we exploit the inference-training asymmetry of automatic differentiation as a novel defense axis. We propose DLR-Lock, a method where the purveyor of the model purposely replaces each pretrained MLP in their model with a deep low-rank residual network (DLR-Net) of comparable parameter count, forcing activation memory that grows linearly with depth during backpropagation. DLR-Nets are efficiently trained via module-wise distillation. We show that, beyond this memory overhead, DLR-Lock results in architectural mismatches that complicate the optimization landscape of standard fine-tuning, and a backward pass that incurs disproportionately more overhead than the forward pass. Our defense succeeds in withstanding adaptive attackers with full knowledge of the defense strategy while preserving the original model's capabilities. Experiments on LLM validate these claims.

</details>


### [979] [MASS-DPO: Multi-negative Active Sample Selection for Direct Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10784)
*Rohan Surana,Xintong Li,Sheldon Yu,Yiran Jenny Shen,Chuhan Wang,Tong Yu,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Jingbo Shang,Julian McAuley,Junda Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MASS-DPO提出了一种基于Fisher信息的目标函数，用于在Plackett-Luce模型下选择具有互补信息的多负样本子集，从而在减少冗余的同时保持对齐质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PL模型下的多负样本偏好优化（如DPO扩展）虽然利用多个负响应信号，但负样本池过大导致计算成本高，且许多候选样本梯度冗余，对策略更新贡献相似。

Method: 提出MASS-DPO，基于PL模型的Fisher信息设计目标函数，通过log-determinant准则选择信息互补、梯度方向差异大的负样本子集，替代完整负样本池。

Result: 在推荐、多选QA等4个基准和3个模型族上，MASS-DPO在准确性、Recall/NDCG、基于边界的优化动态方面达到或超过现有方法，且使用更少的负样本实现更强的对齐。

Conclusion: 通过信息论驱动的主动采样策略，高效选择紧凑且富有信息的负样本子集，有效降低计算成本并提升对齐效果。

Abstract: Multi-negative preference optimization under the Plackett--Luce (PL) model extends Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) by leveraging comparative signals across one preferred and multiple rejected responses. However, optimizing over large negative pools is costly, and many candidates contribute redundant gradients due to their similar effects on policy updates. We introduce MASS-DPO, a multi-negative active sample selection method that derives a PL-specific Fisher-information objective for selecting compact, informative negative subsets within each prompt. The resulting log-determinant objective selects negatives that contribute complementary information for policy updates, yielding compact subsets that retain the full pool's information while reducing redundancy. In practice, this favors negatives whose gradients cover different update directions, reducing redundant signal from near-duplicate candidates while preserving the most useful training information. Across four benchmarks spanning recommendation and multiple-choice QA and three model families, MASS-DPO consistently exceeds or matches existing methods in accuracy, improves Recall/NDCG and margin-based optimization dynamics, and delivers stronger alignment with substantially fewer negatives.

</details>


### [980] [Elucidating Representation Degradation Problem in Diffusion Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10790)
*Zhipeng Yao,Dazhou Li,Zitong Zhang,Durude Mahee,Fan Zhu,Wenbin Zhang,Xinwei He,Yeying Jin,Rui Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现扩散模型训练中存在“表征退化”问题：高噪声下模型输出结构失真。通过NTK谱弱化和低秩行为分析，提出ERD框架动态重分配优化资源，加速收敛并提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型训练效率低下，存在由噪声水平升高导致的表征退化问题——模型输出出现渐进式结构失真，影响训练稳定性和生成质量。

Method: 提出Elucidated Representation Diffusion (ERD)——一种即插即用框架，根据有效可恢复性动态重分配优化努力，稳定表征学习且无需外部监督。

Result: 加速收敛；在多种扩散骨干网络上取得强实证表现。

Conclusion: ERD通过动态优化资源分配缓解了表征退化问题，有效提升扩散模型的训练效率和生成质量。

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success, yet their training remains inefficient due to a severe optimization bottleneck, which we term Representation Degradation. As noise levels increase, the outputs of the trained model exhibit progressive structural distortion, which can destabilize training and impair generation quality. Our analysis suggests that this instability is driven by mismatched target recoverability, which is associated with Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) spectral weakening and effective low-rank behavior. To address this, we propose Elucidated Representation Diffusion (ERD), a plug-and-play framework that dynamically reallocates optimization effort according to effective recoverability. By stabilizing representation learning without external supervision, ERD accelerates convergence and achieves strong empirical performance across diffusion backbones.

</details>


### [981] [ConQuR: Corner Aligned Activation Quantization via Optimized Rotations for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10793)
*Chayne Thrash,Ali Abbasi,Soheil Kolouri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种轻量级后训练旋转校准方法，通过学习正交旋转使激活值分布更均匀，从而减少低比特激活量化误差，避免昂贵的端到端训练和激活存储开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型内存占用大、推理成本高，权重-激活量化可降低这些成本，但低比特激活量化因存在异常值导致量化误差大。现有基于旋转的方法要么需要昂贵的端到端训练，要么依赖存储的激活语料，产生大量计算或存储开销。

Method: 提出轻量级后训练旋转校准方法：1）学习正交旋转，将归一化激活值与内接超立方体的角对齐，使激活能量在各维度均匀分布；2）通过正交Procrustes问题实现高效闭式解更新，避免梯度优化；3）引入在线校准过程，随校准样本处理更新旋转矩阵，无需存储激活数据。

Result: 在Llama-2和Llama-3系列（3B到70B参数）上实验，困惑度基准和常识推理任务上取得有竞争力或更好的性能，同时避免了昂贵的端到端训练和大量离线激活存储。

Conclusion: 该方法有效降低了低比特激活量化的误差，在性能和效率之间取得良好平衡，为LLM低成本部署提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are costly to deploy due to their large memory footprint and high inference cost. Weight-activation quantization can reduce these costs, but low-bit activation quantization remains difficult because activation outliers induce large quantization error. Recent rotation-based methods address this by applying orthogonal transformations that redistribute activation magnitude across dimensions, but existing approaches either require expensive end-to-end rotation training or rely on stored activation corpora, introducing significant compute or storage overhead. We propose a lightweight post-training rotation calibration method for LLM activation quantization. Our method learns orthogonal rotations that align normalized activations with the corners of an inscribed hypercube, encouraging activation energy to be distributed more evenly across dimensions. This objective admits an efficient closed-form update via the orthogonal Procrustes problem, avoiding gradient-based optimization over the orthogonal group. We further introduce an online calibration procedure that updates rotations as calibration samples are processed, eliminating the need to store activations on disk and allowing rotations to adapt to quantized activation distributions during calibration. Experiments on Llama-2 and Llama-3 models from 3B to 70B parameters show that our method achieves competitive or improved performance across perplexity benchmarks and common sense reasoning tasks while avoiding both costly end-to-end training and large offline activation storage.

</details>


### [982] [Muown: Row-Norm Control for Muon Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10797)
*Kai Lion,Florian Hübler,Bingcong Li,Antonio Orvieto,Niao He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Muown 是 Muon 优化器的改进版本，通过将行大小向量作为显式优化变量来处理权重矩阵谱范数漂移问题，在 GPT 风格预训练中（124M-2.7B 参数）相比 Muon、SOAP、AdamW 和 Lion 实现了更好的困惑度，且对学习率和权重衰减更鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon 优化器在大规模语言模型预训练中的表现对权重衰减高度敏感，且没有解耦权重衰减时，权重矩阵的谱范数会随着训练向上漂移。作者希望通过分析谱范数漂移的根本原因，提出一种改进方法来解决这一问题，从而提高优化器的性能和鲁棒性。

Method: 将权重矩阵的谱范数分解为行大小因子和行一致性因子，发现前者是 Muon 下谱范数漂移的主要驱动因素。基于此，提出 Muown：将行大小向量作为显式优化变量，在其上使用由分解导出的 ℓ∞ 几何进行更新，而对剩余的方向分量保持 Muon 不变。理论证明了 Muown 在确定性和随机性设置下都能达到最优非凸收敛速率。

Result: 在 124M 到 2.7B 参数的 GPT 风格模型上对 FineWeb-Edu 进行预训练，Muown 在困惑度指标上优于 Muon、SOAP、AdamW 和 Lion。此外，Muown 拓宽了接近最优学习率的平台区域，降低了对权重衰减的敏感性，避免了谱范数漂移，且适当分片后步骤时间开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: Muown 作为 Muon 的即插即用替代方案，通过显式处理行大小向量的更新，有效解决了谱范数漂移问题，提升了大语言模型预训练的性能和稳定性，同时保持了较低的计算开销。

Abstract: Muon has emerged as a strong competitor to AdamW for language model pre-training, yet its behavior at scale is sensitive to weight decay. Recent work has observed that, for Muon without decoupled weight decay, the spectral norm of weight matrices drifts upward over training. Through a decomposition of the spectral norm into a row-magnitude factor and a row-coherence factor, we identify the former as the empirical driver of this drift under Muon, while the latter remains well-behaved along the trajectory. Motivated by this diagnosis, we introduce Muown, a drop-in replacement for Muon that treats the row-magnitude vector as an explicit optimizer variable, updating it under the $\ell_\infty$ geometry induced by the decomposition, while applying Muon unchanged to the remaining direction component. We prove that Muown attains the optimal non-convex rates in both deterministic and stochastic regimes under a dual norm aligned with the underlying geometries and with a stochastic noise coefficient that empirically remains below that of Muon throughout training. Across GPT-style pre-training on FineWeb-Edu with model sizes from 124M up to 2.7B parameters, Muown improves perplexity over Muon, SOAP, AdamW, and Lion. It also widens the plateau of near-optimal learning rates across model scales, reduces sensitivity to weight decay, and avoids the spectral norm drift at negligible step-time overhead when appropriately sharded.

</details>


### [983] [The Last Word Often Wins: A Format Confound in Chain-of-Thought Corruption Studies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10799)
*Gabriel Garcia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了腐败研究（corruption studies）在评估思维链（CoT）忠实性时存在系统性混淆：对于以显式答案语句结尾的链，腐败检测到的是答案文本出现的位置，而非计算发生的位置。通过格式消融实验、冲突答案实验和生成时刻探测等多重证据，证明了这一混淆的存在，并提出三前提协议作为最低标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CoT忠实性评估方法（腐败研究）可能因链的格式（显式答案语句结尾）而产生系统性偏差，将"答案出现的位置"误认为"计算发生的位置"，需要识别并量化这一混淆，提出改进方案。

Method: 通过多种实验方法：（1）数据集内格式消融（去除答案语句，保留推理内容）；（2）冲突答案实验（测量模型跟随错误答案的倾向）；（3）生成时刻探测（探针检测答案是否早期确定）；（4）跨尺度（3B-32B）和跨数据集（GSM8K、MATH）验证。

Result: （1）格式消融使后缀敏感性下降约19倍（GSM8K, 3B）； （2）冲突答案实验中，7B模型CC准确率接近零（≤0.02），3B-7B跟随错误率0.63-1.00，32B降至~0.01； （3）生成时刻探针显示答案早期确定率<5%；（4）格式效应持续至14B，32B趋近于零。

Conclusion: 腐败研究存在系统性混淆，将答案文本出现位置误认为计算发生位置。提出三前提协议（仅问题对照、格式刻画、全位置扫描）作为腐败忠实性研究的最低标准。

Abstract: Corruption studies, the primary tool for evaluating chain-of-thought (CoT) faithfulness, identify which chain positions are "computationally important" by measuring accuracy when steps are replaced with errors. We identify a systematic confound: for chains with explicit terminal answer statements, the dominant format in standard benchmarks, corruption studies detect where the answer text appears, not where computation occurs.
  A within-dataset format ablation provides the key evidence: on standard GSM8K chains ending with "the answer is X," removing only the answer statement, preserving all reasoning, collapses suffix sensitivity ~19x at 3B (N=300, p=0.022). Conflicting-answer experiments quantify the causal mechanism: at 7B, CC accuracy drops to near-zero (<=0.02) across five architecture families; the followed-wrong rate spans 0.63-1.00 at 3B-7B and attenuates at larger scales (0.300 at Phi-4-14B, ~0.01 at 32B). A within-stable 7B replication (9.3x attenuation, N=76, p=7.8e-3; Qwen3-8B N=299, p=0.004) provides converging evidence, and the pattern replicates on MATH (DeepSeek-R1-7B: 10.9x suffix-survival recovery). On chains without answer suffixes the same protocol identifies the prefix as load-bearing (Delta=-0.77, p<10^-12).
  Generation-time probes confirm a dissociation: the answer is not early-determined during generation (early commitment <5%), yet at consumption time model outputs systematically follow the explicit answer text. The format-determination effect persists through 14B (8.5x ratio, p=0.001) and converges toward zero at 32B. We propose a three-prerequisite protocol (question-only control, format characterization, all-position sweep) as a minimum standard for corruption-based faithfulness studies.

</details>


### [984] [Mistake-Bounded Language Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10809)
*Jon Kleinberg,Charlotte Peale,Omer Reingold*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"错误有界生成"框架，将语言生成的学习目标从最终一致性转向最小化累积错误输出。作者建立了到"从正确演示中学习"的归约，为有限类提供了同时实现最优最后错误时间和错误界的算法，证明了无限流情况下对数错误与收敛保证之间存在根本性权衡，并将框架扩展到含噪对抗场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言生成极限学习工作仅关注最终一致性（最后一次错误的时间），忽视了学习过程中累积产生的无效输出误差。作者希望解决这一问题，将优化目标从"何时不再犯错"转向"总共犯了多少错"。

Method: 1) 形式化定义"错误有界生成"问题；2) 建立到"从正确演示中学习"(LCD)框架的归约；3) 对有限语言类设计算法同时优化最后错误时间和错误界；4) 对可数无限语言流证明对数错误与收敛保证的权衡；5) 扩展框架处理噪声对抗环境。

Result: 1) 有限类算法实现最优最后错误时间 Cdim(L) 和错误界 ⌊log₂|L|⌋；2) 无限流场景下，对数错误 O(log i) 与现有收敛保证不可兼得；3) 噪声场景下错误界随对抗次优性缩放。

Conclusion: 本文提出的错误有界生成框架弥补了现有语言生成极限学习对累积误差忽视的缺陷，揭示了不同场景下错误界与收敛性之间的基本权衡，为设计更实用的语言生成算法提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We investigate the learning task of language generation in the limit, but shift focus from the traditional time-of-last-mistake metric of a generator's success to a new notion of "mistake-bounded generation." While existing results for language generation in the limit focus on guaranteeing eventual consistency, they are blind to the cumulative error incurred during the learning process. We address this by shifting the goal to minimizing the total number of invalid elements output by a generation algorithm. We establish a formal reduction to the Learning from Correct Demonstrations framework of Joshi et al. (2025), enabling a general recipe for deriving mistake bounds via weighted update rules. For finite classes, we provide an algorithm that simultaneously achieves an optimal last-mistake time of $\mathsf{Cdim}(L)$ and a mistake bound of $\lfloor \log_2 |L| \rfloor$, whereas for the non-uniform setting of countably infinite streams of languages, we prove a fundamental trade-off: achieving logarithmic mistakes $O(\log i)$ necessarily precludes convergence guarantees established in prior work. Finally, we show that our framework can be extended to accommodate noisy adversaries and guarantee mistake bounds that scale with the adversary's suboptimality.

</details>


### [985] [Likelihood scoring for continuations of mathematical text: a self-supervised benchmark with tests for shortcut vulnerabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10810)
*Daniel Ranard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自动生成的基准测试，用于预测技术论文中的隐藏文本（特别是方程后缀）。通过让模型生成预测字符串Z，并利用评分器计算有无Z条件下目标Y的下一词概率，以无标签方式评估Z是否传递了有用信息。实验表明，GPT-5.5等模型的预测显著优于上下文控制，且能区分不同模型家族和推理设置，但被微调评分器控制后，GPT-5.4 nano无法超越。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上评估模型对技术论文中隐藏文本的预测能力需要人工标注，成本高且难以扩展。本文旨在设计一种无需人工标签的自动化基准，能够衡量模型生成的预测是否真正传递了关于隐藏延续的有用信息，并暴露潜在的捷径（shortcut）漏洞。

Method: 构建方程后缀预测基准：论文提供可见上下文X和隐藏延续Y，模型生成预测字符串Z。通过一个独立的评分器（如Qwen3-8B、Kimi K2.6）分别计算条件于Z和不条件于Z时Y的下一词概率，评估Z的信息传递量。控制组包括：利用最近上下文而非预测作为Z，以及微调评分器使其仅基于上下文而非Z来预测Y，以检测Z是否只是“提示”了评分器而非做出真正有用的预测。

Result: 在138篇物理/数学论文的1363个方程延续上，GPT-5.5、Opus 4.7、GPT-5.4 nano的预测在两种评分器下均优于上下文控制，且能区分模型家族和推理努力设置。GPT-5.5的预测在强控制（微调评分器）下仍表现优异，而GPT-5.4 nano无法超越该控制。更长的散文/TeX延续也显示出正向但噪声较大的提升，主要集中在目标开头附近。

Conclusion: 跨模型对数似然评分可作为静态基准，用于评估模型生成预测的能力，并探测潜在的捷径漏洞。该方法可在强化学习或模型选择优化之前应用，以识别模型是否真正理解内容而非利用评分器的偏见。

Abstract: We introduce an automatically generated benchmark for predicting hidden text in technical papers. A paper supplies visible context $X$ and a hidden continuation $Y$; the evaluated model writes an auxiliary forecast string $Z$, and a separate scorer assigns next-token probability to $Y$ both with and without conditioning on $Z$. This gives a label-free test of whether $Z$ transmits information about the continuation, compared against controls where $Z$ is recent context rather than a forecast. Our main testbed is equation-suffix prediction: the predictor sees context and the first part of a displayed equation, then forecasts the rest. The task mixes surface-level arXiv/TeX text modeling with reasoning-sensitive inference; the suffix is one of many roughly equivalent continuations, so the benchmark is read statistically rather than item-by-item. On 1363 equation continuations from 138 recent physics and mathematics papers, forecasts from GPT-5.5, Opus 4.7, and GPT-5.4 nano all improve clipped likelihood over the context control under both Qwen3-8B and Kimi K2.6 scorers, distinguishing model families and reasoning-effort settings without human labels. To emulate shortcuts where $Z$ further primes the scorer rather than making a useful forecast, we also fine-tune the scorer on context-only prompts and apply it to held-out papers as a stronger control. GPT-5.5 forecasts still beat this fine-tuned control; GPT-5.4 nano forecasts do not. Longer prose/TeX continuations show positive but noisier lift over controls, concentrated near the beginning of the target. These results support cross-model likelihood scoring as a static benchmark and as a setup for probing shortcut vulnerabilities before reinforcement learning or model-selection optimization is applied.

</details>


### [986] [Policy Gradient Methods for Non-Markovian Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10816)
*Avik Kar,Siddharth Chandak,Rahul Singh,Soumitra Sinhahajari,Eric Moulines,Shalabh Bhatnagar,Nicholas Bambos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究非马尔可夫决策过程中的策略梯度方法，提出了一种基于奖励的智能体状态-马尔可夫策略(ASM)框架，联合优化智能体状态动态和控制策略，并证明了策略梯度定理，提出了ASMPG算法，在理论和实验上均优于基于预测目标学习状态表征的基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非马尔可夫决策过程中，观测和奖励依赖整个交互历史，而现有方法要么将智能体状态动态视为固定不变，要么通过预测目标来学习它，未能直接以最大化累积奖励为目标进行联合优化。

Method: 提出Agent State-Markov (ASM)策略类，包含智能体状态动态和控制策略两部分；证明ASM策略的策略梯度定理（推广到情节式和无限水平折扣NMDP）；提出ASMPG算法，利用状态动态的递归结构进行高效优化。

Result: 建立了ASM策略的有限时间和几乎必然收敛保证；在多个非马尔可夫任务上，ASMPG算法优于基于预测目标学习状态表征的基线方法。

Conclusion: 以奖励为中心的联合优化框架比基于预测目标的方法更有效，为处理非马尔可夫强化学习问题提供了新的理论依据和实用算法。

Abstract: We study policy gradient methods for reinforcement learning in non-Markovian decision processes (NMDPs), where observations and rewards depend on the entire interaction history. To handle this dependence, the agent maintains an internal state that is recursively updated to provide a compact summary of past observations and actions. In contrast to approaches that treat the agent state dynamics as fixed or learn it via predictive objectives, we propose a reward-centric formulation that jointly optimizes the agent state dynamics and the control policy to maximize the expected cumulative reward. To this end, we consider a class of Agent State-Markov (ASM) policies, comprising an agent state dynamics and a control policy that maps the agent state to actions. We establish a novel policy gradient theorem for ASM policies, extending the classical policy gradient results from the Markovian setting to episodic and infinite-horizon discounted NMDPs. Building on this gradient expression, we propose the Agent State-Markov Policy Gradient (ASMPG) algorithm, which leverages the recursive structure of the agent state dynamics for efficient optimization. We establish finite-time and almost sure convergence guarantees, and empirically demonstrate that, on a range of non-Markovian tasks, ASMPG outperforms baselines that learn state representations via predictive objectives.

</details>


### [987] [On periodic distributed representations using Fourier embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10818)
*Jakeb Chouinard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用高维空间中的周期嵌入来表示周期性信号，避免传统角度表示（如弧度）的数值问题，并基于Spatial Semantic Pointers形式化了Dirichlet和周期高斯核函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的标量角度表示（如弧度、度数）在处理角度差异超过π时存在数值不连续和区分困难的问题，需要一种更稳健的周期信号表示方法。

Method: 采用高维空间中的实值周期嵌入来避免角度数值问题，并通过Spatial Semantic Pointers（一种神经可解释的表示方案）来形式化Dirichlet核和周期高斯核，控制点积相似性以构造不同的核形状。

Result: 成功构建了两种周期核函数（Dirichlet核和周期高斯核），能够有效控制点积相似性，产生不同的核形状，且表示方案具有神经可解释性。

Conclusion: 高维周期嵌入为周期信号提供了一种更好的表示方式，相较于传统标量角度表示，能避免数值不连续问题，并可通过Spatial Semantic Pointers灵活构造多种核函数。

Abstract: Periodic signals are critical for representing physical and perceptual phenomena. Scalar, real angular measures, e.g., radians and degrees, result in difficulty processing and distinguishing nearby angles, especially when their absolute difference exceeds pi. We can avoid this problem by using real-valued, periodic embeddings in high-dimensional space. These representations also allow us to control the nature of their dot product similarities, allowing us to construct a variety of different kernel shapes. In this work, we aim of highlight how these representations can be constructed and focus on the formalization of Dirichlet and periodic Gaussian kernels using the neurally-plausible representation scheme of Spatial Semantic Pointers.

</details>


### [988] [Benchmarking Sensor-Fault Robustness in Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10822)
*Alexander Windmann,Philipp Wittenberg,Gianluca Manca,Marcel Dix,Jens U. Brandt,Oliver Niggemann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SensorFault-Bench，一个评估CPS预测模型在传感器故障（噪声、缺失、偏差等）下鲁棒性的标准化测试协议，发现干净MSE排名与故障场景下的误差排名不一致，并对比了不同鲁棒性提升方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CPS预测模型评估仅关注名义误差，忽略了传感器故障（噪声、偏差、缺失、时序错位）对模型鲁棒性的影响，缺乏标准化的故障压力测试协议。

Method: 构建SensorFault-Bench协议：基于4个真实数据集、8个打分数值场景、标准化严重性模型；提出分离故障迁移分割（disjoint fault-transfer split），实现故障训练与评估的隔离；采用最坏场景退化、干净MSE、最坏场景故障时间MSE等多维评估指标。

Result: 干净MSE表现好的架构在故障下可能严重退化；干净MSE排名与最坏场景故障时间误差排名不一致；Chronos-2（零样本基础模型）在干净MSE上匹配或落后于朴素预测器，且在ETTh1和Traffic上退化最大；PGD对抗训练和随机化训练在值域故障主导时有效，故障增强在可用性故障主导时有效。

Conclusion: SensorFault-Bench提供了标准化的CPS传感器故障鲁棒性评估协议，可用于未来新数据集、架构和鲁棒性提升方法的统一评估，代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Cyber-physical system (CPS) forecasting models depend on sensor streams with noisy, biased, missing, or temporally misaligned readings, yet standard forecasting evaluation often selects models by nominal error without showing whether they remain robust under such faults. We introduce SensorFault-Bench, a shared CPS-grounded sensor-fault stress-test protocol for evaluating forecasting architectures and robustness-improvement methods, and an operational taxonomy organizing the method comparison. Across four real-world datasets and eight scored scenarios governed by a standardized severity model, it reports worst-scenario degradation, clean mean squared error (MSE), and worst-scenario fault-time MSE, separating relative robustness from absolute error. A disjoint fault-transfer split lets explicit fault-training methods train on adjacent fault families while evaluation uses separate benchmark scenarios. Empirically, forecasting architectures favored by clean MSE can degrade sharply under faults, and clean-MSE rankings can disagree with worst-scenario fault-time error rankings. Chronos-2, the evaluated zero-shot foundation-model representative, matches or trails the last-value naive forecaster in clean MSE on the two single-target datasets and has the largest worst-scenario degradation on ETTh1 and Traffic, where all channels are forecast targets. For the evaluated robustness-improvement method set, paired deltas show selective degradation reductions: projected gradient descent adversarial training and randomized training lead where value faults dominate observed degradation, while fault augmentation leads where availability faults dominate. SensorFault-Bench provides open-source code, documented data access, and reproduction and extension guides, so new datasets, architectures, and robustness-improvement methods can be evaluated under the same CPS sensor-fault robustness protocol.

</details>


### [989] [NoRIN: Backbone-Adaptive Reversible Normalization for Time-Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10823)
*Shun Zhang,Yuyang Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NoRIN，一种基于Johnson S_U变换的非线性可逆归一化方法，用于时间序列预测。该方法通过两个形状参数(δ,ε)控制尾重和偏度，克服了RevIN等仿射归一化无法重塑数据分布的问题。研究发现梯度训练会导致形状参数退化为线性极限，因此采用Slifker-Shapiro分位拟合法初始化形状参数，再通过贝叶斯优化进行解耦优化。在90种配置下验证了不同骨干网络确实需要不同的归一化参数才能达到最佳性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的RevIN及其后继方法（Dish-TS, SAN, FAN）仅采用仿射变换(x ↦ ax+b)进行归一化，无法改变数据的分布形态——重尾仍然重尾，偏度仍然存在。作者希望提出一种能真正重塑数据分布的非线性归一化方法。

Method: 1) 提出基于arcsinh形式Johnson S_U变换的NoRIN，包含两个形状参数(δ,ε)分别控制尾重和偏度；2) 发现"退化问题"：梯度训练会使形状参数快速退化为线性极限(δ→∞)；3) 采用解耦策略：用Slifker-Shapiro分位拟合初始化(δ,ε)，再通过贝叶斯优化在验证集上优化，内层训练与标准RevIN相同。

Result: 在6种骨干网络×5个真实数据集×3种预测跨度（共90种配置）上，解耦的形状优化得到的(δ*,ε*)系统性地远离线性极限，且其值因骨干网络不同而不同。这验证了不同骨干网络确实需要不同的归一化参数来达到最佳性能。

Conclusion: NoRIN通过非线性可逆归一化和解耦形状优化，有效克服了RevIN类方法的分布重塑限制和退化问题。实验表明不同骨干网络对归一化参数的需求存在本质差异，这为时间序列预测中的归一化设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Reversible instance normalization (RevIN) and its successors (Dish-TS, SAN, FAN) have become the de facto plug-in for time-series forecasting, yet the map they apply to each data point is strictly affine, $x \mapsto ax+b$, so they cannot reshape the underlying distribution -- heavy tails remain heavy and skewness remains uncorrected. We propose NoRIN, a non-linear reversible normalization based on the arcsinh-form Johnson $S_U$ transform with two shape parameters $(δ,\varepsilon)$ that control tailedness and skewness; the linear $Z$-score used by RevIN is recovered only in the limit $δ\to \infty$. Training $(δ,\varepsilon)$ jointly with the backbone via gradient descent reliably pushes them toward this linear limit within a few epochs -- a phenomenon we name the degeneration problem: the forecasting loss is locally indifferent to shape, and the high-capacity backbone compensates for any monotone reparameterization of its input. NoRIN escapes the degeneration by decoupling shape selection from gradient training: $(δ,\varepsilon)$ are initialized by a closed-form Slifker-Shapiro quantile fit and refined by Bayesian optimization on the validation objective, while the inner training loop is identical to standard RevIN-style training. Across six representative backbones x five real-world datasets x three prediction horizons (90 configurations), decoupled shape optimization recovers $(δ^\star,\varepsilon^\star)$ that sit systematically far from the linear limit, with values that vary in a backbone-dependent way. This empirically supports the central thesis: different backbones genuinely require different normalization parameters to reach their best performance.

</details>


### [990] [Clin-JEPA: A Multi-Phase Co-Training Framework for Joint-Embedding Predictive Pretraining on EHR Patient Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10840)
*Yixuan Yang,Mehak Arora,Ryan Zhang,Baraa Abed,Junseob Kim,Tilendra Choudhary,Md Hassanuzzaman,Kevin Zhu,Ayman Ali,Chengkun Yang,Alasdair Edward Gent,Victor Moas,Rishikesan Kamaleswaran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Clin-JEPA是一个针对EHR数据的多阶段联合嵌入预测（JEPA）预训练框架，通过五阶段课程学习稳定地共同训练编码器和预测器，实现了无需微调即可同时进行患者轨迹预测和多任务下游风险预测，在MIMIC-IV ICU数据上取得了显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有JEPA框架要么在预训练后丢弃预测器（如I-JEPA、V-JEPA），要么在冻结的编码器上训练预测器（如V-JEPA 2-AC），导致编码器无法感知预测器在推理时使用的 rollout 信号；而简单地对编码器和预测器进行联合训练又存在表示坍塌和在线/目标漂移等问题。作者希望提出一个稳定的联合训练方案。

Method: 提出Clin-JEPA框架，包含五阶段预训练课程：预测器预热、联合精炼、EMA目标对齐、硬同步、预测器最终化。编码器基于Qwen3-8B，预测器为92M参数潜在轨迹预测器。通过分阶段解决不同的训练不稳定性问题。

Result: 在MIMIC-IV ICU数据上：（1）潜在ℓ1 rollout漂移在48小时预测范围内收敛（-15.7%），而基线和消融实验发散（+3%到+4951%）；（2）编码器学习到临床可区分的潜在几何结构（恶化患者比稳定患者在潜在空间中位移大4.83倍，基线≤2.62倍）；（3）单一骨干网络在ICareFM EEP上达到平均AUROC 0.851，在8个二元风险任务上达到0.883（分别比基线平均提升+0.038和+0.041）。

Conclusion: Clin-JEPA证明了通过精心设计的课程学习策略，可以在EHR数据上稳定地联合训练编码器与预测器，得到一个既能预测患者轨迹又能直接服务于多种下游风险预测任务的单一骨干模型，且无需逐任务微调。

Abstract: We present Clin-JEPA, a multi-phase co-training framework for joint-embedding predictive (JEPA) pretraining on EHR patient trajectories. JEPA architectures have enabled latent-space planning in robotics and high-quality representation learning in vision, but extending the paradigm to EHR data -- to obtain a single backbone that simultaneously forecasts patient trajectories and serves diverse downstream risk-prediction tasks without per-task fine-tuning -- remains an open challenge. Existing JEPA frameworks either discard the predictor after pretraining (I-JEPA, V-JEPA) or train it on a frozen pretrained encoder (V-JEPA 2-AC), leaving the encoder unaware of the rollout signal that the retained predictor must use at inference; co-training the encoder and predictor under a shared JEPA prediction objective would supply this grounding, but naïve co-training is unstable, with representation collapse and online/target drift causing autoregressive rollout to diverge. Clin-JEPA's five-phase pretraining curriculum -- predictor warmup, joint refinement, EMA target alignment, hard sync, and predictor finalization -- addresses each failure mode by phase, stably co-training a Qwen3-8B-based encoder and a 92M-parameter latent trajectory predictor. On MIMIC-IV ICU data, three independent evaluations support the framework: (1) latent $\ell_1$ rollout drift uniquely converges ($-$15.7%) over 48-hour horizons while baselines and ablations diverge (+3% to +4951%); (2) the encoder learns a clinically discriminative latent geometry (deteriorating-patient cohorts displace 4.83$\times$ further than stable patients in latent space, vs $\leq$2.62$\times$ for baseline encoders); (3) a single backbone outperforms strong tabular and sequence baselines on multi-task downstream evaluation. Clin-JEPA achieves mean AUROC 0.851 on ICareFM EEP and 0.883 on 8 binary risk tasks (+0.038 and +0.041 vs baseline average).

</details>


### [991] [Conditional anomaly detection methods for patient-management alert systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10847)
*Michal Valko,Gregory Cooper,Amy Seybert,Shyam Visweswaran,Melissa Saul,Miloš Hauskrecht*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了基于实例的条件异常检测方法，通过距离度量学习优化检测性能，并在肺炎患者入院决策和肝素诱发血小板减少症检测两个真实医疗问题上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统异常检测方法无法处理条件异常问题（即异常依赖于某些属性值），作者希望提出一种能检测在特定条件下才表现异常的实例方法。

Method: 采用基于实例的方法，依赖距离度量识别对检测异常最关键的数据样本，并研究了多种距离度量及度量学习方法以优化性能。

Result: 在两个真实医疗数据集上（社区获得性肺炎患者的异常入院决策、HPF4检测异常订单）验证了基于实例的条件异常检测方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于实例的方法结合适当的距离度量学习，能有效解决条件异常检测问题，在医疗领域具有实用价值。

Abstract: Anomaly detection methods can be very useful in identifying unusual or interesting patterns in data. A recently proposed conditional anomaly detection framework extends anomaly detection to the problem of identifying anomalous patterns on a subset of attributes in the data. The anomaly always depends (is conditioned) on the value of remaining attributes. The work presented in this paper focuses on instance-based methods for detecting conditional anomalies. The methods rely on the distance metric to identify examples in the dataset that are most critical for detecting the anomaly. We investigate various metrics and metric learning methods to optimize the performance of the instance-based anomaly detection methods. We show the benefits of the instance-based methods on two real-world detection problems: detection of unusual admission decisions for patients with the community-acquired pneumonia and detection of unusual orders of an HPF4 test that is used to confirm Heparin induced thrombocytopenia - a life-threatening condition caused by the Heparin therapy.

</details>


### [992] [Compute Where it Counts: Self Optimizing Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10875)
*Yash Akhauri,Mohamed S. Abdelfattah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Self-Optimizing Language Models (SOL)，通过轻量级策略网络为每个解码步骤动态分配计算预算（注意力稀疏性、MLP激活剪枝、量化位宽），在固定总预算下比静态均匀分配策略提升MMLU准确率最高7.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高效LLM推理研究大多对每个token施加统一计算预算，但实际token难度差异很大，导致简单token过计算、困难token欠计算。本文旨在实现单模型内的动态计算预算分配。

Method: SOL将冻结的LLM与轻量级策略网络配对，策略网络读取LLM隐藏状态，在每个解码步骤选择离散的效率动作，联合控制注意力稀疏性、MLP激活剪枝和激活量化位宽。使用group-relative policy optimization在teacher-forced序列上训练，通过对比同一token路径下不同计算调度的似然，优化语言模型质量与预算使用的权衡。

Result: 在各种模型变体和计算预算下，SOL在匹配预算时质量优于静态分配和随机调度搜索。在所有实验中发现了更好的质量-效率帕累托前沿，MMLU准确率比均匀预算分配策略提升最高7.3%。

Conclusion: 动态计算预算分配是提升LLM推理效率的有效互补方向，SOL通过轻量级策略网络实现了更优的质量-效率权衡。

Abstract: Efficient LLM inference research has largely focused on reducing the cost of each decoding step (e.g., using quantization, pruning, or sparse attention), typically applying a uniform computation budget to every generated token. In practice, token difficulty varies widely, so static compression can over-compute on easy steps and under-compute on hard ones. We study dynamic budget allocation for autoregressive decoding: learning how much computation to spend per token from within a single model.
  Self-Optimizing Language Models (SOL) pair a frozen LLM with a lightweight policy network that reads the LLM hidden state and selects a discrete efficiency action at each decode step. Actions can jointly control (i) token-level attention sparsity, (ii) structured activation pruning in the MLP, and (iii) activation quantization bit-width, while leaving the base model weights unchanged. We train the policy with group-relative policy optimization on teacher-forced episodes: the token sequence is fixed, while we sample multiple compute schedules (i.e., "counterfactual" schedules that vary only the efficiency actions for the same token path) and compare their likelihoods under the same supervision. Our reward trades off language-model quality against soft penalties that encourage episode-average budget usage to match a requested target. Across model variants and compute regimes, SOL improves quality at matched budget over static allocation and strong random schedule search, offering a complementary axis for inference-efficiency optimization. SOL discovers a better quality-efficiency pareto-front across all our experiments and improves MMLU accuracy by up to 7.3% over uniform budget allocation strategies.

</details>


### [993] [AssayBench: An Assay-Level Virtual Cell Benchmark for LLMs and Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10876)
*Edward De Brouwer,Carl Edwards,Alexander Wu,Jenna Collier,Graham Heimberg,Xiner Li,Meena Subramaniam,Ehsan Hajiramezanali,David Richmond,Jan-Christian Hütter,Sara Mostafavi,Gabriele Scalia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AssayBench，一个基于1920个公开CRISPR筛选实验构建的表型筛选预测基准，用于评估虚拟细胞模型在计算机中预测细胞扰动的能力。实验表明现有方法距离理论性能上限差距很大，而零样本通用大语言模型表现优于专用生物学模型，并通过微调、集成和提示优化可进一步提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器学习和大规模生物学数据推动了虚拟细胞模型的发展，但目前缺乏一个标准基准来评估模型在计算机中预测表型筛选结果的能力。现有工作集中于分子层面的读数，与真实药物发现中关注的表型终点关联较弱。

Method: 基于1920个公开CRISPR筛选实验构建基准，涵盖五类细胞表型；将任务形式化为每条筛选对应的基因排名预测；引入调整后的nDCG指标（连续度量）以比较异质实验间的表现。

Result: 现有方法距离经验估计的性能上限仍有很大差距；零样本通用LLM表现优于生物学专用LLM和可训练基线；微调、集成和提示优化等技术可进一步提升LLM在此任务上的性能。

Conclusion: AssayBench为计算机化表型筛选及更广泛的虚拟细胞模型研究提供了一个实用的测试平台，有助于衡量该领域的进展。

Abstract: Recent advances in machine learning and large-scale biological data collections have revived the prospect of building a virtual cell, a computational model of cellular behavior that could accelerate biological discovery. One of the most compelling promises of this vision is the ability to perform in silico phenotypic screens, in which a model predicts the effects of cellular perturbations in unseen biological contexts. This task combines heterogeneous textual inputs with diverse phenotypic outputs, making it particularly well-suited to LLMs and agentic systems. Yet, no standard benchmark currently exists for this task, as existing efforts focus on narrower molecular readouts that are only indirectly aligned with the phenotypic endpoints driving many real-world drug discovery workflows. In this work, we present AssayBench, a benchmark for phenotypic screen prediction, built from 1,920 publicly available CRISPR screens spanning five broad classes of cellular phenotypes. We formulate the screen prediction task as a gene rank prediction for each screen and introduce the adjusted nDCG, a continuous metric for comparing performance across heterogeneous assays. Our extensive evaluation shows that existing methods remain far from empirically estimated performance ceilings and zero-shot generalist LLMs outperform biology-specific LLMs and trainable baselines. Optimization techniques such as fine-tuning, ensembling, and prompt optimization can further improve LLM performance on this task. Overall, AssayBench offers a practical testbed for measuring progress toward in silico phenotypic screening and, more broadly, virtual cell models.

</details>


### [994] [Neural Weight Norm = Kolmogorov Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10878)
*Tiberiu Musat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，在固定精度下，循环神经网络的权重范数与输出二进制串的Kolmogorov复杂度之间（对数因子内）存在等价关系，从而揭示了权重衰减实际上隐式地实现了Solomonoff通用先验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究权重衰减（weight decay）为何有效，试图从理论层面建立正则化与算法信息论（Kolmogorov复杂度）之间的联系。

Method: 通过两个紧的规约证明：1）任何通用图灵机程序可编码为神经网络权重，每比特程序仅需单位权重成本；2）任何固定精度网络可通过枚举非零参数（带对数寻址开销）来描述。并在排列编码场景下展示了对数因子的可达性。

Result: 固定精度循环神经网络的最小权重范数与输出二进制串的Kolmogorov复杂度相差至多对数因子；权重衰减等价于（多项式因子内）Solomonoff通用先验；该结果对任意范数均成立。

Conclusion: 权重衰减的有效性源于其在固定精度下隐式编码了Kolmogorov复杂度，从而实现了最优的归纳偏置。固定精度假设是必要条件，无限精度下神经网络可编码不可计算函数，权重范数失去意义。

Abstract: Why does weight decay work? We prove that, in any fixed-precision regime, the smallest weight norm of a looped neural network outputting a binary string equals the Kolmogorov complexity of that string, up to a logarithmic factor.
