The resulting PDFs frequently suffer from misplaced floats, overflowing equations, inconsistent table scaling, widow and orphan lines, and poor page balance, forcing authors into repetitive compile-inspect-edit cycles. Rule-based tools are blind to rendered visuals, operating only on source code and log files. Text-only LLMs perform open-loop text editing, unable to predict or verify the two-dimensional layout consequences of their changes. Reliable typesetting optimization therefore requires a visual closed loop with verification after every edit. We formalize this problem as Visual Typesetting Optimization (VTO), the task of transforming a compilable LaTeX paper into a visually polished, page-budget-compliant PDF through iterative visual verification and source-level revision, and introduce a five-category taxonomy of typesetting defects to guide diagnosis. We present PaperFit, a vision-in-the-loop agent that iteratively renders pages, diagnoses defects, and applies constrained repairs. To benchmark VTO, we construct PaperFit-Bench with 200 papers across 10 venue templates and 13 defect types at different difficulty. Extensive experiments show that PaperFit outperforms all baselines by a large margin, establishing that bridging the gap from compilable source to publication-ready PDF requires vision-in-the-loop optimization and that VTO constitutes a critical missing stage in the document automation pipeline.

</details>


### [1176] [TMAS: Scaling Test-Time Compute via Multi-Agent Synergy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10344)
*George Wu,Nan Jing,Qing Yi,Chuan Hao,Ming Yang,Feng Chang,Yuan Wei,Jian Yang,Ran Tao,Bryan Dai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TMAS是一个通过多智能体协同来扩展测试时计算资源的框架，它利用分层记忆机制（经验库+指南库）和混合奖励强化学习，在推理过程中实现跨轨迹的结构化信息流动，从而更好地平衡探索与利用，在复杂推理基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的结构化测试时扩展方法要么弱协调并行推理轨迹，要么依赖有噪声的历史信息而没有明确决定保留和重用哪些内容，限制了它们在探索与利用之间的平衡能力。

Method: TMAS将推理组织为多个专门智能体之间的协作过程，实现跨智能体、跨轨迹和跨迭代的结构化信息流动。引入分层记忆机制：经验库重用低层可靠中间结论和局部反馈，指南库记录高层策略以避免冗余推理。同时设计混合奖励强化学习方案，联合保留基本推理能力、增强经验利用并鼓励探索。

Result: 在多个具有挑战性的推理基准上，TMAS在迭代扩展方面优于现有的测试时扩展基线，混合奖励训练进一步提高了迭代扩展的效果和稳定性。

Conclusion: 通过多智能体协同和分层记忆机制，TMAS能够更有效地平衡探索与利用，实现更强的迭代式测试时计算扩展能力。

Abstract: Test-time scaling has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models by allocating additional computation during inference. Recent structured approaches have further advanced this paradigm by organizing inference across multiple trajectories, refinement rounds, and verification-based feedback. However, existing structured test-time scaling methods either weakly coordinate parallel reasoning trajectories or rely on noisy historical information without explicitly deciding what should be retained and reused, limiting their ability to balance exploration and exploitation. In this work, we propose TMAS, a framework for scaling test-time compute via multi-agent synergy. TMAS organizes inference as a collaborative process among specialized agents, enabling structured information flow across agents, trajectories, and refinement iterations. To support effective cross-trajectory collaboration, TMAS introduces hierarchical memories: the experience bank reuses low-level reliable intermediate conclusions and local feedback, while the guideline bank records previously explored high-level strategies to steer subsequent rollouts away from redundant reasoning patterns. Furthermore, we design a hybrid reward reinforcement learning scheme tailored to TMAS, which jointly preserves basic reasoning capability, enhances experience utilization, and encourages exploration beyond previously attempted solution strategies. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TMAS achieves stronger iterative scaling than existing test-time scaling baselines, while hybrid reward training further improves scaling effectiveness and stability across iterations. Code and data are available at https://github.com/george-QF/TMAS-code.

</details>


### [1177] [How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10347)
*Weikai Xu,Kun Huang,Yunren Feng,Jiaxing Li,Yuhan Chen,Yuxuan Liu,Zhizheng Jiang,Heng Qu,Pengzhi Gao,Wei Liu,Jian Luan,Xiaolin Hu,Bo An*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了移动GUI智能体的世界模型在不同模态（delta文本、完整文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码）下的表现，发现可渲染代码在分布内保真度高，基于文本的反馈在在线OOD执行中更鲁棒；世界模型生成的轨迹可用于训练提升智能体表现；同时指出世界模型更适合作为先验感知或训练监督，而非通用的后验验证器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动世界模型提供基于文本或图像的未来状态预测，但哪种表示更有用、生成的rollout能否替代真实环境、以及测试时指导如何帮助不同强度的智能体，这些问题尚不清楚。

Method: 筛选和标注移动世界模型数据，训练四种模态的世界模型（delta文本、完整文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码），并在MobileWorldBench和Code2WorldBench上达到SOTA；随后在AITZ、AndroidControl、AndroidWorld上评估下游效用。

Result: 可渲染代码重建在分布内保真度最高，提供有效的多模态监督；文本反馈在在线OOD执行中更鲁棒。世界模型生成的轨迹可提供可迁移的交互经验，提升智能体任务表现。对于低动作熵的过度自信智能体，后验自我反思收益有限。

Conclusion: 世界模型更有效的方式是作为先验感知或训练监督，而非通用的后验验证器。

Abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

</details>


### [1178] [Agent-ValueBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Values](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10365)
*Haonan Dong,Qiguan Feng,Kehan Jiang,Haoran Ye,Xin Zhang,Guojie Song*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Agent-ValueBench，首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准，涵盖394个可执行环境、4,335个价值冲突任务，发现智能体价值观与底层LLM存在分歧，并揭示了价值潮汐、非加性变化等关键现象，表明智能体对齐正从模型对齐转向框架对齐与技能引导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有价值观基准仅局限于LLM，忽略了智能体作为任务执行者时其价值观与底层LLM的差异，且智能体模态在数据集、评估和系统层面引入新挑战。

Method: 构建Agent-ValueBench基准，包含394个可执行环境、16个领域、4,335个价值冲突任务，覆盖28个价值系统与332个维度；通过端到端管道协同生成并由心理学家逐实例审核；每个任务配备两条极对齐黄金轨迹用于轨迹级评估。

Result: 在14个前沿模型和4个主流框架上测试，发现：(1) 智能体价值观呈现跨模型同质的"价值潮汐"现象；(2) 框架牵引导致非加性变化；(3) 技能嵌入可更决定性地引导价值观。

Conclusion: 智能体对齐的杠杆正从经典模型对齐和提示工程转向框架对齐与技能引导。

Abstract: Autonomous agents have rapidly matured as task executors and seen widespread deployment via harnesses such as OpenClaw. Safety concerns have rightly drawn growing research attention, and beneath them lie the values silently steering agent behavior. Existing value benchmarks, however, remain confined to LLMs, leaving agent values largely uncharted. From intuitive, empirical, and theoretical vantage points, we show that an agent's values diverge from those of its underlying LLM, and the agentic modality further introduces dataset-, evaluation-, and system-level challenges absent from text-only protocols. We close this gap with Agent-ValueBench, the first benchmark dedicated to agent values. It features 394 executable environments across 16 domains, offering 4,335 value-conflict tasks that cover 28 value systems and 332 dimensions. Every instance is co-synthesized through our purpose-built end-to-end pipeline and curated per-instance by professional psychologists. Each task ships with two pole-aligned golden trajectories whose checkpoints anchor a trajectory-level rubric-based judge. Benchmarking 14 frontier proprietary and open-weights models across 4 mainstream harnesses, we uncover three concerted findings. Agent values first manifest as a Value Tide of cross-model homogeneity beneath interpretable counter-currents. This tide bends non-additively under harness pull, and yet more decisively under deliberate steering via embedded skills. Together these results signal that the agent-alignment lever is shifting from classical model alignment and prompt steering toward harness alignment and skill steering.

</details>


### [1179] [EGL-SCA: Structural Credit Assignment for Co-Evolving Instructions and Tools in Graph Reasoning Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10366)
*Zike Yuan,Yukun Cao,Han Zhang,Jianzhi Yan,Le Liu,Cai ke,Yue Yu,Hui Wang,Ming Liu,Bing Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过双空间协同（指令策略空间+工具程序空间）和结构信用分配机制，在四个图推理基准上达到92.0%的平均成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法分别改进指令侧或工具侧，未能明确失败后应更新哪一侧，缺乏系统的协同进化机制。

Method: 构建双空间框架：指令侧策略空间负责推理策略，工具侧程序空间负责可执行算法工具；引入结构信用分配机制将轨迹证据映射到条件更新，精准路由失败到提示优化或工具合成/修复；采用按任务族分层训练分布和Pareto风格保留策略。

Result: 在四个图推理基准上达到92.0%的平均成功率，显著优于纯提示和固定工具箱基线。

Conclusion: 通过指令与工具的协同进化，验证器中心的双空间框架能有效解决图推理智能体面临的结构正确性验证问题。

Abstract: Graph reasoning agents operating from natural-language inputs must solve a coupled problem: they must reconstruct a structured graph instance from text, decide whether existing computational assets are sufficient, interact with tools under a strict execution protocol, and satisfy an external verifier that checks structured correctness rather than textual plausibility. Existing approaches usually improve either the instruction side or the tool side in isolation, which leaves unclear what should be updated after failure. We propose EGL-SCA, a verifier-centric dual-space framework that models a graph reasoning agent using two collaborative components: an instruction-side policy space for reasoning strategies, and a tool-side program space for executable algorithmic tools. Our central mechanism is structural credit assignment, which maps trajectory evidence to conditional updates, precisely routing failures to either prompt optimization or tool synthesis and repair. To provide sufficient learning signals for dual-space adaptation, we introduce a training distribution stratified by task family, coupled with a Pareto-style retention strategy to balance success, generality, and parsimony. Experiments on four graph reasoning benchmarks show that EGL-SCA achieves a state-of-the-art 92.0\% average success rate. By effectively co-evolving instructions and tools, our framework significantly outperforms both pure-prompting and fixed-toolbox baselines.

</details>


### [1180] [Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects: From Passive Assertions to Active Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10370)
*Zeyd Boukhers,Oya Beyan,Cong Yang,Christoph Lange*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出自治FAIR数字对象(aFDO)概念，通过三个基于语义网标准的增强层（策略层、公告层、协议层），使科学出版物具备自动化验证、矛盾消解和可信度更新能力，在罕见病本体（ClinVar/HPO/Orphanet）的4,305个FDO上验证，共识机制解决56.3%的自然冲突，并在拜占庭容错界限内优雅退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Web科学知识是被动断言，无法自主验证证据、调和矛盾或更新可信度；策展依赖中心化中间件和机构持续性，注册中心关闭后数据即使在线也失去主动管理。

Method: aFDO增强FDO三个能力：1) 基于RDF-star/ PROV-O/ SHACL/ ODRL的策略层实现条件-动作规则；2) 基于ActivityStreams 2.0的公告层限制评价成本；3) 基于声誉与置信度加权的一致协议层，在有界对抗模型下消解矛盾。

Result: 在4,305个FDO上测试，共识机制解决56.3%的3,914个ClinVar自然冲突；在Sybil/合谋/投毒攻击下，机制在拜占庭容错界限(f < n/5)内优雅退化，超出后按预期失效。

Conclusion: aFDO将自治FAIR数字对象从抽象概念推进到可操作模型，为被动科学出版向可问责、符合标准、可超越机构存续期的自动化提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Scientific knowledge on the Web is published as passive assertions and cannot decide when to validate evidence, reconcile contradictions, or update confidence as findings accumulate. Curation depends on centralised middleware and institutional continuity, but when registries close, active stewardship stops even when data remain online. We advance the concept of Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects (aFDOs) from an abstract idea to an operational model, to offer a route from passive scientific publication toward accountable, standards-aligned automation that can outlive its publishing institutions. aFDO augments FDOs with three capabilities anchored in Semantic Web standards, namely 1) a policy layer over RDF-star aligned with PROV-O, SHACL, and ODRL for portable condition-action rules, 2) an announcement layer over ActivityStreams 2.0 that bounds per-announcement evaluation cost, and 3) an agreement layer that resolves multi-source contradictions through reputation and confidence weighted agreement under a bounded adversarial model. We provide a formal definition that distinguishes policy specifications, event handlers, and communication interfaces. We evaluate an open reference implementation on 4,305 FDOs grounded in rare-disease ontologies, namely ClinVar, HPO, and Orphanet, combined with controlled synthetic observations. The consensus mechanism resolves 56.3% of 3,914 naturally occurring ClinVar conflicts where multiple submitters disagree and an expert panel has subsequently adjudicated. Under Sybil, collusion, and poisoning attacks, the mechanism degrades gracefully within its design Byzantine-tolerance bound (f < n/5), and fails as predicted beyond that bound.

</details>


### [1181] [Agent-X: Full Pipeline Acceleration of On-device AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10380)
*Jinha Chung,Byeongjun Shin,Jiin Kim,Minsoo Rhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Agent-X是一个纯软件、保持精度的框架，通过前缀缓存和LLM-free推测解码，在边缘设备上加速AI代理工作负载，实现1.61倍端到端加速且无精度损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于LLM的代理在边缘设备上存在高端到端延迟问题，此前缺乏系统性解决该瓶颈的工作。

Method: 提出两个核心组件：(1) 基于代理特定输入token模式的提示重写，利用前缀缓存加速预填充阶段；(2) 无LLM的推测解码，实现低开销的快速token生成。

Result: 在代表性代理工作负载上实现1.61倍端到端加速，且无精度损失。

Conclusion: 首次系统性地表征并消除了端侧AI代理的延迟瓶颈，且框架可无缝集成到现有端侧代理中。

Abstract: LLM-based agents deliver state-of-the-art performance across tasks but incur high end-to-end latency on edge devices. We introduce Agent-X, a software-only, accuracy-preserving framework that accelerates both the prefill and decode stages of on-device agent workloads. Agent-X's two key components rewrite prompts to leverage prefix caching tailored to agent-specific input-token patterns and enable LLM-free speculative decoding for fast token generation with minimal overhead. On representative agentic workloads, Agent-X achieves a 1.61x end-to-end speedup in real systems with no accuracy loss and can be seamlessly integrated into existing on-device AI agents. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first to systematically characterize and eliminate latency bottlenecks in on-device agents.

</details>


### [1182] [Agentic Performance at the Edge: Insights from Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10384)
*Shiqiang Wang,Herbert Woisetschläger*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 这篇论文研究了在边缘部署（8B参数以下）的AI智能体性能损失问题，发现智能体质量并非简单由参数数量决定，而是取决于模型选择与工具工作流的联合设计。通过领域条件化评估方法，揭示了准确率-延迟的帕累托前沿，可用于指导边缘AI部署策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备受限于内存、功耗和延迟预算，通常只能部署约8B参数以下的模型。一个重要问题尚未被充分研究：当模型规模受限时，智能体任务的质量损失有多大？本文旨在回答这一问题。

Method: 针对边缘场景，进行了模型规模缩放、通用型与代码型模型对比、以及固定协议下工具执行能力的实证研究。提出了领域条件化评估方法，并进行了实现层面的模型-工具交互分析。

Result: 核心发现：边缘智能体质量不是参数数量的简单函数。不同模型系列存在语义错误与执行错误的不同失败模式。在准确率-延迟空间中存在帕累托前沿，可依据运营优先级指导策略选择。

Conclusion: 稳健的边缘AI部署取决于模型选择与工具工作流的联合设计。领域条件化分析能够揭示准确率-延迟权衡中的帕累托最优策略，为实际部署提供实践指导。

Abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is a natural fit for Internet of Things (IoT) and edge systems, but edge deployments are often constrained to models around 8 billion parameters or smaller. An important question is: How much agentic-task quality is lost when model size is constrained by memory, power, and latency budgets? To address this question, in this paper, we provide an initial empirical study considering edge-focused model scaling, general-purpose versus coder-oriented model effects, and tool-enabled execution under a fixed protocol. We introduce a domain-conditioned evaluation methodology, an implementation-grounded analysis of model-tool interactions, practical guidance for model selection under constraints, and an analysis of failure modes that reveals distinct semantic versus execution failure patterns across model families. Our core finding is that edge-agent quality is not a simple function of parameter count. Robust deployment depends on the joint design of model choice and tool workflow. Domain-conditioned analysis reveals Pareto fronts in the accuracy-latency space that can guide strategy selection based on operational priorities.

</details>


### [1183] [GuardAD: Safeguarding Autonomous Driving MLLMs via Markovian Safety Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10386)
*Tianyuan Zhang,Peng Yue,Zihao Peng,Jiangfan Liu,Zonghao Ying,Jiakai Wang,Tianlin Li,Jian Yang,Yaodong Yang,Aishan Liu,Xianglong Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GuardAD提出了一种基于马尔可夫逻辑状态的模型无关安全防护机制，通过神经符号逻辑形式化推理动态驾驶场景中的安全隐患，并主动修正不安全动作，在多个基准测试中事故率降低32.07%，任务性能提升6.85%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM驱动的自动驾驶系统在动态交通场景中缺乏时间序列上的安全推理能力，多数防护机制采用静态逻辑约束，无法应对不断演化的交通交互，导致在动态驾驶环境中的鲁棒性不足。

Method: 提出GuardAD框架：(1) 神经符号逻辑形式化——将安全谓词表示为异构交通参与者的马尔可夫逻辑状态；(2) n阶马尔可夫逻辑归纳——持续推断超出单步观测的潜在和新兴危险；(3) 逻辑驱动的动作修正——利用推理出的安全状态指导动作优化，无需修改底层MLLM模型。

Result: 在多个基准测试和AD-MLLM上，事故率降低32.07%，任务性能提升6.85%；闭环仿真评估和实车实验进一步验证了有效性。

Conclusion: GuardAD通过时序逻辑推理有效增强了自动驾驶MLLM的安全性，是一种模型无关、可迁移的安全防护方案。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly integrated into autonomous driving (AD) systems; however, they remain vulnerable to diverse safety threats, particularly in accident-prone scenarios. Recent safeguard mechanisms have shown promise by incorporating logical constraints, yet most rely on static formulations that lack temporally grounded safety reasoning over evolving traffic interactions, resulting in limited robustness in dynamic driving environments. To address these limitations, we propose GuardAD, a model-agnostic safeguard that formulates AD safety as an evolving Markovian logical state. GuardAD introduces Neuro-Symbolic Logic Formalization, which represents safety predicates over heterogeneous traffic participants and continuously induces them via n-th order Markovian Logic Induction. This design enables the inference of emerging and latent hazards beyond single-step observations. Rather than simply vetoing unsafe actions, GuardAD performs Logic-Driven Action Revision, where inferred safety states actively guide action refinement without modifying the underlying MLLM. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and AD-MLLMs demonstrate that GuardAD substantially reduces accident rates (-32.07%) while slightly improving task performance (+6.85%). Moreover, closed-loop simulation evaluations, together with physical-world vehicle studies, further validate the effectiveness and potential of GuardAD.

</details>


### [1184] [LLM4Branch: Large Language Model for Discovering Efficient Branching Policies of Integer Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10401)
*Zhinan Hou,Xingchen Li,Yankai Zhang,Tianxun Li,Keyou You*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出LLM4Branch框架，利用大语言模型自动发现高效的分支策略，该策略由LLM生成的程序骨架和通过零阶优化优化的参数向量组成，在MILP基准测试中达到CPU方法SOTA，性能与先进GPU方法相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于学习的分支策略方法依赖于昂贵的专家演示，且训练目标与求解器端到端性能之间存在差距，需要更高效、更贴近实际性能的自动化方法。

Method: 利用大语言模型生成可执行程序的骨架，配合参数向量构成分支策略；参数通过零阶优化方法在少量实例上以端到端性能反馈进行优化。

Result: 在标准MILP基准测试中，LLM4Branch在CPU方法中达到SOTA，且性能与先进的GPU方法相当。

Conclusion: LLM4Branch成功利用LLM自动发现高效分支策略，克服了对专家演示的依赖和训练-性能差距，为自动化分支策略设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: Efficient branching policies are essential for accelerating Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solvers. Their design has long relied on hand-crafted heuristics, and now machine learning has emerged as a promising paradigm to automate this process. However, existing learning-based methods are often hindered by their dependence on expensive expert demonstrations and the gap between training objectives and the solver's end-to-end performance. In this work, we propose LLM4Branch, a novel framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the discovery of efficient branching policies. Specifically, the discovered policy is an executable program with a program skeleton generated by the LLM and a parameter vector, which is optimized via a zeroth-order method over a few instances with their end-to-end performance feedback. Extensive experiments on standard MILP benchmarks demonstrate that LLM4Branch establishes a new state-of-the-art among CPU-based methods and achieves performance competitive with advanced GPU-based models. Codes are available at https://github.com/hzn18/LLM4Branch.

</details>


### [1185] [Can Agent Benchmarks Support Their Scores? Evidence-Supported Bounds for Interactive-Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10448)
*Shanshan Gao,Liyi Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个结果证据报告层，通过在现有基准测试中增加证据标签（通过/失败/未知）和证据支持的得分区间，来提升交互式智能体基准测试中结果检测的可靠性，并在五个公开基准上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交互式智能体基准测试的结果检查往往依赖表面信号（如检测是否点击了"保存"按钮），无法可靠判断任务是否真正成功（如地址是否真的被更改）。这种不可靠的结果检测使得报告的成功率具有误导性，影响基准质量。

Method: 提出一个结果证据报告层，在不修改现有基准的任务、智能体或评估器的前提下，实现三项功能：(1) 预先指定验证结果所需的存储工件；(2) 对每次运行应用固定检查表，分配三种证据标签：Evidence Pass、Evidence Fail、Unknown；(3) 报告证据支持的得分区间，量化Unknown案例带来的不确定性。

Result: 在ANDROIDWORLD、AGENTDOJO、APPWORLD、tau3 bench retail和MINIWOB五个公开基准上评估，该方法能够分离出多种经验上不同的失败模式。

Conclusion: 该证据报告层能够使不确定的案例保持可见，避免将其静默计入、丢弃或隐藏在单一聚合成功率中，从而提供更可靠、更透明的基准评估结果。

Abstract: Interactive agent benchmarks map an agent run to a binary outcome through outcome checks. When these checks rely on surface level signals or fail to capture the agent's actual action path, they cannot reliably determine whether the run succeeded. For example, a benchmark task may ask whether Alice's shipping address was changed, while the outcome check only verifies that the agent clicked "Save." This does not guarantee that the intended state change occurred, since the agent may have modified the wrong record. Treating such a run as successful therefore makes the reported score misleading. Benchmark quality thus depends not only on task design, but also on the reliability of outcome detection.
  We address this problem by introducing an outcome evidence reporting layer for existing benchmarks, without modifying their tasks, agents, or evaluators. The layer performs three functions. First, before scoring, it specifies which stored artifacts are required to verify the claimed outcome for each case. Second, it applies a locked checklist to each completed run and assigns one of three evidence labels: Evidence Pass, Evidence Fail, or Unknown. Third, it reports evidence supported score bounds that quantify uncertainty arising from Unknown cases. Rather than silently counting, discarding, or hiding uncertain cases inside a single aggregate success rate, the framework keeps them explicitly visible.
  We evaluate the outcome evidence layer on five public benchmarks: ANDROIDWORLD, AGENTDOJO, APPWORLD, tau3 bench retail, and MINIWOB. The resulting reports separate several empirically distinct failure modes.

</details>


### [1186] [ASIA: an Autonomous System Identification Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10480)
*Dario Piga,Marco Forgione*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ASIA框架，利用大语言模型作为自主编码代理，自动完成系统辨识中的模型类选择、算法调优和超参数搜索，无需人工干预，只需自然语言描述问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统系统辨识方法虽然理论丰富，但在实践中模型选择、训练算法和超参数调优仍依赖人工试错，耗费专家时间和经验。作者希望借助AI代理自动化这一迭代搜索过程。

Method: 基于现有代理平台构建ASIA，将大语言模型作为自主编码代理，形成"假设→实现→评估"的闭环，无需人工干预；输入仅为问题描述的自然语言文本。

Result: 在两个系统辨识基准上进行了实证研究，分析了代理的搜索行为、发现的架构和训练策略以及模型质量。

Conclusion: ASIA展现了自动化系统辨识的潜力，但存在隐性测试泄漏、方法透明度降低和可重复性不足等局限性。

Abstract: Over the years, research in system identification has provided a rich set of methods for learning dynamical models, together with well-established theoretical guarantees. In practice, however, the choice of model class, training algorithm, and hyperparameter tuning is still largely left to empirical trial-and-error, requiring substantial expert time and domain experience. Motivated by recent advances in agentic artificial intelligence, we present ASIA, a framework that delegates this iterative search to a large language model acting as an autonomous coding agent. Building on existing agentic platforms, ASIA closes the loop between hypothesis, implementation, and evaluation without human intervention, requiring only a plain-English description of the identification problem. We conduct an empirical study of ASIA on two system identification benchmarks and analyse the agent's search behaviour, the architectures and training strategies it discovers, and the quality of the resulting models. We also discuss the potential of the approach and its current limitations, including implicit test leakage, reduced methodological transparency, and reproducibility concerns.

</details>


### [1187] [SkillEvolver: Skill Learning as a Meta-Skill](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10500)
*Genrui Zhang,Erle Zhu,Jinfeng Zhou,Caiyan Jia,Hongning Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SkillEvolver提出了一个轻量级在线技能学习框架，通过元技能迭代地生成、部署和优化领域特定技能（以自然语言和代码形式），而非模型权重，使得技能可直接用于任何智能体。在83个任务上达到56.8%准确率，优于人工技能的43.6%和无技能的29.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体技能是静态的、一次性生成的，缺乏从实际使用中学习和改进的机制，无法自适应地提升性能。

Method: SkillEvolver包含一个元技能，它通过迭代循环：先创作领域技能（prose+code），部署到智能体中，然后从智能体实际使用该技能时遇到的失败中获取学习信号（而非仅从探索轨迹中学习），最后通过"新智能体过拟合审计"检测过拟合、泄露以及"静默绕过"（技能内容看似有效但从未被调用）等问题，据此进行改进。

Result: 在83个SkillsBench任务（覆盖15+领域）上达到56.8%准确率，优于人工技能的43.6%和无技能基线的29.9%。在KernelBench的3个GPU内核优化任务上，平均加速比从1.16提升至1.51。

Conclusion: SkillEvolver证明了一种轻量级、无需重新训练模型的在线技能学习方法是有效的，且技能以文本和代码形式存储，可即插即用于任何兼容的CLI智能体，具有很好的泛化性和实用性。

Abstract: Agent skills today are static artifact: authored once -- by human curation or one-shot generation from parametric knowledge -- and then consumed unchanged, with no mechanism to improve from real use. We propose \textbf{SkillEvolver}, a lightweight, plug-and-play solution for online skill learning, in which a single meta-skill iteratively authors, deploys, and refines domain-specific skills. The learning target of SkillEvolver is the skill's prose and code, not model weights, so that the resulting artifact drops into any agent without retraining; and the meta-skill itself is just another skill, loaded through the same interface by any protocol-compliant CLI-agent. Unlike trace-distillation, the meta-skill refines only after deploying the learnt skill, such that the learning signal comes from failures another agent encounters while using it -- not from exploratory traces alone. Refinement iterations are governed by a fresh-agent overfit audit that catches possible leakage as well as deployed-skill-specific failures, including the silent-bypass mode in which a skill appears valid in content but is never invoked at runtime. On $83$ SkillsBench tasks spanning $15^{+}$ domains, SkillEvolver reaches $56.8\%$ accuracy versus $43.6\%$ for curated human skills and $29.9\%$ for the no-skill baseline; on three GPU kernel optimization tasks from KernelBench, it also raises mean speedup from $1.16$ to $1.51$ on average.

</details>


### [1188] [SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10503)
*Yiming Liu,Bin Lu,Xinbing Wang,Chenghu Zhou,Meng Jin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM在处理图结构时内部会自发重建拓扑结构（注意图呈现"锯齿状"模式），但这种能力被attention sink稀释。作者提出一种无需训练的注意力锐化方法Slash，通过重新分配注意力权重来增强LLM的图结构理解能力，在图任务和分子预测上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM处理序列化图数据时存在结构理解困难，现有方案（外接图适配器/微调）成本高且泛化性差。作者希望通过揭示LLM内部机制，找到一种轻量级、无需额外训练的方法来增强其图结构理解能力。

Method: 提出Slash（StructuraL Attention SHarpening）方法：基于LLM内部自发的"锯齿状"注意力模式，通过即插即用的注意力重分配机制，放大模型对图拓扑结构的内部表征，同时抑制attention sink的稀释效应。

Result: 在纯图任务和分子预测任务上，Slash在多种不同LLM上均取得显著且一致的性能提升。

Conclusion: LLM内部存在被忽视的图结构理解能力，通过轻量级注意力干预（而非昂贵的训练）即可有效释放这种能力，为提升LLM的结构化推理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate Slash delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

</details>


### [1189] [Consistency as a Testable Property: Statistical Methods to Evaluate AI Agent Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10516)
*Harsh Raj,Niranjan Orkat,Suvrorup Mukherjee,Aritra Guha,Cheryl Flynn,Subhabrata Majumdar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文建立了AI智能体可靠性的严格度量科学，通过U-统计量和基于核的轨迹稳定性指标，量化语义保持扰动下的一致性，并区分了核心能力与执行鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估方法（如pass@1）无法有效检测智能体在语义保持扰动下的策略崩塌问题，缺乏对可靠性的系统性度量框架。

Method: 提出基于U-统计量的输出级可靠性度量和基于核函数的轨迹级稳定性度量，用于评估智能体在不同操作条件下的一致性表现。

Result: 在三个智能体基准实验上验证了框架有效性，轨迹级一致性指标相比传统pass@1率具有更高的诊断灵敏度，能揭示微小任务变化导致完整策略崩塌的现象。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了定位智能体偏差根源的数学工具，有助于识别和修复阻碍智能体在高风险真实环境中部署的架构问题。

Abstract: This paper establishes a rigorous measurement science for AI agent reliability, providing a foundational framework for quantifying consistency under semantically preserving perturbations. By leveraging $U$-statistics for output-level reliability and kernel-based metrics for trajectory-level stability, we offer a principled approach to evaluating agents across diverse operating conditions. Our proposal highlights the important distinction between the core capability and execution robustness of an agent, showing that minor task-level variations can induce complete strategy breakdowns despite the agent possessing the requisite knowledge for the task. We validate our framework through extensive experiments on three agentic benchmarks, demonstrating that trajectory-level consistency metrics provide far greater diagnostic sensitivity than traditional pass@1 rates. By providing the mathematical tools to isolate where and why agents deviate, we enable the identification and rectification of architectural concerns that hinder the deployment of agents in high-stakes, real-world environments.

</details>


### [1190] [PrimeKG-CL: A Continual Graph Learning Benchmark on Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10529)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Yao Li,Qing Qing,Ziqi Xu,Xingtong Yu,Jiaxing Huang,Renqiang Luo,Xikun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PrimeKG-CL，一个基于九个权威生物医学数据库构建的持续图学习基准，包含两个真实时间快照（2021年6月-2023年7月），涵盖129K+节点、8.1M+边，设计了10个实体类型分组任务。研究发现解码器与持续学习策略存在强交互效应，且DistMult能区分持久与废弃知识而RotatE不能，多模态特征可提升实体任务达60%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续图学习(CGL)研究几乎完全基于静态通用知识图谱的合成随机分割，无法复现真实生物医学知识图谱所经历的非同步、结构化演化过程。生物医学知识图谱依赖的上游本体在不同周期独立更新，每次发布添加数百万边并废弃数十万边，亟需一个能反映这种真实演化特性的基准。

Method: PrimeKG-CL基准包含：1) 九个权威生物医学数据库的129K+节点、8.1M+边；2) 两个真实时间快照（2021年6月和2023年7月），含5.83M新增边、889K移除边、7.21M持久边；3) 10个实体类型分组任务；4) 多模态节点特征；5) 每任务的持久/新增/移除测试分层。在三个任务（生物医学关系预测、实体分类、知识图谱问答）上评估了六种持续学习策略、四种KGE解码器，以及LKGE、LLM-RAG智能体和CMKL。

Result: 1) 解码器与持续学习策略存在强交互效应，无单一策略在所有解码器上最优，错误组合会显著降低性能；2) 仅DistMult能清晰区分持久知识与废弃知识，RotatE缺乏此效应，说明标准指标混淆了对有效事实的保留与对过时事实的遗忘；3) 多模态特征提升实体级任务达60%；4) 近期CKGE框架IncDE在5.67M三元组基础任务上扩展失败（尝试五次，最高350GB RAM）。

Conclusion: 生物医学知识图谱的持续学习需考虑真实演化特征，解码器选择与CL策略需谨慎匹配，标准评估指标可能掩盖对废弃知识的遗忘失败问题，多模态特征能显著提升实体级任务性能。

Abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs underwrite drug repurposing and clinical decision support, yet the upstream ontologies they depend on update on independent cycles that add millions of edges and deprecate hundreds of thousands more between releases. Yet existing continual graph learning has been studied almost exclusively on synthetic random splits of static, generic KGs, a regime that cannot reproduce the asynchronous, structured evolution real biomedical KGs undergo. To this end, we introduce PrimeKG-CL, a CGL benchmark built from nine authoritative biomedical databases (129K+ nodes, 8.1M+ edges, 10 node types, 30 relation types) with two genuine temporal snapshots (June 2021, July 2023; 5.83M edges added, 889K removed, 7.21M persistent), 10 entity-type-grouped tasks, multimodal node features, and a per-task persistent/added/removed test stratification. On three tasks (biomedical relationship prediction, entity classification, KGQA), we evaluate six CL strategies across four KGE decoders, plus LKGE, an LLM-RAG agent, and CMKL. We find that decoder choice and continual learning strategy interact strongly: no single strategy performs best across all decoders, and mismatched combinations can significantly degrade performance. Moreover, only DistMult exhibits a clear separation between persistent and deprecated knowledge, indicating that standard metrics conflate retention of still-valid facts with failure to forget outdated ones; this effect is absent under RotatE. In addition, multimodal features improve entity-level tasks by up to 60%, and a recent CKGE framework (IncDE) failed to scale to our 5.67M-triple base task across five attempts up to 350GB RAM. Data, pipeline, baselines, and the stratified split are released openly. Dataset:huggingface.co/datasets/yradwan147/PrimeKGCL|Code:github.com/yradwan147/primekg-cl-neurips2026

</details>


### [1191] [A Reflective Storytelling Agent for Older Adults: Integrating Argumentation Schemes and Argument Mining in LLM-Based Personalised Narratives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10531)
*Jayalakshmi Baskar,Vera C. Kaelin,Kaan Kilic,Helena Lindgren*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘的反思性故事生成代理，用于支持面向老年人的数字伴侣进行健康导向的叙事交互。通过两阶段研究（11名专家参与式设计 + 55名老年人评估）验证了该方法在提升叙事个人相关性、文化认同性和减少幻觉方面的效果，并将论证挖掘定位为一种反思性检测机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索基于大语言模型的叙事生成能否有效支持老年人与数字伴侣的有目的性叙事交互，并解决LLM存在的幻觉和透明性不足等问题。

Method: 构建一个反思性故事生成代理，集成知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘来指导和检查叙事生成过程。采用两阶段研究：阶段一（11名领域专家的参与式设计进行形成性评估与迭代优化）；阶段二（55名老年人评估基于人设的叙事，涵盖4种提示和2个创造力水平）。

Result: 约三分之二的叙事被参与者识别出具有个人相关目的；基于论证的目的识别率约一半；文化可识别性强烈影响使用意愿；轻微不一致性在叙事可理解和具有个人相关性时往往被容忍；高幻觉风险指标与高感知不一致性相关；高论证质量指标与高清晰度和有意义性评分相关。

Conclusion: 论证挖掘可作为一种反思性检测机制，用于将形式化基础信号与人类评估进行比较，在面向老年人的健康导向LLM叙事生成中具有应用价值。

Abstract: This work investigates whether knowledge-driven large language model (LLM)-based storytelling can support purposeful narrative interaction with a digital companion for older adults. To address known limitations of LLMs, including hallucinations and limited transparency, we present a reflective storytelling agent integrating knowledge graphs, user modelling, argumentation theory, and argument mining to guide and inspect narrative generation.
  The study consisted of two phases. Phase I employed participatory design involving 11 domain experts in a formative evaluation that informed iterative refinement. The resulting system generates narratives grounded in structured user models representing health-promoting activities and motivations. Phase II involved 55 older adults evaluating persona-based narratives across four prompts and two creativity levels. Participants assessed perceived purpose, usefulness, cultural relatability, and inconsistencies. The system additionally computed hallucination-risk indicators to evaluate generated narratives.
  Participants recognised personally relevant purposes in roughly two thirds of narratives, while argument-based purposes were identified in around half of these cases. Cultural recognisability strongly influenced willingness to use the functionality, whereas minor inconsistencies were often tolerated when narratives remained understandable and personally relevant. Narratives with higher hallucination-risk indicators were more often perceived as inconsistent, while higher argument-quality indicators tended to co-occur with higher clarity and meaningfulness ratings.
  Overall, the study positions argument mining as a reflective inspection mechanism for comparing formal grounding signals with human evaluations in health-oriented LLM storytelling for older adults.

</details>


### [1192] [Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10541)
*Yao Li,Xikun Zhang,Xiaotao Shen,Sonika Tyagi,Xin Zheng,Jiaxing Huang,Feng Xia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出统一序列-图集成框架GraphAge-Seq，通过门控调制机制融合DNA序列统计特征与共甲基化图结构，在血样甲基化数据上实现MAE 3.149年，比最强图基线提升12.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表观遗传时钟方法无法在统一框架中联合建模共甲基化图结构与位点特异性DNA序列上下文，而序列上下文对甲基化调控具有重要影响。

Method: 构建八维DNA序列统计特征（如CpG密度、局部腺嘌呤频率等），通过轻量级门控调制机制自适应缩放每个位点的甲基化信号，再输入图卷积网络进行年龄预测。

Result: 在3,707个血样甲基化样本上，测试MAE为3.149年，比最强图基线提升12.8%；手工设计的序列统计特征优于CNN端到端学习表征。

Conclusion: 手工设计的序列特征在小样本数据体制下比端到端学习更有效；CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率存在与年龄相关的重要性变化，与CpG富集启动子区年龄相关超甲基化机制一致。

Abstract: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science. Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.

</details>


### [1193] [Agent-First Tool API: A Semantic Interface Paradigm for Enterprise AI Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10555)
*Kai Pan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本论文指出现有API（基于CRUD范式）与AI Agent需求之间存在五大架构不匹配，并提出了面向Agent的工具API范式，包含六动词语义协议、标准化工具契约（NTC）和双层治理管线。在85个工具的生产平台上验证，Agent优先API将任务成功率从64%提升至88%，减少72.7%的人工干预，错误恢复能力提升5.8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具接口（API）仍基于人类使用的CRUD范式设计，无法满足AI Agent自主交互的深层需求（如依赖精确ID、返回渲染结果而非结构化数据、单次交互假设等），导致Agent在真实生产环境中任务成功率低、人工干预频繁。

Method: 提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含三个核心机制：(1) 六动词语义协议：search→resolve→preview→execute→verify→recover；(2) 标准化工具契约（NTC）：提供置信度、证据链、建议下一步等结构化决策元数据；(3) 双层治理管线：静态能力策略 + 动态风险升级。该范式作为语义应用层，独立于MCP等传输层协议。

Result: 在85个注册工具、6个业务领域的生产多租户SaaS平台上验证。50个真实运营任务的对比实验：Agent优先API任务成功率88% vs 优化CRUD基线64%（+37.5%），人工干预减少72.7%，自主错误恢复提升5.8倍。

Conclusion: Agent-First Tool API范式有效解决了传统API与Agent之间的架构不匹配问题，显著提升任务成功率、降低人工干预。该范式与MCP等传输协议正交互补，可作为现有工具发现/调用协议之上的语义应用层。

Abstract: As AI agents transition from research prototypes to enterprise production systems, the tool interfaces they consume remain rooted in human-oriented CRUD paradigms. This paper identifies five fundamental architectural mismatches between conventional APIs and autonomous agent requirements: exact-identifier dependence, rendering-oriented responses, single-shot interaction assumptions, user-equivalent authorization, and opaque error semantics. We propose the Agent-First Tool API paradigm, comprising three integrated mechanisms: (1) a Six-Verb Semantic Protocol that decomposes tool interactions into search, resolve, preview, execute, verify, and recover phases; (2) a Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) providing structured decision-support metadata including confidence scores, evidence chains, and suggested next actions; and (3) a dual-layer governance pipeline combining static capability policies with dynamic risk escalation. The paradigm is implemented and validated in a production multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 85 registered tools across 6 business domains. Comparative experiments on 50 real operational tasks demonstrate that Agent-First APIs achieve 88% end-to-end task success rate versus 64% for optimized CRUD baselines (+37.5%), while reducing required human interventions by 72.7% and improving autonomous error recovery by 5.8x. We establish that the paradigm is orthogonal and complementary to transport-layer standards such as MCP, operating as the semantic application layer above existing tool discovery and invocation protocols.

</details>


### [1194] [Deep Arguing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10569)
*Adam Gould,Francesca Toni*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Deep Arguing，一种将深度学习与论证推理相结合的神经符号方法，用于可解释分类。深度神经网络构建论证结构（数据点支持其标签、攻击其他标签），通过可微的论证语义进行端到端训练，从而在保持竞争性能的同时提供基于案例的可解释预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型虽性能强大，但由于参数众多、特征提取与任务目标紧密耦合且缺乏显式推理机制，人类难以理解其预测依据。理解模型学到了什么表征以及为何学到这些表征仍是开放挑战。

Method: 提出Deep Arguing神经符号方法：深度神经网络构建论证图结构，数据点支持其分配标签并攻击不同标签；使用可微的论证语义进行推理；模型端到端联合学习特征表示和论证交互；通过论证图的结构约束指导学习过程。

Result: 在表格数据和图像数据集上的实验表明，Deep Arguing在达到与标准基线相竞争的性能的同时，提供了可解释的论证推理。

Conclusion: Deep Arguing成功将深度学习与论证推理融合，在保持预测性能的同时提供了忠实的基于案例的解释，有望成为可解释AI的重要范式。

Abstract: Deep learning has become the dominant approach for creating high capacity, scalable models across diverse data modalities. However, because these models rely on a large number of learned parameters, tightly couple feature extraction with task objectives, and often lack explicit reasoning mechanisms, it is difficult for humans to understand how they arrive at their predictions. Understanding what representations emerge and why they arise from the training data remains an open challenge. We introduce Deep Arguing, a novel neurosymbolic approach that integrates deep learning with argumentation construction and reasoning for interpretable classification with different data modalities. In our approach deep neural networks construct an argumentation structure wherein data points support their assigned label and attack different ones. Using differentiable argumentation semantics for reasoning, the model is trained end-to-end to jointly learn feature representation and argumentative interactions. This results in argumentation structures providing faithful case-based explanations for predictions. Structure constraints over the argumentation graph guide learning, improving both interpretability and predictive performance. Experiments with tabular and imaging datasets show that Deep Arguing achieves performance competitive with standard baselines whilst offering interpretable argumentative reasoning.

</details>


### [1195] [LLM Jaggedness Unlocks Scientific Creativity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10574)
*Shray Mathur,J. Anibal Boscoboinik,Esther H. R. Tsai,Kevin G. Yager*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了 SciAidanBench 基准来评估大语言模型的科学生成创造力，发现模型的进步呈现"锯齿状"不均匀特征。跨任务、跨问题、跨学科领域都存在能力差异，但通过推理时计算、知识池化和集体讨论等元模型集成方法，可以有效利用这种锯齿状特征来提升整体创造力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI发展，模型进步并非均匀提升，而是在不同任务、领域和规模上呈现"锯齿状"（jagged）特征。现有研究缺乏对这种动态不均匀性的系统测量与利用方法，尤其是在科学创造力这一关键维度上。

Method: 构建 SciAidanBench 基准，包含开放式科学问题；要求模型生成尽可能多的独特且连贯的想法，以有效回答数量衡量创造力；评估19个基础模型（8个提供商，共30个变体），从跨任务、跨问题、跨领域三个层面分析锯齿状特征；探索推理时计算、知识池化、集体讨论三种机制构建元模型集成。

Result: 1）通用创造力与科学创造力提升不统一，模型能力剖面分化明显；2）强模型在同一提示任务上表现出高方差，创造力爆发不均衡；3）模型在不同科学子领域展现出碎片化的能力分布；4）通过元模型集成可以有效超越任何单一模型的表现。

Conclusion: AI进步的锯齿状特征不应被视为局限，而应视为一种结构性资源。理解和利用这种不均匀性，可以通过模型组合放大LLM驱动的科学创造力。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence advances, models are not improving uniformly. Instead, progress unfolds in a jagged fashion, with capabilities growing unevenly across tasks, domains, and model scales. In this work, we examine this dynamic jaggedness through the lens of scientific idea generation. We introduce SciAidanBench, a benchmark of open-ended scientific questions designed to measure the scientific creativity of large language models (LLMs). Given a scientific question, models are asked to generate as many unique and coherent ideas as possible, with the total number of valid responses serving as a proxy for creative potential. Evaluating 19 base models across 8 providers (30 total variants including reasoning versions), we find that jaggedness manifests both across models and within models. First, in a cross-task comparison between general and scientific creativity, improvements in general creativity do not translate uniformly to scientific creativity, revealing divergent capability profiles across models. Second, at the prompt level, stronger models do not improve uniformly; instead, they exhibit high variability, with bursts of creativity on some questions and limited performance on others. Third, at the domain level, individual models display uneven strengths across scientific subfields, reflecting fragmented internal capability profiles. Finally, we show that this jaggedness can be harnessed. We explore mechanisms of inference-time compute, knowledge pooling, and brainstorming to combine models effectively and construct meta-model ensembles that outperform any single model. Our results position jaggedness not as a limitation, but as a resource, a structural feature of AI progress that, when understood and leveraged, can amplify LLM-driven scientific creativity.

</details>


### [1196] [A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10592)
*Vipin Singh,Tianheng Ling,Peter Ghaly,Felix Grimmeisen,Gregor Schiele,Felix Biessmann*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个结合云端和边缘端深度学习预测方法的Web演示系统，用于监测合流制下水道溢流（CSO）的填充动态，帮助在极端降雨事件中提前预警容量超限，并具备网络中断下的弹性运行能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 历史城市的合流制下水道系统在极端降雨事件下面临CSO溢流风险，造成环境和公共健康影响，需要提前预测以采取预防措施。

Method: 开发了基于Web的交互式监控仪表板，集成云端和边缘端的深度学习预测方法，实现溢流监测并对网络中断具有弹性。

Result: 成功构建了可在线访问的演示系统（riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de），并提供了视频展示。

Conclusion: 该工具能够有效预测溢流池填充动态，及时预警容量超限，提升城市排水系统的抗风险能力。

Abstract: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).

</details>


### [1197] [LLARS: Enabling Domain Expert & Developer Collaboration for LLM Prompting, Generation and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10593)
*Philipp Steigerwald,Mara Stieler,Jennifer Burghardt,Eric Rudolph,Jens Albrecht*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LLARS是一个开源平台，通过协作提示工程、批量生成和混合评估三个模块，帮助领域专家和开发者共同构建基于LLM的系统，已在在线咨询领域验证其高效性和易用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缩小领域专家与开发者之间在构建LLM系统时的鸿沟，解决当前缺乏端到端集成平台的问题。

Method: 提出LLARS平台，包含三个核心模块：1）协作提示工程（实时协同、版本控制、即时LLM测试）；2）批量生成（可配置的prompt×模型×数据输出，带成本控制）；3）混合评估（人类与LLM联合评估，提供一致性指标和溯源分析）。三个模块紧密集成，形成端到端流水线。

Result: 通过对六名领域专家和三名开发者在在线咨询领域的访谈，证实LLARS直观易用，通过整合所有功能显著节省时间，并使跨学科协作变得无缝。

Conclusion: LLARS为跨学科团队构建LLM系统提供了有效的集成解决方案，能够提升协作效率和系统构建体验。

Abstract: We demonstrate LLARS (LLM Assisted Research System), an open-source platform that bridges the gap between domain experts and developers for building LLM-based systems. It integrates three tightly connected modules into an end-to-end pipeline: Collaborative Prompt Engineering for real-time co-authoring with version control and instant LLM testing, Batch Generation for configurable output production across user-selected prompts $\times$ models $\times$ data with cost control, and Hybrid Evaluation where human and LLM evaluators jointly assess outputs through diverse assessment methods, with live agreement metrics and provenance analysis to identify the best model-prompt combination for a given use case. New prompts and models are automatically available for batch generation and completed batches can be turned into evaluation scenarios with a single click. Interviews with six domain experts and three developers in online counselling confirmed that LLARS feels intuitive, saves considerable time by keeping everything in one place and makes interdisciplinary collaboration seamless.

</details>


### [1198] [Budget-Efficient Automatic Algorithm Design via Code Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10598)
*Maxime Bouscary,Manxi Wu,Saurabh Amin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于有向无环图（DAG）的LLM自动算法设计框架，通过逐块修正（而非完整算法生成）提升搜索效率，并在组合优化任务上验证其优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的自动算法设计效率低下：以完整算法为粒度，重复生成冗余子结构，且丢弃低适应度候选方案中可能包含的有价值特征。

Method: 将算法表示为有向无环图，LLM输出紧凑的修正算子（添加/替换/删除代码块），每次修正增强图结构，实现修正级别的信用分配，并理论分析不同预算下搜索深度与宽度的最优平衡。

Result: 在三个组合优化问题上，基于图的搜索在同等token预算下始终优于完整算法搜索。实验还发现丰富上下文仅在LLM先验知识较浅时有益，否则可能适得其反。

Conclusion: 图结构分解与修正级信用分配能显著提升预算约束下LLM自动算法设计的效率，且提示词设计需根据模型先验知识水平调整。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for automatic algorithm design (AAD). However, existing pipelines remain inefficient. They operate at the granularity of full algorithms, redundantly rewriting recurring substructures and discarding low-fitness candidates that may contain valuable algorithmic features. We formalize budget-efficient automatic algorithm design, wherein the search policy maximizes realized fitness subject to limited computational cost. We propose a directed acyclic graph representation of algorithms and build a search framework that fully exploits the LLM's output. Instead of querying the LLM for full algorithms, we use it to obtain corrections: compact operators that add, replace, or remove code blocks. Each correction augments the graph, yielding new algorithms that compose with prior corrections. This graph structure decomposes algorithms into sets of corrections, enabling correction-level credit assignment that informs subsequent queries. We complement this framework with theoretical insights into the ideal balance between search depth and breadth at different budget levels. We validate our method empirically on three combinatorial optimization problems, demonstrating consistent superiority of our graph-based search over full-algorithm search at equal token budget. Finally, our experiments suggest that rich contexts help only when the LLM's prior knowledge is shallow, and can hinder performance otherwise.

</details>


### [1199] [The Open-Box Fallacy: Why AI Deployment Needs a Calibrated Verification Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10601)
*Phongsakon Mark Konrad,Tim Lukas Adam,Ane Cathrine Holst Merrild,Riccardo Terrenzi,Rebecca De Rosa,Toygar Tanyel,Serkan Ayvaz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文批判了将机械可解释性作为AI部署前提的做法，主张以可校准验证（Verification Coverage）作为关键指标，通过领域限定、独立可查、发布后监控、可问责、可抗辩、可撤销的六要素标准来替代机械可解释性要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI部署监管过度依赖机械可解释性，但这既超出其适用范围，也无法解决模型能力在相近任务间分布不均、以及理解不等于可控这两个核心问题。作者旨在提出更务实、可操作的验证标准来替代可解释性作为部署闸门。

Method: 通过对比分析：（1）模型能力在不同任务间的不均匀分布；（2）社会对不透明专业知识的传统治理方式（证书、监控、责任、上诉与撤销）；（3）两项实证证据（内部表示与输出修正间53%的差距；仅9.0%的FDA审批AI设备包含前瞻性上市后监测）。提出Verification Coverage作为六维度可报告标准，并制定最小组成规则。

Result: 发现机械理解与实际行动之间存在53个百分点的鸿沟；仅9.0%的FDA批准AI/ML医疗器械文档包含前瞻性上市后监测研究。据此论证验证覆盖比可解释性更适合作为部署授权指标。

Conclusion: 提出Verification Coverage标准（领域限定、独立可查、发布后监控、可问责、可抗辩、可撤销），作为与能力评分并列出现在模型卡片、排行榜和监管披露中的关键指标。部署授权应依附于具体用途而非通用模型，且应基于可校准验证而非机械可解释性。

Abstract: AI deployment in sensitive domains such as health care, credit, employment, and criminal justice is often treated as unsafe to authorize until model internals can be explained. This often leads to an excessive reliance on mechanistic interpretability to address a deployment challenge beyond its intended scope. We argue that the gate should instead be calibrated verification: authorization should be domain-scoped, independently checkable, monitored after release, accountable, contestable, and revocable. The reason is twofold. First, model capability is uneven across nearby tasks, so authorization must attach to a specific use rather than to a model in general. Second, societies have long governed opaque expertise through credentials, monitoring, liability, appeal, and revocation rather than mechanism-level explanation. Recent evidence reinforces this distinction between mechanistic understanding and deployment authority: a 53-percentage-point gap between internal representations and output correction shows that understanding may not translate into action, while one scoping review found that only 9.0% of FDA-approved AI/ML device documents contained a prospective post-market surveillance study. We propose Verification Coverage, a six-component reportable standard with a minimum-composition rule, as the metric that should sit beside capability scores in model cards, leaderboards, and regulatory disclosures.

</details>


### [1200] [PRISM: Generation-Time Detection and Mitigation of Secret Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10614)
*Riya Tapwal,Abhishek Kumar,Carsten Maple*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PRISM，一种针对多智能体LLM系统中凭证泄露问题的实时防御方法。PRISM通过结合16种信号（词汇、结构、信息论、行为、上下文特征）在解码阶段逐token进行风险评分，实现三档（绿/黄/红）干预。在2000任务的对抗基准上，F1=0.832，精确率100%，泄露率0.0%，优于最强基线（Span Tagger F1=0.719，泄露率15.0%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统中存在一种安全风险：敏感信息被一个智能体访问后，会通过共享上下文传播到下游输出，即"传播放大"现象。现有防御（提示工程、静态匹配、LLM-as-judge）要么后验处理，要么依赖表面模式，要么延迟高，无法有效解决该问题。

Method: 提出PRISM实时防御框架：(1) 将凭证泄露建模为序列风险累积问题；(2) 每步解码时，结合16个信号（词汇、结构、信息论、行为、上下文）生成校准风险分；(3) 设置绿/黄/红三档干预机制；(4) 核心发现：凭证泄露前通常伴随熵坍塌和对数几率集中等生成动态变化，结合文本结构线索可提前预警。

Result: 在2000任务对抗基准（13攻击类别、3压力等级、4智能体流水线）上：F1=0.832，精确率=1.000，召回率=0.712，任务级泄露率=0.0%，输出效用=0.893。显著优于Span Tagger（F1=0.719，泄露率15.0%）。

Conclusion: PRISM通过实时、细粒度的token级风险建模，有效解决了多智能体系统中的传播放大问题，实现了零泄露与高输出效用的平衡，为多智能体LLM安全提供了一种可行的防御范式。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems introduce a security risk in which sensitive information accessed by one agent can propagate through shared context and reappear in downstream outputs, even without explicit adversarial intent. We formalise this phenomenon as propagation amplification, where leakage risk increases across agent boundaries as sensitive content is repeatedly exposed to downstream generators. Existing defences, including prompt-based safeguards, static pattern matching, and LLM-as-judge filtering, are not designed for this setting: they either operate after generation, rely primarily on surface-form patterns, or add substantial latency without modelling the generation process itself. To resolve these issues, we propose PRISM, a real-time defence that treats credential leakage as a sequential risk accumulation problem during generation. At each decoding step, PRISM combines 16 signals spanning lexical, structural, information-theoretic, behavioural, and contextual features into a calibrated risk score, enabling per-token intervention through green, yellow, and red risk zones. Our central observation is that credential reproduction is often preceded by a measurable shift in generation dynamics, characterised by entropy collapse and increasing logit concentration. When combined with text-structural cues such as identifier-pattern detection, these temporal signals provide an early warning of leakage before a secret is fully reconstructed. Across a 2,000-task adversarial benchmark covering 13 attack categories and three pressure levels in a heterogeneous four-agent pipeline, PRISM achieves F1 = 0.832 with precision = 1.000 and recall = 0.712, while producing no observed leakage on our benchmark (0.0% task-level leak rate) and preserving output utility of 0.893. It substantially outperforms the strongest baseline, Span Tagger, which achieves F1 = 0.719 with a 15.0% task-level leak rate.

</details>


### [1201] [Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10624)
*Ramesh Arvind Naagarajan,Zühal Wagner,Stefan Streif*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出层次化因果溯因（HCA）框架，融合物理知识图谱、KKT乘子优化证据和PCMCI时序因果发现，为非线性模型预测控制（MPC）生成可解释的决策说明。在温室气候、建筑暖通、化工过程三个领域验证，HCA比LIME准确率提升53%，且无需领域调参。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性MPC因复杂动力学、硬约束和数值优化导致控制决策不透明，损害操作员信任，阻碍实际部署。

Method: HCA结合三种证据源：领域知识图谱进行物理推理、KKT乘子提取优化证据、PCMCI算法进行时序因果发现，通过排序与验证策略生成忠实可解释的说明。

Result: 在三个控制领域，HCA解释准确率0.478，比LIME（0.311）提升53%；经2-3天KKT阈值校准后准确率达0.88；消融实验表明任一证据源缺失会导致32-37%准确率下降。

Conclusion: HCA框架有效提升了非线性MPC的可解释性，其排序-验证方法论可推广至其他基于预测的决策系统。

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

</details>


### [1202] [Teacher-Aware Evolution of Heuristic Programs from Learned Optimization Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10634)
*Minyu Chen,Song Qin,Ling-I Wu,Jianxin Xue,Guoqiang Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种教师感知的进化框架，通过独立训练的学习优化策略作为行为教师，为候选启发式程序提供局部反馈信号，从而在组合优化问题中发现更优的可执行静态启发式算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计主要依赖延迟的最终性能反馈，缺乏中间过程的引导信号，导致搜索效率低下。

Method: 使用独立训练的优化策略（学习型优化器）作为行为教师，在候选启发式程序访问的状态上查询教师的动作偏好，将其作为局部反馈信号纳入进化搜索过程，同时考虑任务性能和教师行为信号。

Result: 在调度、路由和图优化基准测试上，该方法优于纯性能驱动的LLM启发式进化基线，且部署时无需神经网络推理。

Conclusion: 学习优化策略可以被重新用作行为反馈源，用于自动启发式发现，为结合学习型优化与进化搜索提供了新范式。

Abstract: LLM-based automatic heuristic design has shown promise for generating executable heuristics for combinatorial optimization, but existing methods mainly rely on delayed endpoint performance. We propose a \emph{teacher-aware evolutionary framework} that uses independently trained learned optimization policies as behavioral teachers. Instead of deploying or imitating the teacher, our method queries it on states visited by candidate heuristic programs and uses its action preferences as local feedback for evolution. The resulting search discovers static executable heuristics guided by both task performance and teacher-derived behavioral signals. Experiments on scheduling, routing, and graph optimization benchmarks show that our method improves over performance-driven LLM heuristic evolution baselines while requiring no neural inference at deployment. These results suggest that learned optimization policies can be repurposed as behavioral feedback sources for automatic heuristic discovery.

</details>


### [1203] [Navigating the Sea of LLM Evaluation: Investigating Bias in Toxicity Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10639)
*Regina Gugg,Selina Niederländer,Andreas Stöckl,Martin Flechl*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了LLM毒性基准测试中的评估偏差问题，发现任务类型（从文本补全转为摘要）、输入数据域变化以及模型选择均会导致基准测试结果不稳定，揭示当前安全评估框架缺乏鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在业界和学术界被广泛采用，但缺乏对毒性基准测试的系统性评估。组织依赖这些基准来认证模型，若存在未识别的评估偏差，可能导致部署脆弱或不安全的系统。

Method: 通过实验探究评估设置变化（任务类型、指标、数据域、模型选择）对基准测试行为的影响，分析被忽略的内在偏差。

Result: 1) 将任务从文本补全改为摘要时，基准更倾向标记内容为有害；2) 输入数据域变化时某些基准无法保持行为一致；3) 观察到模型特定的不稳定性。

Conclusion: 现有安全评估框架不够鲁棒，需要更全面、更稳健的评估体系来确保LLM部署的安全性。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of LLMs in both research and industry highlights the challenges of deploying them safely and reveals a gap in the systematic evaluation of toxicity benchmarks. As organizations increasingly rely on these benchmarks to certify models for customer-facing applications and automated moderation, unrecognized evaluation biases could lead to the deployment of vulnerable or unsafe systems. This work investigates the robustness of established benchmarking setups and examines how to measure currently neglected intrinsic biases, such as those related to model choice, metrics, and task types. Our experiments uncover significant discrepancies in benchmark behaviors when evaluation setups are altered. Specifically, shifting the task from text completion to summarization increases the tendency of benchmarks to flag content as harmful. Additionally, certain benchmarks fail to maintain consistent behavior when the input data domain is changed. Furthermore, we observe model-specific instabilities, demonstrating a clear need for more robust and comprehensive safety evaluation frameworks.

</details>


### [1204] [diffGHOST: Diffusion based Generative Hedged Oblivious Synthetic Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10647)
*Florent Guépin,Cheick Tidiani Cisse,Denis Renaud,François Bidet,Arnaud Legendre*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出diffGHOST，一种基于潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型，用于在合成移动轨迹时平衡隐私保护和数据效用，通过识别和缓解关键样本的记忆化问题来提供隐私保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹合成模型依赖生成模型的隐式隐私假说，无法在保护隐私的同时保持轨迹数据的实用性，亟需一种能提供明确隐私保证的方法。

Method: 提出diffGHOST条件扩散模型，基于潜在空间分割技术，通过条件分段识别并缓解关键样本的记忆化问题，在潜在空间中进行隐私保护。

Result: 在隐私保护与轨迹数据效用之间取得了更好的平衡，有效缓解了生成模型对敏感样本的记忆化问题。

Conclusion: diffGHOST通过潜在空间分割的条件扩散机制，为轨迹合成提供了可证明的隐私保障，优于依赖隐式隐私的传统生成模型。

Abstract: Trajectories are nowadays valuable information for a wide range of applications. However they are also inherently sensitive, as they contain highly personal information about individuals. Facing this challenge, synthesizing mobility trajectories has emerged as a promising solution to leverage mobility information while preserving privacy. State-of-the-art models, often rely on the false assumptions of generative models implicit privacy and fails to provide privacy guarantees while preserving trajectories utility. Here, we introduce diffGHOST, a conditional diffusion model based on latent space segmentation, designed to answer this challenge. Thus, this paper propose a methodology that identify and mitigate memorization of critical samples using condition segments of a learn latent space.

</details>


### [1205] [Evolving-RL: End-to-End Optimization of Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Capability within Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10663)
*Zhiyuan Fan,Wenwei Jin,Feng Zhang,Bin Li,Yihong Dong,Yao Hu,Jiawei Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Evolving-RL框架，通过联合优化经验提取和利用能力，提升大语言模型的自我进化效果，在ALFWorld和Mind2Web任务上显著超越基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自我进化智能体研究多关注系统级设计（如经验表示与管理），忽略了底层模型自身的能力；部分工作虽用强化学习优化经验利用阶段，但未将自我进化视为一个需要联合优化的统一过程。

Method: 提出Evolving-RL框架，以经验提取和评估为核心，利用评估产生的两个监督信号分别优化提取器（extractor）和解算器（solver），实现两者的协同共进化。

Result: 在ALFWorld上相比GRPO基线在未见任务上提升高达98.7%，在Mind2Web上提升35.8%；在有无测试时经验积累的场景下均优于标准基线。

Conclusion: 经验提取与利用的协同共进化是充分释放自我进化能力的关键；Evolving-RL本质上是一种经验增强的强化学习算法，可将可复用经验模式内化到模型参数中。

Abstract: Experience-driven self-evolving agents aim to overcome the static nature of large language models by distilling reusable experience from past interactions, thus enabling adaptation to novel tasks at deployment time. This process places substantial demands on the foundation model's capacities for abstraction, generalization, and in-context learning. However, most existing studies focus primarily on system-level design choices, such as how experience is represented and managed, neglecting the inherent capabilities of the underlying model. While some recent works have started to optimize the experience utilization stage via reinforcement learning, they still fail to treat self-evolution as a unified process to be jointly optimized. To this end, we propose Evolving-RL, an efficient algorithmic framework that jointly improves the experience extraction and utilization capabilities required for self-evolution. Specifically, we center the learning process on experience extraction and evaluation, using the two supervisory signals derived from evaluation to optimize the extractor and solver separately and thus enable their coordinated co-evolution. Experiments on ALFWorld and Mind2Web show that Evolving-RL effectively enhances LLMs' ability to extract and reuse experience, leading to strong performance gains on out-of-distribution tasks (up to 98.7% relative improvement over the GRPO baseline on ALFWorld unseen tasks and 35.8% on Mind2Web), and these gains are fully unlocked only through the coordinated co-evolution of experience extraction and utilization. Furthermore, Evolving-RL inherently functions as an experience-augmented RL algorithm. By internalizing reusable experience patterns directly into model parameters, it achieves remarkable performance gains over standard baselines on both seen and unseen tasks, even in the absence of test-time experience accumulation.

</details>


### [1206] [GESR: A Genetic Programming-Based Symbolic Regression Method with Gene Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10685)
*Yanjie Li,Liping Zhang,Min Wu,Weijun Li,Lina Yu,Jingyi Liu,Yusong Deng,Mingzhu Wan,Xin Ning*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于基因编辑的符号回归方法GESR，通过两个BERT模型分别指导遗传编程中的基因变异和交叉操作，显著提升了计算效率和整体性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统遗传编程（GP）的变异和交叉操作是完全随机的，虽然模拟了自然进化，但会产生大量无效变异，效率低下。作者希望引入一种"上帝之手"来预判哪些基因编辑能产生更好结果，从而提升进化效率。

Method: 提出了GESR方法，训练了两个BERT模型分别充当"上帝之手"：第一个利用BERT的掩码语言建模能力指导基因（表达式符号）的变异；第二个通过预测交叉点来指导个体基因的交叉操作。

Result: 实验结果表明，GESR相比传统GP算法显著提高了计算效率，在多个符号回归任务上取得了强大的整体性能。

Conclusion: 基于基因编辑思想的GESR方法有效解决了传统GP随机性带来的效率问题，为符号回归任务提供了一种更高效的新范式。

Abstract: Mathematical formulas serve as a language through which humans communicate with nature. Discovering mathematical laws from scientific data to describe natural phenomena has been a long-standing pursuit of humanity for centuries. In the field of artificial intelligence, this challenge is known as the symbolic regression problem. Among existing symbolic regression approaches, Genetic Programming (GP) based on evolutionary algorithms remains one of the most classical and widely adopted methods. GP simulates the evolutionary process across generations through genetic mutation and crossover. However, mutations and crossovers in GP are entirely random. While this randomness effectively mimics natural evolution, it inevitably produces both beneficial and detrimental variations. If there existed a metaphorical `God` capable of foreseeing which genetic mutations or crossovers would yield superior outcomes and performing targeted gene editing accordingly, the efficiency of evolution could be substantially improved. Motivated by this idea, we propose in this paper a symbolic regression approach based on gene editing, termed GESR. In GESR, we trained two "hands of God" (two BERT models). Among them, the first leverages the BERT's masked language modeling capability to guide the mutation of genes (expression symbols). The other BERT model guides the crossover of individual genes by predicting the crossover point. Experimental results demonstrate that GESR significantly improves computational efficiency compared with traditional GP algorithms and achieves strong overall performance across multiple symbolic regression tasks.

</details>


### [1207] [The Agent Use of Agent Beings: Agent Cybernetics Is the Missing Science of Foundation Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10754)
*Xinrun Wang,Chang Yang,He Zhao,Zhuoyi Lin,Shuyue Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"智能体控制论"框架，将经典控制论的六条定律映射到智能体设计原则，为基于LLM的智能体提供理论支撑，涵盖可靠性、持续运行和自我改进三大工程需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的智能体领域工程驱动为主，缺乏第一性原理指导。关键问题如长时间运行的智能体如何保持专注、环境超出表征能力时如何应对、安全自我改进需要何种架构等尚未解决。

Method: 将经典控制论的六条定律映射为六条智能体设计原则，再综合为可靠性、持续运行、自我改进三大工程需求，形成"智能体控制论"框架，并在代码生成、计算机使用和自动化研究三个领域进行分析验证。

Result: 通过控制论框架识别了现有智能体系统在三个应用领域的失败模式，并给出了具体的工程建议。

Conclusion: 智能体控制论为基于LLM的智能体提供了理论科学基础，有望推动其从工程试错走向原则性、可靠的现实部署。

Abstract: LLM-based foundation agents that perceive, reason, and act across thousands of reasoning steps are rapidly becoming the dominant paradigm for deploying artificial intelligence in open-ended, long-horizon complex tasks. Despite this significance, the field remains overwhelmingly engineering-driven. Engineering practice has converged on useful primitives (tool loops, memory banks, harnesses, reflection steps), yet these are assembled by empirical trial and error rather than from first principles. Fundamental questions remain open: under what conditions does a long-running agent remain on-task? How should an agent respond when its environment exceeds its representational capacity? What architectural properties are necessary for safe self-improvement? We argue that cybernetics, the mid-twentieth-century science of control and communication in complex systems, provides the missing theoretical scaffold for foundation agents. By mapping six canonical laws of classical cybernetics onto six agent design principles, and synthesizing those principles into three engineering desiderata (reliability, lifelong running, and self-Improvement), we arrive at a framework termed Agent Cybernetics. Three application domains, code generation, computer use and automated research, exemplify the analytical framework of agent cybernetics by identifying failure modes and concrete engineering recommendations. We hope that agent cybernetics opens a new research venue and establishes the scientific foundation that foundation agents need for principled, reliable real-world deployment.

</details>


### [1208] [MATRA: Modeling the Attack Surface of Agentic AI Systems -- OpenClaw Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10763)
*Tim Van hamme,Thomas Vissers,Javier Carnerero-Cano,Mario Fritz,Emil C. Lupu,Lieven Desmet,Dinil Mon Divakaran*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MATRA是一个针对自主AI代理系统的威胁建模框架，通过资产影响评估和攻击树分析，量化架构控制（如网络沙箱和最小权限）对降低风险的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM被部署为具备工具和数据库访问权限的自主代理时，从业者缺乏系统方法来评估已知威胁在具体部署场景中的实际风险。

Method: 基于资产的影响评估 + 攻击树分析，将已知LLM威胁映射到具体部署风险，并量化架构控制措施的风险降低效果。

Result: 在OpenClaw个人AI代理部署上验证了框架，量化了网络沙箱和最小权限访问等控制如何通过限制注入攻击的爆炸半径来降低风险。

Conclusion: MATRA提供了一种实用的威胁建模方法，帮助从业者系统评估和缓解自主AI系统中的安全风险。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents with access to tools, databases, and external services, yet practitioners (across different sectors) lack systematic methods to assess how known threat classes translate into concrete risks within a specific agentic deployment. We present MATRA, a pragmatic threat modeling framework for agentic AI systems that adapts established risk assessment methodology to systematically assess how known LLM threats translate into deployment-specific risks. MATRA begins with an asset-based impact assessment and utilizes attack trees to determine the likelihood of these impacts occurring within the system architecture. We demonstrate MATRA on a personal AI agent deployment using OpenClaw, quantifying how architectural controls such as network sandboxing and least-privilege access reduce risk by limiting the blast radius of successful injections.

</details>


### [1209] [TrajPrism: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Language-Grounded Urban Trajectory Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10782)
*Lihuan Li,Wilson Wongso,Baiyu Chen,Hao Xue,Ruiyi Yang,Yifan Duan,Xiachong Lin,Yang Song,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出TrajPrism，一个多任务基准测试，用于评估语言与轨迹之间的对齐，涵盖指令条件轨迹生成、语义轨迹检索和轨迹描述三个任务，包含30万条轨迹和210万个任务实例。同时开发了三个概念验证模型（TrajAnchor、TrajFuse、TrajRap），实验表明仅依赖几何信息的基线方法在语言-轨迹对齐任务上表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究很少在同一真实轨迹上同时评估轨迹的几何表示和自然语言描述，轨迹建模多关注几何信息，而语言为中心的移动基准多关注路线规划和工具使用，缺乏对文本与底层路线之间细粒度、可验证的对齐评估。

Method: 构建了一个多任务基准TrajPrism，包含三个任务：(i) 指令条件轨迹生成、(ii) 语言驱动的语义轨迹检索、(iii) 轨迹描述。使用四维出行意图分类法对真实城市轨迹进行标注，经过judge筛选过滤，覆盖波尔图、旧金山和北京三个城市30万条轨迹，共产生210万个任务实例。同时开发了三个概念验证模型：TrajAnchor（轨迹生成）、TrajFuse（语义检索）和TrajRap（轨迹描述）。

Result: 构建了30万条轨迹、210万任务实例的多城市基准；概念验证模型实例化了提出的任务；实验表明仅依赖几何信息的轨迹基线在语言-轨迹对齐协议（尤其是语言作为输入输出接口时）上存在较大差距。

Conclusion: 释放了包含代码和可重现标注管道的TrajPrism基准，该管道设计为跨城市可移植，只需兼容的轨迹输入和地图资源即可推广到其他城市。

Abstract: Urban mobility is naturally expressed both as trajectories in space and as natural-language descriptions of travel intent, constraints, and preferences. However, prior work rarely evaluates these two modalities together on the same real-world trajectories: trajectory modeling often stays geometry-centric, while language-centric mobility benchmarks frequently target route planning and tool use rather than fine-grained, verifiable alignment between text and the underlying route. We introduce TrajPrism, a multi-task benchmark for language-trajectory alignment that unifies (i) instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, (ii) language-driven semantic trajectory retrieval, and (iii) trajectory captioning, together with an evaluation protocol that measures trajectory fidelity, retrieval quality, and language groundedness. We construct TrajPrism by pairing real urban trajectories with judge-filtered language annotations generated under a four-dimensional travel-intent taxonomy. The benchmark contains 300K selected trajectories across Porto, San Francisco, and Beijing, yielding 2.1M task instances from three instruction variants, three retrieval queries, and one caption per trajectory. We further develop proof-of-concept models for each task: TrajAnchor for instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, TrajFuse for semantic trajectory retrieval, and TrajRap for trajectory captioning. These models instantiate the proposed tasks and show that geometry-only trajectory baselines leave a large gap on our protocol, especially where language is part of the input-output interface. We release TrajPrism with code and a reproducible annotation pipeline that is designed to be portable across cities, given compatible trajectory inputs and map resources.

</details>


### [1210] [ComplexMCP: Evaluation of LLM Agents in Dynamic, Interdependent, and Large-Scale Tool Sandbox](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10787)
*Yuanyang Li,Xue Yang,Longyue Wang,Weihua Luo,Hongyang Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了ComplexMCP基准，用于评估LLM Agent在复杂商业软件自动化中的表现。该基准包含300多个基于MCP协议的工具、7个有状态沙箱，采用种子驱动架构模拟动态环境。测试发现顶级模型成功率不足60%，远低于人类的90%，并识别三大瓶颈：工具检索饱和、过度自信和战略失败主义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM Agent擅长调用独立API，但在真实的商业软件自动化场景中表现不佳。真实环境中的工具具有原子性、相互依赖且易受噪声干扰，现有基准无法充分评估Agent在这些条件下的能力。

Method: 基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)构建ComplexMCP基准，包含7个有状态沙箱（覆盖办公套件到金融系统）和300多个经过精心测试的工具。采用种子驱动架构模拟动态环境状态和不可预测的API故障，确保评估的确定性和多样性。

Result: 顶级模型成功率不超过60%，远低于人类的90%。通过细粒度轨迹分析发现三个关键瓶颈：(1) 工具检索饱和——动作空间扩大时检索能力不足；(2) 过度自信——Agent跳过必要的环境验证；(3) 战略失败主义——Agent倾向于合理化失败而非尝试恢复。

Conclusion: 当前Agent在相互依赖的工作流中表现不足，ComplexMCP可作为评估下一代弹性自主系统的关键测试平台。

Abstract: Current LLM agents are proficient at calling isolated APIs but struggle with the "last mile" of commercial software automation. In real-world scenarios, tools are not independent; they are atomic, interdependent, and prone to environmental noise. We introduce $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$, a benchmark designed to evaluate agents in these rigorous conditions. Built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ provides over 300 meticulously tested tools derived from 7 stateful sandboxes, ranging from office suites to financial systems. Unlike existing datasets, our benchmark utilizes a seed-driven architecture to simulate dynamic environment states and unpredictable API failures, ensuring a deterministic yet diverse evaluation.
  We evaluate various LLMs across full-context and RAG paradigms, revealing a stark performance gap: even top-tier models fail to exceed a 60% success rate, far trailing human performance 90%. Granular trajectory analysis identifies three fundamental bottlenecks: (1) $\textbf{tool retrieval saturation}$ as action spaces scale; (2) $\textbf{over-confidence}$, where agents skip essential environment verifications; and (3) $\textbf{strategic defeatism}$, a tendency to rationalize failure rather than pursuing recovery. These findings underscore the insufficiency of current agents for interdependent workflows, positioning $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ as a critical testbed for the next generation of resilient autonomous systems.

</details>


### [1211] [PathISE: Learning Informative Path Supervision for Knowledge Graph Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10791)
*Shengxiang Gao,Chao Lei,Jey Han Lau,Jianzhong Qi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PathISE 提出了一种从答案标签中学习高质量中间监督信号（关系路径）的方法，用于 KGQA 任务，无需昂贵的人工标注或大模型精炼，在多个基准上取得了竞争性或最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的 KGQA 方法需要高质量的中间监督信号（如路径或子图）来训练检索模型，但这些信号的获取耗时耗力。作者希望从答案标签中自动学习这些监督信号，从而降低对人工或昂贵资源的依赖。

Method: PathISE 包含两部分：1）一个轻量级 Transformer 估计器，用于估计关系路径的信息量，构建伪路径级监督；2）将这些监督信号蒸馏到一个 LLM 路径生成器中，生成的路径被用于在 KG 上提供紧凑证据，进行归纳答案推理。

Result: 在三个 KGQA 基准上，PathISE 取得了具有竞争力或最优的性能，并且其生成的监督信号可以复用于增强现有 KGQA 模型，无需昂贵的 LLM 精炼。

Conclusion: PathISE 证明了从答案标签中自动学习中间路径监督是可行的，既高效又有效，为 KGQA 任务提供了一种低成本、可迁移的解决方案。

Abstract: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) aims to answer user questions by reasoning over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Recent KGQA methods mainly follow the retrieval-augmented generation paradigm to ground Large Language Models~(LLMs) with structured knowledge from KGs. However, training effective models to retrieve question-relevant evidence from KGs typically requires high-quality intermediate supervision signals, such as question-relevant paths or subgraphs, which are time- and resource-intensive to obtain. We propose PathISE, a novel framework for learning high-quality intermediate supervision from answer-level labels. PathISE introduces a lightweight transformer-based estimator that estimates the informativeness of relation paths to construct pseudo path-level supervision. This supervision is then distilled into an LLM path generator, whose generated paths are grounded in the KG to provide compact evidence for inductive answer reasoning. ExtensiveISE experiments on three KGQA benchmarks show that PathISE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art KGQA performance, and provides reusable supervision signals that can enhance existing KGQA models, without relying on costly LLM-refined supervision signals. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87.

</details>
